- `EVENT_DYINGFETUS_QUES`: "{catname} finds a dying fetus, quivering in fright and pain."
- `EVENT_COMFORT_ANSW`: "Comfort"
- `EVENT_DYINGFETUS_REW1`: "Showing pity for the small thing, {catname} comforts it. <br/>  <br/> The fetus is pleased and joins the cats!"
- `EVENT_DYINGFETUS_REW2`: "{catname}'s affection calms the fetus and it rests peacefully. Karma up!"
- `EVENT_DYINGFETUS_REW3`: "The fetus rejects {catname}'s attempts at comforting it, getting angry instead! <br/>  <br/> It attacks!"
- `EVENT_DYINGFETUS_REW4`: "{catname} tries to comfort the fetus, but it bites {him}! <br/>  <br/> {catname}'s mouth deforms into a strange shape..."
- `EVENT_PATCHUP_ANSW`: "Patch up"
- `EVENT_DYINGFETUS_REW5`: "{catname} deftly patches up the fetus, saving its life! <br/>  <br/> It is grateful and joins in for the next battle!"
- `EVENT_DYINGFETUS_REW6`: "As {catname} patches the fetus's wounds, it looks up gratefully at {him}. <br/>  <br/> The fetus joins {catname} on the adventure!"
- `EVENT_DYINGFETUS_REW7`: "{catname} tries to mend the fetus's wounds, but it thinks {he} is attacking and desperately swings at {catname}!"
- `EVENT_DYINGFETUS_REW8`: "Not used to this kind of pressure, {catname} fumbles and accidentally stabs {himself}!"
- `EVENT_PUTOUTOFMISERY_ANSW`: "Put it out of its misery"
- `EVENT_DYINGFETUS_REW9`: "{catname} crushes the fetus's skull. It dies."
- `EVENT_DYINGFETUS_REW10`: "{catname} squishes the fetus and its guts spill out!"
- `EVENT_DYINGFETUS_REW11`: "{catname} crushes the small fetus, killing it instantly."
- `EVENT_DYINGFETUS_REW12`: "{catname} hears a loud thumping and sliding sound and looks up in horror! <br/>  <br/> The fetus's mom is coming, and it looks angry!"

```
DyingFetus {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_DYINGFETUS_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame dying_fetus
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_DYINGFETUS_QUES"

        options {
            comfort {
                label "EVENT_COMFORT_ANSW"
                stat cha

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_DYINGFETUS_REW1"
                            gain_familiar CharmedFetus
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_DYINGFETUS_REW2"
                            permanent_stats {
                                lck 1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 4
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_DYINGFETUS_REW3"
                            spawn_unit_next_fight {
                                object Fetus
                                count 1
                                spawn_side cats
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_DYINGFETUS_REW4"
                            mutation {
                                mouth 705
                            }
                            permanent_stats {
                                dex -1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            patch_up {
                label "EVENT_PATCHUP_ANSW"
                stat int

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_DYINGFETUS_REW5"
                            gain_familiar CharmedFetus                            
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_DYINGFETUS_REW6"
                            gain_familiar CharmedFetus2
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 4
                            prompt "EVENT_DYINGFETUS_REW7"
                            spawn_unit_next_fight {
                                object Fetus
                                count 1
                                spawn_side cats
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 5
                            prompt "EVENT_DYINGFETUS_REW8" 
                            permanent_stats {
                                con -1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            put_out_of_misery {
                label "EVENT_PUTOUTOFMISERY_ANSW"
                stat str

                good {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_DYINGFETUS_REW9"
                            //nothing
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_DYINGFETUS_REW10"
                            get_item_from_pool [GutsHeart GutsLiver GutsIntestines]
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 3
                            prompt "EVENT_DYINGFETUS_REW11"
                            //nothing
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 6
                            prompt "EVENT_DYINGFETUS_REW12" 
                            spawn_unit_next_fight {
                                object MegaFetus
                                count 1
                                spawn_side enemies
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `StuckCorpse`
**Source:** `caves_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_STUCKCORPSE_NAME`: "Stuck Corpse"
- `EVENT_STUCKCORPSE_QUES`: "The legs of a deceased human are sticking out of the ground. <br/>  <br/> [i]What a terrible way to go, stuck in a hole like that![/i] thinks {catname}."
- `EVENT_LOOT_ANSW`: "Loot"
- `EVENT_STUCKCORPSE_REW1`: "{catname} manages to pull some coins out of the corpse's pockets."
- `EVENT_STUCKCORPSE_REW2`: "{catname} searches in and around the hole and finds some gear left behind by the unlucky miner."
- `EVENT_STUCKCORPSE_REW3`: "Spiders from inside the hole crawl out when {catname} approaches! <br/>  <br/> They bite {him} and spew sticky webs everywhere!"
- `EVENT_STUCKCORPSE_REW4`: "{catname} digs into the hole looking for treasure, and a swarm of spiders fly out!"
- `EVENT_REMOVE_ANSW`: "Remove"
- `EVENT_STUCKCORPSE_REW5`: "{catname} pulls the corpse out, disassembling it one bone at a time."
- `EVENT_STUCKCORPSE_REW6`: "As {catname} pulls the corpse out, {he} discovers that it was holding something!"
- `EVENT_STUCKCORPSE_REW7`: "This corpse looks like Butch?? <br/>  <br/> A chill goes down {catname}'s spine... <br/>  <br/> [i]How could this be?[/i]"
- `EVENT_STUCKCORPSE_REW8`: "{catname} pulls the corpse out of the hole. <br/>  <br/> Looking at the hole now that it is unclogged, it appears to have an odd shape..."

```
StuckCorpse {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_STUCKCORPSE_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame stuck_corpse
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_STUCKCORPSE_QUES"

        options {
            loot {
                label "EVENT_LOOT_ANSW"
                stat lck
                animation choice_dex_alt

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_STUCKCORPSE_REW1"
                            gain_coins [4 8]
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_STUCKCORPSE_REW2"
                            get_item_from_pool [MinerHat, MinerMask, MinerArmor]
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_STUCKCORPSE_REW3"
                            damage [3 6]
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Webbed 2
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_STUCKCORPSE_REW4" 
                            spawn_unit_next_fight {
                                object [TinySpider]
                                count 5
                                spawn_side cats
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            remove {
                label "EVENT_REMOVE_ANSW"
                stat str

                good {
                    set_frame 5
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_STUCKCORPSE_REW5"
                            get_item_from_pool bone_equipment
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_STUCKCORPSE_REW6"
                            get_item_from_pool chapter_rare
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {  
                            set_frame 5
                            prompt "EVENT_STUCKCORPSE_REW7"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Fear 1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 4
                            prompt "EVENT_STUCKCORPSE_REW8" 
                            event_now_same_cat CatHole
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `SomethingWhisperingFromTheDarkness`
**Source:** `caves_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_SOMETHINGWHISPERING_NAME`: "Something whispering from the darkness"
- `EVENT_SOMETHINGWHISPERING_QUES`: "{catname} hears something whispering from the darkness... <br/>  <br/> Should the party keep on going forward?"
- `EVENT_KEEPGOING_ANSW`: "Keep going"
- `EVENT_SOMETHINGWHISPERING_REW1`: "The cats carry on, their ears alert to signs of danger. <br/>  <br/> After traveling for a time, the whispering fades into the distance."
- `EVENT_SOMETHINGWHISPERING_REW2`: "{catname} bravely leads on despite the ominous whispering."
- `EVENT_SOMETHINGWHISPERING_REW3`: "As {catname} moves forward, the whispering turns into chanting coming from beneath {his} feet! <br/>  <br/> {catname} runs for {his} life in fear!"
- `EVENT_SOMETHINGWHISPERING_REW4`: "Suddenly, large red hands burst through the earth beneath the cats feet and grab hold of them! <br/>  <br/> It's an ambush!"
- `EVENT_FINDANOTHERWAY_ANSW`: "Find another way"
- `EVENT_SOMETHINGWHISPERING_REW5`: "{catname} turns away from the path and finds a new one that is less disconcerting."
- `EVENT_SOMETHINGWHISPERING_REW6`: "{catname} finds a better way through the caves!"
- `EVENT_SOMETHINGWHISPERING_REW7`: "The cats wander lost through endless caves that all look alike..."
- `EVENT_SOMETHINGWHISPERING_REW8`: "Worried it is a bad omen, {catname} leads the party away. <br/>  <br/> As the party wanders through the caves, {catname} can't shake the feeling that {he} made a mistake..."

```
SomethingWhisperingFromTheDarkness {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_SOMETHINGWHISPERING_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame whispering_from_darkness
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_SOMETHINGWHISPERING_QUES"

        options {
            keep_going {
                label "EVENT_KEEPGOING_ANSW"

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_SOMETHINGWHISPERING_REW1"
                            //nothing
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 2
                            prompt "EVENT_SOMETHINGWHISPERING_REW2"
                            gain_disorder Brave
                            permanent_stats {
                                int 1
                            }
                            play_result_animation resultVeryGood
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 4
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 3
                            prompt "EVENT_SOMETHINGWHISPERING_REW3"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Fear 1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 4
                            prompt "EVENT_SOMETHINGWHISPERING_REW4" 
                            party_damage 2
                            ambush_next_basic_fights 1
                            party_status_next_fight {
                                Immobile 1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            find_another_way {
                label "EVENT_FINDANOTHERWAY_ANSW"

                good {
                    set_frame 5
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_SOMETHINGWHISPERING_REW5"
                            event_now_same_cat random
                            play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 2
                            prompt "EVENT_SOMETHINGWHISPERING_REW6"
                            event_now_same_cat Blessing
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 5
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_SOMETHINGWHISPERING_REW7"
                            next_event_bonus -1
                            event_now random
                            play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_SOMETHINGWHISPERING_REW8" 
                            next_event_bonus -2
                            event_now_same_cat random
                           // play_result_animation resultBad
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `CrackInTheWall`
**Source:** `caves_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_CRACKINTHEWALL_NAME`: "Crack in the wall"
- `EVENT_CRACKINTHEWALL_QUES`: "{catname} finds a crack in the wall. <br/>  <br/> {He} wonders what might lie beyond..."
- `EVENT_CRACKINTHEWALL_QUES2`: "{catname} finds a damaged crack in the wall. <br/>  <br/> {catname} might be able to fit {his} arm through if {he} can crack it open far enough!"
- `EVENT_CRACKINTHEWALL_QUES3`: "{catname} finds a break in the wall as if someone has broken into it. <br/>  <br/> {He} thinks {he} sees treasure hiding inside!"
- `EVENT_USE_WEAPON_ANSW`: "Use equipped weapon"
- `EVENT_CRACKINTHEWALL_REW1`: "{catname} slams {his} weapon into the crack and manages to break it open farther!"
- `EVENT_CRACKINTHEWALL_REW2`: "{catname} uses {his} weapon to pry off part of the wall. <br/>  <br/> Coins spill out from widened the crack!"
- `EVENT_CRACKINTHEWALL_REW3`: "{catname} wedges {his} weapon into the gap in the wall and pulls. <br/>  <br/> {His} weapon snaps and breaks!"
- `EVENT_CRACKINTHEWALL_REW4`: "{catname} strikes the wall with {his} weapon... <br/>  <br/> Rocks from the ceiling collapse down atop {him} and the party! Debris wedges its way into the crack, sealing it up."
- `EVENT_BASH_ANSW`: "Bash"
- `EVENT_CRACKINTHEWALL_REW5`: "{catname} swings at the crack in the wall but nothing happens so {he} walks off instead."
- `EVENT_CRACKINTHEWALL_REW6`: "{catname} strikes at the crack, breaking off pieces of the wall. <br/>  <br/> Some coins tumble out of the widened gap!"
- `EVENT_CRACKINTHEWALL_REW7`: "{catname} punches the wall... <br/>  <br/> It hurts!"
- `EVENT_CRACKINTHEWALL_REW8`: "{catname} winds up and swings at the crack with all {his} strength... <br/>  <br/> {He} howls in pain from the impact!"
- `EVENT_LOOT_ANSW`: "Loot"
- `EVENT_CRACKINTHEWALL_REW9`: "{catname} reaches through the crack in the wall and pulls out some loot!"
- `EVENT_CRACKINTHEWALL_REW10`: "Jackpot! {catname} fishes out a bag of treasure that was stashed in the wall."
- `EVENT_CRACKINTHEWALL_REW11`: "{catname} reaches through the crack looking for treasure, but all that is left is some old food."
- `EVENT_CRACKINTHEWALL_REW12`: "{catname} pokes his head through the wall looking for treasure... <br/>  <br/> Something large grabs onto {him} and pulls {catname} through the wall!"

```
CrackInTheWall {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_CRACKINTHEWALL_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        choose_cat_with_item_slot_equipped weapon
        subject_frame crack_in_the_wall
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        setup {
            conditional_reward {
                requirements {
                    counter_maximum [WorldEventLegacyCounter_CrackInTheWall 0]
                }
                reward {
                    prompt "EVENT_CRACKINTHEWALL_QUES"
                    set_frame 1
                }
            }
            conditional_reward {
                requirements {
                    counter_range [WorldEventLegacyCounter_CrackInTheWall 1 1]
                }
                reward {
                    prompt "EVENT_CRACKINTHEWALL_QUES2"
                    set_frame 2
                }
            }
            conditional_reward {
                requirements {
                    counter_range [WorldEventLegacyCounter_CrackInTheWall 2 2]
                }
                reward {
                    prompt "EVENT_CRACKINTHEWALL_QUES2"
                    set_frame 3
                }
            }
            conditional_reward {
                requirements {
                    counter_range [WorldEventLegacyCounter_CrackInTheWall 3 3]
                }
                reward {
                    prompt "EVENT_CRACKINTHEWALL_QUES2"
                    set_frame 4
                }
            }
            conditional_reward {
                requirements {
                    counter_minimum [WorldEventLegacyCounter_CrackInTheWall 4]
                }
                reward {
                    prompt "EVENT_CRACKINTHEWALL_QUES3"
                    set_frame 5
                }
            }
        }

        options {
            use_weapon {
                label "EVENT_USE_WEAPON_ANSW"
                
                requirements {
                    counter_maximum [WorldEventLegacyCounter_CrackInTheWall 3]
                    cat_has_item_slot_equipped weapon
                }

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_CRACKINTHEWALL_REW1"
                            increment_legacy_counter WorldEventLegacyCounter_CrackInTheWall
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_CRACKINTHEWALL_REW2"
                            increment_legacy_counter WorldEventLegacyCounter_CrackInTheWall
                            increment_legacy_counter WorldEventLegacyCounter_CrackInTheWall
                            gain_coins [10 15]
                        }
                    }

                    //Update frame
                    conditional_reward {
                        requirements {
                            counter_range [WorldEventLegacyCounter_CrackInTheWall 1 1]
                        }
                        reward {
                            set_frame 2
                        }
                    }
                    conditional_reward {
                        requirements {
                            counter_range [WorldEventLegacyCounter_CrackInTheWall 2 2]
                        }
                        reward {
                            set_frame 3
                        }
                    }
                    conditional_reward {
                        requirements {
                            counter_range [WorldEventLegacyCounter_CrackInTheWall 3 3]
                        }
                        reward {
                            set_frame 4
                        }
                    }
                    conditional_reward {
                        requirements {
                            counter_minimum [WorldEventLegacyCounter_CrackInTheWall 4]
                        }
                        reward {
                            set_frame 5
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_CRACKINTHEWALL_REW3"
                            decrement_legacy_counter WorldEventLegacyCounter_CrackInTheWall
                            lose_item weapon
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_CRACKINTHEWALL_REW4" 
                            decrement_legacy_counter WorldEventLegacyCounter_CrackInTheWall
                            decrement_legacy_counter WorldEventLegacyCounter_CrackInTheWall
                            party_damage [5 10]
                            party_status_next_fight {
                                AbilityOnBattleStart_Immediate RocksFallEvent
                            }
                        }
                    }

                    //Update frame
                    conditional_reward {
                        requirements {
                            counter_maximum [WorldEventLegacyCounter_CrackInTheWall 0]
                        }
                        reward {
                            set_frame 1
                        }
                    }
                    conditional_reward {
                        requirements {
                            counter_range [WorldEventLegacyCounter_CrackInTheWall 1 1]
                        }
                        reward {
                            set_frame 2
                        }
                    }
                    conditional_reward {
                        requirements {
                            counter_range [WorldEventLegacyCounter_CrackInTheWall 1 1]
                        }
                        reward {
                            set_frame 2
                        }
                    }
                    conditional_reward {
                        requirements {
                            counter_range [WorldEventLegacyCounter_CrackInTheWall 2 2]
                        }
                        reward {
                            set_frame 3
                        }
                    }
                    conditional_reward {
                        requirements {
                            counter_range [WorldEventLegacyCounter_CrackInTheWall 3 3]
                        }
                        reward {
                            set_frame 4
                        }
                    }
                    conditional_reward {
                        requirements {
                            counter_minimum [WorldEventLegacyCounter_CrackInTheWall 4]
                        }
                        reward {
                            set_frame 5
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            bash {
                label "EVENT_BASH_ANSW"
                stat str
                
                requirements {
                    counter_maximum [WorldEventLegacyCounter_CrackInTheWall 3]
                }

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_CRACKINTHEWALL_REW5"
                            //nothing
                            play_animation resultLeave
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_CRACKINTHEWALL_REW6"
                            increment_legacy_counter WorldEventLegacyCounter_CrackInTheWall
                            gain_coins [10 15]
                        }
                    }
                    
                    //Update frame
                    conditional_reward {
                        requirements {
                            counter_range [WorldEventLegacyCounter_CrackInTheWall 1 1]
                        }
                        reward {
                            set_frame 2
                        }
                    }
                    conditional_reward {
                        requirements {
                            counter_range [WorldEventLegacyCounter_CrackInTheWall 2 2]
                        }
                        reward {
                            set_frame 3
                        }
                    }
                    conditional_reward {
                        requirements {
                            counter_range [WorldEventLegacyCounter_CrackInTheWall 3 3]
                        }
                        reward {
                            set_frame 4
                        }
                    }
                    conditional_reward {
                        requirements {
                            counter_minimum [WorldEventLegacyCounter_CrackInTheWall 4]
                        }
                        reward {
                            set_frame 5
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_CRACKINTHEWALL_REW7"
                            damage 5
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_CRACKINTHEWALL_REW8" 
                            injury str
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            loot {
                label "EVENT_LOOT_ANSW"
                stat lck
                animation choice_dex_alt

                requirements {
                    counter_minimum [WorldEventLegacyCounter_CrackInTheWall 4]
                }

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_CRACKINTHEWALL_REW9"
                            gain_coins [5 15]
                            get_item_from_pool chapter_common
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_CRACKINTHEWALL_REW10"
                            gain_coins [10 30]
                            get_item_from_pool chapter_rare
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward { 
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_CRACKINTHEWALL_REW11"
                            gain_food [1 5]
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_CRACKINTHEWALL_REW12" 
                            battle "events/crackinthewall.lvl"
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `LeakingMeat`
**Source:** `caves_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_LEAKINGMEAT_NAME`: "Hanging Meat"
- `EVENT_LEAKINGMEAT_QUES`: "{catname} finds a strange lump of pulsating meat hanging down from the ceiling. <br/>  <br/> Maybe it leaked through from another floor?"
- `EVENT_LEAKINGMEAT_EAT_ANSW`: "Eat the meat"
- `EVENT_LEAKINGMEAT_REW1`: "{catname} takes a large bite out of the hanging meat. It tastes strange, but good. <br/>  <br/> {catname}'s body mutates!"
- `EVENT_LEAKINGMEAT_REW2`: "Juices run down {catname}'s chin as {he} devours the meat. It tastes delicious!"
- `EVENT_LEAKINGMEAT_REW3`: "{catname}'s body begins to shake and mutate after {he} bites into the strange meat..."
- `EVENT_LEAKINGMEAT_REW4`: "It tastes gross! {catname} spits out the rotting meat, but it is too late..."
- `EVENT_LEAKINGMEAT_KISS_ANSW`: "Kiss the meat"
- `EVENT_LEAKINGMEAT_REW5`: "{catname} licks the meat, swallowing the moist juices on the outside of the flesh. {his} body mutates!"
- `EVENT_LEAKINGMEAT_REW6`: "{catname} kisses the strange flesh. It begins to move! <br/>  <br/> A large mouth opens up and greets {him}. It is friendly and wants to tag along!"
- `EVENT_LEAKINGMEAT_REW7`: "As {catname}'s tongue meets the flesh, it awakens and latches onto {him}!"
- `EVENT_LEAKINGMEAT_REW8`: "{catname} approaches the strange meat and brings {his} lips to touch it... <br/>  <br/> Terror and confusion grips {catname}'s face as {his} mouth mutates into a horrifying shape!"

```
LeakingMeat {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_LEAKINGMEAT_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame meat_leaking
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_LEAKINGMEAT_QUES"

        options {
            eat_meat {
                label "EVENT_LEAKINGMEAT_EAT_ANSW"
                stat con

                good {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_LEAKINGMEAT_REW1"
                            random_mutation 1
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_LEAKINGMEAT_REW2"
                            random_mutation 1
                            permanent_stats {
                                con 2
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_LEAKINGMEAT_REW3"
                            random_mutation 1
                            gain_disorder_from_pool all_disorders
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_LEAKINGMEAT_REW4" 
                            gain_disorder_from_pool all_disorders
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            kiss_meat {
                label "EVENT_LEAKINGMEAT_KISS_ANSW"
                stat cha

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_LEAKINGMEAT_REW5"
                            random_mutation 1
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 2
                            prompt "EVENT_LEAKINGMEAT_REW6"
                            random_mutation 1
                            gain_familiar CharmedHeadTumor
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_LEAKINGMEAT_REW7"
                            random_mutation 1
                            get_parasite_from_pool [CrimsonMask_Cursed RedCap_Cursed PoundOfFlesh_Cursed]
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_LEAKINGMEAT_REW8" 
                            random_mutation_from_set {
                                mouth -1
                            }
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Fights 99
                                PermanentConfusion 1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

## File: `core_events.gon`

### `DemonicIdol`
**Source:** `core_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_DEMONICIDOL_NAME`: "Demonic Idol"
- `EVENT_DEMONICIDOL_QUES`: "A large demonic statue sits before {catname}. <br/>  <br/> It clutches a large bowl in its hands and asks for a sacrifice!"
- `EVENT_DEMONICIDOL_1DAMAGE_ANSW`: "Donate blood (1hp)"
- `EVENT_DEMONICIDOL_REW1`: "{catname} scratches {his} paw and releases some blood into the bowl..."
- `EVENT_DEMONICIDOL_REW1_B`: "[i]"What an insult, you call that mere pittance a sacrifice?"[/i]"
- `EVENT_DEMONICIDOL_REW2`: "Without hesitating, {catname} releases a drop of blood into the bowl..."
- `EVENT_DEMONICIDOL_REW2_B`: "[i]"At least you were quick about it."[/i] The terrifying figure looks pleased."
- `EVENT_DEMONICIDOL_HALFDAMAGE_ANSW`: "Donate blood (1/2 hp)"
- `EVENT_DEMONICIDOL_REW3`: "{catname} cuts {his} arm and allows the blood to flow into the bowl..."
- `EVENT_DEMONICIDOL_REW3_B`: "The demonic idol looks pleased! <br/> [i]"Yes... more, more!"[/i]"
- `EVENT_DEMONICIDOL_REW4`: "The demonic idol looks very pleased. <br/>  <br/> [i]"See? isn't that easy? You'll have to come back with the rest later..."[/i]"
- `EVENT_DEMONICIDOL_REW5`: "{catname}'s blood flows into the bowl and {he} stumbles away, dizzy with weakness. <br/>  <br/> Nothing seems to happen."
- `EVENT_DEMONICIDOL_REW6`: "{catname}'s blood stains the ground and the bowl is full almost to the brim... <br/>  <br/> [i]Is that all you have to give? Insulting! I know you have much, much, more!"[/i]"
- `EVENT_DEMONICIDOL_FULLDAMAGE_ANSW`: "Donate blood (all but 1 hp)"
- `EVENT_DEMONICIDOL_REW7`: "{catname} nearly passes out as {he} drains {his} blood into the bowl... <br/>  <br/> [i]"Yes, give it all! Perfect!"[/i]  The demonic idol is grinning with pleasure at the sight of the full bowl of {catname}'s blood."
- `EVENT_DEMONICIDOL_REW8`: "[i]"I am pleased by your commitment! A glorious sacrifice!"[/i] <br/>  <br/> The bowl of {catname}'s blood coagulates and shifts into a strange shape. The statue pours the bowl over {catname}'s head."
- `EVENT_DEMONICIDOL_REW9`: "{catname}'s blood drains into the bowl. <br/>  <br/> {He} feels only a little stronger for how much that hurt!"
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"
- `EVENT_DEMONICIDOL_REW10`: "{catname} leaves the statue alone."
- `EVENT_DEMONICIDOL_REW11`: "{catname} wants to leave but feels an overwhelming urge to please the statue... <br/>  <br/> {He} grits {his} teeth and shakes {his} mind free of the feeling."
- `EVENT_DEMONICIDOL_REW12`: "{catname} turns to leave... <br/>  <br/> [i]"How dare you deny me! What an insult! You think you can walk away unscathed?"[/i]"

```
DemonicIdol {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_DEMONICIDOL_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame demonic_idol
        choose_cat_with_min_health 75%
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_DEMONICIDOL_QUES"

        options { 
            damage_1 {
                label "EVENT_DEMONICIDOL_1DAMAGE_ANSW"
                stat con
                
                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_DEMONICIDOL_REW1"
                            self_damage 1
                            prompt "EVENT_DEMONICIDOL_REW1_B"
                            set_frame 2
                            injury cha
                            gain_disorder_from_pool all_disorders
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_DEMONICIDOL_REW2"
                            self_damage 1
                            prompt "EVENT_DEMONICIDOL_REW2_B"
                            set_frame 3
                            permanent_stats {
                                random 1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_DEMONICIDOL_REW1"
                            self_damage 1
                            prompt "EVENT_DEMONICIDOL_REW1_B"
                            injury cha
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_DEMONICIDOL_REW1" 
                            self_damage 1
                            prompt "EVENT_DEMONICIDOL_REW1_B"
                            injury cursed
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            damage_half {
                label "EVENT_DEMONICIDOL_HALFDAMAGE_ANSW"
                stat con

                good {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_DEMONICIDOL_REW3"
                            self_damage 50%
                            prompt "EVENT_DEMONICIDOL_REW3_B"
                            permanent_stats {
                                random 1
                            }
                            
                        }
                        rare {
                            self_damage 50%
                            prompt "EVENT_DEMONICIDOL_REW4"
                            permanent_stats {
                                str 1
                                dex 1
                                con 1
                                int 1
                                spd 1
                                cha 1
                                lck 1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            self_damage 50%
                            prompt "EVENT_DEMONICIDOL_REW5"
                            //nothing
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 2
                            prompt "EVENT_DEMONICIDOL_REW6"
                            injury cha
                            self_damage 50%
                            injury cha
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            damage_full {
                label "EVENT_DEMONICIDOL_FULLDAMAGE_ANSW"
                stat con

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_DEMONICIDOL_REW7"
                            set_frame 3
                            self_damage 99%
                            permanent_stats {
                                str 1
                                dex 1
                                con 1
                                int 1
                                spd 1
                                cha 1
                                lck 1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            self_damage 99%
                            prompt "EVENT_DEMONICIDOL_REW8"
                            set_frame 4
                            gain_disorder DarkOne
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            self_damage 99%
                            prompt "EVENT_DEMONICIDOL_REW9"
                            set_frame 2
                            permanent_stats {
                                random 1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            self_damage 99%
                            prompt "EVENT_DEMONICIDOL_REW5"
                            //nothing
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            leave {
                label "EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW"
                stat lck

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_DEMONICIDOL_REW10"
                            play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                            //nothing
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_DEMONICIDOL_REW11"
                            set_frame 3
                            permanent_stats {
                                random 1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_DEMONICIDOL_REW10"
                            play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                            //nothing
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_DEMONICIDOL_REW12"
                            set_frame 2
                            injury cursed
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `JaggedPathway`
**Source:** `core_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_JAGGEDPATHWAY_NAME`: "Jagged Pathway"
- `EVENT_JAGGEDPATHWAY_QUES`: "A jagged pathway leads downward ahead, riddled with bones and sharp rocks..."
- `EVENT_JAGEDPATHWAY_ANSW_PUSH`: "Push through"
- `EVENT_JAGGEDPATHWAY_REW1`: "The cats push through the dim and twisted rocky path, careful to stay clear of danger. <br/>  <br/> It leads to a narrow passageway to the next area, leading them into an ambush!"
- `EVENT_JAGGEDPATHWAY_REW2`: "{catname} makes {his} way carefully through the sharp rocks and scree... <br/>  <br/> {He} finds several items laying behind a large stalagmite!"
- `EVENT_JAGGEDPATHWAY_REW3`: "{catname} tries to navigate through the dangerous caves, but slips and scratches {himself} on a sharp rocky outcrop... <br/>  <br/> {catname} howls as blood starts spraying from {his} wounds!"
- `EVENT_JAGGEDPATHWAY_REW4`: "The passageway is lined with sharp rocks and bones which tear into {catname} as {he} tries to push through..."
- `EVENT_JAGEDPATHWAY_ANSW_AROUND`: "Find another way around"
- `EVENT_JAGGEDPATHWAY_REW5`: "{catname} finds a different, less ominous looking path to carry on."
- `EVENT_JAGGEDPATHWAY_REW6`: "Backtracking a ways, {catname} discovers a hidden passageway that the party had missed on their way by! <br/>  <br/> It branches into several caverns farther on, allowing the party to ambush the next two battles!"
- `EVENT_JAGGEDPATHWAY_REW7`: "Doubling back, {catname} tries to find a better way forward but ends up getting hopelessly lost!"
- `EVENT_JAGGEDPATHWAY_REW8`: "{catname} tries to climb back up the way {he} came, but accidentally dislodges a giant stalactite and it plummets downward, lodging into {his} skull!"

```
JaggedPathway {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_JAGGEDPATHWAY_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame jagged_pathway
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_JAGGEDPATHWAY_QUES"

        options {
            push_through {
                label "EVENT_JAGEDPATHWAY_ANSW_PUSH"
                stat str

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 4
                            prompt "EVENT_JAGGEDPATHWAY_REW1"
                            ally_ambush_next_fights 1
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 2
                            prompt "EVENT_JAGGEDPATHWAY_REW2"
                            get_item_from_pool chapter_specific_item
                            get_item_from_pool chapter_specific_item
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_JAGGEDPATHWAY_REW3"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Bleed 3
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_JAGGEDPATHWAY_REW4" 
                            gain_disorder DeepCut
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            find_another_way {
                label "EVENT_JAGEDPATHWAY_ANSW_AROUND"
                stat lck
                animation choice_leave

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_JAGGEDPATHWAY_REW5"
                            play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                            //nothing
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 4
                            prompt "EVENT_JAGGEDPATHWAY_REW6"
                            ally_ambush_next_fights 2
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 5
                            prompt "EVENT_JAGGEDPATHWAY_REW7"
                            event_now_same_cat random
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 3
                            prompt "EVENT_JAGGEDPATHWAY_REW8"
                            get_parasite SlagTight
                            event_now_same_cat JaggedPathwayStalactite
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `MysteriousStranger`
**Source:** `core_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTRANGER_NAME`: "Mysterious Stranger"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTRANGER_QUES`: "[i]Would you like to play a game? Just place your paw right here and we shall begin...[/i] <br/>  <br/> {catname} peers beneath the stranger's patchwork cloak but can't see what is hiding within. Cats are pretty fast though... {He} might win!"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTRANGER_QUES2`: "[i]Want to play again? You could get lucky this time, if you're fast enough![/i]"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTRANGER_ANSW`: "Play his game"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTRANGER_REW1`: "{catname} barely pulls {his} paw back at the last second! <br/>  <br/> [i]Impressive... Have your winnings.[/i]"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTRANGER_END_AGAIN`: "Play again?"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTRANGER_REW2`: "Before the stranger could barely move the large knife, {catname} darts {his} paw away to safety! <br/>  <br/> [i]Most impressive... I think you win today. I give up![/i]"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTRANGER_REW3`: "{catname} concentrates on the stranger's movements but {he} is caught by surprise and the knife slices down, removing {his} finger! <br/>  <br/> [i]Not fast enough little feline![/i]"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTRANGER_REW4`: "The knife slams down, cutting off {catname}'s finger! <br/>  <br/> [i]Are you even trying?!? Pay attention this time![/i] <br/>  <br/> The stranger reaches out and grabs {catname}'s paw, forcing {him} to play again!"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTRANGER_END_AGAIN2`: "Play again"
- `EVENT_LEAVE_ANSW`: "Leave"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTRANGER_REW5`: "{catname} doesn't like the vibe of this situation and decides it is probably best to depart."
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTRANGER_REW6`: "{catname} clutches {his} paw in shame and runs away!"

```
MysteriousStranger {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTRANGER_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame mysterious_stranger
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTRANGER_QUES"
        
        setup {
            conditional_reward {
                requirements {
                    has_token HasPlayedMysteriousStranger
                }
                reward {
                    prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTRANGER_QUES2"
                }
            }
        }

        options {
            play {
                label "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTRANGER_ANSW"
                stat spd

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 3
                            set_adventure_token HasPlayedMysteriousStranger
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTRANGER_REW1"
                            gain_coins [5 15]
                            override_end_option_prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTRANGER_END_AGAIN"
                            event_now_same_cat MysteriousStranger
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 4
                            set_adventure_token HasPlayedMysteriousStranger
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTRANGER_REW2"
                            gain_coins [20 100]
                            permanent_stats {
                                spd 1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        set_adventure_token HasPlayedMysteriousStranger
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTRANGER_REW3"
                            set_adventure_token HasPlayedMysteriousStranger
                            set_adventure_token MysteriousStranger_HasLostFinger
                            random_pool [
                                {
                                    permanent_stats {
                                        str -1
                                    }
                                }
                                {
                                    permanent_stats {
                                        dex -1
                                    }
                                }
                            ]
                            override_end_option_prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTRANGER_END_AGAIN"
                            event_now_same_cat MysteriousStranger
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTRANGER_REW4"
                            set_adventure_token HasPlayedMysteriousStranger
                            set_adventure_token MysteriousStranger_HasLostFinger
                            random_pool [
                                {
                                    permanent_stats {
                                        str -1
                                    }
                                }
                                {
                                    permanent_stats {
                                        dex -1
                                    }
                                }
                            ]
                            override_end_option_prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTRANGER_END_AGAIN2"
                            event_now_same_cat MysteriousStrangerForced
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            leave {
                label "EVENT_LEAVE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave

                good {
                    //prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTRANGER_REW5"
                    conditional_reward {
                        requirements {
                            not_has_token HasPlayedMysteriousStranger
                        }
                        reward {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTRANGER_REW5"
                        }
                    }

                    conditional_reward {
                        requirements {
                            has_token HasPlayedMysteriousStranger
                        }
                        reward {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTRANGER_REW6"
                        }
                    }
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

## File: `crater_events.gon`

### `PitOfSnakes`
**Source:** `crater_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_PITOFSNAKES_NAME`: "Pit of Snakes"
- `EVENT_PITOFSNAKES_QUES`: "A pit of snakes block the way before {catname}!"
- `EVENT_FIGHT_ANSW`: "Fight"
- `EVENT_PITOFSNAKES_REW1`: "{catname} dives into the pit, dispatching snakes left and right!"
- `EVENT_PITOFSNAKES_REW2`: "{catname} leaps into the pit, unleashing an awe-inspiring flurry of defensive blows, surrounded on all sides by snakes!"
- `EVENT_PITOFSNAKES_REW3`: "{catname} tries to fight the snakes but is overwhelmed, bitten all over and poisoned!"
- `EVENT_PITOFSNAKES_REW4`: "The sheer number of bites covering {catname} when {he} stumbles out of the pit is alarming, but {he} manages to survive... <br/>  <br/> {catname}'s body begins to mutate from all the venom flowing through {his} veins."
- `EVENT_JUMPOVER_ANSW`: "Jump over"
- `EVENT_PITOFSNAKES_REW5`: "{catname} manages to leap over the snakes and makes it away unscathed."
- `EVENT_PITOFSNAKES_REW6`: "{catname} darts past the snakes! <br/>  <br/> On the way by {he} spies an item that they are guarding and snatches it!"
- `EVENT_PITOFSNAKES_REW7`: "{catname} falls short and lands in the pit! The snakes bite {him} several times before {he} is able to scramble out!"
- `EVENT_PITOFSNAKES_REW8`: "{catname} barely clears the pit, landing awkwardly on the edge and breaks {his} leg!"
- `EVENT_CHARM_ANSW`: "Charm"
- `EVENT_PITOFSNAKES_REW9`: "{catname} charms one of the snakes and lures it to leave the pit and join the cats!"
- `EVENT_PITOFSNAKES_REW10`: "{catname} lures several of the snakes away from the pit with {his} charm and befriends them!"
- `EVENT_PITOFSNAKES_REW11`: "The snakes leave the pit and chase after the cats, biting and poisoning them!"
- `EVENT_PITOFSNAKES_REW12`: "{catname} tries to sweet talk the snakes, but gets bitten in the face instead!"

```
PitOfSnakes {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_PITOFSNAKES_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame pit_of_snakes
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_PITOFSNAKES_QUES"

        options {
            fight {
                label "EVENT_FIGHT_ANSW"
                stat str

                good {
                    set_frame 4
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_PITOFSNAKES_REW1"
                            gain_food [4 8]
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_PITOFSNAKES_REW2"
                            learn_passive CobraStyle
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 5
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_PITOFSNAKES_REW3"
                            damage 3
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Poison 3
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_PITOFSNAKES_REW4"
                            damage 6
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Poison 6
                            }
                            mutation {
                                ears 328
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            jump_over {
                label "EVENT_JUMPOVER_ANSW"
                stat dex

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 1
                            prompt "EVENT_PITOFSNAKES_REW5"
                            //nothing
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 3
                            prompt "EVENT_PITOFSNAKES_REW6"
                            //gain_parasite GoldenIdol //Item is waiting on feature
                            get_item_from_pool chapter_rare
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 5
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_PITOFSNAKES_REW7"
                            damage 3
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Poison 3
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_PITOFSNAKES_REW8" 
                            injury spd
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            charm {
                label "EVENT_CHARM_ANSW"
                stat cha

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_PITOFSNAKES_REW9"
                            gain_familiar Snake
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_PITOFSNAKES_REW10"
                            gain_familiar Snake
                            gain_familiar Snake
                            gain_familiar Snake
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 5
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_PITOFSNAKES_REW11"
                            party_damage 3
                            party_status_next_fight {
                                Poison 3
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_PITOFSNAKES_REW12" 
                            permanent_stats {
                                cha -1
                            }
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Poison 3
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `Meteor`
**Source:** `crater_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_METEOR_NAME`: "Meteor"
- `EVENT_METEOR_QUES`: "At the heart of a small crater, {catname} finds a strange vibrating meteor!"
- `EVENT_TAKE_ANSW`: "Take"
- `EVENT_METEOR_REW1`: "{catname} pockets the small meteor for later."
- `EVENT_METEOR_REW2`: "{catname} picks up the meteor. The vibrations feel strange in {his} paws, pulsing through {catname}'s whole body. <br/>  <br/> {catname} has gained a mutation!"
- `EVENT_METEOR_REW3`: "An amoeba hiding on the meteor latches onto {catname}! {He} tries to shake it off but it is stuck fast!"
- `EVENT_METEOR_REW4`: "{catname} moves to pick up the meteor, but giant space amoebas leap out from it and latch onto {him}, covering {his} body! <br/>  <br/> {catname} tries in vain to scrape them off but it's impossible."
- `EVENT_CRACKOPEN_ANSW`: "Crack open"
- `EVENT_METEOR_REW5`: "As {catname} pulls the fragile meteor apart, a strange liquid sprays out of it and mutates {catname}!"
- `EVENT_METEOR_REW6`: "{catname} cracks open the meteor and a warm green liquid gushes out of it! <br/>  <br/> {catname}'s body mutates!"
- `EVENT_METEOR_REW7`: "{catname} breaks the meteor open, and is sprayed with a foul liquid that was trapped inside!"
- `EVENT_METEOR_REW8`: "A dense liquid seeps out of the meteor as {catname} tries to break it open, covering {him} in Amoebas!"
- `EVENT_LEAVE_ANSW`: "Leave"
- `EVENT_METEOR_REW9`: "{catname} isn't interested in strange, one-of-a-kind, vibrating meteors and walks off to the next area."

```
Meteor {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_METEOR_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame meteor
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_METEOR_QUES"

        options {
            take {
                label "EVENT_TAKE_ANSW"
                stat lck

                good {
                    set_frame 5
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_METEOR_REW1"
                            get_item_from_pool chapter_common //TODO: Replace with small meteor item when it is implemented.
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_METEOR_REW2"
                            random_mutation 1
                            get_item_from_pool chapter_rare //TODO: Replace with meteor item when it is implemented.
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 4
                            prompt "EVENT_METEOR_REW3"
                            random_mutation 1
                            get_parasite_from_pool [AmoebaHat AmoebaNeck AmoebaFace]
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 4
                            prompt "EVENT_METEOR_REW4" 
                            random_mutation 2
                            random_pool [
                                {
                                    get_parasite AmoebaNeck
                                    get_parasite AmoebaFace
                                }
                                {
                                    get_parasite AmoebaHat
                                    get_parasite AmoebaFace
                                }
                                {
                                    get_parasite AmoebaHat
                                    get_parasite AmoebaNeck
                                }
                            ]
                            spawn_unit_next_fight {
                                object Amoeba
                                count 1
                                side enemies
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            crack_open {
                label "EVENT_CRACKOPEN_ANSW"
                stat str

                good {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_METEOR_REW5"
                            random_mutation 1               
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_METEOR_REW6"
                            random_mutation 1
                            gain_coins 15
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 2
                            prompt "EVENT_METEOR_REW7"
                            gain_disorder_from_pool all_disorders
                            random_mutation 1
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 4
                            prompt "EVENT_METEOR_REW8" 
                            random_mutation 3
                            random_pool [
                                {
                                    get_parasite AmoebaNeck
                                    get_parasite AmoebaFace
                                }
                                {
                                    get_parasite AmoebaHat
                                    get_parasite AmoebaFace
                                }
                                {
                                    get_parasite AmoebaHat
                                    get_parasite AmoebaNeck
                                }
                            ]
                            spawn_unit_next_fight {
                                object Amoeba
                                count 1
                                side enemies
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            leave {
                label "EVENT_LEAVE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave
                
                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_METEOR_REW9"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `MysteriousCrater`
**Source:** `crater_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCRATER_NAME`: "Mysterious Crater"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCRATER_QUES`: "{catname} finds a mysterious crater in the ground. <br/>  <br/> {He} can't see what lies in shadow at the bottom, but {catname} thinks {he} could find a way down."
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCRATER_ENTER_ANSW`: "Enter crater"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCRATER_REW1`: "The cats descend carefully into the crater..."
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCRATER_REW2`: "In the crater {catname} finds fragments of a destroyed meteor!"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCRATER_REW3`: "{catname} scrambles down the crater wall into the darkness below..."
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCRATER_REW4`: "As {catname} descends into the crater, {he} is attacked by a giant Amoeba and a swarm of its babies!"
- `EVENT_LEAVE_ANSW`: "Leave"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCRATER_REW5`: "{catname} leads the party safely around the crater and on to the next area."

```
MysteriousCrater {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCRATER_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame mysterious_crater
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCRATER_QUES"

        options {
            enter_crater {
                label "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCRATER_ENTER_ANSW"
                stat lck

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCRATER_REW1"
                            next_event_bonus 2
                            random_pool [
                                {
                                    event_now Meteor
                                }
                                {
                                    event_now SeveredHead
                                }
                                {
                                    event_now WatchingHead
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 3
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCRATER_REW2"
                            //TODO: Replace with 2-4 meteor items
                            get_item_from_pool chapter_common
                            random_pool [
                                {
                                    get_item_from_pool chapter_common
                                }
                                {
                                    get_item_from_pool chapter_common
                                    get_item_from_pool chapter_common
                                }
                                {
                                    get_item_from_pool chapter_common
                                    get_item_from_pool chapter_common
                                    get_item_from_pool chapter_common
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCRATER_REW3"
                            next_event_bonus -1
                            random_pool [
                                {
                                    event_now_same_cat Meteor
                                }
                                {
                                    event_now_same_cat SeveredHead
                                }
                                {
                                    event_now_same_cat WatchingHead
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 2
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCRATER_REW4" 
                            
                            random_pool [
                                {
                                    get_parasite AmoebaNeck
                                    get_parasite AmoebaFace
                                }
                                {
                                    get_parasite AmoebaHat
                                    get_parasite AmoebaFace
                                }
                                {
                                    get_parasite AmoebaHat
                                    get_parasite AmoebaNeck
                                }
                            ]
                            spawn_unit_next_fight {
                                object Amoeba
                                count 1
                                side enemies
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            leave {
                label "EVENT_LEAVE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave
                
                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCRATER_REW5"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```
