## File: `dead_body.gon`

### `DeadRat`
**Source:** `dead_body.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_DEADRAT_NAME`: "Dead Rat"
- `EVENT_DEADRAT_QUES`: "{catname} finds a dead rat... <br/>  <br/> Stench from the corpse fills {his} nose, a powerful but intriguing smell."
- `EVENT_DESTROY_ANSW`: "Destroy"
- `EVENT_DEADRAT_REW1`: "{catname} decimates the corpse! <br/>  <br/> Tiny screams can be heard as nearby rats scamper away in fear!"
- `EVENT_DEADRAT_REW2`: "{catname} rips the body apart! <br/>  <br/> Among the remains {he} sees something interesting..."
- `EVENT_DEADRAT_REW3`: "{catname} smashes the rat corpse, tearing it limb from limb! <br/>  <br/> From around {him}, {catname} hears chittering through the walls as angry rats prepare to ambush!"
- `EVENT_DEADRAT_REW4`: "With a surprising fervor, {catname} rips apart the poor dead rat, scattering its remains across the room! <br/>  <br/> The other cats look on in shock at the extremely violent action!"
- `EVENT_EAT_ANSW`: "Eat"
- `EVENT_DEADRAT_REW5`: "{catname} rips apart the rat's plump body, devouring the tough but delicious flesh! <br/>  <br/> Satisfied, {catname} saves some for later."
- `EVENT_DEADRAT_REW6`: "{catname} opens {his} mouth and swallows the rat whole! {He} starts to feel a little funny... <br/>  <br/> {catname} lets out a startled meow as {his} body mutates into a new shape!"
- `EVENT_DEADRAT_REW7`: "{catname} rashly devours the dead rat without hesitation... <br/>  <br/> {He} starts to get sick and feels weak!"
- `EVENT_DEADRAT_REW8`: "{catname} gnaws the rat's head off. Its brain is delicious!"
- `EVENT_LOOT_ANSW`: "Loot"
- `EVENT_DEADRAT_REW9`: "{catname} pulls apart the rat's body and finds money in its stomach!"
- `EVENT_DEADRAT_REW10`: "No need to get messy digging around inside, {catname} thinks... <br/>  <br/> The rat is already a great snack!"
- `EVENT_DEADRAT_REW11`: "{catname} discovers an object lodged in the rat's throat and pulls it out..."
- `EVENT_DEADRAT_REW12`: "{catname} tosses the rat's body around, looking for anything useful. <br/>  <br/> {He} gets a strange feeling like {he} is being watched and sees several sets of eyes peering at {him} from the darkness… <br/>  <br/> It's an ambush!"
- `EVENT_DEADRAT_REW13`: "{catname} pokes at the body... It wasn't dead!  <br/>  <br/> The rat jumps up and bites {him}!"

```
DeadRat {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_DEADRAT_NAME"
        cat_choice random //choose, random, none (random and none are equivalent)
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame deadrat
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_DEADRAT_QUES"

        options {
            destroy {
                label "EVENT_DESTROY_ANSW"
                stat str

                good {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_DEADRAT_REW1"
 
                            spawn_unit_next_fight {
                                object [Rat Pinky]
                                count 2
                                spawn_side enemies
                            }

                            global_effect_next_fight {
                                CharacterTypeGainsStatusAtBattleStart {
                                    tag rat
                                    Fear 1
                                }
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_DEADRAT_REW2"
                            get_item_from_pool rat_trinkets
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_DEADRAT_REW3"
                            spawn_unit_next_fight {
                                object [Rat Pinky Leaper]
                                count 2
                                spawn_side enemies
                            }

                            ambush_next_basic_fights 1
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_DEADRAT_REW4"
                            gain_disorder BloodFrenzy
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            eat {
                label "EVENT_EAT_ANSW"
                stat con

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_DEADRAT_REW5"
                            full_heal 1
                            gain_food [2 10]
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_DEADRAT_REW6"
                            random_mutation_from_set {
                                tail 1500
                                ears 1500
                                mouth 1500
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_DEADRAT_REW7"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Poison 2
                            }
                            permanent_stats {
                                con -1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_DEADRAT_REW8"
                            gain_disorder Rabies
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            loot {
                label "EVENT_LOOT_ANSW"
                stat dex
                animation choice_dex_alt

                good {
                    set_frame 4
                    reward {
                        common {
                            random_pool [
                                {
                                    prompt "EVENT_DEADRAT_REW9"
                                    gain_coins [5 10]
                                }
                                {
                                    prompt "EVENT_DEADRAT_REW10"
                                    get_item_from_pool food
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_DEADRAT_REW11"
                            get_item_from_pool rat_trinkets
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 4
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_DEADRAT_REW12"
                            spawn_unit_next_fight {
                                object [Rat Pinky Leaper]
                                count 2
                                spawn_side enemies
                            }

                            ambush_next_basic_fights 1
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_DEADRAT_REW13"
                            gain_disorder Rabies
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `DeadCat`
**Source:** `dead_body.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_DEADCAT_NAME`: "Dead Cat"
- `EVENT_DEADCAT_QUES`: "{catname} finds a deceased cat, its body sprawled out in contortions from the pain it experienced in its final moments of life..."
- `EVENT_EAT_ANSW`: "Eat"
- `EVENT_DEADCAT_REW1`: "The corpse is fresh. {catname} devours it, not complaining about a good meal."
- `EVENT_DEADCAT_REW2`: "{catname} ravenously consumes the dead cat while the rest of the party looks on awkwardly... <br/>  <br/> {catname} appears to relish this opportunity far too much!"
- `EVENT_DEADCAT_REW3`: "A gang of cats walks in on {catname}, {his} mouth still full of fur and whiskers. <br/>  <br/> They beat up the party for desecrating the dead!"
- `EVENT_DEADCAT_REW4`: "Assuming {catname} will stay clear of the corpse, the cats look back in horror as {catname} begins cannibalizing the corpse! <br/>  <br/> They will never look at {catname} the same again... What a monster!"
- `EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW`: "Examine"
- `EVENT_DEADCAT_REW5`: "{catname} digs through the dead cat's pockets and finds some catnip!"
- `EVENT_DEADCAT_REW6`: "After closer examination, {catname} discovers it was just sleeping! <br/>  <br/> Who sleeps in a position like that?"
- `EVENT_DEADCAT_REW7`: "{catname} checks for a pulse on the cat with {his} paw... <br/>  <br/> It wasn't dead! Rudely startled from a deep slumber, the cat scratches and bites at the cats!"
- `EVENT_DEADCAT_REW8`: "After sniffing the cat, {catname} realizes that he might have known it. <br/>  <br/> {catname} is suddenly in a very bad mood..."
- `EVENT_LOOT_ANSW`: "Loot"
- `EVENT_DEADCAT_REW9`: "{catname} reaches beneath the cat and finds something!"
- `EVENT_DEADCAT_REW10`: "This cat has been dead for a while... it won't be needing that fur anymore! <br/>  <br/> {catname} tears off its hide and repurposes it!"
- `EVENT_DEADCAT_REW11`: "{catname} turns over the body. The body is infested with maggots! <br/>  <br/> The maggots spill out everywhere!"
- `EVENT_DEADCAT_REW12`: "{catname} turns over the body... <br/>  <br/> It was a trick! The cat snatches something from {catname}'s pockets and scurries away!"
- `EVENT_DEADCAT_REW13`: "{catname} turns over the body only to see {his} own face staring back at {him}! <br/>  <br/> {catname}'s hair stands up on end as a chill goes down {his} spine..."

```
DeadCat {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_DEADCAT_NAME"
        cat_choice random //choose, random, none (random and none are equivalent)
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame deadcat
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_DEADCAT_QUES"

        options {
            eat {
                label "EVENT_EAT_ANSW"
                stat con

                good {
                    set_frame 4
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_DEADCAT_REW1"
                            heal 10
                            gain_food [2 10]

                            global_effect_next_fight {
                                KillEnemyOfTypeAtBattleStart {
                                    enemy_type cat
                                    fallback_spawn [TomTom Kitten CatCaller Mangy]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_DEADCAT_REW2"
                            gain_disorder Cannibal
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 4
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_DEADCAT_REW3"
                            party_damage 3
                            self_damage 8
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_DEADCAT_REW4"
                            gain_disorder Shunned
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            examine {
                label "EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW"
                stat int

                good {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_DEADCAT_REW5"
                            get_item_from_pool [Catnip, CatnipBig, KiloOfCatnip]
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_DEADCAT_REW6"
                            gain_cat_familiar 1
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_DEADCAT_REW7"
                            party_damage [1 6]
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_DEADCAT_REW8"
                            gain_disorder Distemper
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            loot {
                label "EVENT_LOOT_ANSW"
                stat dex
                animation choice_dex_alt

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_DEADCAT_REW9"
                            gain_coins [1 10]
                            get_item_from_pool consumables
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_DEADCAT_REW10"
                            get_item_from_pool cat_armor
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            random_pool [
                                {
                                    prompt "EVENT_DEADCAT_REW11"
                                    spawn_unit_next_fight {
                                        object Maggot
                                        count 2
                                        spawn_side cats
                                    }
                                }
                                {
                                    prompt "EVENT_DEADCAT_REW12"
                                    lose_item inventory
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_DEADCAT_REW13"
                            //gain_disorder_from_pool mental_disorders
                            spawn_reflection_next_fight 1
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `BonePile`
**Source:** `dead_body.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_BONEPILE_NAME`: "Bone Pile"
- `EVENT_BONEPILE_QUES`: "Bones from some long-dead creature lie piled on the ground in front of {catname}."
- `EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW`: "Examine"
- `EVENT_BONEPILE_REW1`: "{catname} rummages through the bones, looking for anything useful..."
- `EVENT_BONEPILE_REW2`: "{catname} sifts through the pile of bones, hunting for something useful..."
- `EVENT_BONEPILE_REW3`: "{catname} approaches the bones, reaching out to touch them... <br/>  <br/> Rattling and clicking, the bones reassemble into a skeletal monster!"
- `EVENT_BONEPILE_REW4`: "{catname} sees something staring back at {him} from inside the skull's eyeless sockets. <br/>  <br/> {catname} stares back at it, unblinking, for what seems like years as terror envelops {his} mind with an iron grip..."
- `EVENT_DESTROY_ANSW`: "Destroy"
- `EVENT_BONEPILE_REW5`: "{catname} cracks open the bones, exposing the moist, red and juicy marrow within."
- `EVENT_BONEPILE_REW6`: "{catname} trips and lands among the sharp, jagged bones."
- `EVENT_BONEPILE_REW7`: "{catname} tries to break a particularly large bone, but it snaps back on {him}, breaking {his} arm!"
- `EVENT_LOOT_ANSW`: "Loot"
- `EVENT_BONEPILE_REW8`: "{catname} assembles some of the bones into makeshift equipment!"
- `EVENT_BONEPILE_REW9`: "An ominous noise comes from the bones as wind passes through them… <br/>  <br/> {catname} hears a terrible cracking sound as {his} leg snaps in half!"
- `EVENT_BONEPILE_REW10`: "{catname} contorts as {his} bones vibrate painfully within {his} body... <br/>  <br/> Multiple bones shatter, and {catname} collapses to the ground, screaming in agony!"

```
BonePile {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_BONEPILE_NAME"
        cat_choice random //choose, random, none (random and none are equivalent)
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame bonepile
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_BONEPILE_QUES"

        options {
            examine {
                label "EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW"
                stat int

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_BONEPILE_REW1"
                            get_item_from_pool bone_equipment
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_BONEPILE_REW2"
                            get_item SnaggleTooth
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_BONEPILE_REW3"
                            spawn_unit_next_fight {
                                object [SkeletonCat TallSkeletonCat]
                                count 1
                                spawn_side enemies
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_BONEPILE_REW4"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Fear 10
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            destroy {
                label "EVENT_DESTROY_ANSW"
                stat str

                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_BONEPILE_REW5"
                    set_frame 4
                    reward {
                        common {
                            heal 10
                            gain_food [10 25]
                        }
                        rare {
                            get_item BoneMarrow
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 4
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_BONEPILE_REW6"
                            self_damage [1 10]
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_BONEPILE_REW7"
                            injury str
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            loot {
                label "EVENT_LOOT_ANSW"
                stat dex
                animation choice_dex_alt

                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_BONEPILE_REW8"
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            get_item_from_pool bone_weapons
                        }
                        rare {
                            get_item_from_pool bone_armor
                            get_item_from_pool bone_armor
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_BONEPILE_REW9"
                            injury spd
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_BONEPILE_REW10"
                            injury str
                            injury spd
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `GutPile`
**Source:** `dead_body.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_GUTPILE_NAME`: "Gut Pile"
- `EVENT_GUTPILE_QUES`: "{catname} finds a grotesque mound of guts heaped into a large pile... <br/>  <br/> What a strange sight!"
- `EVENT_EAT_ANSW`: "Eat"
- `EVENT_GUTPILE_REW1`: "The whole party joins in on the feast! The guts taste tangy, but they go down easily. <br/>  <br/> Sometime later the cats feel a bit ill… <br/>  <br/> The cats are poisoned!"
- `EVENT_GUTPILE_REW2`: "{catname} wolfs down a particularly delicious and fatty liver!"
- `EVENT_GUTPILE_REW3`: "{catname} gobbles up the guts, but {he} can't get the taste of rotting, undigested food out of {his} mouth..."
- `EVENT_GUTPILE_REW4`: "As {catname} slurps down the slimy guts, {he} feels something wriggling in {his} throat..."
- `EVENT_LOOT_ANSW`: "Loot"
- `EVENT_GUTPILE_REW5`: "As {catname} pulls apart the large intestine, money spills out onto the ground!"
- `EVENT_GUTPILE_REW6`: "{catname} riffles through the sticky guts. {He} thinks they look stylish!"
- `EVENT_GUTPILE_REW7`: "When {catname} disturbs the pile, a swarm of flies rises up to protect their dinner! <br/>  <br/> The flies chase the party into the next battle."
- `EVENT_GUTPILE_REW8`: "A strange bug leaps from the pile and burrows its way deep into {catname}'s belly button!"
- `EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW`: "Examine"
- `EVENT_GUTPILE_REW9`: "{catname} looks around in the pile of guts and finds some edible scraps."
- `EVENT_GUTPILE_REW10`: "{catname} notices that a stomach in the pile looks particularly bloated and tears it open... <br/>  <br/> It's full of undigested food!"
- `EVENT_GUTPILE_REW11`: "{catname} and the cats eat some of the organs, but they are rotten and taste disgusting!"
- `EVENT_GUTPILE_REW12`: "{catname} discovers something amazing hidden among the guts... <br/>  <br/> A small doodie! {He} hides {his} findings from the party. Such a precious turd will no doubt cause jealousy!"

```
GutPile {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_GUTPILE_NAME"
        cat_choice random //choose, random, none (random and none are equivalent)
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame gutspile
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_GUTPILE_QUES"

        options {
            eat {
                label "EVENT_EAT_ANSW"
                stat con

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_GUTPILE_REW1"
                            party_heal 100%
                            gain_food [5 15]

                            party_status_next_fight {
                                Poison 1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_GUTPILE_REW2"
                            gain_food [2 5]
                            permanent_stats {
                                con 1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_GUTPILE_REW3"
                            gain_disorder_from_pool all_disorders
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_GUTPILE_REW4"
                            get_parasite_from_pool parasites
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            loot {
                label "EVENT_LOOT_ANSW"
                stat dex
                animation choice_dex_alt

                good {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_GUTPILE_REW5"
                            gain_coins [1 15]
                            gain_food [1 15]
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_GUTPILE_REW6"
                            get_item_from_pool guts_items
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_GUTPILE_REW7"

                            spawn_unit_next_fight {
                                object Fly
                                count 3
                                spawn_side cats
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_GUTPILE_REW8"
                            get_parasite_from_pool parasites
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            examine {
                label "EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW"
                stat int

                good {
                    set_frame 4
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_GUTPILE_REW9"
                            get_item_from_pool food
                            gain_food [1 5]
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_GUTPILE_REW10"
                            gain_food [1 5]
                            get_item_from_pool food
                            get_item_from_pool food
                            get_item_from_pool food
                            get_item_from_pool food
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 4
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_GUTPILE_REW11"
                            party_damage 5
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_GUTPILE_REW12"
                            get_parasite AlluringDoodie
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `SeveredHead`
**Source:** `dead_body.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_SEVEREDHEAD_NAME`: "Severed Head"
- `EVENT_SEVEREDHEAD_QUES`: "{catname} finds a severed head lying on the ground. Its unblinking eye stares right through {him}. <br/>  <br/> What should {he} do?"
- `EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW`: "Examine"
- `EVENT_SEVEREDHEAD_REW1`: "The head whispers something to {catname} as {he} gets close, but {catname} can't make out what it's saying."
- `EVENT_SEVEREDHEAD_REW2`: "{catname} finds a small boil on the back of the head. Pushing the boil causes the head's eyeball to drop to the floor, blinking in seemingly random intervals."
- `EVENT_SEVEREDHEAD_REW3`: "A chill runs up {catname}'s spine as the head tells {him} a secret. {He} will no doubt take this to the grave."
- `EVENT_SEVEREDHEAD_REW4`: "The head screams, and its eye rolls back into its head! <br/>  <br/> {catname}'s brain flashes with memories that are not {his} own."
- `EVENT_DESTROY_ANSW`: "Destroy"
- `EVENT_SEVEREDHEAD_REW5`: "{catname} attempts to attack the fleshy head, but stops short when {he} hears it start to whimper. A single tear drops from its quivering eyeball."
- `EVENT_SEVEREDHEAD_REW6`: "The head weeps as {catname} tears it apart with all of {his} might. <br/>  <br/> A single tooth flies from its gaping maw… It looks valuable!"
- `EVENT_SEVEREDHEAD_REW7`: "{catname}'s paw snags on the large head's tooth, tearing {his} flesh. The head seems to smile as {catname} bleeds profusely."
- `EVENT_SEVEREDHEAD_REW8`: "The head's mouth opens impossibly wide as {catname} moves in to attack. It snaps down on {his} arm, tearing muscle from the bone!"
- `EVENT_EAT_ANSW`: "Eat"
- `EVENT_SEVEREDHEAD_REW9`: "{catname} bites into the head. It tastes bland and unsatisfying."
- `EVENT_SEVEREDHEAD_REW10`: "{catname} bites through the skull of the strange head, tasting its salty brains… <br/>  <br/> {He} feels invigorated!"
- `EVENT_SEVEREDHEAD_REW11`: "As {catname} gets close, the head shoots something from its eye socket that attaches to {catname}'s head. <br/>  <br/> {catname} feels strange..."
- `EVENT_SEVEREDHEAD_REW12`: "{catname} stops short as a guttural gurgling begins to resonate from the bottom half of the head. <br/>  <br/> {catname}'s stomach churns, and {he} begins to vomit profusely."

```
SeveredHead {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_SEVEREDHEAD_NAME"
        cat_choice random //choose, random, none (random and none are equivalent)
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame severedhead
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_SEVEREDHEAD_QUES"

        options {
            examine {
                label "EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW"
                stat int

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_SEVEREDHEAD_REW1"
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_SEVEREDHEAD_REW2"
                            get_item BlinkingEyeball
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                        prompt "EVENT_SEVEREDHEAD_REW3"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Fear 1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_SEVEREDHEAD_REW4"
                            gain_disorder_from_pool mental_disorders
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            destroy {
                label "EVENT_DESTROY_ANSW"
                stat str

                good {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_SEVEREDHEAD_REW5"
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_SEVEREDHEAD_REW6" 
                            get_item GoldenTooth
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                        prompt "EVENT_SEVEREDHEAD_REW7"
                            self_damage [4 8]
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Bleed 2
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                        prompt "EVENT_SEVEREDHEAD_REW8"
                            self_damage [6 10]
                            injury str 
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            eat {
                label "EVENT_EAT_ANSW"
                stat con

                good {
                    set_frame 4
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_SEVEREDHEAD_REW9"
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_SEVEREDHEAD_REW10" 
                            permanent_stats {
                                con 2
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 4
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_SEVEREDHEAD_REW11"
                            get_parasite CursedHairball
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_SEVEREDHEAD_REW12"
                            injury con
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `CatPelts`
**Source:** `dead_body.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_PILEOFCATPELTS_NAME`: "Pile of Cat Pelts"
- `EVENT_PILEOFCATPELTS_QUES`: "{catname} finds a giant pile of cat pelts... How terrible!"
- `EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW`: "Examine"
- `EVENT_PILEOFCATPELTS_REW1`: "Among the skinned cats, {catname} discovers a variety of useful stuff."
- `EVENT_PILEOFCATPELTS_REW2`: "{catname} dons one of the pelts, and wears it fiercely!"
- `EVENT_PILEOFCATPELTS_REW3`: "{catname} digs through the pile of cat pelts, but only ends up with dried blood and maggots stuck in {his} paws... <br/>  <br/> This was a mistake!"
- `EVENT_PILEOFCATPELTS_REW4`: "As {catname} looks closely, {he} recognizes some of the faces on these pelts… <br/>  <br/> {catname} is holding the skins of {his} grandparents! Who did this!?"
- `EVENT_LOOT_ANSW`: "Loot"
- `EVENT_PILEOFCATPELTS_REW5`: "Among the skinned cats, {catname} discovers a variety of useful stuff."
- `EVENT_PILEOFCATPELTS_REW6`: "{catname} thinks the pelts would make a great outfit!"
- `EVENT_PILEOFCATPELTS_REW7`: "The pile is riddled with maggots. They burrow into {catname}'s skin!"
- `EVENT_PILEOFCATPELTS_REW8`: "{catname} notices the faces on the pelts are moving. {He} leans closer to hear what they are whispering... <br/>  <br/> [i]HELP US!![/i]"
- `EVENT_DESTROY_ANSW`: "Destroy"
- `EVENT_PILEOFCATPELTS_REW9`: "{catname} digs around in the pile and finds some useful stuff."
- `EVENT_PILEOFCATPELTS_REW10`: "{catname} tears apart one of the better pelts and fashions it into something {he} can wear!"
- `EVENT_PILEOFCATPELTS_REW11`: "Ripping apart the cat skins, {catname} becomes covered in fleas!"
- `EVENT_PILEOFCATPELTS_REW12`: "{catname} notices something odd about the pelts… <br/>  <br/> They seem to be letting out faint screams each time {catname} hits them…"

```
CatPelts {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_PILEOFCATPELTS_NAME"
        cat_choice random //choose, random, none (random and none are equivalent)
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame catpelts
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_PILEOFCATPELTS_QUES"

        options {
            examine {
                label "EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW"
                stat int

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_PILEOFCATPELTS_REW1"
                            get_item_from_pool consumables
                            heal 3
                            party_heal 1
                            gain_food [1 5]
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_PILEOFCATPELTS_REW2"
                            get_item_from_pool [CatHideHat CatHideMask CatHideArmor]
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_PILEOFCATPELTS_REW3"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                ConstitutionUp -1
                                StrengthUp -1
                                Poison 1
                            }
                            damage 2
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_PILEOFCATPELTS_REW4"
                            gain_disorder Anxiety
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            loot {
                label "EVENT_LOOT_ANSW"
                stat dex
                animation choice_dex_alt

                good {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_PILEOFCATPELTS_REW5"
                            get_item_from_pool consumables
                            heal 3
                            party_heal 1
                            gain_food [1 5]
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_PILEOFCATPELTS_REW6"
                            get_item_from_pool [CatHideHat CatHideMask CatHideArmor]
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_PILEOFCATPELTS_REW7"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                ConstitutionUp -1
                                StrengthUp -1
                                Poison 1
                            }
                            damage 2
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_PILEOFCATPELTS_REW8"
                            gain_disorder Anxiety
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            destroy {
                label "EVENT_DESTROY_ANSW"
                stat str

                good {
                    set_frame 4
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_PILEOFCATPELTS_REW9"
                            get_item_from_pool consumables
                            heal 3
                            party_heal 1
                            gain_food [1 5]
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_PILEOFCATPELTS_REW10"
                            get_item_from_pool [CatHideHat CatHideMask CatHideArmor]
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 4
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_PILEOFCATPELTS_REW11"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                ConstitutionUp -1
                                StrengthUp -1
                                Poison 1
                            }
                            damage 2
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_PILEOFCATPELTS_REW12"
                            gain_disorder Anxiety
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

        }
    }
}
```

### `Stain`
**Source:** `dead_body.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTAIN_NAME`: "Mysterious Stain"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTAIN_QUES`: "There is a mysterious stain on the ground here... <br/>  <br/> {catname} wonders what type of strange happenings could have caused it?"
- `EVENT_LICK_ANSW`: "Lick"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTAIN_REW1`: "{catname} licks the strange surface... <br/>  <br/> It tastes sweet, with lumps of brain matter hiding beneath the dried blood. Delicious! <br/>  <br/> {catname} feels a surge of energy for the next battle!"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTAIN_REW2`: "The stain on the ground tastes funny, but {catname} keeps licking it, swallowing flakes of dried blood and hair. <br/>  <br/> When {he} is done licking it clean, {catname} feels a strange sensation grip {him} as {his} body mutates!"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTAIN_REW3`: "{catname} drags {his} tongue over the ground, tearing up dry flakes of the material into {his} mouth... <br/>  <br/> {catname} retches as old hairs in the stain get stuck in {his} teeth!"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTAIN_REW4`: "Dried blood and hairs from the stain make {catname}'s stomach turn as {he} digests the rough surface, giving {him} cramps!"
- `EVENT_LEAVE_ANSW`: "Leave"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTAIN_REW5`: "{catname} opts to not place {his} soft tongue on the new surface. Who knows what it could have been?"

```
Stain {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTAIN_NAME"
        cat_choice random //choose, random, none (random and none are equivalent)
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame mysteriousstain
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTAIN_QUES"

        options {
            lick {
                label "EVENT_LICK_ANSW"
                stat con

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTAIN_REW1"
                            random_pool [ //RandomStatUp does not show on cat info in map.
                                {
                                    self_status_next_fight {
                                        StrengthUp 2
                                    }
                                }{
                                    self_status_next_fight {
                                        DexterityUp 2
                                    }
                                }{
                                    self_status_next_fight {
                                        ConstitutionUp 2
                                    }
                                }{
                                    self_status_next_fight {
                                        IntelligenceUp 2
                                    }
                                }{
                                    self_status_next_fight {
                                        SpeedUp 2
                                    }
                                }{
                                    self_status_next_fight {
                                        CharismaUp 2
                                    }
                                }{
                                    self_status_next_fight {
                                        LuckUp 2
                                    }
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTAIN_REW2"
                            random_mutation 1
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTAIN_REW3"
                            random_pool [ //RandomStatDown does not show on cat info in map.
                                {
                                    self_status_next_fight {
                                        StrengthUp -2
                                    }
                                }{
                                    self_status_next_fight {
                                        DexterityUp -2
                                    }
                                }{
                                    self_status_next_fight {
                                        ConstitutionUp -2
                                    }
                                }{
                                    self_status_next_fight {
                                        IntelligenceUp -2
                                    }
                                }{
                                    self_status_next_fight {
                                        SpeedUp -2
                                    }
                                }{
                                    self_status_next_fight {
                                        CharismaUp -2
                                    }
                                }{
                                    self_status_next_fight {
                                        LuckUp -2
                                    }
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTAIN_REW4"
                            gain_disorder_from_pool physical_disorders
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            leave {
                label "EVENT_LEAVE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave

                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTAIN_REW5"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `DecayingCarcass`
**Source:** `dead_body.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_DECAYINGCARCASS_NAME`: "Decaying Carcass"
- `EVENT_DECAYINGCARCASS_QUES`: "{catname} comes across the decaying remains of a long dead creature. It appears to move slightly, but {he} thinks it might have just been the numerous insects slowly devouring it."
- `EVENT_EAT_ANSW`: "Eat"
- `EVENT_DECAYINGCARCASS_REW1`: "{catname}'s eyes glint as {he} catches the scent of decay. Drawn by the odor {he} leans in and bites into the decaying flesh..."
- `EVENT_DECAYINGCARCASS_REW2`: "{catname} feasts on the ripe flesh, it's been a while since {his} last meal. {He} briefly feels an itching sensation, then a surge of energy!"
- `EVENT_DECAYINGCARCASS_REW3`: "{catname} bites into the rotting carcass and swallows the flesh, still writhing with small things."
- `EVENT_DECAYINGCARCASS_REW4`: "{catname}'s primal instincts overcome {his} better judgement and he tears into the putrid flesh, ignoring the many creatures lurking within the decayed meat."
- `EVENT_LOOT_ANSW`: "Loot"
- `EVENT_DECAYINGCARCASS_REW5`: "As {catname} investigates the carcass, a large maggot crawls out, looking inquisitively at {him}. It seems friendly?"
- `EVENT_DECAYINGCARCASS_REW6`: "Scavenging through the corpse, {catname} finds a small larva buried in the boney flesh."
- `EVENT_DECAYINGCARCASS_REW7`: "As {catname} approaches the corpse, it shudders, as if letting out a final gasp of breath. Before {he} can react, the creature lashes out with a half decomposed limb and claws at {him}."
- `EVENT_DECAYINGCARCASS_REW8`: "{catname} digs through the decomposing flesh and exposed bone, searching for something valuable. With {his} arm deep in the mass, {he} feels something latch onto {him}..."
- `EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW`: "Examine"
- `EVENT_DECAYINGCARCASS_REW9`: "{catname} circles the carcass, nose wrinkling at the foul odor and does not see anything of note."
- `EVENT_DECAYINGCARCASS_REW10`: "{His} eyes alert, {catname} takes in every detail of the corpse. By studying the inverted flesh of bones and sinews, {catname} feels like {he} has a better grasp of anatomy."
- `EVENT_DECAYINGCARCASS_REW11`: "The pungent stench of the decaying carcass overwhelms {catname}'s senses. Unable to focus {he} turns away instead."
- `EVENT_DECAYINGCARCASS_REW12`: "{catname} extends a paw, prodding the carcass gently. As {he} does, a swarm of flies takes to the air and {catname} jumps back. It's too late however, as an opportunistic parasite latches on."

```
DecayingCarcass {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_DECAYINGCARCASS_NAME"
        cat_choice random //choose, random, none (random and none are equivalent)
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame decaying_carcass
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_DECAYINGCARCASS_QUES"

        options {
            eat {
                label "EVENT_EAT_ANSW"
                stat con

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_DECAYINGCARCASS_REW1"
                            get_parasite_from_pool parasites
                            permanent_stats {
                                random 1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_DECAYINGCARCASS_REW2"
                            get_parasite_from_pool good_parasites
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_DECAYINGCARCASS_REW3"
                            get_parasite_from_pool parasites
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_DECAYINGCARCASS_REW4"
                            get_parasite_from_pool parasites
                            gain_disorder_from_pool physical_disorders
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            loot {
                label "EVENT_LOOT_ANSW"
                stat dex
                animation choice_dex_alt

                good {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_DECAYINGCARCASS_REW5"
                            gain_familiar CharmedMaggot
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_DECAYINGCARCASS_REW6"
                            get_and_equip_item FlyLarva
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_DECAYINGCARCASS_REW7"
                            self_damage 2
                        }

                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_DECAYINGCARCASS_REW8"
                            get_parasite_from_pool parasites
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            examine {
                label "EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW"
                stat int

                good {
                    set_frame 4
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_DECAYINGCARCASS_REW9"
                            //nothing
                        }

                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_DECAYINGCARCASS_REW10"
                            permanent_stats {
                                int 1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 4
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_DECAYINGCARCASS_REW11"
                            //nothing
                        }

                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_DECAYINGCARCASS_REW12"
                            get_parasite_from_pool parasites
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `APoop`
**Source:** `dead_body.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_APOOP_NAME`: "A Poop"
- `EVENT_APOOP_QUES`: "{catname} finds a small pile of excrement. <br/>  <br/> {He} wrinkles {his} nose as the dropping permeates the room with a foul stench..."
- `EVENT_DESTROY_ANSW`: "Destroy"
- `EVENT_APOOP_REW1`: "With a well aimed strike, {catname} strikes at the poop and quickly dispatches it! <br/>  <br/> {He} feels something metallic..."
- `EVENT_APOOP_REW2`: "Without hesitation, {catname} pounces on the poop and eviscerates it. <br/>  <br/> Whatever creature who left it behind must have liked eating gold!"
- `EVENT_APOOP_REW3`: "Not taking any chances, {catname} strikes the small pile of excrement, spraying the walls with debris. <br/>  <br/> {He} made a mess but nothing else seems to have happened."
- `EVENT_APOOP_REW4`: "{catname} pounces forward, crushing the poop in {his} paws! Excrement sprays everywhere, covering {catname}'s fur with stench. <br/>  <br/> The rest of the party takes a step back, clearly disgusted."
- `EVENT_EAT_ANSW`: "Eat"
- `EVENT_APOOP_REW5`: "Without thinking twice, {catname} takes a large bite of poop. <br/>  <br/> {He} feels a little better."
- `EVENT_APOOP_REW6`: "{catname} approaches the poop slowly, enjoying the fragrant stench. <br/>  <br/> {He} chows down on it furiously. Is there any more?"
- `EVENT_APOOP_REW7`: "As it slides down, {catname} starts to realize how bad of an idea this was. <br/>  <br/> {His} stomach turns and {he} starts to feel sick..."
- `EVENT_APOOP_REW8`: "{catname} begins to eat the poop but lets out a cry of pain as {he} swallows. <br/>  <br/> The strange excrement shifts and expands inside of {him}..."
- `EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW`: "Examine"
- `EVENT_APOOP_REW9`: "{catname} looks carefully at the poop and finds a small object sticking out..."
- `EVENT_APOOP_REW10`: "Buried in the poop {catname} thinks {he} sees something shiny!"
- `EVENT_APOOP_REW11`: "{catname} looks closely at the poop... <br/>  <br/> [i]"This is incredible! It will make a fantastic hat!"[/i] <br/>  <br/> {catname} is obsessed with the poop and plops it on {his} head."
- `EVENT_APOOP_REW12`: "{catname} digs around in the excrement, but only manages to get {himself} covered in feces! <br/>  <br/> The rest of the party turn their noses away from {him} in horror at the stench..."

```
APoop {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_APOOP_NAME"
        cat_choice random //choose, random, none (random and none are equivalent)
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame a_poop
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_APOOP_QUES"

        options {
            destroy {
                label "EVENT_DESTROY_ANSW"
                stat str

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_APOOP_REW1"
                            gain_coins 1
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_APOOP_REW2"
                            gain_coins 10
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_APOOP_REW3"
                            //gain nothing
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_APOOP_REW4"
                            gain_disorder Stinky
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            eat {
                label "EVENT_EAT_ANSW"
                stat con

                good {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_APOOP_REW5"
                            heal 1
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_APOOP_REW6"
                            gain_disorder Scatological
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_APOOP_REW7"
                            gain_disorder_from_pool stomach_disorders
                        }

                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_APOOP_REW8"
                            gain_disorder IntestinalProlapse
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            examine {
                label "EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW"
                stat int

                good {
                    set_frame 4
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_APOOP_REW9"
                            get_item_from_pool consumables
                        }

                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_APOOP_REW10"
                            get_item_from_pool poop_items
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 4
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_APOOP_REW11"
                            get_parasite EnchantingPoop_Cursed
                        }

                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_APOOP_REW12"
                            gain_disorder Stinky
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `ALargePoop`
**Source:** `dead_body.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_ALARGEPOOP_NAME`: "A Large Poop"
- `EVENT_ALARGEPOOP_QUES`: "{catname} finds a large mound of poop. <br/>  <br/> {catname} covers {his} nose with {his} paw to keep {himself} from gagging at the smell."
- `EVENT_DESTROY_ANSW`: "Destroy"
- `EVENT_ALARGEPOOP_REW1`: "{catname} smashes the poop, spraying it across the floor. <br/>  <br/> The distinct [i]plink!, plink![/i] of coins scattering on the ground reverberates throughout the room."
- `EVENT_ALARGEPOOP_REW2`: "{catname} pulls apart the pile and finds a large number of coins buried inside!"
- `EVENT_ALARGEPOOP_REW3`: "{catname} strikes the mound and sprays excrement all over {himself}... <br/>  <br/> The other cats jump back in horror at the stench!"
- `EVENT_ALARGEPOOP_REW4`: "{catname} dives into the pile of poop, destroying it from the inside out! <br/>  <br/> {He} emerges a few moments later, absolutely covered in brown, smelly excrement..."
- `EVENT_EAT_ANSW`: "Eat"
- `EVENT_ALARGEPOOP_REW5`: "{catname} bites into the soft heap... it tastes great! <br/>  <br/> {catname} can't get enough of it. {His} eyes dart around, hungry for more poop..."
- `EVENT_ALARGEPOOP_REW6`: "{catname} devours the poop, excrement flying everywhere as he feasts."
- `EVENT_ALARGEPOOP_REW7`: "{catname} takes a large bite of the feces. <br/>  <br/> {His} insides begin to gurgle and twist!"
- `EVENT_ALARGEPOOP_REW8`: "{catname} eagerly gobbles down large bites of the poop. <br/>  <br/> {His} insides swell and groan as {his} stomach reacts to the foul meal!"
- `EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW`: "Examine"
- `EVENT_ALARGEPOOP_REW9`: "{catname} discovers that the poop has become fossilized! <br/>  <br/> {He} gingerly picks up the poop and stashes it in {his} pocket."
- `EVENT_ALARGEPOOP_REW10`: "{catname} examines the heap of poop, and finds some items inside!"
- `EVENT_ALARGEPOOP_REW11`: "{catname} bets there is something valuable hiding inside the poop and makes it {his} mission to dig through every last brown log!"
- `EVENT_ALARGEPOOP_REW12`: "{catname} believes {he} sees something inside the poop and leaps into the pile, desperately searching for valuables! <br/>  <br/> Hopefully that was at least a valuable lesson."

```
ALargePoop { 
    intro {
        title "EVENT_ALARGEPOOP_NAME"
        cat_choice random //choose, random, none (random and none are equivalent)
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame a_large_poop
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_ALARGEPOOP_QUES"

        options {
            destroy {
                label "EVENT_DESTROY_ANSW"
                stat str

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_ALARGEPOOP_REW1"
                            gain_coins 10
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_ALARGEPOOP_REW2"
                            gain_coins 25
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_ALARGEPOOP_REW3"
                            gain_disorder Stinky
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_ALARGEPOOP_REW4"
                            gain_disorder Stinky
                            get_parasite FecalHood_Cursed
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            eat {
                label "EVENT_EAT_ANSW"
                stat con

                good {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_ALARGEPOOP_REW5"
                            gain_disorder Scatological

                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_ALARGEPOOP_REW6"
                            gain_disorder Scatological
                            get_item EnchantingPoop
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_ALARGEPOOP_REW7"
                            gain_disorder IntestinalProlapse
                        }

                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_ALARGEPOOP_REW8"
                            injury con
                            gain_disorder Incontinence
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            examine {
                label "EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW"
                stat int

                good {
                    set_frame 4
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_ALARGEPOOP_REW9"
                            get_item_from_pool poop_items
                        }

                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_ALARGEPOOP_REW10" 
                            get_item_from_pool poop_items
                            get_item_from_pool {
                                pool chapter
                                restrict trinket
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_ALARGEPOOP_REW11"
                            gain_disorder Stinky
                        }

                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_ALARGEPOOP_REW12"
                            gain_disorder Stinky
                            get_parasite FecalMask_Cursed
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `AMegaHugePoop`
**Source:** `dead_body.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_AMEGAHUGEPOOP_NAME`: "A Mega Huge Poop"
- `EVENT_AMEGAHUGEPOOP_QUES`: "{catname} has found a mega huge poop! <br/>  <br/> {catname} looks up in awe at the massive monument to defecation towering above {him}."
- `EVENT_DESTROY_ANSW`: "Destroy"
- `EVENT_AMEGAHUGEPOOP_REW1`: "{catname} lays into the massive poop with {his} paws, sending chunks flying everywhere! <br/>  <br/> Whatever laid this beauty must have also eaten a whole lot of coins!"
- `EVENT_AMEGAHUGEPOOP_REW2`: "Layers of brown poop crumble before {catname} as {he} pulls back the side of the pile, revealing a massive pile of coins hidden inside!"
- `EVENT_AMEGAHUGEPOOP_REW3`: "{catname}'s paws splatter excrement everywhere as {he} punches {his} way through the massive poop. <br/>  <br/> {He} steps away, proud of {his} work, but covered in feces!"
- `EVENT_AMEGAHUGEPOOP_REW4`: "{catname} dives face first into the massive poop and gets covered in feces! <br/>  <br/> The other cats run in terror from {his} stench!"
- `EVENT_EAT_ANSW`: "Eat"
- `EVENT_AMEGAHUGEPOOP_REW5`: "{catname} eats {his} fill from the huge pile of poop, acquiring an insatiable appetite for the peculiar flavor!"
- `EVENT_AMEGAHUGEPOOP_REW6`: "The poop tastes delicious and {catname} eats until {his} belly is almost bursting!"
- `EVENT_AMEGAHUGEPOOP_REW7`: "{catname} devours many rolls of the brown stool... <br/>  <br/> {His} stomach rumbles and {he} collapses in pain!"
- `EVENT_AMEGAHUGEPOOP_REW8`: "{catname} consumes the poop but it tastes gross! <br/>  <br/> {He} feels a growing pressure from {his} stomach as gasses from the feces begin to expand!"
- `EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW`: "Examine"
- `EVENT_AMEGAHUGEPOOP_REW9`: "{catname} carefully digs through the huge pile and finds a section that has fossilized!"
- `EVENT_AMEGAHUGEPOOP_REW10`: "{catname} meticulously searches through the gargantuan pile of stool and finds several trinkets!"
- `EVENT_AMEGAHUGEPOOP_REW11`: "{catname} pokes the huge pile of poop, looking for loot, and it collapses down on top of {him}!"
- `EVENT_AMEGAHUGEPOOP_REW12`: "{catname} leaps into the huge pile of feces, looking for treasure! <br/>  <br/> Moments later {catname} crawls out, drenched in poop!"

```
AMegaHugePoop {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_AMEGAHUGEPOOP_NAME"
        cat_choice random //choose, random, none (random and none are equivalent)
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame a_mega_large_poop
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_AMEGAHUGEPOOP_QUES"

        options {
            destroy {
                label "EVENT_DESTROY_ANSW"
                stat str

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_AMEGAHUGEPOOP_REW1"
                            gain_coins 25
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_AMEGAHUGEPOOP_REW2"
                            gain_coins 50
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_AMEGAHUGEPOOP_REW3"
                            gain_disorder Stinky
                            get_parasite FecalHood_Cursed
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_AMEGAHUGEPOOP_REW4"
                            gain_disorder Stinky
                            get_parasite FecalHood_Cursed
                            get_parasite FecalNecklace_Cursed
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            eat {
                label "EVENT_EAT_ANSW"
                stat con

                good {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_AMEGAHUGEPOOP_REW5"
                            gain_disorder Scatological
                            get_item EnchantingPoop
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_AMEGAHUGEPOOP_REW6"
                            gain_disorder Scatological
                            get_item EnchantingPoop
                            permanent_stats {
                                con 2
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_AMEGAHUGEPOOP_REW7"
                            injury con
                            gain_disorder Incontinence
                        }

                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_AMEGAHUGEPOOP_REW8"
                            gain_disorder ExplosiveGas
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            examine {
                label "EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW"
                stat int

                good {
                    set_frame 4
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_AMEGAHUGEPOOP_REW9"
                            get_item_from_pool poop_items
                            get_item_from_pool{
                                pool chapter_common
                                restrict trinket
                            }
                        }

                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_AMEGAHUGEPOOP_REW10"
                            get_item_from_pool{
                                pool chapter_common
                                restrict trinket
                            }
                            get_item_from_pool{
                                pool chapter
                                restrict trinket
                            }
                            get_item_from_pool{
                                pool chapter_rare
                                restrict trinket
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_AMEGAHUGEPOOP_REW11"
                            gain_disorder Stinky
                            get_parasite FecalMask_Cursed

                        }

                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_AMEGAHUGEPOOP_REW12"
                            gain_disorder Stinky
                            get_parasite FecalMask_Cursed
                            get_parasite FecalNecklace_Cursed
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `MummifiedCorpse`
**Source:** `dead_body.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_MUMMIFIEDCORPSE_NAME`: "Mummified Corpse"
- `EVENT_MUMMIFIEDCORPSE_QUES`: "{catname} comes across a mummified corpse. <br/>  <br/> The body is dried and hardened, frozen in time in the tragic pose of its final moment."
- `EVENT_DESTROY_ANSW`: "Destroy"
- `EVENT_MUMMIFIEDCORPSE_REW1`: "{catname} tears into the fragile body, crumbling the bones and dry skin to dust. <br/>  <br/> {catname} feels very strong!"
- `EVENT_MUMMIFIEDCORPSE_REW2`: "{catname} mercilessly pulls the mummified body apart. <br/>  <br/> {catname} purrs as {his} demonstration of strength impresses the others!"
- `EVENT_MUMMIFIEDCORPSE_REW3`: "{catname} pulls at the body but it is hard as rock and {he} is unable to break it. <br/>  <br/> How embarrassing! {catname} lags behind to lick {his} ego."
- `EVENT_MUMMIFIEDCORPSE_REW4`: "{catname} tears the corpse apart, and a swarm of fleas bursts out, biting {him} all over!"
- `EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW`: "Examine"
- `EVENT_MUMMIFIEDCORPSE_REW5`: "{catname} looks closely at the body... <br/>  <br/> There are holes in its neck and the skin is chalk white as if all the blood was drained from the body. <br/>  <br/> What a horrifying way to go... {catname} shudders at the thought!"
- `EVENT_MUMMIFIEDCORPSE_REW6`: "{catname} senses a creature lurking in the dark nearby... <br/>  <br/> {He} leads the party in an ambush!"
- `EVENT_MUMMIFIEDCORPSE_REW7`: "{catname} tries to pry into the fossilized remains but cuts {himself} on the hard exterior."
- `EVENT_MUMMIFIEDCORPSE_REW8`: "{catname}'s fur stands up on end as {he} senses something quietly entering the room... <br/>  <br/> {catname} turns to see the creature standing right behind {him}!"
- `EVENT_LOOT_ANSW`: "Loot"
- `EVENT_MUMMIFIEDCORPSE_REW9`: "Lumps of mummified flesh tumble away from the corpse as {catname} digs into it looking for treasure."
- `EVENT_MUMMIFIEDCORPSE_REW10`: "{catname} examines the body and notices it is clutching something..."
- `EVENT_MUMMIFIEDCORPSE_REW11`: "As {catname} is attempting to loot the corpse, it rolls oddly almost like it is alive and {catname} leaps in fright!"
- `EVENT_MUMMIFIEDCORPSE_REW12`: "As {catname} is looking around the body for something useful, {he} catches its eye and could swear it winks at {him}. <br/>  <br/> {catname} cannot shake that image from {his} mind."

```
MummifiedCorpse {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_MUMMIFIEDCORPSE_NAME"
        cat_choice random //choose, random, none (random and none are equivalent)
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame mummified_corpse
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_MUMMIFIEDCORPSE_QUES"

        options {
            destroy {
                label "EVENT_DESTROY_ANSW"
                stat str

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MUMMIFIEDCORPSE_REW1"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                TempStrengthUp 1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_MUMMIFIEDCORPSE_REW2"    
                            permanent_stats {
                                str 1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 1
                            prompt "EVENT_MUMMIFIEDCORPSE_REW3"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Stun 1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 2
                            prompt "EVENT_MUMMIFIEDCORPSE_REW4"
                            get_parasite_from_pool parasites
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            examine {
                label "EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW"
                stat int

                good {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MUMMIFIEDCORPSE_REW5"
                            //nothing, gain info about boss
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_MUMMIFIEDCORPSE_REW6"
                            battle "events/chupacabra.lvl"
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MUMMIFIEDCORPSE_REW7"
                            self_damage 2
                        }

                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_MUMMIFIEDCORPSE_REW8"
                            ambush "events/chupacabra.lvl"
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            loot {
                label "EVENT_LOOT_ANSW"
                stat dex
                animation choice_dex_alt

                good {
                    set_frame 4
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MUMMIFIEDCORPSE_REW9"
                            get_item_from_pool deadcat_equipment
                        }

                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_MUMMIFIEDCORPSE_REW10"
                            get_item_from_pool{
                                pool chapter_rare
                                restrict trinket
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 4
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MUMMIFIEDCORPSE_REW11"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Fear 3
                            }
                        }

                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_MUMMIFIEDCORPSE_REW12"
                            gain_disorder Anxiety
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `Fetus`
**Source:** `dead_body.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_FETUS_NAME`: "Fetus"
- `EVENT_FETUS_QUES`: "{catname} finds a small, helpless fetus lying on the floor. <br/>  <br/> It stares up at {him} with large, round eyes."
- `EVENT_EAT_ANSW`: "Eat"
- `EVENT_FETUS_REW1`: "The cats chow down on the fetus. It is delicious!"
- `EVENT_FETUS_REW2`: "{catname} digs in, eating {his} fill of the soft flesh... <br/>  <br/> {He} feels invigorated!"
- `EVENT_FETUS_REW3`: "{catname} eats the fetus, but it tastes vile! <br/>  <br/> {He} starts to feel sick from eating the strange meat. <br/>  <br/> {catname} is poisoned!"
- `EVENT_FETUS_REW4`: "As {catname} bites into the fetus, a parasite hiding inside the body breaks off and latches onto {catname}!"
- `EVENT_CHARM_ANSW`: "Charm"
- `EVENT_FETUS_REW5`: "{catname} comforts the little fellow with kind words and the fetus becomes a friend!"
- `EVENT_FETUS_REW6`: "{catname} gives the fetus lots of wet kisses and it giggles in delight! <br/>  <br/> The fetus and its other pinky friends join the party on their adventure!"
- `EVENT_FETUS_REW7`: "{catname} moves close to give the fetus a kiss but it bites {catname} on the nose!"
- `EVENT_FETUS_REW8`: "{catname} attempts to comfort the fetus, but when {he} gets close it transforms and grabs onto {catname}!"
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"
- `EVENT_FETUS_REW9`: "{catname} ignores the fetus."
- `EVENT_FETUS_REW10`: "{catname} leaves the fetus alone... <br/>  <br/> {He} can't shake the feeling of guilt over abandoning it and lags behind the party, feeling sad. <br/>  <br/> {catname} will go last next battle."

```
Fetus {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_FETUS_NAME"
        cat_choice random //choose, random, none (random and none are equivalent)
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame fetus
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_FETUS_QUES"

        options {
            eat {
                label "EVENT_EAT_ANSW"
                stat con

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_FETUS_REW1"
                            party_heal 100%
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_FETUS_REW2"
                            permanent_stats {
                                con 1
                            }
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                HealthRegenUp 1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_FETUS_REW3"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Poison 2
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_FETUS_REW4"
                            get_parasite_from_pool parasites
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            charm {
                label "EVENT_CHARM_ANSW"
                stat cha

                good {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_FETUS_REW5"
                            gain_familiar CharmedPinky
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_FETUS_REW6"
                            gain_familiar CharmedPinky
                            gain_familiar CharmedPinky
                            gain_familiar CharmedPinky
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_FETUS_REW7"
                            damage 2
                        }

                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_FETUS_REW8"
                            get_parasite_from_pool parasites
                        }
                    }
                }
```
