```
            }

            ignore {
                label "EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave

                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_FETUS_REW9"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                    //Nothing happens
                }
                bad {
                    prompt "EVENT_FETUS_REW10"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                    self_status_next_fight {
                        AddInitiative -99
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `BloodStain`
**Source:** `dead_body.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_BLOODSTAIN_NAME`: "Blood Stain"
- `EVENT_BLOODSTAIN_QUES`: "{catname} wrinkles {his} nose at the distinct smell of iron in the air. <br/>  <br/> Dark pools of blood are splattered across the ground, gleaming in the dim light."
- `EVENT_BLOODSTAIN_ALT_FUTURE_QUES`: "A small pool of liquid shines in the sterile air. <br/>  <br/> The liquid gleams under the bright lights of the future."
- `EVENT_BLOODSTAIN_ALT_THEEND_QUES`: "A dark pool of liquid is on the ground. <br/>  <br/> Bubbles rise from the surface of the pool as {catname} approaches it."
- `EVENT_LICK_ANSW`: "Lick"
- `EVENT_BLOODSTAIN_REW1`: "It tastes almost sweet. {catname} laps up the thick surface."
- `EVENT_BLOODSTAIN_REW2`: "{catname} leans over and stares into the warm pool. <br/>  <br/> Behind {his} reflection, {he} sees something looking back at {him}."
- `EVENT_BLOODSTAIN_REW3`: "The blood tastes bitter and stale. {catname} swallows repeatedly, trying to remove the metallic taste from {his} mouth."
- `EVENT_BLOODSTAIN_REW4`: "As {catname} dips {his} tongue into the viscous liquid, {he} feels something leap up from the pool and latch onto {him}!"
- `EVENT_BLOODSTAIN_ALT_REW1`: "It takes time, but {catname} manages to lap up a lot of the liquid. <br/>  <br/> It tastes good and {catname} feels stronger."
- `EVENT_BLOODSTAIN_ALT_REW2`: "{catname} laps up the strange liquid. It is tangy, but tastes delicious!"
- `EVENT_BLOODSTAIN_ALT_REW3`: "{catname} drinks the liquid but it tastes very bitter. <br/>  <br/> {His} stomach begins to ache and {catname} feels hot."
- `EVENT_BLOODSTAIN_ALT_REW4`: "{catname} leans {his} face down into the viscous liquid to drink... <br/>  <br/> The pool begins to splash and bubble as small parasites latch onto {catname}!"
- `EVENT_LEAVE_ANSW`: "Leave"
- `EVENT_BLOODSTAIN_REW5`: "{catname} steps carefully around the dark pool without disturbing it."

```
BloodStain {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_BLOODSTAIN_NAME"
        cat_choice random //choose, random, none (random and none are equivalent)
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame blood_stain
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        setup {
            conditional_reward {
                requirements {
                    is_not_chapter [future theend]
                }
                reward {
                    prompt "EVENT_BLOODSTAIN_QUES"
                }
            }
            
            conditional_reward {
                requirements {
                    is_chapter [future]
                }
                reward {
                    prompt "EVENT_BLOODSTAIN_ALT_FUTURE_QUES"
                }
            }

            conditional_reward {
                requirements {
                    is_chapter [theend]
                }
                reward {
                    prompt "EVENT_BLOODSTAIN_ALT_THEEND_QUES"
                }
            }
        }

        options {
            lick {
                label "EVENT_LICK_ANSW"
                stat con
                
                requirements {
                    is_not_chapter [future theend]
                }

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_BLOODSTAIN_REW1"
                            heal 1
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_BLOODSTAIN_REW2"
                            get_parasite CrimsonMask_Cursed
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_BLOODSTAIN_REW3"
                            self_damage 1
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_BLOODSTAIN_REW4"
                            get_parasite_from_pool parasites
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            lick_alt {
                label "EVENT_LICK_ANSW"
                stat con
                
                requirements {
                    is_chapter [future theend]
                }

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_BLOODSTAIN_ALT_REW1"
                            permanent_stats {
                                con 1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_BLOODSTAIN_ALT_REW2"
                            upgrade_passive random
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_BLOODSTAIN_ALT_REW3"
                            permanent_stats {
                                con -1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_BLOODSTAIN_ALT_REW4"
                            get_parasite_from_pool parasites
                            get_parasite_from_pool parasites
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            leave {
                label "EVENT_LEAVE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave

                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_BLOODSTAIN_REW5"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `RottenMeat`
**Source:** `dead_body.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_ROTTENMEAT_NAME`: "Rotten Meat"
- `EVENT_ROTTENMEAT_QUES`: "{catname} discovers a hunk of rotting meat, partially decomposed."
- `EVENT_EAT_ANSW`: "Eat"
- `EVENT_ROTTENMEAT_REW1`: ""A meal is a meal," thinks {catname}, as {he} gobbles down the rancid flesh."
- `EVENT_ROTTENMEAT_REW2`: "The poisonous flesh tastes gross. {catname} feels an odd sensation in {his} paws and looks down to see {his} claws have become discolored."
- `EVENT_ROTTENMEAT_REW3`: "What might have once been a nutritious meal has long since become toxic waste."
- `EVENT_ROTTENMEAT_REW4`: "Overcome with hunger, {catname} consumes the rotting meat. Feeling sick to {his} stomach, {he} feels a growing urge to puke..."
- `EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW`: "Examine"
- `EVENT_ROTTENMEAT_REW5`: "Although aged, much of the meat still appears edible. {catname} stashes it away for later."
- `EVENT_ROTTENMEAT_REW6`: "{catname} notices a maggot looking inquisitively at the meat. Knowing the rotting meal will be much more enjoyed by the maggot, {catname} offers it the meal and gains a friend!"
- `EVENT_ROTTENMEAT_REW7`: "As {catname} pokes at the aging flesh, a bunch of angry maggots jump out and attack!"
- `EVENT_ROTTENMEAT_REW8`: "{catname} leans in close to the foul pile and sniffs carefully. The rank stench intrigues {him} and {he} doesn't notice a small creature wriggle into {his} fur."
- `EVENT_LOOT_ANSW`: "Loot"
- `EVENT_ROTTENMEAT_REW9`: "Tearing away the moldy flesh {catname} discovers the remaining bones could make a great weapon."
- `EVENT_ROTTENMEAT_REW10`: "{catname} pulls the rotten bits of flesh away, revealing more edible meat below."
- `EVENT_ROTTENMEAT_REW11`: "After picking it up, {catname} realizes it would make a great weapon."
- `EVENT_ROTTENMEAT_REW12`: "{catname} gingerly picks up the hunk of meat showing it off to {his} party members. It explodes, splattering everyone with toxic chunks!"
- `EVENT_ROTTENMEAT_REW13`: "As {he} greedily digs through the rotting flesh, looking for treasure within, {catname} becomes infected!"

```
RottenMeat {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_ROTTENMEAT_NAME"
        cat_choice random //choose, random, none (random and none are equivalent)
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame rotten_meat
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_ROTTENMEAT_QUES"

        options {
            eat {
                label "EVENT_EAT_ANSW"
                stat con

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_ROTTENMEAT_REW1"
                            heal 5

                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_ROTTENMEAT_REW2"
                            learn_passive PoisonTips
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_ROTTENMEAT_REW3"
                            self_damage 5
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_ROTTENMEAT_REW4"
                            permanent_stats {
                                con -1
                            }
                            learn_ability BarfBall 
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            examine {
                label "EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW"
                stat int

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_ROTTENMEAT_REW5"
                            set_frame 4
                            gain_food [1 5]
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_ROTTENMEAT_REW6"
                            set_frame 5
                            gain_familiar FamiliarChargeyMaggot
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 5
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_ROTTENMEAT_REW7"
                            spawn_unit_next_fight {
                                object [Maggot]
                                count 2
                                spawn_side cats
                            }
                        }

                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_ROTTENMEAT_REW8"
                            get_parasite_from_pool parasites
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            loot {
                label "EVENT_LOOT_ANSW"
                stat dex
                animation choice_dex_alt

                good {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            random_pool [
                                {
                                    prompt "EVENT_ROTTENMEAT_REW9"
                                    get_item_from_pool bone_weapons
                                }
                                {
                                    prompt "EVENT_ROTTENMEAT_REW10"
                                    gain_food [1 5]
                                }
                            ]
                        }

                        rare {
                            set_frame 1
                            prompt "EVENT_ROTTENMEAT_REW11"
                            get_item RottenMeat
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 5
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_ROTTENMEAT_REW12"
                            party_damage [2 6]
                        }

                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_ROTTENMEAT_REW13"
                            gain_disorder LooseMeat
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `OminousSign`
**Source:** `dead_body.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_OMINOUSSIGN_NAME`: "Ominous Sign"
- `EVENT_OMINOUSSIGN_QUES`: "A strange figure made of sticks and twine hangs before {catname}. <br/>  <br/> A shiver runs down {his} spine. This is an ominous sign..."
- `EVENT_DESTROY_ANSW`: "Destroy"
- `EVENT_OMINOUSSIGN_REW1`: "{catname} tears down the weird figure and pulls it apart easily, grinning in triumph. <br/>  <br/> A calm settles over {catname}. {He} feels reassured that this deed will be rewarded in the coming battle."
- `EVENT_OMINOUSSIGN_REW2`: "{catname} rips the ominous figure down and pulls it apart with {his} paws. <br/>  <br/> A strange light briefly glows from {his} body as some distant entity blesses {catname} for destroying the foul sign."
- `EVENT_OMINOUSSIGN_REW3`: "{catname} swats at the hanging sign with {his} paw, but can't pull it down. <br/>  <br/> A sudden sense of foreboding tingles down {catname}'s spine..."
- `EVENT_OMINOUSSIGN_REW4`: "{catname} reaches up and touches the strange wooden figure, and lets out a cry of pain!"
- `EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW`: "Examine"
- `EVENT_OMINOUSSIGN_REW5`: "{catname} examines the ominous sign... It appears to be a warning! <br/>  <br/> The party takes care moving forward, allowing them to ambush the next battle!"
- `EVENT_OMINOUSSIGN_REW6`: "{catname} stares at the strange sign and ponders its meaning... <br/>  <br/> After some time, an idea forms in {catname}'s mind for a new spell!"
- `EVENT_OMINOUSSIGN_REW7`: "{catname} ponders the strange wooden figure for a while, not paying attention to {his} surroundings... <br/>  <br/> It's a trap!"
- `EVENT_OMINOUSSIGN_REW8`: "The strange shape creeps into {catname}'s mind, and {he} begins seeing them everywhere! <br/>  <br/> Still shaking with fear at an image {he} can't unsee, the other cats manage to corral {catname} onward..."
- `EVENT_LOOT_ANSW`: "Loot"
- `EVENT_OMINOUSSIGN_REW9`: "{catname} gingerly pulls the ratty figure down and pockets it."
- `EVENT_OMINOUSSIGN_REW10`: "{catname} carefully detaches the wooden shape and brings it back to the other cats."
- `EVENT_OMINOUSSIGN_REW11`: "{catname} tries to pull it down, but it keeps slipping through {his} paws!"
- `EVENT_OMINOUSSIGN_REW12`: "A terrifying screech echoes in {catname}'s mind as {he} touches the ominous sign...  <br/>  <br/> {He} recoils in pain, trying to pull {himself} away, but the wooden figure latches onto {him}!"

```
OminousSign {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_OMINOUSSIGN_NAME"
        cat_choice random //choose, random, none (random and none are equivalent)
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame ominous_sign
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_OMINOUSSIGN_QUES"

        options {
            destroy {
                label "EVENT_DESTROY_ANSW"
                stat str

                good {  
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_OMINOUSSIGN_REW1"
                            self_status_next_fight{
                                DivineShield 2
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_OMINOUSSIGN_REW2"
                            learn_passive Blessed
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 5
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_OMINOUSSIGN_REW3"
                            event_now_same_cat Happening
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_OMINOUSSIGN_REW4"
                            injury cursed
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            examine {
                label "EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW"
                stat int

                good {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_OMINOUSSIGN_REW5"
                            ally_ambush_next_fights 1
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_OMINOUSSIGN_REW6"
                            learn_ability_from_pool Necromancer                             
                        }
                    }
                } 
                bad {
                    set_frame 5
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_OMINOUSSIGN_REW7"
                            ambush_next_basic_fights 1
                        }

                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_OMINOUSSIGN_REW8"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Fear 3
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            loot {
                label "EVENT_LOOT_ANSW"
                stat dex
                animation choice_dex_alt

                good {
                    set_frame 4
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_OMINOUSSIGN_REW9"
                            get_item_from_pool rat_trinkets
                        }

                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_OMINOUSSIGN_REW10"
                            get_item CursedStickman
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 5
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_OMINOUSSIGN_REW11"
                            permanent_stats {
                                lck -1
                            }
                        }

                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_OMINOUSSIGN_REW12"
                            get_parasite CursedStickman
                            gain_disorder_from_pool [Psychosis, Touched, Soulless]
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `StrangeFlowers`
**Source:** `dead_body.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_STRANGEFLOWERS_NAME`: "Strange Flowers"
- `EVENT_STRANGEFLOWERS_QUES`: "A scent is in the air. It's sweet, almost intoxicating, but something about it feels unnatural. <br/>  <br/> {catname} finds the source: a patch of strange flowers."
- `EVENT_EAT_ANSW`: "Eat"
- `EVENT_STRANGEFLOWERS_REW1`: "Delicious. {catname} ravenously devours the flowers, rolling on the ground as a strange sensation washes over {him}."
- `EVENT_STRANGEFLOWERS_REW2`: "As {catname} consumes the soft petals, {he} feels a rush of clarity in {his} mind."
- `EVENT_STRANGEFLOWERS_REW3`: "{catname} blinks rapidly as {his} senses are bombarded by the sharp flavor of the plant. <br/>  <br/> {He} raises a paw in an odd, inquisitive manner, batting at the air in confusion."
- `EVENT_STRANGEFLOWERS_REW4`: "{catname} devours the pale flowers. <br/>  <br/> Suddenly, {his} muscles clench as {his} senses become sharpened. There is a crazed look in {his} eyes!"
- `EVENT_DESTROY_ANSW`: "Destroy"
- `EVENT_STRANGEFLOWERS_REW5`: "As {catname} shreds the plant, a delicious and intoxicating odor fills the air. <br/>  <br/> {catname} decides to keep the fragrant mulch for later."
- `EVENT_STRANGEFLOWERS_REW6`: "{catname} pulls the flowers apart, ripping up the roots. A strange bulb is revealed beneath!"
- `EVENT_STRANGEFLOWERS_REW7`: "When the delicate petals are bruised and cut, a powerful fragrance fills {his} lungs. <br/>  <br/> {catname} blinks, then stumbles back as a wave of drowsiness overtakes {him}..."
- `EVENT_STRANGEFLOWERS_REW8`: "As {catname} lashes out at the plant, it strikes back! <br/>  <br/> A thorny stem wraps around {his} outstretched arm and {he} jumps back, howling in pain."
- `EVENT_LOOT_ANSW`: "Loot"
- `EVENT_STRANGEFLOWERS_REW9`: "{catname} digs around underneath the soft leaves of the plant, and finds a collection of powerful looking seeds!"
- `EVENT_STRANGEFLOWERS_REW10`: "Hiding beneath the alluring flowers {catname} finds a rare patch of delicious, luminescent grass!"
- `EVENT_STRANGEFLOWERS_REW11`: "As {catname} carefully looks beneath the flowers, they let out a soft pollen. <br/>  <br/> {catname} sneezes! {He} then suddenly decides that now would be an ideal time for a nap..."
- `EVENT_STRANGEFLOWERS_REW12`: "{catname}'s eyes grow heavy. Since nothing is going on, {he} decides now is a good time to sleep. {he}'s suddenly so tired..."

```
StrangeFlowers {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_STRANGEFLOWERS_NAME"
        cat_choice random //choose, random, none (random and none are equivalent)
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame strange_flowers
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_STRANGEFLOWERS_QUES"

        options {
            eat {
                label "EVENT_EAT_ANSW"
                stat con

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_STRANGEFLOWERS_REW1"
                            get_and_equip_item Catnip
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_STRANGEFLOWERS_REW2"
                            permanent_stats {
                                int 1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_STRANGEFLOWERS_REW3"
                            self_status_next_fight{
                                Confusion 2
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_STRANGEFLOWERS_REW4"
                            gain_disorder_from_pool [Psychosis, Pica, Vegan]
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            destroy {
                label "EVENT_DESTROY_ANSW"
                stat str

                good {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_STRANGEFLOWERS_REW5"
                            get_item CatnipBig
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_STRANGEFLOWERS_REW6"
                            get_item StrangeMarble //TODO: Gain strange bulb weapon
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_STRANGEFLOWERS_REW7"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                AbilityOnBattleStart_Immediate FlowerEventSleep
                            }
                        }

                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_STRANGEFLOWERS_REW8"
                            injury spd //broken leg
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Bleed 1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            loot {
                label "EVENT_LOOT_ANSW"
                stat dex
                animation choice_dex_alt

                good {
                    set_frame 4
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_STRANGEFLOWERS_REW9"
                            get_item SeedBombs
                        }

                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_STRANGEFLOWERS_REW10"
                            get_item BagOfGrass
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 5
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_STRANGEFLOWERS_REW11"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Sleep 2
                            }
                        }

                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_STRANGEFLOWERS_REW12"
                            gain_disorder Narcolepsy
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `Mushroom`
**Source:** `dead_body.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_MUSHROOM_NAME`: "Mushroom"
- `EVENT_MUSHROOM_QUES`: "{catname} has found a large mushroom. What should {he} do with it?"
- `EVENT_EAT_ANSW`: "Eat"
- `EVENT_MUSHROOM_REW1`: "{catname} munches on the soft flesh of the mushroom. <br/>  <br/> {He} feels {his} mind expanding with a temporary rush of brilliance. The possibilities are endless!"
- `EVENT_MUSHROOM_REW2`: "Taking a large bite out of the mushroom, {catname} considers the many paths that led {him} to this strange situation."
- `EVENT_MUSHROOM_REW3`: "As {he} chews on the soft flesh of the mushroom, {catname}'s mind begins to spin. Despite having trouble focusing, {he} stumbles on."
- `EVENT_MUSHROOM_REW4`: "{catname} takes a timid bite. Then another bite. {He} then furiously devours the supple mushroom! <br/>  <br/> {catname} looks around, eager for more..."
- `EVENT_LOOT_ANSW`: "Loot"
- `EVENT_MUSHROOM_REW5`: "{catname} plucks the mushroom up by the stem. It might be useful later in a pinch."
- `EVENT_MUSHROOM_REW6`: "In the dim light {catname} notices luminescent veins running down the stem of the mushroom. {He} delicately uproots the mushroom and tucks it away."
- `EVENT_MUSHROOM_REW7`: "As {catname} attempts to pull up the mushroom, it releases a cloud of spores! <br/>  <br/> {catname} stumbles back, {his} senses confused by the potent cloud."
- `EVENT_MUSHROOM_REW8`: "As {catname} roughly pulls at the mushroom, it releases a toxic cloud of spores! <br/>  <br/> Breathing in the dense particles, {catname} shudders. {His} eyes begin darting around menacingly."
- `EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW`: "Examine"
- `EVENT_MUSHROOM_REW9`: "{catname} notices that the mushroom has grown up over the body of some long deceased creature. <br/>  <br/> Digging into the remains reveals something that could make great armor!"
- `EVENT_MUSHROOM_REW10`: "Beneath the innocent looking shroom is the carcass of a powerful creature. {catname} pulls it out..."
- `EVENT_MUSHROOM_REW11`: "{catname} sees something poking out from beneath the mushroom... <br/>  <br/> As {he} moves closer to investigate, a skeletal arm reaches out and strikes {him}!"
- `EVENT_MUSHROOM_REW12`: "Distracted sniffing the odd mushroom, a rotting skeletal hand reaches out from beneath it and strikes {catname}! <br/>  <br/> {He} howls as {his} skin begins to rot from some horrible disease."

```
Mushroom {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_MUSHROOM_NAME"
        cat_choice random //choose, random, none (random and none are equivalent)
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame mushroom
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_MUSHROOM_QUES"

        options {
            eat {
                label "EVENT_EAT_ANSW"
                stat con

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MUSHROOM_REW1"
                            self_status_next_fight{
                                IntelligenceUp 3
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_MUSHROOM_REW2"
                            permanent_stats {
                                int 1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MUSHROOM_REW3" 
                            self_status_next_fight{
                                IntelligenceUp -3
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_MUSHROOM_REW4"
                            gain_disorder_from_pool [EatingDisorder, Pica]
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            loot {
                label "EVENT_LOOT_ANSW"
                stat dex
                animation choice_dex_alt

                good {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MUSHROOM_REW5"
                            get_item_from_pool [Mushrooms, PurpleMushroom, BlackMushroom]
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_MUSHROOM_REW6"
                            get_item_from_pool [SpottedMushroom, RedMushroom]
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 5
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MUSHROOM_REW7"
                            self_status_next_fight{
                                Confusion 4
                            }
                        }

                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_MUSHROOM_REW8"
                            gain_disorder Paranoia
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            examine {
                label "EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW"
                stat int

                good {
                    set_frame 4
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MUSHROOM_REW9"
                            random_pool [
                                {
                                    get_item_from_pool bone_armor
                                }
                                {
                                    get_item_from_pool cat_armor
                                }
                            ]
                            
                        }

                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_MUSHROOM_REW10"
                            get_item_from_pool rotten_armor
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 5
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MUSHROOM_REW11"
                            self_damage [3 8]
                            self_status_next_fight{
                                Fear 1
                            }
                        }

                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_MUSHROOM_REW12"
                            gain_disorder Necrosis
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `SmellyBag`
**Source:** `dead_body.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_SMELLYBAG_NAME`: "Smelly Bag"
- `EVENT_SMELLYBAG_QUES`: "A putrid stench is on the air. <br/>  <br/> {catname} wrinkles {his} nose as {he} finds the source, an incredibly smelly bag."
- `EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW`: "Examine"
- `EVENT_SMELLYBAG_REW1`: "{catname} sees something poking out through the top of the bag and pulls it out..."
- `EVENT_SMELLYBAG_REW2`: "{catname} finds an old string holding the bag shut and carefully pulls it open..."
- `EVENT_SMELLYBAG_REW3`: "{catname} gets close to the bag and a large worm slides out and bites {him}!"
- `EVENT_SMELLYBAG_REW4`: "As {catname} approaches the bag, a parasite leaps out and latches onto {him}!"
- `EVENT_DESTROY_ANSW`: "Destroy"
- `EVENT_SMELLYBAG_REW5`: "{catname} rips open the smelly bag and finds something among the trash..."
- `EVENT_SMELLYBAG_REW6`: "The rotting bag succumbs to {catname}'s assault and breaks open, revealing several items within!"
- `EVENT_SMELLYBAG_REW7`: "The bag leaps forward and attacks {catname}! <br/>  <br/> {catname} bolts in surprise and the Chum Bag pursues {him} to the next area!"
- `EVENT_SMELLYBAG_REW8`: "As {catname} goes to strike what {he} thought was just a bag, it bites {his} face!"
- `EVENT_LOOT_ANSW`: "Loot"
- `EVENT_SMELLYBAG_REW9`: "{catname} pries open the bag and reaches in, looking for something useful..."
- `EVENT_SMELLYBAG_REW10`: "{catname} pulls the stinky bag open and a bunch of items tumble out!"
- `EVENT_SMELLYBAG_REW11`: "{catname} reaches into the bag and digs around. {He} feels something latch onto {him}!"
- `EVENT_SMELLYBAG_REW12`: "As {catname} digs through the bag, the waste and filth stick to {his} fur like glue!"

```
SmellyBag {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_SMELLYBAG_NAME"
        cat_choice random //choose, random, none (random and none are equivalent)
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame smelly_bag
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_SMELLYBAG_QUES"

        options {
            examine {
                label "EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW"
                stat int

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_SMELLYBAG_REW1"
                            get_item_from_pool consumables
                        }
                        rare { 
                            prompt "EVENT_SMELLYBAG_REW2"
                            get_item_from_pool {
                                pool chapter_common
                                restrict [weapon consumables armor]
                            }
                            get_item_from_pool {
                                pool chapter_common
                                restrict [weapon consumables armor]
                            }
                            get_item_from_pool {
                                pool chapter_common
                                restrict [weapon consumables armor]
                            }
                            random_pool [
                                {} //get 3 or 4 items.
                                {
                                    get_item_from_pool {
                                        pool chapter_common
                                        restrict [weapon consumables armor]
                                    }
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_SMELLYBAG_REW3"
                            damage [2 4]
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_SMELLYBAG_REW4"
                            get_parasite_from_pool parasites
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            destroy {
                label "EVENT_DESTROY_ANSW"
                stat str

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_SMELLYBAG_REW5"
                            get_item_from_pool consumables
                        }
                        rare { 
                            prompt "EVENT_SMELLYBAG_REW6"
                            get_item_from_pool {
                                pool chapter_common
                                restrict [weapon consumables armor]
                            }
                            get_item_from_pool {
                                pool chapter_common
                                restrict [weapon consumables armor]
                            }
                            get_item_from_pool {
                                pool chapter_common
                                restrict [weapon consumables armor]
                            }
                            random_pool [
                                {} //get 3 or 4 items.
                                {
                                    get_item_from_pool {
                                        pool chapter_common
                                        restrict [weapon consumables armor]
                                    }
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 4
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_SMELLYBAG_REW7"
                            spawn_unit_next_fight {
                                object ChumBag
                                count 1
                            }
                        }

                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_SMELLYBAG_REW8"
                            injury cha
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            loot {
                label "EVENT_LOOT_ANSW"
                stat dex
                animation choice_dex_alt

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_SMELLYBAG_REW9"
                            get_item_from_pool consumables
                        }
                        rare { 
                            prompt "EVENT_SMELLYBAG_REW10"
                            get_item_from_pool {
                                pool chapter_common
                                restrict [weapon consumables armor]
                            }
                            get_item_from_pool {
                                pool chapter_common
                                restrict [weapon consumables armor]
                            }
                            get_item_from_pool {
                                pool chapter_common
                                restrict [weapon consumables armor]
                            }
                            random_pool [
                                {} //get 3 or 4 items.
                                {
                                    get_item_from_pool {
                                        pool chapter_common
                                        restrict [weapon consumables armor]
                                    }
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 5
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_SMELLYBAG_REW11"
                            get_parasite_from_pool sludge_armor
                        }

                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_SMELLYBAG_REW12"
                            get_parasite PutridPile
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

### `ASmallPileOfStones`
**Source:** `dead_body.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_ASMALLPILEOFSTONES_NAME`: "A small pile of stones"
- `EVENT_ASMALLPILEOFSTONES_QUES`: "{catname} finds a small pile of stones scattered on the ground."
- `EVENT_EAT_ANSW`: "Eat"
- `EVENT_ASMALLPILEOFSTONES_REW1`: "{catname} gobbles up the rocks. They are quite crunchy."
- `EVENT_ASMALLPILEOFSTONES_REW2`: "With great effort, {catname} chews on the rocks and swallows them."
- `EVENT_ASMALLPILEOFSTONES_REW3`: "{catname} tries to bite through a rock but cracks {his} tooth instead!"
- `EVENT_ASMALLPILEOFSTONES_REW4`: "{catname} fills {his} mouth with rocks and tries to chew them... <br/>  <br/> {catname} howls in pain as {his} jaw breaks!"
- `EVENT_LOOT_ANSW`: "Loot"
- `EVENT_ASMALLPILEOFSTONES_REW5`: "{catname} gathers up the rocks to use for later."
- `EVENT_ASMALLPILEOFSTONES_REW6`: "{catname} spends time meticulously picking up every rock {he} can find in the area. <br/>  <br/> It takes a while but {catname} is rewarded for {his} efforts!"
- `EVENT_ASMALLPILEOFSTONES_REW7`: "{catname} fills {his} pockets to the brim with rocks! <br/>  <br/> It slows {him} down considerably."
- `EVENT_ASMALLPILEOFSTONES_REW8`: "[i]"Wow! What a cute rock!"[/i] exclaims {catname}, and picks up one of the larger rocks. <br/>  <br/> The other cats look on skeptically but no one has the heart to tell {catname} it's just a rock."
- `EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW`: "Examine"
- `EVENT_ASMALLPILEOFSTONES_REW9`: "{catname} looks closely at the rocks, and finds some coins mixed in!"
- `EVENT_ASMALLPILEOFSTONES_REW10`: "Upon closer examination, {catname} discovers that the rocks are made of gold! <br/>  <br/> [i]"We're rich!"[/i]"
- `EVENT_ASMALLPILEOFSTONES_REW11`: "Convinced there is something here that doesn't meet the eye, {catname} stares transfixed at the rocks for hours. <br/>  <br/> The party waits so long they are ambushed!"
- `EVENT_ASMALLPILEOFSTONES_REW12`: "{catname} examines the rocks for ages, getting more and more excited the longer that goes on. <br/>  <br/> They are just rocks, but {catname} is obsessed with them!"

```
ASmallPileOfStones {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_ASMALLPILEOFSTONES_NAME"
        cat_choice random //choose, random, none (random and none are equivalent)
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame a_small_pile_of_stones
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_ASMALLPILEOFSTONES_QUES"

        options {
            eat {
                label "EVENT_EAT_ANSW"
                stat con

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_ASMALLPILEOFSTONES_REW1"
                            heal 1
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_ASMALLPILEOFSTONES_REW2"
                            permanent_stats { //TODO: gain RockTeeth item: +2 melee damage
                                str 1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_ASMALLPILEOFSTONES_REW3"
                            damage 1
                            permanent_stats { //TODO: Injury: Cracked Tooth: -1 melee damage.
                                str -1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_ASMALLPILEOFSTONES_REW4"
                            injury cha //TODO: Injury: Broken Jaw: -1 damage, Can't eat food.
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            loot {
                label "EVENT_LOOT_ANSW"
                stat dex
                animation choice_dex_alt

                good {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_ASMALLPILEOFSTONES_REW5"
                            get_item Rocks
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_ASMALLPILEOFSTONES_REW6"
                            get_item Rocks
                            get_item Rocks
                            get_item_from_pool rock_items
                            get_item_from_pool rock_items
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_ASMALLPILEOFSTONES_REW7"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                SpeedUp -2
                            }
                        }

                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_ASMALLPILEOFSTONES_REW8"
                            get_parasite CursedRock
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            examine {
                label "EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW"
                stat int

                good {
                    set_frame 4
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_ASMALLPILEOFSTONES_REW9"
                            gain_coins [3 7]
                        }

                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_ASMALLPILEOFSTONES_REW10"
                            gain_coins [15 30]
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 5
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_ASMALLPILEOFSTONES_REW11"
                            ambush_next_basic_fights 1
                        }

                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_ASMALLPILEOFSTONES_REW12"
                            gain_disorder Fossilized //TODO: add RockHound disorder to this pool.
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `FruitBasket`
**Source:** `dead_body.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_FRUITBASKET_NAME`: "Fruit Basket"
- `EVENT_FRUITBASKET_QUES`: "{catname} discovers a basket of fruit. The warm smell of fresh citrus and bananas lingers in the air. A refreshing reprieve!"
- `EVENT_EAT_ANSW`: "Eat"
- `EVENT_FRUITBASKET_REW1`: "Warm juice from the fruit runs down {catname}'s chin as {he} devours the delicious fruit."
- `EVENT_FRUITBASKET_REW2`: "The fruit is tasty! {catname} and the other cats gobble up the whole basket."
- `EVENT_FRUITBASKET_REW3`: "{catname} bites into a piece of fruit, then spits it out in disgust! It's poisoned!"
- `EVENT_FRUITBASKET_REW4`: "The fruit tastes great, at first... But after {catname} and the other cats devour it, they look down and notice that the remains are all rotted. They begin to feel sick as poison sets in..."
- `EVENT_DESTROY_ANSW`: "Destroy"
- `EVENT_FRUITBASKET_REW5`: "{catname} crushes the fruit, spraying juice everywhere. <br/>  <br/> It smells nice but nothing happens..."
- `EVENT_FRUITBASKET_REW6`: "{catname} tears open the fruit and pokes through the remains, looking for something useful..."
- `EVENT_FRUITBASKET_REW7`: "{catname} pushes the basket of fruit over and steps on the fruit, squeezing their juices out onto the ground."
- `EVENT_FRUITBASKET_REW8`: "{catname} smashes the fruit, and a swarm of fruit flies surround the cats!"
- `EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW`: "Examine"
- `EVENT_FRUITBASKET_REW9`: "{catname} examines the fruit in the basket and finds one that looks fresh. {He} shares it with the rest of the party."
- `EVENT_FRUITBASKET_REW10`: "Upon closer inspection, {catname} notices that the fruit is shimmering in the dim light. <br/>  <br/> The cats carefully bite into the ripe fruit... It's the most delicious thing they've ever tasted!"
- `EVENT_FRUITBASKET_REW11`: "As {catname} was examining the fruit, {he} was not paying attention to {his} surroundings... It's a trap!"
- `EVENT_FRUITBASKET_REW12`: "{catname} picks up one of the strange fruits, and it rots in {his} paws! <br/>  <br/> {catname} jumps back in fear as the whole basket begins to rapidly decompose!"

```
FruitBasket {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_FRUITBASKET_NAME"
        cat_choice random //choose, random, none (random and none are equivalent)
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame fruit_basket
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_FRUITBASKET_QUES"

        options {
            eat {
                label "EVENT_EAT_ANSW"
                stat con

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_FRUITBASKET_REW1"
                            full_heal 1
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_FRUITBASKET_REW2"
                            party_heal 100%
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_FRUITBASKET_REW3"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Poison 3
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_FRUITBASKET_REW4"
                            party_status_next_fight {
                                Poison 3
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            destroy {
                label "EVENT_DESTROY_ANSW"
                stat str

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_FRUITBASKET_REW5"
                            //nothing happens.
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_FRUITBASKET_REW6"
                            get_item_from_pool [MagicSeed, BagOfSeeds, GlowingSeed] 
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 2
                            prompt "EVENT_FRUITBASKET_REW7"
                            //nothing happens.
                        }

                        rare {
                            set_frame 3
                            prompt "EVENT_FRUITBASKET_REW8"
                            spawn_unit_next_fight {
                                object Fly
                                count [6 8]
                                spawn_side cats
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            examine {
                label "EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW"
                stat int

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_FRUITBASKET_REW9"
                            party_heal 3
                        }

                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_FRUITBASKET_REW10"
                            party_heal 6
                            party_status_next_fight {
                                DivineShield 1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_FRUITBASKET_REW11"
                            ambush_next_basic_fights 1
                        }

                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_FRUITBASKET_REW12"
                            self_status_next_fight{
                                Fear 5
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `HumanSkin`
**Source:** `dead_body.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_HUMANSKIN_NAME`: "Human Skin"
- `EVENT_HUMANSKIN_QUES`: "{catname} sees something ahead. At first {he} is unable to distinguish the strange lump hanging loosely from the ceiling. <br/>  <br/> {His} ears go back and {his} eyes grow wide as {he} realizes it is the skin of a human head, dry and boneless..."
- `EVENT_EAT_ANSW`: "Eat"
- `EVENT_HUMANSKIN_REW1`: "{catname} tugs at the loose skin with {his} teeth, pulling chunks off and eating them. Tasty!"
- `EVENT_HUMANSKIN_REW2`: "{catname} twitches as {he} chews on the dry skin. {He} feels a terrible itching sensation in {his} head as {catname}'s eyes mutate and become round!"
- `EVENT_HUMANSKIN_REW3`: "{catname} bites into the leathery skin. It is chewy and tastes weird. {He} feels {his} stomach begin to turn..."
- `EVENT_HUMANSKIN_REW4`: "{catname} chews on the tough skin. {His} eyes glaze over and {he} starts shaking uncontrollably!"
- `EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW`: "Examine"
- `EVENT_HUMANSKIN_REW5`: "{catname} examines the loose flaps of skin. Looking into the... mouth? <br/>  <br/> {He} sees something hidden there..."
- `EVENT_HUMANSKIN_REW6`: "{catname} sticks {his} head inside the strange head, looking for anything within. <br/>  <br/> Before {he} can react, the leathery husk falls on {him}!"
- `EVENT_HUMANSKIN_REW7`: "Even though it has no eyes, {catname} feels as if it is staring right at {him}... <br/>  <br/> A shudder runs down {catname}'s spine and {his} hair stands on end."
- `EVENT_HUMANSKIN_REW8`: "{catname} stares at the ghastly head... <br/>  <br/> {He} blinks and shudders. How long has {he} been sitting here staring at it? <br/>  <br/> {catname} turns away, but when {he} closes {his} eyes, the face is still haunting {him}."
- `EVENT_LOOT_ANSW`: "Loot"
- `EVENT_HUMANSKIN_REW9`: "{catname} walks around the strange husk but doesn't see anything worth taking."
- `EVENT_HUMANSKIN_REW10`: "{catname} notices that the eyebrows on the head seem intact. {catname} tears the eyebrows off and wears them!"
- `EVENT_HUMANSKIN_REW11`: "{catname} tugs at the skin, trying to find something useful to do with it, but is disappointed."
- `EVENT_HUMANSKIN_REW12`: "{catname} pulls at the skin, and a large hunk tears off. <br/>  <br/> {He} tries to eat it, but as {catname} swallows the tough leather, {he} chokes!"

```
HumanSkin {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_HUMANSKIN_NAME"
        cat_choice random //choose, random, none (random and none are equivalent)
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame human_skin
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_HUMANSKIN_QUES"

        options {
            eat {
                label "EVENT_EAT_ANSW"
                stat con

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_HUMANSKIN_REW1"
                            heal 5
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_HUMANSKIN_REW2"
                            mutation {
                                eyes 702 //gain human eyes
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_HUMANSKIN_REW3"
                            random_pool [
                                {
                                    self_status_next_fight {
                                        Poison 1
                                    }
                                }{
                                    self_status_next_fight {
                                        Poison 2
                                    }
                                }{
                                    self_status_next_fight {
                                        Poison 3
                                    }
                                }{
                                    self_status_next_fight {
                                        Poison 4
                                    }
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_HUMANSKIN_REW4"
                            gain_disorder_from_pool mental_disorders
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            examine {
                label "EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW"
                stat int
                
                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 3
                            prompt "EVENT_HUMANSKIN_REW5"
                            get_item_from_pool consumables
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 4
                            prompt "EVENT_HUMANSKIN_REW6"
                            mutation { 
                                ears 310 //gain human ears
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 5
                            prompt "EVENT_HUMANSKIN_REW7"
                            party_status_next_fight {
                                Fear 1
                            }
                        }

                        rare {
                            set_frame 5
                            prompt "EVENT_HUMANSKIN_REW8"
                            gain_disorder_from_pool mental_disorders
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            loot {
                label "EVENT_LOOT_ANSW"
                stat dex
                animation choice_dex_alt

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 4
                            prompt "EVENT_HUMANSKIN_REW9"
                            //nothing happens
                        }

                        rare {
                            set_frame 5
                            prompt "EVENT_HUMANSKIN_REW10"
                            mutation {
                                eyebrows 440 //gain human eyebrows
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        set_frame 4
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_HUMANSKIN_REW11"
                            //nothing happens
                        }
                        set_frame 2
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_HUMANSKIN_REW12"
                            permanent_stats {
                                con -1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `BottleOfViperBooze`
**Source:** `dead_body.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_BOTTLEOFVIPERBOOZE_NAME`: "Bottle of Viper Booze"
- `EVENT_BOTTLEOFVIPERBOOZE_QUES`: "{catname} discovers a strange bottle with a Viper label on it. <br/>  <br/> {He} thinks it might be some kind of booze..?"
- `EVENT_DRINK_ANSW`: "Drink"
- `EVENT_BOTTLEOFVIPERBOOZE_REW1`: "{catname} cautiously drinks the dark liquid. It tastes odd... but very good."
- `EVENT_BOTTLEOFVIPERBOOZE_REW2`: "{catname} pops off the lid and downs the strange liquid... <br/>  <br/> {He} feels {his} stomach bubbling and a toxic taste splashes onto {his} tongue. {catname} feels a strong urge to spit!"
- `EVENT_BOTTLEOFVIPERBOOZE_REW3`: "{catname} takes a gulp of the liquid and immediately begins convulsing as poison ravages {his} body."
- `EVENT_BOTTLEOFVIPERBOOZE_REW4`: "{catname} downs the bottle and lets out a loud belch... <br/>  <br/> Then a howl! The powerful toxin melts {him} from the inside out!"
- `EVENT_LOOT_ANSW`: "Loot"
- `EVENT_BOTTLEOFVIPERBOOZE_REW5`: "{catname} picks up the bottle and dumps out the unknown liquid."
- `EVENT_BOTTLEOFVIPERBOOZE_REW6`: "{catname} tucks away the bottle. Maybe {he}'ll drink it later?"
- `EVENT_BOTTLEOFVIPERBOOZE_REW7`: "{catname} picks up the bottle and cracks the lid to sniff at what might be inside. <br/>  <br/> It bursts open and acid bubbles over {him}!"
- `EVENT_BOTTLEOFVIPERBOOZE_REW8`: "{catname} goes to pick up the bottle, but a venomous snake comes out of the bottle and bites {him}! <br/>  <br/> {catname}'s body is wracked with pain!"
- `EVENT_LEAVE_ANSW`: "Leave"
- `EVENT_BOTTLEOFVIPERBOOZE_REW9`: "{catname} opts to leave the bottle alone and moves on."

```
BottleOfViperBooze {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_BOTTLEOFVIPERBOOZE_NAME"
        cat_choice random //choose, random, none (random and none are equivalent)
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame bottle_of_viper_booze
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_BOTTLEOFVIPERBOOZE_QUES"

        options {
            drink {
                label "EVENT_DRINK_ANSW"
                stat con

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_BOTTLEOFVIPERBOOZE_REW1"
                            permanent_stats {
                                random 1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_BOTTLEOFVIPERBOOZE_REW2"
                            learn_ability BarfBall
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_BOTTLEOFVIPERBOOZE_REW3"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Poison 7
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_BOTTLEOFVIPERBOOZE_REW4"
                            random_mutation {
                                tag melted
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            loot {
                label "EVENT_LOOT_ANSW"
                stat dex
                animation choice_dex_alt

                good {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_BOTTLEOFVIPERBOOZE_REW5"
                            get_item Bottles
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_BOTTLEOFVIPERBOOZE_REW6"
                            get_item ViperBottle
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 4
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_BOTTLEOFVIPERBOOZE_REW7"
                            damage 5
                            permanent_stats {
                                str -1
                            }
                        }

                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_BOTTLEOFVIPERBOOZE_REW8"
                            damage 10
                            permanent_stats {
                                str -1
                                spd -1
                                dex -1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            leave {
                label "EVENT_LEAVE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave
                
                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_BOTTLEOFVIPERBOOZE_REW9"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `Hairball`
**Source:** `dead_body.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_HAIRBALL_NAME`: "Hairball"
- `EVENT_HAIRBALL_QUES`: "{catname} finds a hairball made of chunks of fur and hair. <br/>  <br/> It has small bones sticking out of it. It's honestly quite disgusting... Or is it?"
- `EVENT_EAT_ANSW`: "Eat"
- `EVENT_HAIRBALL_REW1`: "{catname} takes a bite of the grey mass. <br/>  <br/> It's crunchy and bits of fur get stuck in {his} teeth."
- `EVENT_HAIRBALL_REW2`: "{catname} bites into the lumpy ball. There is a raw primal quality to it that makes it a very enjoyable experience!"
- `EVENT_HAIRBALL_REW3`: "{catname} starts eating the hairball, and starts gagging involuntarily. {He} starts to feel sick..."
- `EVENT_HAIRBALL_REW4`: "This might just be the worst thing {catname} has ever put in {his} mouth, and there has been a lot! <br/>  <br/> The hairball is both crunchy and mushy. {catname} thinks {he} might never eat again."
- `EVENT_LOOT_ANSW`: "Loot"
- `EVENT_HAIRBALL_REW5`: "{catname} examines the hairball and feels something hard and metal buried inside..."
- `EVENT_HAIRBALL_REW6`: "The dim light must have tricked {him}! <br/>  <br/> {catname} stares in awe at the hairball, which is made entirely of gold!"
- `EVENT_HAIRBALL_REW7`: "{catname} picks up the hairball and pulls it apart, trying to wear it as a sweater. <br/>  <br/> The other cats don't have the heart to tell {him} how absolutely hideous it looks!"
- `EVENT_HAIRBALL_REW8`: "{catname} grabs the hairball and tries putting it on {his} head like a hat. <br/>  <br/> Something slimy moves inside it and bites {him}!"
- `EVENT_LEAVE_ANSW`: "Leave"
- `EVENT_HAIRBALL_REW9`: "That thing looks gross. {catname} leaves it alone."

```
Hairball {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_HAIRBALL_NAME"
        cat_choice random //choose, random, none (random and none are equivalent)
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame hairball
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_HAIRBALL_QUES"

        options {
            eat {
                label "EVENT_EAT_ANSW"
                stat con

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 2
                            prompt "EVENT_HAIRBALL_REW1"
                            heal 1
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 3
                            prompt "EVENT_HAIRBALL_REW2"
                            get_item RatBeezer
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_HAIRBALL_REW3"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Poison 1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_HAIRBALL_REW4"
                            permanent_stats {
                                con -1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            loot {
                label "EVENT_LOOT_ANSW"
                stat dex
                animation choice_dex_alt

                good {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_HAIRBALL_REW5"
                            gain_coins 1
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_HAIRBALL_REW6"
                            gain_coins 20
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 3
                            prompt "EVENT_HAIRBALL_REW7"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                CharismaUp -2
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 4
                            prompt "EVENT_HAIRBALL_REW8"
                            get_parasite CursedHairball
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            leave {
                label "EVENT_LEAVE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave
                
                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_HAIRBALL_REW9"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `TallGrass`
**Source:** `dead_body.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_TALLGRASS_NAME`: "TallGrass"
- `EVENT_TALLGRASS_QUES`: "A field of tall grass stands before {catname}, blocking {his} way. {catname} ponders what to do..."
- `EVENT_DESTROY_ANSW`: "Destroy"
- `EVENT_TALLGRASS_REW1`: "{catname} beats {his} way through the dense brush, and discovers a hidden path leading to the next battle!"
- `EVENT_TALLGRASS_REW2`: "{catname} rips through the tall grass, revealing a secret stash!"
- `EVENT_TALLGRASS_REW3`: "{catname} leaps into the tall grass, striking with {his} paws. <br/>  <br/> The grass makes way to thorny brambles beneath which tear into {catname}'s skin!"
- `EVENT_TALLGRASS_REW4`: "{catname} strikes at the grass. Before {he} can react, large brambles lash out at them, grabbing all the cats!"
- `EVENT_EAT_ANSW`: "Eat"
- `EVENT_TALLGRASS_REW5`: "{catname} chews on the tall grass. Delicious! {He} devours the tasty greens."
- `EVENT_TALLGRASS_REW6`: "As {he} carefully chews the tender blades, the grass begins spreading around {him}, engulfing the party in fragrant flowers!"
- `EVENT_TALLGRASS_REW7`: "{catname} attempts to bite the grass but before {he} can, large brambles wrap around {him}!"
- `EVENT_TALLGRASS_REW8`: "{catname} chews on the grass. It is dry and tastes pretty gross. <br/>  <br/> Maybe the next bite will taste good? {catname}'s stomach starts to hurt..."
- `EVENT_LOOT_ANSW`: "Loot"
- `EVENT_TALLGRASS_REW9`: "As {catname} digs through the tall grass, {he} smells something DELICIOUS! <br/>  <br/> {catname} frantically searches for the source and finds it!"
- `EVENT_TALLGRASS_REW10`: "{catname} wades through the tall grass, and sees something sticking out beneath the weeds!"
- `EVENT_TALLGRASS_REW11`: "{catname} attempts to push through the grass looking for loot, but gets tangled in thick brambles!"
- `EVENT_TALLGRASS_REW12`: "{catname} approaches the tall grass... <br/>  <br/> Suddenly, large brambles reach out and grapple {him}!"

```
TallGrass {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_TALLGRASS_NAME"
        cat_choice random //choose, random, none (random and none are equivalent)
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame tall_grass
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_TALLGRASS_QUES"

        options {
            destroy {
                label "EVENT_DESTROY_ANSW"
                stat str

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 2
                            prompt "EVENT_TALLGRASS_REW1"
                            ally_ambush_next_fights 1
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 3
                            prompt "EVENT_TALLGRASS_REW2"
                            gain_coins [10 20]
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {                    
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 4
                            prompt "EVENT_TALLGRASS_REW3"
                            damage 8
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 5
                            prompt "EVENT_TALLGRASS_REW4"
                            party_damage 5
                            party_status_next_fight {
                                Tangled 2
                                AbilityOnBattleStart_Immediate SummonBrambles2
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            eat {
                label "EVENT_EAT_ANSW"
                stat con

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 2
                            prompt "EVENT_TALLGRASS_REW5"
                            full_heal 1
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                HealthRegenUp 1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 2
                            prompt "EVENT_TALLGRASS_REW6"
                            //TODO: Gain grass mutation instead of spawning grass and healing.
                            party_heal 5
                            party_status_next_fight {
                                AbilityOnBattleStart_Immediate GrassEvent
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 4
                            prompt "EVENT_TALLGRASS_REW7"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Bleed 1
                            }
                        }

                        rare {
                            set_frame 2
                            prompt "EVENT_TALLGRASS_REW8"
                            permanent_stats {
                                con -1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            loot {
                label "EVENT_LOOT_ANSW"
                stat dex
                animation choice_dex_alt

                good {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_TALLGRASS_REW9"
                            random_pool [
                                {
                                    get_item KiloOfCatnip
                                }
                                {
                                    get_item CatnipBig
                                    get_item CatnipBig
                                }
                                {
                                    get_item Catnip
                                    get_item Catnip
                                    get_item Catnip
                                }
                            ]
                        }

                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_TALLGRASS_REW10"
                            get_item_from_pool grass_items
							get_item_from_pool grass_items
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 4
                            prompt "EVENT_TALLGRASS_REW11"
                            damage 2
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                AbilityOnBattleStart_Immediate SummonBrambles2
                            }
                        }

                        rare {
                            set_frame 5
                            prompt "EVENT_TALLGRASS_REW12"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                AbilityOnBattleStart_Immediate BrambleRandomTileEvent
                                AbilityOnBattleStart_Immediate BrambleRandomTileEvent
                                AbilityOnBattleStart_Immediate BrambleRandomTileEvent
                                AbilityOnBattleStart_Immediate BrambleRandomTileEvent
                                AbilityOnBattleStart_Immediate BrambleRandomTileEvent
                                AbilityOnBattleStart_Immediate BrambleRandomTileEvent
                                AbilityOnBattleStart_Immediate BrambleRandomTileEvent
                                AbilityOnBattleStart_Immediate BrambleRandomTileEvent
                                AbilityOnBattleStart_Immediate BrambleRandomTileEvent
                                AbilityOnBattleStart_Immediate BrambleRandomTileEvent
                                AbilityOnBattleStart_Immediate BrambleRandomTileEvent
                            }
                            spawn_unit_next_fight {
                                object BrambleBaby
                                count 1
                                spawn_side enemies
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```
