### `Fountain`
**Source:** `dead_body.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_FOUNTAIN_NAME`: "Fountain"
- `EVENT_FOUNTAIN_QUES`: "A giant stone fountain sits in front of {catname}. It's pouring water majestically."
- `EVENT_DRINK_ANSW`: "Drink"
- `EVENT_FOUNTAIN_REW1`: "{catname} laps up water from the fountain. {He} feels a tingling sensation as all of {his} wounds and scars wash away."
- `EVENT_FOUNTAIN_REW2`: "{catname} feels a flood of stillness wash over {his} body, as all of {his} aches and pains are removed in an instant. {He} looks up at the fountain with renewed vigor for life. <br/>  <br/> {catname} has become a baby kitten again!"
- `EVENT_FOUNTAIN_REW3`: "{catname} feels a terrible squeezing sensation in {his} skull as {his} head shrinks! {He} lets out a pitiful "Mew!" as {his} brain becomes that of a kitten."
- `EVENT_FOUNTAIN_REW4`: "The other cats look on in surprise as {catname} shrinks down into a small kitten after drinking from the fountain!"
- `EVENT_LEAVE_ANSW`: "Leave"
- `EVENT_FOUNTAIN_LEAVE`: "{catname} isn't thirsty."

```
Fountain {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_FOUNTAIN_NAME"
        cat_choice random //choose, random, none (random and none are equivalent)
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame fountain
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_FOUNTAIN_QUES"

        options {
            drink {
                label "EVENT_DRINK_ANSW"
                stat con

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_FOUNTAIN_REW1"
                            full_heal 1
                            heal_injury 1
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_FOUNTAIN_REW2"
                            set_age 1
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_FOUNTAIN_REW3"
                            permanent_stats {
                                int -4
                                cha +1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_FOUNTAIN_REW4"
                            gain_disorder EternalYouth
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            leave {
                label "EVENT_LEAVE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave

                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_FOUNTAIN_LEAVE"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }   
    }
}
```

## File: `debug_events.gon`

### `TestLegacyEvent`
**Source:** `debug_events.gon`  

```
TestLegacyEvent {
    intro {
        title "Legacy Event Test"
        cat_choice random //choose, random, none (random and none are equivalent)
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame unknown
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "Donate 3 times before you can receive a reward!"

        options {
            donate {
                label "Donate"
                stat none
                animation choice_misc

                good {
                    prompt "you donated!"
                    increment_legacy_counter WorldEventLegacyCounter_TestLegacyFoo
                }
            }

            receive {
                label "Receive"
                stat none
                animation choice_misc

                requirements {
                    counter_minimum [WorldEventLegacyCounter_TestLegacyFoo 3]
                }

                good {
                    prompt "you got it!"
                }
            }

            knife {
                label "Get a knife"
                stat none
                animation choice_misc

                good {
                    trigger_adventure_unlock legacy_event_unlock_momsknife
                    get_item MomsKnife
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

**Source:** `debug_events.gon`  

```
TestCutsceneResult {
    intro {
        title "Test Cutscene"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame unknown
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "Prompt"

        options {
            chaos_ending {
                label "chaos ending"
                stat none

                good {
                    cutscene {
                        cutscene "chaos_ending_good"
                        skip_result_screen true
                    }
                    get_item CryogenicTimeChamber_Full
                }
            }
            altar_sacrifice {
                label "king intro"
                stat none

                good {
                    kill cat
                    play_animation resultHole
                    cutscene_on_exit king_intro

            }

            chapter_cutscene {
                label "chap"
                stat none

                }

                stat none

                        skip_result_screen true
                    }

            timemachine {

                stat none

                good {
                    cutscene {
                        cutscene "time_machine"
                        skip_result_screen true
                    }

                    random_mutation 10
                    begin_chapter iceage.gon
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

## File: `desert_events.gon`

### `Mirage`
**Source:** `desert_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_MIRAGE_NAME`: "Mirage"
- `EVENT_MIRAGE_QUES`: "{catname} squints {his} eyes, peering through the hot shimmering air. {He} thinks {he} sees something on the horizon!"
- `EVENT_INSPECT_ANSW`: "Inspect"
- `EVENT_MIRAGE_REW1`: "After trudging through the hot sand for what could be hours, {catname} forgets {he} even saw anything."
- `EVENT_MIRAGE_REW2`: "Amid the steaming dunes, {catname} comes upon a travelling merchant!"
- `EVENT_MIRAGE_REW3`: "After wandering for hours under the scorching sun, {catname} gives up on leading the party..."
- `EVENT_MIRAGE_REW4`: "The scorching sun cooks the cats beneath their fur and they stumble on in pain, lost among the endless dunes..."
- `EVENT_GOAROUND_ANSW`: "Go around"
- `EVENT_MIRAGE_REW5`: "The party trudges on through the blinding sun."
- `EVENT_MIRAGE_REW6`: "The cats come upon an encampment, its occupants resting in the hot afternoon sun. <br/>  <br/> {catname} leads the party in an ambush!"

```
Mirage {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_MIRAGE_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame mirage
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_MIRAGE_QUES"

        options {
            inspect {
                label "EVENT_INSPECT_ANSW"
                stat int

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MIRAGE_REW1"
                            //nothing
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_MIRAGE_REW2"
                            shop_now Event_SmallShop
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            conditional_reward {
                                requirements {
                                    has_token AdventureToken_Mirage2
                                }
                                reward {
                                    set_frame 2
                                    prompt "EVENT_MIRAGE_REW1"
                                    //This was final (3rd) attempt, end event.
                                }
                                else {
                                    set_frame 3
                                    prompt "EVENT_MIRAGE_REW3"
                                    party_damage 1
                                    event_now Mirage
                                    
                                    conditional_reward {
                                        requirements {
                                            has_token AdventureToken_Mirage1
                                        }
                                        reward {
                                            set_adventure_token AdventureToken_Mirage2
                                        }
                                        else {
                                            set_adventure_token AdventureToken_Mirage1
                                        }
                                    }
                                }
                            }                                
                        }
                        rare { 
                            conditional_reward {
                                requirements {
                                    has_token AdventureToken_Mirage2
                                }
                                reward {
                                    set_frame 2
                                    prompt "EVENT_MIRAGE_REW1"
                                }
                                else {
                                    set_adventure_token AdventureToken_Mirage1
                                    set_frame 4
                                    prompt "EVENT_MIRAGE_REW4"
                                    party_damage 5
                                    event_now Mirage
                                    
                                    conditional_reward {
                                        requirements {
                                            has_token AdventureToken_Mirage1
                                        }
                                        reward {
                                            set_adventure_token AdventureToken_Mirage2
                                        }
                                        else {
                                            set_adventure_token AdventureToken_Mirage1
                                        }
                                    }
                                }
                            }       
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            go_around {
                label "EVENT_GOAROUND_ANSW"
                stat spd

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MIRAGE_REW5"
                            //nothing
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_MIRAGE_REW6"
                            ally_ambush_next_fights 1
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            conditional_reward {
                                requirements {
                                    has_token AdventureToken_Mirage2
                                }
                                reward {
                                    set_frame 2
                                    prompt "EVENT_MIRAGE_REW1"
                                }
                                else {
                                    set_frame 3
                                    prompt "EVENT_MIRAGE_REW3"
                                    party_damage 1
                                    event_now Mirage
                                    
                                    conditional_reward {
                                        requirements {
                                            has_token AdventureToken_Mirage1
                                        }
                                        reward {
                                            set_adventure_token AdventureToken_Mirage2
                                        }
                                        else {
                                            set_adventure_token AdventureToken_Mirage1
                                        }
                                    }
                                }
                            }                                
                        }
                        rare { 
                            conditional_reward {
                                requirements {
                                    has_token AdventureToken_Mirage2
                                }
                                reward {
                                    set_frame 2
                                    prompt "EVENT_MIRAGE_REW1"
                                }
                                else {
                                    set_adventure_token AdventureToken_Mirage1
                                    set_frame 4
                                    prompt "EVENT_MIRAGE_REW4"
                                    party_damage 5
                                    event_now Mirage
                                    
                                    conditional_reward {
                                        requirements {
                                            has_token AdventureToken_Mirage1
                                        }
                                        reward {
                                            set_adventure_token AdventureToken_Mirage2
                                        }
                                        else {
                                            set_adventure_token AdventureToken_Mirage1
                                        }
                                    }
                                }
                            }       
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `Oasis`
**Source:** `desert_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_OASIS_NAME`: "Oasis"
- `EVENT_OASIS_QUES`: "{catname} finds an oasis with a small shaded pool of water.  <br/>  <br/> {catname}'s dry throat longs for a wet reprieve from the endless dry heat of the desert..."
- `EVENT_DRINK_ANSW`: "Drink"
- `EVENT_OASIS_REW1`: "{catname} gulps down the fresh water. {He} had forgotten how wonderful the feeling of water is!"
- `EVENT_OASIS_REW2`: "The cats drag themselves into the oasis and lay in the small pool, drinking as much as they can stomach!"
- `EVENT_OASIS_REW3`: "The warm water tastes salty, but {catname} continues drinking from the briny pool in desperation, poisoning {himself}!"
- `EVENT_OASIS_REW4`: "{catname} laps up the water from the strange pool. It has a strange sweet taste that reminds {him} of {his} mother's warm milk. <br/>  <br/> {catname} has become a kitten!"
- `EVENT_LEAVE_ANSW`: "Leave"
- `EVENT_OASIS_REW5`: "Despite the dry heat of the desert, {catname} decides it would be best to move on. Free water in this dreadful place is too good to be true!"

```
Oasis {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_OASIS_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame oasis
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_OASIS_QUES"

        options {
            drink {
                label "EVENT_DRINK_ANSW"
                stat lck

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_OASIS_REW1"
                            full_heal 1
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_OASIS_REW2"
                            party_heal 100%
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 3
                            prompt "EVENT_OASIS_REW3"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Poison 1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 4
                            prompt "EVENT_OASIS_REW4"
                            set_age 1
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            leave {
                label "EVENT_LEAVE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave
                
                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_OASIS_REW5"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `MysteriousTomb`
**Source:** `desert_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB_NAME`: "Mysterious Tomb"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB_QUES`: "An ancient stone structure protrudes from the dry desert surface. Large doors protect whatever is entombed inside. <br/>  <br/> What should {catname} do?"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB_ANSW`: "Open door"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB_END`: "Peek inside"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB_REW1`: "{catname} lets out a stuttered growl as {he} barely manages to force the heavy door open..."
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB_REW2`: "With brute force, {catname}'s paws force the door open..."
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB_REW3`: "{catname} tries to pull the heavy doors open but they are stuck fast."
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB_REW4`: "{catname} begins to pry the door open but it slams shut on {his} arm!"
- `EVENT_LEAVE_ANSW`: "Leave"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB_REW5`: "{catname} thinks better of it. {He} doesn't feel up for raiding a tomb today."

```
MysteriousTomb {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame mysterious_tomb_door
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB_QUES"

        options {
            smash {
                label "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB_ANSW"
                stat str

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    override_end_option_prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB_END"
                    event_now_same_cat MysteriousTomb1
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB_REW1"
                            damage 2
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB_REW2"
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB_REW3"
                            //nothing
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 3
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB_REW4" 
                            injury str
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            leave {
                label "EVENT_LEAVE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave
                
                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB_REW5"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

## File: `future_events.gon`

### `VendingMachine`
**Source:** `future_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_VENDINGMACHINE_NAME`: "Vending Machine"
- `EVENT_VENDINGMACHINE_QUES`: "{catname} finds a large vending machine. <br/>  <br/> Looking through the glass window {he} sees rows and rows of goodies inside!"
- `EVENT_VENDINGMACHINE_COINS_ANSW`: "Put in coins"
- `EVENT_VENDINGMACHINE_REW4`: "{catname} pushes {his} coins into the machine... <br/>  <br/> It begins shaking violently then falls over on top of {catname}!"
- `EVENT_VENDINGMACHINE_REW3`: "{catname} hears a thunk after each time {he} slides a coin into the machine... <br/>  <br/> Nothing happens. What a scam! The vending machine must be broken."
- `EVENT_VENDINGMACHINE_REW1`: "{catname} pushes coins into the slot... <br/>  <br/> Moments later {he} hears a loud banging sound then some items pop out!"
- `EVENT_VENDINGMACHINE_REW2`: "{catname} pays 10 coins and a bunch of items tumble down out of the vending machine!"
- `EVENT_VENDINGMACHINE_REW0`: "{catname} tries to put in the coins but foolishly did not have enough."
- `EVENT_VENDINGMACHINE_SHAKE_ANSW`: "Shake machine"
- `EVENT_VENDINGMACHINE_REW5`: "{catname} shakes the vending machine and several of the items inside drop out!"
- `EVENT_VENDINGMACHINE_REW6`: "{catname} deftly tips the vending machine and shakes it causing items to drop out!"
- `EVENT_VENDINGMACHINE_REW7`: "{catname} shakes the vending machine valiantly but the items inside are held fast."
- `EVENT_VENDINGMACHINE_REW8`: "{catname} pushes and pulls at the machine, trying to dislodge some of the contents... <br/>  <br/> {He} slips and the whole machine tips over on top of {him}!"
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"
- `EVENT_VENDINGMACHINE_REW9`: "{catname} ignores the vending machine and moves on."

```
VendingMachine {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_VENDINGMACHINE_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame vending_machine
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_VENDINGMACHINE_QUES"

        options {
            put_in_coins {
                label "EVENT_VENDINGMACHINE_COINS_ANSW"
                stat coins
                animation_fail choice_no_coins
                animation choice_coins_ten
                stat_min 10
                stat_max 10

                good {
                    random_pool_consider_luck [ //sort worst to best for luck
                        {
                            prompt "EVENT_VENDINGMACHINE_REW4" //bad crit
                            set_frame 5
                            gain_disorder HeadTrauma
                            play_animation resultVeryBad
                        }
                        { 
                            prompt "EVENT_VENDINGMACHINE_REW3" //bad
                            set_frame 4
                            //get nothing
                            play_animation resultBad
                        }
                        {
                            prompt "EVENT_VENDINGMACHINE_REW1" //good
                            set_frame 2
                            get_item_from_pool chapter_common
                            get_item_from_pool consumables
                            play_animation resultGood
                        }
                        {
                            prompt "EVENT_VENDINGMACHINE_REW2" //good crit
                            set_frame 3
                            get_item_from_pool chapter_common
                            get_item_from_pool consumables
                            get_item_from_pool chapter_common
                            get_item_from_pool consumables
                            play_animation resultVeryGood
                        }
                    ]
                }
                bad {
                    prompt "EVENT_VENDINGMACHINE_REW0"
                }
            }

            shake {
                label "EVENT_VENDINGMACHINE_SHAKE_ANSW"
                stat str

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_VENDINGMACHINE_REW5"
                            set_frame 2
                            get_item_from_pool chapter_common
                            get_item_from_pool consumables
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_VENDINGMACHINE_REW6"
                            set_frame 3
                            get_item_from_pool chapter_common
                            get_item_from_pool consumables
                            get_item_from_pool tech_items
							get_item_from_pool tech_items
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_VENDINGMACHINE_REW7"
                            set_frame 4
                            //nothing
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_VENDINGMACHINE_REW8" 
                            set_frame 5
                            gain_disorder HeadTrauma
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            ignore {
                label "EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave
                
                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_VENDINGMACHINE_REW9"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `ComputerConsole`
**Source:** `future_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_COMPUTERCONSOLE_NAME`: "Computer Console"
- `EVENT_COMPUTERCONSOLE_QUES`: "{catname} finds a computer console with an array of buttons and knobs."
- `EVENT_HACK_ANSW`: "Hack"
- `EVENT_COMPUTERCONSOLE_REW1`: "{catname} presses buttons until the display reads:  <br/>  <br/> [b]Turn off robots?[/b] <br/>  <br/> {catname} presses confirm!"
- `EVENT_COMPUTERCONSOLE_REW2`: "{catname} hacks the console and forces open a secret compartment... <br/>  <br/> A friendly robot pops out!"
- `EVENT_COMPUTERCONSOLE_REW3`: "{catname} tries {his} best but has no idea what {he} is doing..."
- `EVENT_COMPUTERCONSOLE_REW4`: "{catname} is navigating through the console's menus when suddenly an alarm begins blaring and the screen flashes angrily! <br/>  <br/> Oh no, what did {he} trigger!?"
- `EVENT_SMASH_ANSW`: "Smash"
- `EVENT_COMPUTERCONSOLE_REW5`: "{catname} smashes the computer and it shuts off. <br/>  <br/> {He} tries to reboot it but the console is dead."
- `EVENT_COMPUTERCONSOLE_REW6`: "{catname} slams the console over and over until it shuts off. <br/>  <br/> The cats notice a sudden silence as the constant buzzing of nearby machines go quiet."
- `EVENT_COMPUTERCONSOLE_REW7`: "{catname} hits the console a bunch of times but nothing seems to happen."
- `EVENT_COMPUTERCONSOLE_REW8`: "{catname} tries to punch the computer but the hard metal case breaks {his} paw!"

```
ComputerConsole {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_COMPUTERCONSOLE_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame computer_console
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_COMPUTERCONSOLE_QUES"

        options {
            hack {
                label "EVENT_HACK_ANSW"
                stat int

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 2 //off
                            prompt "EVENT_COMPUTERCONSOLE_REW1"
                            global_effect_next_fight {
                                Fights 1
                                CharacterTypeGainsStatusAtBattleStart {
                                    tag robot
                                    Stun 1
                                }
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 3 //charmed bot
                            prompt "EVENT_COMPUTERCONSOLE_REW2"
                            random_pool [
                                {
                                    gain_familiar CharmedLoveBot
                                }{
                                    gain_familiar CharmedSecurityBot
                                }{
                                    gain_familiar CharmedCopBot
                                }{
                                    gain_familiar CharmedSoldierBot
                                }{
                                    gain_familiar CharmedHangerBot
                                }{
                                    gain_familiar CharmedDoctorBot
                                }{
                                    gain_familiar CharmedTallBot
                                }{
                                    gain_familiar CharmedFutureBot
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 4 //no
                            prompt "EVENT_COMPUTERCONSOLE_REW3"
                            //nothing
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 5 //evil haha
                            prompt "EVENT_COMPUTERCONSOLE_REW4" 
                            global_effect_next_fight {
                                Fights 1
                                CharacterTypeGainsStatusAtBattleStart {
                                    tag robot
                                    AllStatsUp 1
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            smash {
                label "EVENT_SMASH_ANSW"
                stat str

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_COMPUTERCONSOLE_REW5"
                            set_frame 4 //no
                            //nothing
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 6 //deactivate
                            prompt "EVENT_COMPUTERCONSOLE_REW6"
                            global_effect_next_fight {
                                Fights 3
                                CharacterTypeGainsStatusAtBattleStart {
                                    tag robot
                                    Stun 1
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_COMPUTERCONSOLE_REW7"
                            set_frame 1
                            //nothing
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 7
                            prompt "EVENT_COMPUTERCONSOLE_REW8" 
                            injury str
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `MysteriousChamber`
**Source:** `future_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCHAMBER_NAME`: "Mysterious Chamber"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCHAMBER_QUES`: "In the center of a room {catname} finds mysterious chamber with a large chair inside. <br/>  <br/> Within the enclosure, {catname} finds 3 labelled buttons."
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCHAMBER_UPGRADE_ANSW`: "Upgrade"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCHAMBER_REW1`: "The chamber whirs and a metal dome descends from the ceiling... <br/>  <br/> It lights up and {catname} feels a strong burst of energy course through {him}."
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCHAMBER_REW2`: "The chamber beeps and clangs as the mechanical device envelops {catname} in warm energy waves."
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCHAMBER_REW3`: "The chamber lights up and {catname} sees metal components whirring above {him}... <br/>  <br/> Suddenly it starts emitting a loud blaring sound and {catname} is blinded by a harsh light."
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCHAMBER_REW4`: "The chamber comes to life around {catname} and {he} feels an odd sensation in {his} body..."
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCHAMBER_PURIFY_ANSW`: "Purify"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCHAMBER_REW5`: "The chamber injects {catname} and {he} feels a tension deep within {him} release."
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCHAMBER_REW6`: "{catname} feels a wave of calm wash over {him} as {his} ailments are washed away."
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCHAMBER_REW7`: "The chamber starts beeping wildly and then it stabs {catname} with a syringe!"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCHAMBER_REW8`: "Arms from within the chamber dig into {catname} and inject {him} with something truly terrible!"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCHAMBER_TELEPORT_ANSW`: "Teleport"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCHAMBER_REW9`: "The chamber lights up and {catname} is teleported to a new place!"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCHAMBER_REW10`: "The chamber beeps triumphantly and then in a bright flash of light it teleports {catname}! <br/>  <br/> Based on how the chamber reacted, {catname} guesses that {he} has been empowered for the next event somehow..."
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCHAMBER_REW11`: "The doors slam shut and {catname} is whisked away to a new place... <br/>  <br/> Straight into an ambush!"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCHAMBER_REW12`: "An alarm siren blares as the doors to the chamber slam shut. <br/>  <br/> {catname} feels a sense of dread overwhelm {him} as the doors begin to slide open..."

```
MysteriousChamber {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCHAMBER_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame mysterious_chamber
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCHAMBER_QUES"

        options {
            upgrade_yourself {
                label "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCHAMBER_UPGRADE_ANSW"
                stat lck

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCHAMBER_REW1"
                            permanent_stats {
                                random 1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCHAMBER_REW2"
                            upgrade_ability random
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 5
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCHAMBER_REW3"
                            permanent_stats {
                                random -1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCHAMBER_REW4" 
                            scramble_basic_attack all
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            purify {
                label "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCHAMBER_PURIFY_ANSW"
                stat lck

                good {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCHAMBER_REW5"
                            heal_disorder 1
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                ConstitutionUp 1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCHAMBER_REW6"
                            heal_disorder 2
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                AllStatsUp 1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 6
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCHAMBER_REW7"
                            gain_disorder_from_pool all_disorders
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCHAMBER_REW8"
                            gain_disorder_from_pool all_disorders 
                            gain_disorder_from_pool all_disorders
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            teleport {
                label "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCHAMBER_TELEPORT_ANSW"
                stat lck

                good {
                    set_frame 4
                    play_animation resultHole
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCHAMBER_REW9"
                            next_event_bonus 1
                            random_pool [
                                {
                                    event_now_same_cat VendingMachine
                                }
                                {
                                    event_now_same_cat ComputerConsole
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCHAMBER_REW10"
                            next_event_bonus 2
                            random_pool [
                                {
                                    event_now_same_cat VendingMachine
                                }
                                {
                                    event_now_same_cat ComputerConsole
                                }
                            ]

                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 7
                    play_animation resultHole
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCHAMBER_REW11"
                            ambush_next_basic_fights 1

                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCHAMBER_REW12" 
                            next_event_bonus -2
                            event_now_same_cat random
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```
