## File: `iceage_events.gon`

### `FrozenHumanoid`
**Source:** `iceage_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_FROZENHUMANOID_NAME`: "Frozen Humanoid"
- `EVENT_FROZENHUMANOID_QUES`: "A large block of ice is before {catname}. <br/>  <br/> Looking deep into the ice, {catname} can see a humanoid figure frozen within!"
- `EVENT_FROZENHUMANOID_BREAKICE_ANSW`: "Break ice"
- `EVENT_FROZENHUMANOID_REW1`: "{catname} breaks through the ice, and frees a cave baby stuck inside! <br/>  <br/> It gurgles at {catname} and crawls around following {him}."
- `EVENT_FROZENHUMANOID_REW2`: "{catname} tries to break through the ice but it is so terribly cold... <br/>  <br/> {His} paws go numb all over, but {he} likes the sensation!"
- `EVENT_FROZENHUMANOID_REW3`: "{catname} tries to break through the ice but only ends up exhausted and cold..."
- `EVENT_FROZENHUMANOID_REW4`: "It's alive! The caveman trapped inside breaks out and charges towards the cats!"
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"
- `EVENT_FROZENHUMANOID_REW5`: "{catname} is cold enough already!"

```
FrozenHumanoid {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_FROZENHUMANOID_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame frozen_humanoid
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_FROZENHUMANOID_QUES"

        options {
            break_ice {
                label "EVENT_FROZENHUMANOID_BREAKICE_ANSW"

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_FROZENHUMANOID_REW1"
                            set_frame 2 
                            gain_familiar {
                                object CharmedCaveBaby
                                initial_health 10
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_FROZENHUMANOID_REW2"
                            set_frame 3
                            learn_passive IcePaws
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_FROZENHUMANOID_REW3"
                            set_frame 4
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Slow 3
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_FROZENHUMANOID_REW4" 
                            set_frame 5
                            spawn_unit_next_fight {
                                object CaveMan
                                count 1
                                spawn_side cats
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            ignore {
                label "EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave
                
                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_FROZENHUMANOID_REW5"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `DeadMammoth`
**Source:** `iceage_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_DEADMAMMOTH_NAME`: "Dead Mammoth"
- `EVENT_DEADMAMMOTH_QUES`: "Beneath a towering mound of ice and fur, {catname} sees a dead mammoth."
- `EVENT_EAT_ANSW`: "Eat"
- `EVENT_DEADMAMMOTH_REW1`: "Although a bit crunchy from being frozen, the meat is still edible and the cats enjoy a feast!"
- `EVENT_DEADMAMMOTH_REW2`: "{catname} bites into the large mammoth... <br/>  <br/> The meat is still tender and fresh!"
- `EVENT_DEADMAMMOTH_REW3`: "{catname} eats some of the meat, but it has spoiled! <br/>  <br/> {catname} has been poisoned."
- `EVENT_DEADMAMMOTH_REW4`: "There is so much meat! {catname} just keeps eating and eating until {he} is completely stuffed..."
- `EVENT_LOOT_ANSW`: "Loot"
- `EVENT_DEADMAMMOTH_REW5`: "{catname} tears apart the mammoth and extracts some of the bones..."
- `EVENT_DEADMAMMOTH_REW6`: "What an immense creature! {catname} and the cats pull it apart, fashioning all sorts of gear!"
- `EVENT_DEADMAMMOTH_REW7`: "It wasn't dead! <br/>  <br/> The mammoth strikes {catname} savagely before {he} can react."
- `EVENT_DEADMAMMOTH_REW8`: "The mammoth wasn't dead! It rears up and ferociously attacks the cats!"
- `EVENT_REVIVE_ANSW`: "Revive"
- `EVENT_DEADMAMMOTH_REW9`: "After approaching the frozen mammoth, {catname} finds a scared mammoth kitten hiding behind it... <br/>  <br/> {catname} coaxes it out and convinces it to join the party!"
- `EVENT_DEADMAMMOTH_REW10`: "The mammoth is almost frozen to death. The cats warm it up with wet kisses and it becomes a friend!"
- `EVENT_DEADMAMMOTH_REW11`: "{catname} tries to revive the mammoth, but it appears to have been dead for a long time."
- `EVENT_DEADMAMMOTH_REW12`: "The mammoth wakes up in a fury and charges the cats!"

```
DeadMammoth {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_DEADMAMMOTH_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame dead_mammoth
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_DEADMAMMOTH_QUES"

        options {
            eat {
                label "EVENT_EAT_ANSW"
                stat con

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_DEADMAMMOTH_REW1"
                            party_heal 5
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_DEADMAMMOTH_REW2"
                            full_heal 1
                            permanent_stats {
                                con 1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_DEADMAMMOTH_REW3"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Poison 1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_DEADMAMMOTH_REW4" 
                            full_heal 1
                            permanent_stats {
                                spd -2
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            loot {
                label "EVENT_LOOT_ANSW"
                stat dex
                animation choice_dex_alt

                good {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_DEADMAMMOTH_REW5"
                            //TODO: Add "count" option to get_item_from_pool so it guarantees different items.
                            get_item_from_pool bone_armor
                            get_item_from_pool bone_equipment
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_DEADMAMMOTH_REW6"
                            get_item_from_pool bone_armor
                            get_item_from_pool bone_equipment
                            get_item_from_pool flesh_items
                            get_item_from_pool flesh_items
                            get_item_from_pool hide_items
                            get_item_from_pool hide_items
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 4
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_DEADMAMMOTH_REW7"
                            random_pool [
                                {
                                    injury str
                                }
                                {
                                    injury spd
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_DEADMAMMOTH_REW8" 
                            party_damage 5
                            party_injury random
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            revive {
                label "EVENT_REVIVE_ANSW"
                stat lck

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 6
                            prompt "EVENT_DEADMAMMOTH_REW9"
                            gain_familiar CharmedMammothBaby
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 5
                            prompt "EVENT_DEADMAMMOTH_REW10"
                            gain_familiar CharmedMammoth
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_DEADMAMMOTH_REW11"
                            //nothing
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 4
                            prompt "EVENT_DEADMAMMOTH_REW12"
                            spawn_unit_next_fight {
                                object Mammoth
                                count 1
                                spawn_side anywhere
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `MysteriousTent`
**Source:** `iceage_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTENT_NAME`: "Mysterious Tent"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTENT_QUES`: "{catname} finds a mysterious tent made of old hides. <br/>  <br/> Through cracks in the tent {catname} thinks {he} can see movement."
- `EVENT_ENTER_ANSW`: "Enter"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTENT_REW1`: "{catname} pushes open the flap of the door. There is a warm fire lit inside! <br/>  <br/> The cats rest around the fire, waiting out the long cold night..."
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTENT_REW2`: "{catname} pushes {his} way through the tent door and finds a shop inside!"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTENT_PROMPT`: "Enter Shop"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTENT_REW3`: "Inside the tent {catname} finds a bedraggled shop keeper with a few wares."
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTENT_REW4`: "{catname} bursts into the tent, disturbing a caveman in the middle of dinner! <br/>  <br/> It screams at {him} in anger and chases {him} out."
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTENT_REW5`: "{catname} ignores the tent and moves on to the next area."

```
MysteriousTent {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTENT_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame mysterious_tent
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTENT_QUES"

        options {
            enter {
                label "EVENT_ENTER_ANSW"

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTENT_REW1"
                            party_heal 100%
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTENT_REW2"
                            override_end_option_prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTENT_PROMPT"
                            shop_now Event_RareShop
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 2
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTENT_REW3"
                            override_end_option_prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTENT_PROMPT"
                            shop_now Event_SmallShop
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 3
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTENT_REW4" 
                            spawn_unit_next_fight {
                                object CaveManNoSpear
                                count 1
                                spawn_side cats
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            ignore {
                label "EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave
                
                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTENT_REW5"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

## File: `junkyard_events.gon`

### `LockedTrunk`
**Source:** `junkyard_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_LOCKEDTRUNK_NAME`: "Locked Trunk"
- `EVENT_LOCKEDTRUNK_QUES`: "While walking through the junkyard, {catname} spots a rusty old car. {He} feels a strong urge to look in the trunk, still locked after all these years."
- `EVENT_OPEN_ANSW`: "Open"
- `EVENT_LOCKEDTRUNK_REW1`: "The lock worn with rust and weather, {catname} manages to pop the trunk open. {He} looks inside for anything worth taking..."
- `EVENT_LOCKEDTRUNK_REW2`: "{catname} pries the lock open and looks inside the old trunk. Treasure! What fool leaves all this behind when they junked their car?"
- `EVENT_LOCKEDTRUNK_REW3`: "An odd smell is emanating from the car... {catname} works the trunk lid loose and pops it open. <br/>  <br/> {He} stares down at the decomposing corpse within. Its mouth is open in a final cry for help, left forever unanswered. So tragic!"
- `EVENT_LOCKEDTRUNK_REW4`: "Feeling like this might be {his} lucky day, {catname} breaks into the trunk. <br/>  <br/> When the lid opens, a horrifying scream rings out as the ghost of some poor soul stuck inside is released! {catname} shudders as it passes through {him}..."
- `EVENT_WALKAWAY_ANSW`: "Walk away"
- `EVENT_LOCKEDTRUNK_REW5`: "{catname} shrugs. Probably just old car junk in there. What good could that be? {catname} uses paws, not wheels, after all."
- `EVENT_LOCKEDTRUNK_REW6`: "{catname} walks away from the old junker. It probably went fast in its day! <br/>  <br/> {catname} imagines sticking {his} head out the window and feeling the wind on {his} face as the car speeds along..."
- `EVENT_LOCKEDTRUNK_REW7`: "{catname} walks a little closer, sniffing the air to identify an odd scent coming from the car. It doesn't smell good! <br/>  <br/> Better not investigate. {He} turns to leave, but the trunk pops open with a bang, revealing a frightening skeleton inside!"

```
LockedTrunk {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_LOCKEDTRUNK_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame locked_trunk
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_LOCKEDTRUNK_QUES"

        options {
            open {
                label "EVENT_OPEN_ANSW"
                stat lck

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 2
                            prompt "EVENT_LOCKEDTRUNK_REW1"
                            get_item_from_pool junkyard_items
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 3
                            prompt "EVENT_LOCKEDTRUNK_REW2"
                            gain_coins [10 20]
							get_item_from_pool junkyard_items
							get_item_from_pool junkyard_items
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 4
                            prompt "EVENT_LOCKEDTRUNK_REW3"
                            gain_disorder_from_pool mental_disorders
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 5
                            prompt "EVENT_LOCKEDTRUNK_REW4" 
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Madness 1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            leave {
                label "EVENT_WALKAWAY_ANSW"
                stat spd

                good {
                    set_frame 1
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_LOCKEDTRUNK_REW5"
                            play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                            //nothing,
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_LOCKEDTRUNK_REW6"
                            permanent_stats {
                                spd 1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 1
                            prompt "EVENT_LOCKEDTRUNK_REW5"
                            play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                            //nothing

                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 4
                            prompt "EVENT_LOCKEDTRUNK_REW7" 
                            gain_disorder_from_pool mental_disorders
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `BarbedWireFence`
**Source:** `junkyard_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_BARBEDWIREFENCE_NAME`: "Barbed wire fence"
- `EVENT_BARBEDWIREFENCE_QUES`: "{catname}'s path is impeded by a barbed wire fence. {He} considers {his} options..."
- `EVENT_CUTWIRES_ANSW`: "Cut wires"
- `EVENT_BARBEDWIREFENCE_REW1`: "{catname} carefully cuts a path through the barbed wiring, allowing the cats to continue onward."
- `EVENT_BARBEDWIREFENCE_REW2`: "{catname} deftly cuts the wire in front of {him}, clearing a path forward. {He} even cuts several sections of wire into weapons!"
- `EVENT_BARBEDWIREFENCE_REW3`: "{catname} tries to cut through the sharp wires, but gets tangled in the wire as it digs into {his} skin!"
- `EVENT_BARBEDWIREFENCE_REW4`: "The sharp wire cuts into {catname} soft, furry skin causing {him} to bleed profusely!"
- `EVENT_SLIPTHROUGH_ANSW`: "Slip through fence"
- `EVENT_BARBEDWIREFENCE_REW5`: "{catname} tries to squeeze through the sharp barbed wire. {He} squirms {his} way through, although not unscathed."
- `EVENT_BARBEDWIREFENCE_REW6`: "{catname} sneaks through the barbed wire. {He} doesn't think anyone would expect an attack from this direction!"
- `EVENT_BARBEDWIREFENCE_REW7`: "{catname} attempts to push {his} way through the sharp wires, but gets cut over and over again!"
- `EVENT_BARBEDWIREFENCE_REW8`: "Part-way through the barbed fence, {catname} gets stuck! The sharp wires dig into {his} skin. {He}'s barely able to escape with {his} life!"
- `EVENT_TAKELONGWAY_ANSW`: "Take the long way around"
- `EVENT_BARBEDWIREFENCE_REW9`: "Smartly, {catname} decides it would be best to find a safer route."
- `EVENT_BARBEDWIREFENCE_REW10`: "{catname} is too intimidated and sheepishly leads the party on a much longer route..."

```
BarbedWireFence {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_BARBEDWIREFENCE_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame barbed_wire_fence
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_BARBEDWIREFENCE_QUES"

        options {
            cut_wires {
                label "EVENT_CUTWIRES_ANSW"
                stat int

                good {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_BARBEDWIREFENCE_REW1"
                            //nothing
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_BARBEDWIREFENCE_REW2"
                            get_item_from_pool barbed_items
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_BARBEDWIREFENCE_REW3"
                            permanent_stats {
                                con -1
                            }
                            get_parasite_from_pool barbed_items
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_BARBEDWIREFENCE_REW4" 
                            permanent_stats {
                                con -1
                            }
                            injury bleeding
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            slip_through {
                label "EVENT_SLIPTHROUGH_ANSW"
                stat dex

                good {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_BARBEDWIREFENCE_REW5"
                            damage [1 3]
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_BARBEDWIREFENCE_REW6"
                            ambush_next_basic_fights 1
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_BARBEDWIREFENCE_REW7"
                            damage [5 10]
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_BARBEDWIREFENCE_REW8" 
                            injury random
                            get_parasite_from_pool barbed_armor
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            go_around {
                label "EVENT_TAKELONGWAY_ANSW"
                stat lck
                animation choice_leave
                
                good {
                    next_event_bonus 1
                    event_now_same_cat random
                    prompt "EVENT_BARBEDWIREFENCE_REW9"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
                bad {
                    next_event_bonus -1
                    event_now_same_cat random
                    prompt "EVENT_BARBEDWIREFENCE_REW10"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `TrashBags`
**Source:** `junkyard_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_TRASHBAGS_NAME`: "Trash Bags"
- `EVENT_TRASHBAGS_QUES`: "{catname} finds a bunch of trash bags. They look full!"
- `EVENT_EAT_ANSW`: "Eat"
- `EVENT_TRASHBAGS_REW1`: "{catname} rips the bags open and devours anything that looks remotely edible. In one of the bags {he} finds a weird foot."
- `EVENT_TRASHBAGS_REW2`: "{catname} gobbles up leftover food within the bags. Tasty!"
- `EVENT_TRASHBAGS_REW3`: "{catname} feverishly devours whatever trash is in the bags, and {his} stomach starts cramping. <br/>  <br/> Something {he} ate doesn't sit well with {him}..."
- `EVENT_TRASHBAGS_REW4`: "{catname} digs through the trash bags eating random scraps of spoiled meat. <br/>  <br/> Part-way through {he} feels an overwhelming revulsion towards what {he} is doing..."
- `EVENT_OPEN_ANSW`: "Open"
- `EVENT_TRASHBAGS_REW5`: "{catname} pulls open the bags and digs around in the filth looking for something useful..."
- `EVENT_TRASHBAGS_REW6`: "{catname} opens the bags, looking for treasure..."
- `EVENT_TRASHBAGS_REW7`: "{catname} leaps into the trash bags, digging through the refuse. When {he} emerges, there is waste stuck all over {him}."
- `EVENT_TRASHBAGS_REW8`: "{catname} breaks open the bags, and the disgusting sludge barely held within spills out and covers {him}!"
- `EVENT_ATTACK_ANSW`: "Attack"
- `EVENT_TRASHBAGS_REW9`: "{catname} leaps onto the bags with claws out, slashing! Something in one of the bags moves for a moment, then is still. You can't hide from {catname}!"
- `EVENT_TRASHBAGS_REW10`: "{catname} strikes at the bags, tearing them open. Rotting gunk from within the bags bursts out onto {catname}'s paws!"
- `EVENT_TRASHBAGS_REW11`: "{catname} attacks one of the bags, but it burts open and a garbage monster attacks {him}!"
- `EVENT_TRASHBAGS_REW12`: "{catname} hits one of the bags, but it wasn't trash! <br/>  <br/> A giant chummy emerges from the thin plastic and strikes {him}!"

```
TrashBags {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_TRASHBAGS_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame trash_bags
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_TRASHBAGS_QUES"

        options {
            eat {
                label "EVENT_EAT_ANSW"
                stat con

                good {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_TRASHBAGS_REW1"
                            heal 5
                            get_item_from_pool flesh_items
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_TRASHBAGS_REW2"
                            permanent_stats {
                                con 1
                            }   
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 4
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_TRASHBAGS_REW3"
                            gain_disorder_from_pool [Dysentery, IBS, Infestation, EatingDisorder, Gastritis, Pica, CrohnsDisease]
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_TRASHBAGS_REW4" 
                            gain_disorder Vegan
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            open {
                label "EVENT_OPEN_ANSW"
                stat lck

                good {
                    set_frame 5
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_TRASHBAGS_REW5"
                            get_item_from_pool recycled_items
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_TRASHBAGS_REW6"
                            get_item_from_pool junkyard_items
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 4
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_TRASHBAGS_REW7"
                            get_parasite_from_pool sludge_armor
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_TRASHBAGS_REW8"
                            get_parasite SludgeHat
                            get_parasite SludgeMask
                            get_parasite SludgeNeck
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            attack {
                label "EVENT_ATTACK_ANSW"
                stat str

                good {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_TRASHBAGS_REW9"
                            global_effect_next_fight {
                                Fights 1
                                StatusRandomEnemiesOnBattleStart {
                                    count 1
                                    Bleed 2
                                }
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_TRASHBAGS_REW10"
                            learn_passive DirtyClaws
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 5
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_TRASHBAGS_REW11"
                            damage 2
                            spawn_unit_next_fight {
                                object ChumBag
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_TRASHBAGS_REW12" 
                            injury random
                            spawn_unit_next_fight {
                                count 2 //TODO: Instead spawn ChampionChummy
                                object ChumBag
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `HeadInATire`
**Source:** `junkyard_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_HEADINATIRE_NAME`: "Head in a tire"
- `EVENT_HEADINATIRE_QUES`: "A wrinkly, withered old head is tucked in the ring of a tire. <br/>  <br/> It stares blankly at {catname}."
- `EVENT_KISS_ANSW`: "Kiss"
- `EVENT_HEADINATIRE_REW1`: "{catname} puckers up and gives the weird head a kiss on the forehead... <br/>  <br/> Nothing seems to happen."
- `EVENT_HEADINATIRE_REW2`: "{catname} bravely gives the head a wet kiss and it grins happily! <br/>  <br/> Now that they are friends, {catname} gets the feeling it won't bother any future parties."
- `EVENT_HEADINATIRE_REW3`: "The old wrinkled skin tastes disgusting and {catname} almost gags as the dry lips of the head try to kiss {him} back!"
- `EVENT_HEADINATIRE_REW4`: "{catname}'s rough tongue rips off a hunk of the decaying skin and {he} inadvertently swallows a leathery hunk of the rotting flesh!"
- `EVENT_RUN_ANSW`: "Run!"
- `EVENT_HEADINATIRE_REW5`: "{catname} darts away before getting too close to the head!"
- `EVENT_HEADINATIRE_REW6`: "{catname} leaps over the tire and continues on, feeling proud of {his} acrobatics!"
- `EVENT_HEADINATIRE_REW7`: "{catname} tries to dart past the head but it reaches out and bites into {his} leg!"
- `EVENT_HEADINATIRE_REW8`: "{catname} turns to run away but the head leaps forward and rips into {his} body, crushing bones! {catname} barely manages to wriggle free from its deadly grasp!"
- `EVENT_ATTACK_ANSW`: "Attack"
- `EVENT_HEADINATIRE_REW9`: "{catname} strikes at the strange head and it deflates like a balloon further into the tire."
- `EVENT_HEADINATIRE_REW10`: "With lighting fast strikes, {catname} rips open the head and it collapses into the tire."
- `EVENT_HEADINATIRE_REW11`: "{catname} trades blows with the head but it emerges the victor, biting into {his} soft face!"
- `EVENT_HEADINATIRE_REW12`: "{catname} goes to bite the head but it tries to devour {catname}, face first! Teeth scrape against {catname}'s skull as {he} pulls {himself} free..."

```
HeadInATire {
    requirements {
        not_has_token WorldEventLegacyToken_HeadInTireCompleted
    }

    intro {
        title "EVENT_HEADINATIRE_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame head_in_a_tire
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_HEADINATIRE_QUES"

        options {
            kiss {
                label "EVENT_KISS_ANSW"
                stat cha

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 1
                            prompt "EVENT_HEADINATIRE_REW1"
                            //nothing
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 4
                            prompt "EVENT_HEADINATIRE_REW2"
                            set_legacy_token WorldEventLegacyToken_HeadInTireCompleted
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_HEADINATIRE_REW3"
                            gain_disorder_from_pool diseases                            
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_HEADINATIRE_REW4"
                            gain_disorder_from_pool diseases
                            gain_disorder_from_pool diseases
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Rot 2
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            run {
                label "EVENT_RUN_ANSW"
                stat spd

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 1
                            prompt "EVENT_HEADINATIRE_REW5"
                            //nothing
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_HEADINATIRE_REW6"
                            permanent_stats {
                                spd 1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 5
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_HEADINATIRE_REW7"
                            injury spd
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_HEADINATIRE_REW8" 
                            injury spd
                            injury spd
                            damage 10
                        }
                    }
                }
            }


            attack {
                label "EVENT_ATTACK_ANSW"
                stat str

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_HEADINATIRE_REW9"
                            //nothing
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_HEADINATIRE_REW10"
                            get_item_from_pool [BonesMask, BonesHat, HumanHead, HumanFleshMask, HumanBrain]
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 5
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_HEADINATIRE_REW11"
                            injury cha
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_HEADINATIRE_REW12" 
                            gain_disorder PuncturedEye
                            injury cha
                            damage 10
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `BoxWithAHole`
**Source:** `junkyard_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_BOXWITHAHOLE_NAME`: "Box with a hole"
- `EVENT_BOXWITHAHOLE_QUES`: "{catname} finds a cardboard box with a hole in it. {He} wonders what could be inside! What should {he} do?"
- `EVENT_LEGINSIDE_ANSW`: "Put {his} leg in the hole"
- `EVENT_BOXWITHAHOLE_REW1`: "{catname} pokes {his} leg into the hole... {He} feels an odd tingling sensation as {his} leg mutates!"
- `EVENT_BOXWITHAHOLE_REW2`: "{catname} sticks {his} leg in the cardboard box. {He} feels a surge of warmth and {his} leg feels great!"
- `EVENT_BOXWITHAHOLE_REW3`: "{catname} shoves {his} leg into the hole and is greeted with a loud crunching sound as something clamps down onto it!"
- `EVENT_BOXWITHAHOLE_REW4`: "{catname} places {his} leg into the cardboard box. Something grabs onto it violently! As {he} desperately tries to pull away, the thing inside the box twists..."
- `EVENT_ARMINSIDE_ANSW`: "Put {his} arm in the hole"
- `EVENT_BOXWITHAHOLE_REW5`: "{catname} gingerly places {his} paw into the hole. Something inside pokes at it, and when {he} withdraws {his} paw, {catname} finds it has been enhanced!"
- `EVENT_BOXWITHAHOLE_REW6`: "{catname} injects {his} arm into the cardboard box. The moment {he} does, {catname} feels a surge of strength as {his} paw is mutated!"
- `EVENT_BOXWITHAHOLE_REW7`: "{catname} puts {his} paw into the cardboard box. Something inside clamps down on it, shattering {his} arm!"
- `EVENT_BOXWITHAHOLE_REW8`: "{catname} carelessly shoves {his} paw into the hole, then screams out in terror as {he} feels unimaginable pain!"
- `EVENT_TAILINSIDE_ANSW`: "Put {his} tail in the hole"
- `EVENT_BOXWITHAHOLE_REW9`: "{catname} slips {his} tail into the hole... {He} feels a surge of warmth as {his} tail mutates!"
- `EVENT_BOXWITHAHOLE_REW10`: "{catname} slides {his} tail into the opening in the cardboard box. A tingly feeling washes over {him} as {his} tail changes shape!"
- `EVENT_BOXWITHAHOLE_REW11`: "Thinking he has outsmarted whatever prankster is inside, {catname} pokes {his} tail through the hole in the cardboard box..."
- `EVENT_BOXWITHAHOLE_REW12`: "{catname} nervously puts {his} tail into the strange hole. Before {he} can react, blood splatters everywhere as {his} tail is cut! {catname} screams in terror!"

```
BoxWithAHole {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_BOXWITHAHOLE_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame box_with_a_hole
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_BOXWITHAHOLE_QUES"

        options {
            leg {
                label "EVENT_LEGINSIDE_ANSW"
                stat lck

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_BOXWITHAHOLE_REW1"
                            random_mutation_from_set {
                                count 1
                                legs -1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_BOXWITHAHOLE_REW2"
                            random_mutation_from_set {
                                count 1
                                legs -1
                            }
                            permanent_stats {
                                spd 1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_BOXWITHAHOLE_REW3"
                            injury spd
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_BOXWITHAHOLE_REW4" 
                            injury spd
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Fear 5
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            arm {
                label "EVENT_ARMINSIDE_ANSW"
                stat lck

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_BOXWITHAHOLE_REW5"
                            random_mutation_from_set {
                                count 1
                                legs -1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_BOXWITHAHOLE_REW6"
                            random_mutation_from_set {
                                count 1
                                legs -1
                            }
                            permanent_stats {
                                str 1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_BOXWITHAHOLE_REW7"
                            injury str
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_BOXWITHAHOLE_REW8" 
                            injury str
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Fear 5
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            tail {
                label "EVENT_TAILINSIDE_ANSW"
                stat lck

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_BOXWITHAHOLE_REW9"
                            random_mutation_from_set {
                                count 1
                                tail -1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_BOXWITHAHOLE_REW10"
                            random_mutation_from_set {
                                count 1
                                tail -1
                            }
                            permanent_stats {
                                dex 1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }

                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_BOXWITHAHOLE_REW11"
                            injury lck
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_BOXWITHAHOLE_REW12" 
                            injury lck
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Fear 5
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `StartDigging`
**Source:** `junkyard_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_STARTDIGGING_NAME`: "Start Digging"
- `EVENT_STARTDIGGING_QUES`: "{catname} finds a pile of dirt with a shovel next to it. <br/>  <br/> Something must be buried here!"
- `EVENT_STARTDIGGING_QUES2`: "{catname} finds a partially dug hole with a spade nearby. <br/>  <br/> Perhaps someone was digging here looking for treasure?"
- `EVENT_STARTDIGGING_QUES3`: "{catname} finds a large hole dug into the ground."
- `EVENT_DIG_ANSW`: "Dig"
- `EVENT_STARTDIGGING_REW1`: "{catname} makes some progress digging into the ground. <br/>  <br/> {He} hears a thunk as {his} shovel hits something..."
- `EVENT_STARTDIGGING_REW2`: "{catname} digs furiously and makes huge progress expanding the hole!"
- `EVENT_STARTDIGGING_REW3`: "{catname} tries to dig but injures {himself} instead!"
- `EVENT_STARTDIGGING_REW4`: "The old spade handle is rough and splinters from the old wood dig into {catname}'s paws! <br/>  <br/> {catname} howls in pain and scrambles out of the hole, pulling dirt back down to the bottom."
- `EVENT_LOOT_ANSW`: "Loot"
- `EVENT_STARTDIGGING_REW5`: "{catname} climbs into the hole and finds a treasure box at the bottom!"
- `EVENT_STARTDIGGING_REW6`: "{catname} reaches down into the hole and pulls out a treasure box!"
- `EVENT_STARTDIGGING_REW7`: "{catname} looks around at the bottom of the hole... <br/>  <br/> There's nothing there. Perhaps it was already looted?"
- `EVENT_STARTDIGGING_REW8`: "{catname} attempts to scramble down into the hole and look for treasure... <br/>  <br/> The fragile dirt walls of the hole collapse, partially filling in the hole!"
- `EVENT_LEAVE_ANSW`: "Leave"
- `EVENT_STARTDIGGING_REW9`: "{catname} moves on."

```
StartDigging {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_STARTDIGGING_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame start_digging
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        setup {
            conditional_reward {
                requirements {
                    not_has_token WorldEventLegacyToken_StartDigging
                }
                reward {
                    prompt "EVENT_STARTDIGGING_QUES"
                }
            }
            conditional_reward {
                requirements {
                    counter_range [WorldEventLegacyToken_StartDigging 1 3]
                }
                reward {
                    prompt "EVENT_STARTDIGGING_QUES2"
                }
            }
            conditional_reward {
                requirements {
                    counter_range [WorldEventLegacyToken_StartDigging 1 1]
                }

                reward {
                    set_frame 2
                }
            }
            conditional_reward {
                requirements {
                    counter_range [WorldEventLegacyToken_StartDigging 2 2]
                }

                reward {
                    set_frame 3
                }
            }
            
            conditional_reward {
                requirements {
                    counter_range [WorldEventLegacyToken_StartDigging 3 3]
                }

                reward {
                    set_frame 4
                }
            }

            conditional_reward {
                requirements {
                    counter_minimum [WorldEventLegacyToken_StartDigging 4]
                }

                reward {
                    set_frame 5
                    prompt "EVENT_STARTDIGGING_QUES3"
                }
            }
        }

        options {
            dig {
                label "EVENT_DIG_ANSW"
                stat str

                requirements {
                    counter_maximum [WorldEventLegacyToken_StartDigging 3]
                }

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_STARTDIGGING_REW1"
                            increment_legacy_counter WorldEventLegacyToken_StartDigging
                            get_item_from_pool junkyard_items
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_STARTDIGGING_REW2"
                            increment_legacy_counter WorldEventLegacyToken_StartDigging
                            increment_legacy_counter WorldEventLegacyToken_StartDigging
                            learn_passive DirtyClaws
							    permanent_stats {
                                str 2
                            }
                        }
                    }

                    //update frame
                    conditional_reward {
                        requirements {
                            counter_range [WorldEventLegacyToken_StartDigging 0 0]
                        }
                        reward {
                            set_frame 1
                        }
                    }
                    conditional_reward {
                        requirements {
                            counter_range [WorldEventLegacyToken_StartDigging 1 1]
                        }
                        reward {
                            set_frame 2
                        }
                    }
                    conditional_reward {
                        requirements {
                            counter_range [WorldEventLegacyToken_StartDigging 2 2]
                        }
                        reward {
                            set_frame 3
                        }
                    }
                    conditional_reward {
                        requirements {
                            counter_range [WorldEventLegacyToken_StartDigging 3 3]
                        }
                        reward {
                            set_frame 4
                        }
                    }                    
                    conditional_reward {
                        requirements {
                            counter_minimum [WorldEventLegacyToken_StartDigging 4]
                        }
                        reward {
                            set_frame 5
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 4
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_STARTDIGGING_REW3"
                            damage [3 6]
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_STARTDIGGING_REW4" 
                            decrement_legacy_counter WorldEventLegacyToken_StartDigging
                            get_parasite PawShards

                            //update frame
                            conditional_reward {
                                requirements {
                                    counter_range [WorldEventLegacyToken_StartDigging 0 0]
                                }
                                reward {
                                    set_frame 1
                                }
                            }
                            conditional_reward {
                                requirements {
                                    counter_range [WorldEventLegacyToken_StartDigging 1 1]
                                }
                                reward {
                                    set_frame 2
                                }
                            }
                            conditional_reward {
                                requirements {
                                    counter_range [WorldEventLegacyToken_StartDigging 2 2]
                                }
                                reward {
                                    set_frame 3
                                }
                            }
                            conditional_reward {
                                requirements {
                                    counter_range [WorldEventLegacyToken_StartDigging 3 3]
                                }
                                reward {
                                    set_frame 4
                                }
                            }                    
                            conditional_reward {
                                requirements {
                                    counter_minimum [WorldEventLegacyToken_StartDigging 4]
                                }
                                reward {
                                    set_frame 5
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            loot {
                label "EVENT_LOOT_ANSW"
                stat lck
                animation choice_dex_alt
                
                requirements {
                    counter_minimum [WorldEventLegacyToken_StartDigging 4]
                }

                good {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_STARTDIGGING_REW5"
                            shop_now TreasureEasy
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_STARTDIGGING_REW6"
                            shop_now TreasureHard
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 5
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_STARTDIGGING_REW7"
                            //nothing
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_STARTDIGGING_REW8" 
                            damage 5
                            decrement_legacy_counter WorldEventLegacyToken_StartDigging
                            decrement_legacy_counter WorldEventLegacyToken_StartDigging
                            set_frame 3
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            leave {
                label "EVENT_LEAVE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave
                
                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_STARTDIGGING_REW9"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

## File: `jurassic_events.gon`

### `MysteriousCave`
**Source:** `jurassic_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE_NAME`: "Mysterious Cave"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE_QUES`: "{catname} finds a mysterious cave. {He} can hear scary voices echoing from within the cave... <br/>  <br/> The darkness entrance beckons {catname} to explore it."
- `EVENT_ENTER_ANSW`: "Enter"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE_REW1`: "{catname} enters the cave. <br/>  <br/> {He} follows the cave downwards, squeezing through crevices and traveling deeper within..."
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE_REW2`: "{catname} hears a familiar voice echoing through the cave as {he} enters, a calming influence as {he} navigates deeper into the cave..."
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE_REW3`: "{catname} hears someone calling {his} name from within the cave! <br/>  <br/> Spooked by the strange voice, {catname} runs away in fear!"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE_REW4`: "Strange voices echo through the cave, clouding {catname}'s mind and filling his thoughts with chaos! <br/>  <br/> {catname} turns and flees in terror!"
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE_REW5`: "{catname} senses something strange about this cave, as if some being is guarding it. <br/>  <br/> {He} opts to leave it alone."

```
MysteriousCave {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame mysterious_cave
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE_QUES"

        options {
            enter {
                label "EVENT_ENTER_ANSW"
                stat con

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE_REW1"
                            event_now_same_cat MysteriousCave1
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE_REW2"
                            set_adventure_token AdventureToken_MysteriousCave_FamiliarVoice
                            event_now_same_cat MysteriousCave1
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE_REW3"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Fear 1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE_REW4" 
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Fear 1
                            }
                            gain_disorder_from_pool mental_disorders
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            ignore {
                label "EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave
                
                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE_REW5"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `TarPits`
**Source:** `jurassic_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_TARPITS_NAME`: "Tar Pits"
- `EVENT_TARPITS_QUES`: "{catname} finds a large pit full of tar. <br/>  <br/> It has a terribly pungent smell like rotting eggs."
- `EVENT_CROSS_ANSW`: "Cross"
- `EVENT_TARPITS_REW1`: "{catname} gracefully sprints over the tar pits without getting stuck. <br/>  <br/> It gives the party an opportunity to ambush the next battle!"
- `EVENT_TARPITS_REW2`: "{catname} wades into the tar and befriends some tar creatures on the way over!"
- `EVENT_TARPITS_REW3`: "It wasn't easy, but {catname} manages to make it to the other side only partially coated in sticky tar."
- `EVENT_TARPITS_REW4`: "The cats get stuck in the deep tar pit... <br/>  <br/> While still trying to pull themselves free, the party is ambushed!"
- `EVENT_GOAROUND_ANSW`: "Go around"
- `EVENT_TARPITS_REW5`: "{catname} navigates around the tar pit to the other side."
- `EVENT_TARPITS_REW6`: "{catname} finds an alternate path away from the tar pit... <br/>  <br/> It leads to a strange cave!"
- `EVENT_TARPITS_REW7`: "{catname} tries to find a way around but gets lost in the dense flora..."
- `EVENT_TARPITS_REW8`: "{catname} gets hopelessly lost! <br/>  <br/> There is so much undergrowth here it is impossible for {him} to navigate."

```
TarPits {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_TARPITS_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame tar_pits
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_TARPITS_QUES"

        options {
            cross {
                label "EVENT_CROSS_ANSW"

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 2
                            prompt "EVENT_TARPITS_REW1"
                            ally_ambush_next_fights 1
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 4
                            prompt "EVENT_TARPITS_REW2"
                            gain_familiar CharmedTarBaby
                            gain_familiar CharmedTarBaby
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_TARPITS_REW3"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Tarred 1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_TARPITS_REW4" 
                            ambush_next_basic_fights 1
                            party_status_next_fight {
                                Tarred 1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            go_around {
                label "EVENT_GOAROUND_ANSW"

                good {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_TARPITS_REW5"
                            //nothing
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_TARPITS_REW6"
                            next_event_bonus 1
                            event_now_same_cat MysteriousCave
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 5
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_TARPITS_REW7"
                            event_now_same_cat random
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_TARPITS_REW8" 
                            next_event_bonus -2
                            event_now_same_cat random
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `NestOfEggs`
**Source:** `jurassic_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_NESTOFEGGS_NAME`: "Nest of Eggs"
- `EVENT_NESTOFEGGS_QUES`: "{catname} finds a huge nest full of enormous eggs!"
- `EVENT_EAT_ANSW`: "Eat"
- `EVENT_NESTOFEGGS_REW1`: "{catname}'s teeth crunch through the brittle shell of the eggs, releasing a delicious nectar within!"
- `EVENT_NESTOFEGGS_REW2`: "The cats devour the large and delicious eggs!"
- `EVENT_NESTOFEGGS_REW3`: "The cats break open the eggs to eat them but are overwhelmed by a sudden stench of farts!"
- `EVENT_NESTOFEGGS_REW4`: "{catname} devours one of the eggs. It tastes absolutely wretched!"
- `EVENT_TAKE_ANSW`: "Take"
- `EVENT_NESTOFEGGS_REW5`: "{catname} grabs one of the eggs and pockets it."
- `EVENT_NESTOFEGGS_REW6`: "{catname} snatches up all of the eggs!"
- `EVENT_NESTOFEGGS_REW7`: "As {catname} goes to pick up one of the eggs, a large shadow falls over {him} and the nest... <br/>  <br/> The mother is here! Before {he} can react, the enraged Raptor tears into {catname}!"
- `EVENT_NESTOFEGGS_REW8`: "When they enter the nest, the cats are suddenly ambushed by Raptors! <br/>  <br/> Beaten and bloodied, the cats manage to barely escape their wrath."
- `EVENT_KISS_ANSW`: "Kiss"
- `EVENT_NESTOFEGGS_REW9`: "{catname} kisses an egg and it begins to hatch!  <br/>  <br/> The baby raptor mistakes {catname} for its mother and follows {him}!"
- `EVENT_NESTOFEGGS_REW10`: "{catname} looks on in wonder as the eggs all begin to hatch! <br/>  <br/> The cats help them out of the sticky mess of shells and the raptor kittens join the party."
- `EVENT_NESTOFEGGS_REW11`: "After disturbing the eggs, {catname} looks on in surprise as the eggs hatch! <br/>  <br/> Angry raptors stumble out of the shells and attack {catname}!"
- `EVENT_NESTOFEGGS_REW12`: "The moment {catname} leans in to kiss an egg, it bursts open and the raptor within bites {him} in the eye!"

```
NestOfEggs {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_NESTOFEGGS_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame nest_of_eggs
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_NESTOFEGGS_QUES"

        options {
            eat {
                label "EVENT_EAT_ANSW"
                stat con

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_NESTOFEGGS_REW1"
                            full_heal 1
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                HealthRegenUp 2
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_NESTOFEGGS_REW2"
                            party_heal 100%
                            party_status_next_fight {
                                HealthRegenUp 2
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_NESTOFEGGS_REW3"
                            party_status_next_fight {
                                Poison 2
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_NESTOFEGGS_REW4" 
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Poison 2
                            }
                            learn_ability BarfBall
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            take {
                label "EVENT_TAKE_ANSW"
                stat spd

                good {
                    set_frame 4
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_NESTOFEGGS_REW5"
                            get_item RaptorEgg
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_NESTOFEGGS_REW6"
                            get_item RaptorEgg
                            get_item_from_pool raptor_nest_eggs
                            get_item_from_pool raptor_nest_eggs
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 6
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_NESTOFEGGS_REW7"
                            damage 5
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Bleed 3
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_NESTOFEGGS_REW8" 
                            party_damage 5
                            party_status_next_fight {
                                Bleed 3
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            kiss {
                label "EVENT_KISS_ANSW"
                stat cha

                good {
                    set_frame 5
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_NESTOFEGGS_REW9"
                            gain_familiar CharmedRaptorBaby
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_NESTOFEGGS_REW10"
                            gain_familiar CharmedRaptorBaby
                            gain_familiar CharmedRaptorBaby
                            gain_familiar CharmedRaptorBaby
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 7
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_NESTOFEGGS_REW11"
                            injury cha
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_NESTOFEGGS_REW12" 
                            damage 10
                            gain_disorder PuncturedEye
                        }   
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

## File: `lab_events.gon`

### `Needles`
**Source:** `lab_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_NEEDLES_NAME`: "Needles"
- `EVENT_NEEDLES_QUES`: "{catname} finds several syringes full of a unknown colored liquids. <br/>  <br/> Which one should {he} take?"
- `EVENT_NEEDLES_AGAIN_QUES`: "{catname} wants to inject another needle!"
- `EVENT_NEEDLES_RED_ANSW`: "Red"
- `EVENT_NEEDLES_REW1`: "{catname} injects the red syringe. The strange liquid quickly courses through {his} veins. <br/>  <br/> {He} feels stronger!"
- `EVENT_NEEDLES_MUTATE_REW`: "{catname} feels a strange tingling sensation as {his} body mutates!"
- `EVENT_NEEDLES_REW2`: "{catname} feels an overwhelming burst of strength, then a strange tingling feeling as {he} gains a mutation! <br/>  <br/> What a rush!"
- `EVENT_NEEDLES_REW3`: "{catname}'s body quivers as the liquid from within the syringe takes hold of {his} body."
- `EVENT_NEEDLES_REW4`: "{catname} shakes as the injection leaves {his} body feeling frail and disfigured..."
- `EVENT_NEEDLES_BLUE_ANSW`: "Blue"
- `EVENT_NEEDLES_REW5`: "{catname}'s mind spins with energy. This was a great idea!"
- `EVENT_NEEDLES_REW6`: "{catname} plunges the needle deep into {his} skin and squeezes the syringe. <br/>  <br/> What an incredible feeling!"
- `EVENT_NEEDLES_REW7`: "{catname} injects the liquid from the blue syringe... <br/>  <br/> {He} feels a numbness in {his} mind as if {he} just forgot something important but can't remember what it is."
- `EVENT_NEEDLES_REW8`: "{catname}'s body quivers and mutates and {he} gets a splitting head ache!"
- `EVENT_NEEDLES_YELLOW_ANSW`: "Yellow"
- `EVENT_NEEDLES_REW9`: "{catname} feels an odd sensation. It is hard to describe, but for some reason it feels like {he} can do anything!"
- `EVENT_NEEDLES_REW10`: "{catname} injects {himself} with the yellow liquid. <br/>  <br/> Wow! {catname} feels great!"
- `EVENT_NEEDLES_REW11`: "The needle stings as {catname} presses it under {his} skin. <br/>  <br/> Did it do anything?"
- `EVENT_NEEDLES_REW12`: "{catname}'s eyes fill with tears of discomfort after injecting {himself}. <br/>  <br/> {He} feels a sudden sadness and begins shaking in despair."

```
Needles {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_NEEDLES_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame needles
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_NEEDLES_QUES"

        setup {
            conditional_reward {
                requirements {
                    has_token AdventureToken_HasTakenNeedle
                }
                reward {
                    prompt EVENT_NEEDLES_AGAIN_QUES
                }
            }
        }

        options {
            red_needle {
                label "EVENT_NEEDLES_RED_ANSW"
                stat lck

                requirements {
                    not_has_token AdventureToken_RedNeedle
                }

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            random_pool [
                                {
                                    prompt "EVENT_NEEDLES_REW1"
                                    permanent_stats {
                                        con 1
                                    }
                                }
                                {
                                    random_mutation 1
                                    prompt "EVENT_NEEDLES_MUTATE_REW"
                                }
                            ]

                            clear_adventure_token AdventureToken_HasTakenNeedle
                            clear_adventure_token AdventureToken_RedNeedle
                            clear_adventure_token AdventureToken_BlueNeedle
                            clear_adventure_token AdventureToken_YellowNeedle
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_NEEDLES_REW2"
                            permanent_stats {
                                con 1
                            }
                            random_mutation 1
                            set_adventure_token AdventureToken_RedNeedle
                            set_adventure_token AdventureToken_HasTakenNeedle
                            conditional_reward {
                                requirements {
                                    has_token AdventureToken_RedNeedle
                                    has_token AdventureToken_BlueNeedle
                                    has_token AdventureToken_YellowNeedle
                                }
                                reward {
                                    clear_adventure_token AdventureToken_HasTakenNeedle
                                    clear_adventure_token AdventureToken_RedNeedle
                                    clear_adventure_token AdventureToken_BlueNeedle
                                    clear_adventure_token AdventureToken_YellowNeedle
                                }
                                else {
                                    event_now_same_cat Needles
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_NEEDLES_REW3"
                            permanent_stats {
                                con -1
                            }

                            clear_adventure_token AdventureToken_HasTakenNeedle
                            clear_adventure_token AdventureToken_RedNeedle
                            clear_adventure_token AdventureToken_BlueNeedle
                            clear_adventure_token AdventureToken_YellowNeedle
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_NEEDLES_REW4" 
                            permanent_stats {
                                con -1
                            }                            
                            random_mutation 1
                            set_adventure_token AdventureToken_RedNeedle
                            set_adventure_token AdventureToken_HasTakenNeedle
                            conditional_reward {
                                requirements {
                                    has_token AdventureToken_RedNeedle
                                    has_token AdventureToken_BlueNeedle
                                    has_token AdventureToken_YellowNeedle
                                }
                                reward {
                                    clear_adventure_token AdventureToken_HasTakenNeedle
                                    clear_adventure_token AdventureToken_RedNeedle
                                    clear_adventure_token AdventureToken_BlueNeedle
                                    clear_adventure_token AdventureToken_YellowNeedle
                                }
                                else {
                                    event_now_same_cat Needles
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            blue_needle {
                label "EVENT_NEEDLES_BLUE_ANSW"
                stat lck
                
                requirements {
                    not_has_token AdventureToken_BlueNeedle
                } 

                good {
                    set_frame 4
                    reward {
                        common {
                            random_pool [
                                {
                                    prompt "EVENT_NEEDLES_REW5"
                                    permanent_stats {
                                        int 1
                                    }
                                }
                                {
                                    prompt "EVENT_NEEDLES_MUTATE_REW"
                                    random_mutation 1
                                }
                            ]
                            
                            clear_adventure_token AdventureToken_HasTakenNeedle
                            clear_adventure_token AdventureToken_RedNeedle
                            clear_adventure_token AdventureToken_BlueNeedle
                            clear_adventure_token AdventureToken_YellowNeedle
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_NEEDLES_REW6"
                            permanent_stats {
                                int 1
                            }
                            random_mutation 1
                            set_adventure_token AdventureToken_BlueNeedle
                            set_adventure_token AdventureToken_HasTakenNeedle
                            conditional_reward {
                                requirements {
                                    has_token AdventureToken_RedNeedle
                                    has_token AdventureToken_BlueNeedle
                                    has_token AdventureToken_YellowNeedle
                                }
                                reward {
                                    clear_adventure_token AdventureToken_HasTakenNeedle
                                    clear_adventure_token AdventureToken_RedNeedle
                                    clear_adventure_token AdventureToken_BlueNeedle
                                    clear_adventure_token AdventureToken_YellowNeedle
                                }
                                else {
                                    event_now_same_cat Needles
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 5
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_NEEDLES_REW7"
                            permanent_stats {
                                int -1
                            }

                            clear_adventure_token AdventureToken_HasTakenNeedle
                            clear_adventure_token AdventureToken_RedNeedle
                            clear_adventure_token AdventureToken_BlueNeedle
                            clear_adventure_token AdventureToken_YellowNeedle
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_NEEDLES_REW8" 
                            permanent_stats {
                                int -1
                            }                            
                            random_mutation 1
                            set_adventure_token AdventureToken_BlueNeedle
                            set_adventure_token AdventureToken_HasTakenNeedle
                            conditional_reward {

                                    clear_adventure_token AdventureToken_BlueNeedle

                                }

                                }

                label "EVENT_NEEDLES_YELLOW_ANSW"

                            clear_adventure_token AdventureToken_BlueNeedle
```
