### `MysteriousJar`
**Source:** `lab_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSJAR_NAME`: "Mysterious Jar"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSJAR_QUES`: "{catname} finds a large mysterious jar. <br/>  <br/> Peering through the murky liquid, {catname} sees a creature trapped within."
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSJAR_QUES2`: "Try as {he} might to resist, {catname} feels an irresistible urge to open the jar and free whatever is trapped inside!"
- `EVENT_FREE_ANSW`: "Free"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSJAR_REW1`: "{catname} twists the lid of the jar off and tips it over, spilling the contents onto the ground... <br/>  <br/> Something tumbles out of the jar and looks up at {catname} with gratitude!"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSJAR_REW1_SQUIRREL`: "It's a squirrel!"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSJAR_REW1_CROW`: "It's a crow!"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSJAR_REW1_SNAKE`: "It's a snake!"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSJAR_REW1_TURTLE`: "It's a turtle!"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSJAR_REW1_TOAD`: "It's a toad!"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSJAR_REW1_CATERPILLAR`: "It's a caterpillar!"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSJAR_REW2`: "{catname} opens the jar and pulls out the creature within... <br/>  <br/> It shivers, as if unaccustomed to the cool air within the lab. <br/>  <br/> {catname} helps wipe goo from the jar off the friendly creature!"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSJAR_REW3`: "{catname} twists the lid and it bursts open! <br/>  <br/> Before {he} can react, the monster inside attacks {catname}, then takes off! <br/>  <br/> {catname} looks around in surprise, bloodied, bruised and poisoned from the encounter."
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSJAR_REW4`: "{catname} pops the lid off and a terrifying creature leaps out and takes off into the next room!"
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSJAR_REW5`: "{catname} ignores the jar and moves on."
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSJAR_REW6`: "{catname} tries to turn away but the creature in the jar moves and {catname} can't draw {his} eyes away..."
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSJAR_REW7`: "{catname} is spooked by whatever is inside and leaves the jar alone!"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSJAR_REW8`: "{catname} feels guilty for abandoning the creature trapped inside... <br/>  <br/> How long has it been stuck in there?"

```
MysteriousJar {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSJAR_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame mysterious_jar
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSJAR_QUES"
        
        setup {
            conditional_reward {
                requirements {
                    not_has_token AdventureToken_MysteriousJarRepeat
                }
                reward {
                    prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSJAR_QUES"
                }
                else {
                    prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSJAR_QUES2"
                }
            }
        }

        options {
            free {
                label "EVENT_FREE_ANSW"
                stat lck

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSJAR_REW1"
                            random_pool [
                                {
                                    gain_familiar Squirrel
                                    prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSJAR_REW1_SQUIRREL"
                                }
                                {
                                    gain_familiar Crow
                                    prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSJAR_REW1_CROW"
                                }
                                {
                                    gain_familiar Snake
                                    prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSJAR_REW1_SNAKE"
                                }
                                {
                                    gain_familiar Turtle
                                    prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSJAR_REW1_TURTLE"
                                }
                                {
                                    gain_familiar Toad
                                    prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSJAR_REW1_TOAD"
                                }
                                {
                                    gain_familiar Catepillar
                                    prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSJAR_REW1_CATERPILLAR"
                                }                               
                            ]
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSJAR_REW2"
                            random_pool [
                                {
                                    gain_familiar CharmedSnakeyBones
                                }
                                {
                                    gain_familiar CharmedHornyCat
                                }
                                {
                                    gain_familiar CharmedGunCat
                                }
                                {
                                    gain_familiar CharmedScorpionCat
                                }
                                {
                                    gain_familiar CharmedMangy2
                                }
                                {
                                    gain_familiar CharmedBabyDeathWorm
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSJAR_REW3"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Poison 1
                                Bleed 1
                                Bruise 1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSJAR_REW4" 
                            spawn_unit_next_fight {
                                object [SnakeyBones HornyCat GunCat ScorpionCat Mangy2 BabyDeathWorm]
                                count 1
                                spawn_side enemies
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            ignore {
                label "EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW"

                requirements {
                    not_has_token AdventureToken_MysteriousJarRepeat
                }

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSJAR_REW5"
                            play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                            //nothing
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSJAR_REW6"
                            set_adventure_token AdventureToken_MysteriousJarRepeat
                            next_event_bonus 1
                            event_now_same_cat MysteriousJar
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSJAR_REW7"
                            play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                            //nothing
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSJAR_REW8" 
                            gain_disorder Depression
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `OddDevice`
**Source:** `lab_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_ODDDEVICE_NAME`: "Odd Device"
- `EVENT_ODDDEVICE_QUES`: "{catname} finds an odd device with buttons and a lever controlling a robotic device."
- `EVENT_ODDDEVICE_PUSHBUTTONS_ANSW`: "Push buttons"
- `EVENT_ODDDEVICE_REW1`: "{catname} pushes some of the buttons! <br/>  <br/> An energy beam fires at {him}, mutating {his} body!"
- `EVENT_ODDDEVICE_REW2`: "{catname} reaches up and presses the buttons... <br/>  <br/> A blinding hot laser beams down on {him} and {his} body mutates!"
- `EVENT_ODDDEVICE_REW3`: "{catname} presses a button on the console... <br/>  <br/> The machine emits a devastating beam that cuts into {catname}!"
- `EVENT_ODDDEVICE_REW4`: "{catname} smashes buttons on the machine until something happens... <br/>  <br/> A giant laser beam slices through {his} flesh!"
- `EVENT_ODDDEVICE_PULLLEVER_ANSW`: "Pull lever"
- `EVENT_ODDDEVICE_REW5`: "{catname} yanks the lever down. <br/>  <br/> A glowing beam washes over {catname} and {he} feels... different!"
- `EVENT_ODDDEVICE_REW6`: "{catname} bravely pulls the lever on the device. <br/>  <br/> A powerful beam of light washes over {catname}, awakening new knowledge deep in {his} mind!"
- `EVENT_ODDDEVICE_REW7`: "{catname} pulls the lever and is immediately struck with a sickening ray, blasting from an arm of the device above {him}!"
- `EVENT_ODDDEVICE_REW8`: "{catname} yanks down the lever... <br/>  <br/> A purple cloud of toxic smoke streams down from the device, choking {catname} in foul fumes!"

```
OddDevice {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_ODDDEVICE_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame odd_device
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_ODDDEVICE_QUES"

        options {
            push_buttons {
                label "EVENT_ODDDEVICE_PUSHBUTTONS_ANSW"

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_ODDDEVICE_REW1"
                            random_mutation 1
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_ODDDEVICE_REW2"
                            random_mutation 2
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_ODDDEVICE_REW3"
                            injury random
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_ODDDEVICE_REW4" 
                            injury random
                            injury random
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            pull_lever {
                label "EVENT_ODDDEVICE_PULLLEVER_ANSW"

                good {
                    set_frame 4
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_ODDDEVICE_REW5"
                            learn_ability_from_pool AnyUnlocked
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_ODDDEVICE_REW6"
                            learn_passive_from_pool AnyUnlocked
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 5
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_ODDDEVICE_REW7"
                            gain_disorder_from_pool all_disorders
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_ODDDEVICE_REW8" 
                            gain_disorder_from_pool all_disorders
                            gain_disorder_from_pool all_disorders
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

## File: `legacy_events.gon`

### `MonkeyPaw1`
**Source:** `legacy_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_MONKEYPAW_NAME`: "Monkey Paw"
- `EVENT_MONKEYPAW1_QUES`: "{catname} discovers a strange disembodied hand. The fingers of the hand are raised upward, unmoving."
- `EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW`: "Examine"
- `EVENT_MONKEYPAW1_REW1`: "{catname} squints {his} eyes, looking carefully at it safely from a distance. It is a very odd sight, but {catname} thinks nothing of it and moves on."
- `EVENT_MONKEYPAW1_REW2`: "{catname} approaches the large hand and cautiously places {his} paw onto the upraised palm..."
- `EVENT_LEAVE_ANSW`: "Leave"
- `EVENT_MONKEYPAW_LEAVE`: "{catname} ignores the strange hand and moves on."

```
MonkeyPaw1 {
    requirements {
        not_has_token WorldEventLegacyToken_MonkeyPaw1
    }

    intro {
        title "EVENT_MONKEYPAW_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame monkey_paw_4fingers
        set_frame 1
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_MONKEYPAW1_QUES"

        options {
            examine {
                label "EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW"
                stat int

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MONKEYPAW1_REW1"
                            //nothing happens
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_MONKEYPAW1_REW2"
                            set_legacy_token WorldEventLegacyToken_MonkeyPaw1
                            set_frame 2
                            event_now_same_cat MonkeyPawWish
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            leave {
                label "EVENT_LEAVE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave
                
                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_MONKEYPAW_LEAVE"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `MonkeyPaw2`

- `EVENT_MONKEYPAW_NAME`: "Monkey Paw"
- `EVENT_MONKEYPAW2_QUES`: "{catname} comes upon a large monkey hand. It has three fingers raised up into the air."
- `EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW`: "Examine"
- `EVENT_MONKEYPAW2_REW1`: "{catname} walks around the strange hand but doesn't see anything to do."
- `EVENT_MONKEYPAW2_REW2`: "{catname} thinks for a minute, then moves up and touches the weird paw. One of its large fingers moves down!"

- `EVENT_MONKEYPAW3_QUES`: "{catname} finds a strange hand, with one finger down and two up."

### `MeatGolem`
**Source:** `legacy_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_MEATGOLEM_NAME`: "Meat Golem"
- `EVENT_MEATGOLEM_QUES`: "[i]"GOLEM THANK YOU RESCUE HIM FROM CRYPT! NOW GOLEM HELP YOU!"[/i]"
- `EVENT_GOLEMSMASH_ANSW`: "SMASH!"
- `EVENT_MEATGOLEM_REW1`: "[i]"GOLEM KNOW WAY AROUND! GOLEM HELP YOU SMASH NEXT BATTLE!"[/i] <br/>  <br/> {catname} lets the golem lead {him} onwards."
- `EVENT_GOLEMSCREAM_ANSW`: "SCREAM!"
- `EVENT_MEATGOLEM_REW2`: "[i]"AAARRRRRRRRRGGGGGGGGGGHHHHHHHHHH!!!!"[/i] <br/>  <br/> {catname} isn't quite sure how that helped, but it definitely sent nearby critters running in terror."
- `EVENT_GOLEMFIND_ANSW`: "FIND!"
- `EVENT_MEATGOLEM_REW3`: "[i]"GOLEM FIND TREASURE! YOU HAVE NOW!"[/i] <br/>  <br/> {catname} accepts the gift."
- `EVENT_GOLEMLICK_ANSW`: "LICK!"
- `EVENT_MEATGOLEM_REW4`: "[i]"HERE KITTY KITTY! GOLEM MAKE KITTY FEEL BETTER!"[/i] <br/>  <br/> The golem gives {catname} a slobbery lick. {He} feels a lot better!"

```
MeatGolem {
    requirements {
        has_token WorldEventLegacyToken_CryptOpened
    }

    intro {
        title "EVENT_MEATGOLEM_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame meat_golem
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_MEATGOLEM_QUES"
        shuffle_options true
        max_options 2

        options {
            smash {
                label "EVENT_GOLEMSMASH_ANSW"
                stat none

                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_MEATGOLEM_REW1"
                    set_frame 2
                    ally_ambush_next_fights 1
                }
            }
            
            scream {
                label "EVENT_GOLEMSCREAM_ANSW"
                stat none

                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_MEATGOLEM_REW2"
                    set_frame 2
                    global_effect_next_fight {
                        Fights 1
                        StatusRandomEnemiesOnBattleStart {
                            count 2
                            Fear 2
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            find {
                label "EVENT_GOLEMFIND_ANSW"
                stat none

                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_MEATGOLEM_REW3"
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            get_item_from_pool {
                                pool chapter_common
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            get_item_from_pool {
                                pool chapter_rare
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            lick {
                label "EVENT_GOLEMLICK_ANSW"
                stat none

                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_MEATGOLEM_REW4"
                    set_frame 2
                    heal_injury 1
                    heal_disorder 1
                    heal 50%
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

## File: `misc_events.gon`

### `CatHole`
**Source:** `misc_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_CATSHAPEDHOLE_NAME`: "Cat-Shaped Hole"
- `EVENT_CATSHAPEDHOLE_QUES`: "{catname} finds a cat-shaped hole in the wall. It looks like it was made just for {him}!"
- `EVENT_GETINTHEHOLE_ANSW`: "Get in the hole!"
- `EVENT_CATSHAPEDHOLE_REW1`: "{catname} tries {his} best, but doesn't fit in the hole."
- `EVENT_CATSHAPEDHOLE_REW2`: "{catname} fits perfectly into the hole. {He} slides in deeper and deeper, unable to turn back! <br/>  <br/> The party waits anxiously for a while at the hole, but {catname} never returns, and they move on without {him}."
- `EVENT_CATSHAPEDHOLE_REW3`: "{catname} is too fat to fit into the hole and the party mocks {him}!"
- `EVENT_CATSHAPEDHOLE_REW4`: "{catname} disappears deep into the hole! <br/>  <br/> The party calls after {him}, but {he} never returns..."
- `EVENT_CATSHAPEDHOLE_REW5`: "With great effort, {catname} resists the urge to get into the strange hole."
- `EVENT_CATSHAPEDHOLE_REW6`: "The hole fits {catname} like a glove and {he} slides deep into it, fading from sight into the blackness of the hole."
- `EVENT_CATSHAPEDHOLE_REW7`: "{catname} manages to resist the urge to climb into the hole. <br/>  <br/> The perfect hole, crafted just for {him}, plagues {his} thoughts, whispering in the deep recesses of {his} mind... compelling {catname} to return!"
- `EVENT_CATSHAPEDHOLE_REW8`: "Without hesitating, {catname} enters the strange hole.  <br/>  <br/> {He} slides in deeper and deeper, unable to turn back! <br/>  <br/> The party looks for {catname}, but {he} is gone..."
- `EVENT_CATSHAPEDHOLE_REW9`: "{catname} tries to enter the hole, but the other cats pull {him} to safety before {he} can go in."
- `EVENT_CATSHAPEDHOLE_REW10`: "{catname} slides deftly into the hole. It fits {him} perfectly, as if created just for {him}! <br/>  <br/> The other cats don't think they will fit, and there are no other similar holes for them, so they move on without {catname}..."
- `EVENT_CATSHAPEDHOLE_REW11`: "{catname} tries to leap into the hole, but {his} body does not fit, and {he} is bashed against the wall..."
- `EVENT_CATSHAPEDHOLE_REW12`: "{catname} leaps into the hole, {his} body sliding perfectly deeper and deeper in until {he} is gone from sight... <br/>  <br/> The party wishes they had tried to stop {catname}. The cats wonder if they will ever see {him} again..."

```
CatHole {
    requirements { //wont show up on quests or on 1-cat runs since the cat dissapearing can be BAD in those cases
        minimum_party_size 2
        not_on_quest 1
    }

    intro {
        title "EVENT_CATSHAPEDHOLE_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame cathole
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_CATSHAPEDHOLE_QUES"

        options {
            concheck {
                label "EVENT_GETINTHEHOLE_ANSW"
                stat con

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 2
                            prompt "EVENT_CATSHAPEDHOLE_REW1"
                            play_animation resultConfused
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 3
                            prompt "EVENT_CATSHAPEDHOLE_REW2"
                            play_animation resultHole

                            //hide_cat 1

                            leave_party_temporarily {
                                fights_skipped 1
                            }

                            mutation {
                                body 900
                                ears 900
                                eyebrows 900
                                eyes 900
                                head 900
                                legs 900
                                arms 900
                                mouth 900
                                tail 900
                            }

                            hide_appearance_changes 1
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 2
                            prompt "EVENT_CATSHAPEDHOLE_REW3"
                            gain_disorder Depression
                            play_animation resultConfused
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 3
                            prompt "EVENT_CATSHAPEDHOLE_REW4"
                            play_animation resultHole

                            //hide_cat 1

                            leave_party_temporarily {
                                fights_skipped 0
                                return_during boss
                                return_as enemy
                            }

                            mutation {
                                body 900
                                ears 900
                                eyebrows 900
                                eyes 900
                                head 900
                                legs 900
                                arms 900
                                mouth 900
                                tail 900
                            }

                            hide_appearance_changes 1
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            intcheck {
                label "EVENT_GETINTHEHOLE_ANSW"
                stat int

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 4
                            prompt "EVENT_CATSHAPEDHOLE_REW5"
                            play_animation resultLeave
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 3
                            prompt "EVENT_CATSHAPEDHOLE_REW6"
                            play_animation resultHole

                            //hide_cat 1

                            leave_party_temporarily {
                                fights_skipped 1
                            }

                            mutation {
                                body 900
                                ears 900
                                eyebrows 900
                                eyes 900
                                head 900
                                legs 900
                                arms 900
                                mouth 900
                                tail 900
                            }

                            hide_appearance_changes 1
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 4
                            prompt "EVENT_CATSHAPEDHOLE_REW7"
                            gain_disorder_from_pool mental_disorders
                            play_animation resultConfused
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 3
                            prompt "EVENT_CATSHAPEDHOLE_REW8"
                            play_animation resultHole

                            //hide_cat 1

                            leave_party_temporarily {
                                fights_skipped 0
                                return_during boss
                                return_as enemy
                            }

                            mutation {
                                body 900
                                ears 900
                                eyebrows 900
                                eyes 900
                                head 900
                                legs 900
                                arms 900
                                mouth 900
                                tail 900
                            }

                            hide_appearance_changes 1
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            dexcheck {
                label "EVENT_GETINTHEHOLE_ANSW"
                stat dex

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 5
                            prompt "EVENT_CATSHAPEDHOLE_REW9"
                            play_animation resultConfused
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 3
                            prompt "EVENT_CATSHAPEDHOLE_REW10"
                            play_animation resultHole

                            //hide_cat true

                            leave_party_temporarily {
                                fights_skipped 1
                            }

                            mutation {
                                body 900
                                ears 900
                                eyebrows 900
                                eyes 900
                                head 900
                                legs 900
                                arms 900
                                mouth 900
                                tail 900
                            }

                            hide_appearance_changes 1
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 6
                            prompt "EVENT_CATSHAPEDHOLE_REW11"
                            gain_disorder_from_pool physical_disorders
                            play_animation resultBad
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 3
                            prompt "EVENT_CATSHAPEDHOLE_REW12"

                            play_animation resultHole
                            
                            //hide_cat 1

                            leave_party_temporarily {
                                fights_skipped 0
                                return_during boss
                                return_as enemy
                            }

                            mutation {
                                body 900
                                ears 900
                                eyebrows 900
                                eyes 900
                                head 900
                                legs 900
                                arms 900
                                mouth 900
                                tail 900
                            }

                            hide_appearance_changes 1
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

### `TallFence`
**Source:** `misc_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_TALLFENCE_NAME`: "Tall Fence"
- `EVENT_TALLFENCE_QUES`: "An imposingly tall fence blocks the way forward in front of {catname}! <br/>  <br/> What should {he} do?"
- `EVENT_CLIMB_ANSW`: "Climb"
- `EVENT_TALLFENCE_REW1`: "With a running jump, {catname} leaps up and over the fence, ambushing the occupants on the other side!"
- `EVENT_TALLFENCE_REW2`: "{catname} deftly climbs over the tall fence and looks around on the other side..."
- `EVENT_TALLFENCE_REW3`: "{catname} tries to leap over the fence, but doesn't quite make it. {He} smashes into the wooden boards and tumbles down to the ground!"
- `EVENT_TALLFENCE_REW4`: "{catname} tries to climb the fence, but one of the boards snaps halfway up and {his} leg slams through the fence and gets stuck!"
- `EVENT_BASH_ANSW`: "Bash"
- `EVENT_TALLFENCE_REW5`: "{catname} smashes a hole in the fence and leaps through, ambushing the surprised occupants on the other side!"
- `EVENT_TALLFENCE_REW6`: "{catname} pries apart the rotting wood of the fence and makes a path through!"
- `EVENT_TALLFENCE_REW7`: "{catname} tears through the wooden fence, but the old timber splinters and digs into {his} soft paws!"
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"
- `EVENT_TALLFENCE_REW8`: "{catname} ignores the fence and finds another way around."

```
TallFence {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_TALLFENCE_NAME"
        cat_choice random //choose, random, none (random and none are equivalent)
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame tallfence
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_TALLFENCE_QUES"

        options {
            climb {
                label "EVENT_CLIMB_ANSW"
                stat dex

                good {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_TALLFENCE_REW1"
                            ally_ambush_next_fights 1
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_TALLFENCE_REW2"
                            get_item_from_pool treasure_easy
                        }
                    }
                }

                bad {
                    set_frame 3

                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_TALLFENCE_REW3"
                            self_damage 5
                            spin again
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_TALLFENCE_REW4"
                            injury spd
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            bash {
                label "EVENT_BASH_ANSW"
                stat str

                good {
                    set_frame 2

                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_TALLFENCE_REW5"
                            get_item_from_pool consumables
                            ally_ambush_next_fights 1
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_TALLFENCE_REW6"
                            get_item_from_pool treasure_easy
                        }
                    }
                }

                bad {
                    set_frame 2
                    prompt "EVENT_TALLFENCE_REW7"

                    reward {
                        common {
                            get_parasite Splinters
                        }
                        rare {
                            get_parasite BadSplinters
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            ignore {
                label "EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave
                
                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_TALLFENCE_REW8"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `MouseTrap`
**Source:** `misc_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_BAITEDMOUSETRAP_NAME`: "Baited Mouse Trap"
- `EVENT_BAITEDMOUSETRAP_QUES`: "{catname} finds a mousetrap with a tasty looking fish on it. What should {he} do?"
- `EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW`: "Examine"
- `EVENT_BAITEDMOUSETRAP_REW1`: "{catname} doesn't see any way of safely getting the fish without triggering the trap and opts to leave it alone."
- `EVENT_BAITEDMOUSETRAP_REW2`: "{catname} cleverly figures out how to remove the bait without triggering the trap!"
- `EVENT_BAITEDMOUSETRAP_REW3`: "{catname} tries to quickly swipe off the bait before the trap can trigger and isn't quick enough! <br/>  <br/> {catname} howls in pain as the metal bruises {his} paw!"
- `EVENT_BAITEDMOUSETRAP_REW4`: "{catname} tries to disarm the mousetrap but accidentally trips it and the metal arm slams shut on {him}!"
- `EVENT_SNEAKBY_ANSW`: "Sneak by"
- `EVENT_BAITEDMOUSETRAP_REW5`: "{catname} decides it's best not to mess with it. It is by a trap after all!"
- `EVENT_BAITEDMOUSETRAP_REW6`: "Trying to show off, {catname} leaps over the trap! It snaps shut!"
- `EVENT_BAITEDMOUSETRAP_REW7`: "{catname} attempts to run past the trap as fast as possible, but it slams shut on {him}!"

```
MouseTrap {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_BAITEDMOUSETRAP_NAME"
        cat_choice random //choose, random, none (random and none are equivalent)
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame mousetrap
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_BAITEDMOUSETRAP_QUES"

        options {
            examine {
                label "EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW"
                stat int

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_BAITEDMOUSETRAP_REW1"
                            //nothing
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 2
                            prompt "EVENT_BAITEDMOUSETRAP_REW2"
								random_pool [
								{
									weight 10
									get_item_from_pool food
								}
								{
									weight 4
									get_item HeadCheese
								}
							]
                        }
                    }
                }

                bad {
                    set_frame 3

                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_BAITEDMOUSETRAP_REW3"
                            damage [5 10]
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_BAITEDMOUSETRAP_REW4"
                            injury random
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            sneak {
                label "EVENT_SNEAKBY_ANSW"
                stat dex

                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_BAITEDMOUSETRAP_REW5"
                    //nothing, escape
                }

                bad {
                    set_frame 3

                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_BAITEDMOUSETRAP_REW6"
                            damage [5 10]
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_BAITEDMOUSETRAP_REW7"
                            injury random
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `CatOrgy`
**Source:** `misc_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_CATSINHEAT_NAME`: "Cats in Heat"
- `EVENT_CATSINHEAT_QUES`: "{catname} stumbles upon a cat party! What should {he} do?"
- `EVENT_SNEAKBY_ANSW`: "Sneak by"
- `EVENT_CATSINHEAT_REW1`: "{catname} slowly backs away, hoping to not draw any unwanted attention!"
- `EVENT_CATSINHEAT_REW2`: "The cats notice {catname} trying to sneak away and are offended {catname} did not at least say hello! <br/>  <br/> They lash out and attack the party!"
- `EVENT_JOININ_ANSW`: "Join in"
- `EVENT_CATSINHEAT_REW3`: "The cats join in on the action. It has been a while since they have had this much fun!"
- `EVENT_CATSINHEAT_REW4`: "{catname} joins in on the fun and is welcomed into the fray! <br/>  <br/> As {catname} gets up to leave, one of the cats follows {him} out…"
- `EVENT_CATSINHEAT_REW5`: "{catname}'s primal urges overcome {his} better judgment and {he} joins in on the fun! What could go wrong?"
- `EVENT_CATSINHEAT_ALT_REW5`: "{catname} can't shake the feeling that {he} may have just kissed {his} grandparent... Gross!"
- `EVENT_CATSINHEAT_ALT_REW5_B`: "The worst possible outcome has been realized... <br/>  <br/> {catname} has just became {his} own great, great, grandparent! <br/>  <br/> {catname}'s body is ravaged with birth defects as the time paradox catches up to {him}!"
- `EVENT_FIGHT_ANSW`: "Fight"
- `EVENT_CATSINHEAT_REW6`: "{catname} strikes left and right, sending the cats scattering in every direction. Amidst the mayhem, the cats drop some of their belongings."
- `EVENT_CATSINHEAT_REW7`: "{catname} leaps into the room and viciously attacks the cats, striking them down with {his} claws in a furious rage! <br/>  <br/> When the bloodbath is over, {catname} is the only one still standing."
- `EVENT_CATSINHEAT_REW8`: "The cats seemed harmless but when {catname} randomly attacks, they turn vicious and tear {catname} to shreds!"
- `EVENT_CATSINHEAT_REW9`: "{catname} tries to take the cats by surprise but is quickly outnumbered and the cats mercilessly subdue {catname}!"
- `EVENT_CATSINHEAT_ALT_REW9`: "The party realizes in horror that {catname} has just slain {his} own grandfather! <br/>  <br/> {catname} feels {his} existence fading from reality..."

```
CatOrgy {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_CATSINHEAT_NAME"
        cat_choice random //choose, random, none (random and none are equivalent)
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame catorgy
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_CATSINHEAT_QUES"

        options {
            sneak {
                label "EVENT_SNEAKBY_ANSW"
                stat dex

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    prompt "EVENT_CATSINHEAT_REW1"
                    //nothing
                }

                bad {
                    set_frame 5
                    prompt "EVENT_CATSINHEAT_REW2"

                    reward {
                        common {
                            party_damage [3 6]
                        }
                        rare {
                            party_damage [7 12]
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            join {
                label "EVENT_JOININ_ANSW"
                stat cha

                good {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_CATSINHEAT_REW3"
                            party_heal 100%
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_CATSINHEAT_REW4"
                            gain_cat_familiar 1
                        }
                    }
                }

                bad {
                    set_frame 3

                    reward {
                        common {
                            conditional_reward {
                                requirements {
                                    is_not_chapter [jurassic iceage]
                                }
                                
                                reward {
                                    prompt "EVENT_CATSINHEAT_REW5"
                                    random_pool [
                                        {
                                            weight 10
                                            gain_disorder_from_pool diseases
                                        }
                                        {
                                            weight 1
                                            gain_disorder FelineAids
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                                else {
                                    prompt "EVENT_CATSINHEAT_ALT_REW5"
                                    gain_disorder AcidReflux
                                }
                            }   
                        }
                        rare {
                            conditional_reward {
                                requirements {
                                    is_not_chapter [jurassic iceage]
                                }
                                
                                reward {
                                    prompt "EVENT_CATSINHEAT_REW5"
                                    random_pool [
                                        {
                                            weight 10
                                            gain_disorder_from_pool diseases
                                        }
                                        {
                                            weight 1
                                            gain_disorder FelineAids
                                        }
                                    ]
                                    get_parasite_from_pool parasites 
                                }
                                else {
                                    prompt "EVENT_CATSINHEAT_ALT_REW5_B"
                                    random_mutation {
                                        count 10
                                        asymmetric true
                                        tag birth_defect
                                    }
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            fight {
                label "EVENT_FIGHT_ANSW"
                stat str

                good {
                    set_frame 4 

                    reward {
                        common {
                            conditional_reward {
                                prompt "EVENT_CATSINHEAT_REW6"
                                requirements {
                                    is_not_chapter [jurassic iceage]
                                }
                                reward {
                                    gain_coins [4 15]
                                    get_item_from_pool consumables
                                }

                                else {
                                    random_pool [
                                        {
                                            get_item Catnip
                                        }
                                        {
                                            gain_food [2 5]
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_CATSINHEAT_REW7"
                            get_item_from_pool [
                                CatHideHat
                                CatHideMask
                                CatHideArmor
                                GutsHeart
                                GutsLiver
                                GutsIntestines
                            ]
                        }
                    }
                }

                bad {

                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 5
                            
                            conditional_reward {
                                prompt "EVENT_CATSINHEAT_REW8"
                                requirements {
                                    is_not_chapter [jurassic iceage]
                                }
                                reward {
                                    injury random
                                }

                                else {
                                    damage 50%
                                    self_status_next_fight {
                                        NoHealthRegen 1
                                    }
                                }
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            conditional_reward {
                                requirements {
                                    is_not_chapter [jurassic iceage]
                                }
                                reward {
                                    prompt "EVENT_CATSINHEAT_REW9"
                                    set_frame 5
                                    injury con
                                    gain_disorder_from_pool diseases
                                }
                                else {
                                    prompt "EVENT_CATSINHEAT_ALT_REW9"
                                    set_frame 4
                                    gain_disorder Soulless
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `WatchingEyeballs`
**Source:** `misc_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_WATCHINGEYEBALLS_NAME`: "Watching Eyeballs"
- `EVENT_WATCHINGEYEBALLS_QUES`: "{catname} stumbles upon a dark hole. Numerous eyes peer out from the darkness."
- `EVENT_SNEAKBY_ANSW`: "Sneak by"
- `EVENT_WATCHINGEYEBALLS_REW1`: "{catname} carefully sneaks by the wall and nothing appears to happen."
- `EVENT_WATCHINGEYEBALLS_REW2`: "{catname} sneaks by the spooky looking crack, leading the party around and into a position to ambush!"
- `EVENT_WATCHINGEYEBALLS_REW3`: "The eyes glare directly at {catname} as {he} attempts to sneak by... <br/>  <br/> {catname} bolts into a sprint in order to get away as quickly as possible!"
- `EVENT_WATCHINGEYEBALLS_REW4`: "{catname} approaches the crack in the wall, trying to discern what creature's eyes are staring at {him}... <br/>  <br/> The unnerving gaze of the eyeballs terrifies {catname}, and the cats turn tail and run for their lives, right into an ambush!"
- `EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW`: "Examine"
- `EVENT_WATCHINGEYEBALLS_REW5`: "After closer examination, {catname} discovers it was just a trick of the light... <br/>  <br/> The eyes were coins!"
- `EVENT_WATCHINGEYEBALLS_REW6`: "{catname} discovers the scary looking eyes were just large coins, glinting in the dim light!"
- `EVENT_WATCHINGEYEBALLS_REW7`: "The cats look directly at the eyes, no one wanting to move first. Their eyes begin to water in pain as they resist the urge to blink. <br/>  <br/> No one says anything but together the cats all turn and run in terror!"
- `EVENT_WATCHINGEYEBALLS_REW8`: "{catname} moves {his} face close to the hole and peers inside... <br/>  <br/> {catname} howls in pain as something sharp from within the hole lashes out and stabs {his} eye!"
- `EVENT_BASH_ANSW`: "Bash"
- `EVENT_WATCHINGEYEBALLS_REW9`: "{catname} smashes the eyes into concave lumps of flesh!"
- `EVENT_WATCHINGEYEBALLS_REW10`: "{catname} bats at the eyes with lightning fast strikes, dispatching them with ease!"
- `EVENT_WATCHINGEYEBALLS_REW11`: "{catname} moves closely to strike the eyes, but they suddenly flash with a blinding brightness!"
- `EVENT_WATCHINGEYEBALLS_REW12`: "{catname} reaches into the dark hole with {his} arm to swat at the eyes, but {he} pokes {himself} in the face on the sharp edges of the hole instead!"

```
WatchingEyeballs {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_WATCHINGEYEBALLS_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame watchingeyeballs
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_WATCHINGEYEBALLS_QUES"

        options {
            sneak {
                label "EVENT_SNEAKBY_ANSW"
                stat dex

                good {
                    set_frame 4

                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_WATCHINGEYEBALLS_REW1"
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_WATCHINGEYEBALLS_REW2"
                            ally_ambush_next_fights 1
                        }
                    }
                }

                bad {
                    set_frame 5

                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_WATCHINGEYEBALLS_REW3"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Fear 1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_WATCHINGEYEBALLS_REW4"
                            party_status_next_fight {
                                Fear 1
                            }
                            ambush_next_basic_fights 1
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            examine {
                label "EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW"
                stat int

                good {
                    set_frame 3
                    
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_WATCHINGEYEBALLS_REW5"
                            gain_coins [5 7]
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_WATCHINGEYEBALLS_REW6"
                            get_item_from_pool Coin_items
                        }
                    }
                }

                bad {
                    set_frame 5

                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_WATCHINGEYEBALLS_REW7"
                            party_status_next_fight {
                                Fear 1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_WATCHINGEYEBALLS_REW8"
                            gain_disorder PuncturedEye
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            bash {
                label "EVENT_BASH_ANSW"
                stat str

                good {
                    set_frame 2 

                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_WATCHINGEYEBALLS_REW9" 
                            get_item_from_pool food
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_WATCHINGEYEBALLS_REW10"
                            get_item_from_pool Eye_items
                        }
                    }
                }

                bad {
                    set_frame 5

                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_WATCHINGEYEBALLS_REW11"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Blind 4
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_WATCHINGEYEBALLS_REW12"
                            gain_disorder PuncturedEye
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

### `SpiderWebs`
**Source:** `misc_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_SPIDERWEBS_NAME`: "Spider Webs"
- `EVENT_SPIDERWEBS_QUES`: "Dense cobwebs line the walls and ceiling, blocking {catname}'s way forward."
- `EVENT_SNEAKBY_ANSW`: "Sneak by"
- `EVENT_SPIDERWEBS_REW1`: "{catname} finds a small gap amidst the webs and wriggles {his} way carefully through the sticky maze!"
- `EVENT_SPIDERWEBS_REW2`: "{catname} attempts to sneak between the webs but gets tangled!"
- `EVENT_SPIDERWEBS_REW3`: "{catname} tries to push through the dense canopy but is caught up in the webs and held fast... <br/>  <br/> From within the sticky maze, {catname} sees a dark shadow moving quickly through the webs toward {him}!"
- `EVENT_ATTACK_ANSW`: "Attack"
- `EVENT_SPIDERWEBS_REW4`: "{catname} successfully claws through the cobwebs and continues onward."
- `EVENT_SPIDERWEBS_REW5`: "Dismantling the cobwebs as {he} goes, {catname} finds a flea trapped in the webs and rescues it!"
- `EVENT_SPIDERWEBS_REW6`: "{catname} and the cats try to push through, but get tangled in the cobwebs!"
- `EVENT_SPIDERWEBS_REW7`: "While biting through a particularly messy cobweb, {catname} feels a sharp bite on {his} face! <br/>  <br/> {catname} howls as {his} flesh mutates!"

```
SpiderWebs {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_SPIDERWEBS_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame spiderwebs
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_SPIDERWEBS_QUES"

        options {
            sneak {
                label "EVENT_SNEAKBY_ANSW"
                stat dex

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    prompt "EVENT_SPIDERWEBS_REW1"
                }

                bad {
                    set_frame 4

                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_SPIDERWEBS_REW2"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Webbed 1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_SPIDERWEBS_REW3"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Webbed 2
                            }
                            spawn_unit_next_fight {
                                object [SpiderCat TallSpiderCat]
                                count 1
                                spawn_side enemies
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            attack {
                label "EVENT_ATTACK_ANSW"
                stat str

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_SPIDERWEBS_REW4"
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 3
                            prompt "EVENT_SPIDERWEBS_REW5"
                            gain_immortal_familiar CharmedFleaSpecial
                        }
                    }
                }

                bad {
                    set_frame 4

                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_SPIDERWEBS_REW6"
                            party_status_next_fight {
                                Webbed 1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_SPIDERWEBS_REW7"

                            random_mutation_from_set {
                                mouth 1026
                                eyes 1029
								legs 306
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `Mirror`
**Source:** `misc_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_STRANGEMIRROR_NAME`: "Strange Mirror"
- `EVENT_STRANGEMIRROR_QUES`: "{catname} comes upon a strange mirror... <br/>  <br/> Although {he} can see {his} reflection, {catname}'s movements appear oddly delayed and distorted."
- `EVENT_INVESTIGATE_ANSW`: "Investigate"
- `EVENT_STRANGEMIRROR_REW1`: "{catname} stares at {himself} for a few moments, but it appears to just be a normal mirror."
- `EVENT_STRANGEMIRROR_REW2`: "{catname} stares into the mirror... <br/>  <br/> {He} blinks, and suddenly {catname} and {his} reflection switch places!"
- `EVENT_STRANGEMIRROR_REW3`: "The reflection in the mirror begins laughing maniacally! <br/>  <br/> {catname} turns and runs away in terror!"
- `EVENT_STRANGEMIRROR_REW4`: "The party watches in horror as {catname}'s reflection crawls out of the mirror and attacks them!"
- `EVENT_BREAK_ANSW`: "Break"
- `EVENT_STRANGEMIRROR_REW5`: "{catname} lets out a low hiss while staring at {his} reflection, then lashes out and shatters the mirror!"
- `EVENT_STRANGEMIRROR_REW6`: "{catname} shatters the fragile reflective pane...  <br/>  <br/> Something was hidden behind it!"
- `EVENT_STRANGEMIRROR_REW7`: "{catname} strikes the mirror with {his} paw, smashing it to smithereens! <br/>  <br/> {catname} suddenly remembers something scary that an old cat back home told {him} about breaking mirrors..."
- `EVENT_STRANGEMIRROR_REW8`: "{catname} smashes the mirror to pieces. <br/>  <br/> Suddenly, a dark foreboding settles on {catname}..."
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"
- `EVENT_STRANGEMIRROR_REW9`: "Creepy! {catname} is spooked by the mirror and runs off."

```
Mirror {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_STRANGEMIRROR_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame mirror
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_STRANGEMIRROR_QUES"

        options {
            investigate {
                label "EVENT_INVESTIGATE_ANSW"
                stat int

                good {
                    
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_STRANGEMIRROR_REW1"
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_STRANGEMIRROR_REW2"
                            set_frame 2

                            mutation {
                                eyes 442
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }

                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_STRANGEMIRROR_REW3"
                            set_frame 4
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Fear 1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_STRANGEMIRROR_REW4"
                            set_frame 2

                            spawn_reflection_next_fight {
                                mutation {
                                    eyes 442
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            attack {
                label "EVENT_BREAK_ANSW"
                stat str

                good {
                    set_frame 3
                    
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_STRANGEMIRROR_REW5"
							random_pool [
								{
									weight 10
									get_item_from_pool [GlassShard, BagOfGlass]
								}
								{
									weight 3
									get_item BrokenWindow
								}
							]
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_STRANGEMIRROR_REW6"
                            get_item_from_pool chapter_rare
                        }
                    }
                }

                bad {
                    set_frame 5

                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_STRANGEMIRROR_REW7"
                            permanent_stats {
                                lck -2
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_STRANGEMIRROR_REW8"

                            next_event_from_set {
                                event Tragedy
                                count 3
                                same_cat true
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            ignore {
                label "EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave
                
                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_STRANGEMIRROR_REW9"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `LockedDoor`
**Source:** `misc_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_LOCKEDDOOR_NAME`: "Locked Door"
- `EVENT_LOCKEDDOOR_QUES`: "A door bars the way forward. It looks like it could be locked. What should {catname} do?"
- `EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW`: "Examine"
- `EVENT_LOCKEDDOOR_REW1`: "After fiddling with the handle, {catname} finds a way to open the door! <br/>  <br/> It leads to a small shop!"
- `EVENT_LOCKEDDOOR_PROMPT1`: "Shop"
- `EVENT_LOCKEDDOOR_REW2`: "{catname} discovers the door is actually unlocked... <br/>  <br/> Beyond the doorway is a large shop full of shiny objects!"
- `EVENT_LOCKEDDOOR_PROMPT2`: "Rare shop!"
- `EVENT_LOCKEDDOOR_REW3`: "{catname} tries to pry the door open, but it slams shut on {his} head!"
- `EVENT_LOCKEDDOOR_REW4`: "The door creaks open, but when {catname} approaches the threshold it slams shut, crushing {him}!"
- `EVENT_BASH_ANSW`: "Bash"
- `EVENT_LOCKEDDOOR_REW5`: "{catname} proudly smashes down the door! <br/>  <br/> A startled shopkeeper within the room beyond yells out, [i]Why can't you just use the handle like a normal cat?![/i] <br/>  <br/> Oops!"
- `EVENT_LOCKEDDOOR_REW6`: "A voice calls out from beyond the destroyed entrance... <br/>  <br/> [i]Why did I even bother installing a door?[/i] <br/>  <br/> The shopkeeper inside begrudgingly pulls out their best wares, hoping to make back enough coins to buy a new door."
- `EVENT_LOCKEDDOOR_REW7`: "{catname} winds up and slams {his} arm as hard as {he} can into the tough wooden door..."
- `EVENT_LOCKEDDOOR_REW8`: "The door cracks and splinters when {catname} hits it! <br/>  <br/> The wooden shards slide deep into {catname}'s skin..."
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"
- `EVENT_LOCKEDDOOR_REW9`: "{catname} ignores the door and continues on."

```
LockedDoor {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_LOCKEDDOOR_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame lockeddoor
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_LOCKEDDOOR_QUES"

        options {
            examine {
                label "EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW"
                stat int

                good {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_LOCKEDDOOR_REW1"
                            override_end_option_prompt "EVENT_LOCKEDDOOR_PROMPT1"
                            shop_now Event_SmallShop
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_LOCKEDDOOR_REW2"
                            override_end_option_prompt "EVENT_LOCKEDDOOR_PROMPT2"
                            shop_now Event_RareShop
                        }
                    }
                }

                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_LOCKEDDOOR_REW3"
                            injury int
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_LOCKEDDOOR_REW4"
                            gain_disorder_from_pool physical_disorders
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            attack {
                label "EVENT_BASH_ANSW"
                stat str

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_LOCKEDDOOR_REW5"
                            override_end_option_prompt "EVENT_LOCKEDDOOR_PROMPT1"
                            shop_now Event_SmallShop
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_LOCKEDDOOR_REW6"
                            override_end_option_prompt "EVENT_LOCKEDDOOR_PROMPT2"
                            shop_now Event_RareShop
                        }
                    }
                }

                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_LOCKEDDOOR_REW7"
                            injury str
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_LOCKEDDOOR_REW8"
                            get_parasite BadSplinters
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            ignore {
                label "EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave
                
                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_LOCKEDDOOR_REW9"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

### `SmallBird`
**Source:** `misc_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_SMALLBIRD_NAME`: "Small Bird"
- `EVENT_SMALLBIRD_QUES`: "{catname} spies a cute little bird. <br/>  <br/> It looks very soft... And also very tasty!"
- `EVENT_CATCH_ANSW`: "Catch"
- `EVENT_SMALLBIRD_REW1`: "{catname} pounces on the bird, and catches it in {his} teeth! <br/>  <br/> This will make a fine treat!"
- `EVENT_SMALLBIRD_REW2`: "{catname} stalks the small bird, {his} tail low to the ground and {his} ears quivering. <br/>  <br/> The bird hops around, and {catname} follows it into the next room..."
- `EVENT_SMALLBIRD_REW3`: "{catname} leaps after the bird, but it evades {him}! <br/>  <br/> Feathers fly as the bird swoops at {catname}, stealing some of {his} coins!"
- `EVENT_SMALLBIRD_REW4`: "{catname} attempts to sneak up on the bird, but at the last minute it takes off! <br/>  <br/> It circles back around and plants a massive spray of white excrement all over {catname}'s head!"
- `EVENT_CHARM_ANSW`: "Charm"
- `EVENT_SMALLBIRD_REW5`: "{catname} saunters up to the small bird and offers it a seed. <br/>  <br/> The bird happily hops over, eager for snack. Little does it know but IT will be the snack today!"
- `EVENT_SMALLBIRD_REW6`: "{catname} makes some chirping sounds deep in {his} throat, and the bird flies over and lands on {his} head! <br/>  <br/> The other cats are very impressed with {catname}'s new skill."
- `EVENT_SMALLBIRD_REW7`: "Attempting to charm the little bird, {catname} holds out a few coins in his paw. <br/>  <br/> The bird snatches them away before {he} can react!"
- `EVENT_SMALLBIRD_REW8`: "{catname} places some seeds on {his} head, hoping that the bird will come land on it. <br/>  <br/> Instead, it swoops down and sprays white excrement in {his} face!"
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"
- `EVENT_SMALLBIRD_REW9`: "It may look cute and fluffy but {catname} knows birds can be a pain so {he} leaves it alone."

```
SmallBird {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_SMALLBIRD_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame small_bird
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_SMALLBIRD_QUES"

        options {
            catch {
                label "EVENT_CATCH_ANSW"
                stat spd

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 2
                            prompt "EVENT_SMALLBIRD_REW1"
                            get_item_from_pool Bird_items
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 1
                            prompt "EVENT_SMALLBIRD_REW2"
                            permanent_stats {
                                lck 1
                            }
                            spawn_unit_next_fight {
                                object BirdSmall
                                spawn_side anywhere
                            }                            
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_SMALLBIRD_REW3"
                            gain_coins [-10 -5]
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_SMALLBIRD_REW4" 
                            get_parasite BirdPoopHat
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            charm {
                label "EVENT_CHARM_ANSW"
                stat cha

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 2
                            prompt "EVENT_SMALLBIRD_REW5"
                            get_item_from_pool Bird_items                          
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 1
                            prompt "EVENT_SMALLBIRD_REW6"
                            permanent_stats {
                                lck 1
                            }
                            spawn_unit_next_fight {
                                object BirdSmall
                                spawn_side anywhere
                            }    
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_SMALLBIRD_REW7"
                            gain_coins [-10 -5]
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_SMALLBIRD_REW8" 
                            get_parasite BirdPoopHat
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            ignore {
                label "EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave
                
                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_SMALLBIRD_REW9"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

### `StrongCurrent`
**Source:** `misc_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_STRONGCURRENT_NAME`: "Strong Current"
- `EVENT_STRONGCURRENT_QUES`: "A strong current of water impedes {catname}'s way forward."
- `EVENT_SWIM_ANSW`: "Swim across"
- `EVENT_STRONGCURRENT_REW1`: "{catname} wades through the water and reaches the other side feeling invigorated from the cold water."
- `EVENT_STRONGCURRENT_REW2`: "{catname} swims through the torrent of water. {He} feels strengthened from the workout!"
- `EVENT_STRONGCURRENT_REW3`: "{catname} struggles to push through the fast flowing water, but eventually reaches the other side, sopping wet."
- `EVENT_STRONGCURRENT_REW4`: "{catname} tries to paddles {his} way across but struggles against the strong current. {catname} barely reaches the other side, exhausted and shivering, only to discover it was a trap!"
- `EVENT_JUMPOVER_ANSW`: "Jump over"
- `EVENT_STRONGCURRENT_REW5`: "{catname} leaps across the torrent of water, landing on the other side. {He} flexes {his} arms in pride at {his} accomplishment."
- `EVENT_STRONGCURRENT_REW6`: "With careful precision, {catname} jumps across the stream of water!"
- `EVENT_STRONGCURRENT_REW7`: "{catname} goes to jump across but {his} leg slips on the wet rocks and {he} tumbles into the torrent!"
- `EVENT_STRONGCURRENT_REW8`: "{catname} doesn't jump far enough and nearly drowns in the deep current!"
- `EVENT_GOAROUND_ANSW`: "Go around"
- `EVENT_STRONGCURRENT_REW9`: "It is probably for the best that {catname} goes around. {He} wouldn't want to get {his} feet wet."
- `EVENT_STRONGCURRENT_REW10`: "{catname} follows the stream away from the main path, leading into a darker region..."

```
StrongCurrent {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_STRONGCURRENT_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame strong_current
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_STRONGCURRENT_QUES"

        options {
            swim {
                label "EVENT_SWIM_ANSW"
                stat str

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_STRONGCURRENT_REW1"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                StrengthUp 2
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_STRONGCURRENT_REW2"
                            permanent_stats {
                                str 1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_STRONGCURRENT_REW3"
                            event_now random
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_STRONGCURRENT_REW4"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                StrengthUp -2
                            }
                            ambush_next_basic_fights 1
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            jump {
                label "EVENT_JUMPOVER_ANSW"
                stat spd

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_STRONGCURRENT_REW5"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                SpeedUp 2
                            }                            
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_STRONGCURRENT_REW6"
                            permanent_stats {
                                spd 1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_STRONGCURRENT_REW7"
                            injury spd
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_STRONGCURRENT_REW8" 
                            gain_disorder_from_pool physical_disorders
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            go_around {
                label "EVENT_GOAROUND_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave
                
                good {
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                    prompt "EVENT_STRONGCURRENT_REW9"
                    event_now_same_cat random
                }
                bad {
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                    prompt "EVENT_STRONGCURRENT_REW10"
                    next_event_bonus -1               
                    event_now_same_cat random
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```
