### `BearTrap`
**Source:** `misc_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_BEARTRAP_NAME`: "Bear Trap"
- `EVENT_BEARTRAP_QUES`: "A large bear trap blocks {catname}'s way forward..."
- `EVENT_DISARM_ANSW`: "Disarm"
- `EVENT_BEARTRAP_REW1`: "{catname} uses a stick to safely disarm the trap."
- `EVENT_BEARTRAP_REW2`: "With lightning fast reflexes, {catname} triggers the trap and jumps back as it snaps shut right in {his} face!"
- `EVENT_BEARTRAP_REW3`: "{catname} bats at the trap with {his} paw trying to trigger it safely. Looks like it requires more weight. {He} pushes down on the trap..."
- `EVENT_BEARTRAP_REW4`: "{catname} tries to show off, taking a running jump at the trap to trigger it quickly as {he} flies by! <br/>  <br/> It slams shut on {catname}'s leg!"
- `EVENT_GOAROUND_ANSW`: "Go around"
- `EVENT_BEARTRAP_REW5`: "{catname} carefully moves around the trap. {He} discovers a chain tied to the other side and pulls on it!"
- `EVENT_BEARTRAP_REW6`: "{catname} skirts around the trap, and finds a release button on the other side!"
- `EVENT_BEARTRAP_REW7`: "{catname} tries to walk around the trap, but stumbles in the narrow space and gets caught!"
- `EVENT_BEARTRAP_REW8`: "{catname} leaps over the large trap, but it snaps at {him} mercilessly as {he} passes over it!"

```
BearTrap {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_BEARTRAP_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame bear_trap
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_BEARTRAP_QUES"

        options {
            disarm {
                label "EVENT_DISARM_ANSW"
                stat dex

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_BEARTRAP_REW1"
                            get_item BearTraps
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_BEARTRAP_REW2"
                            get_item BearTrapMask
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_BEARTRAP_REW3"
                            damage 7
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_BEARTRAP_REW4" 
                            damage 7
                            random_pool [
                                {
                                    injury dex
                                }
                                {
                                    injury spd
                                }
                                {
                                    injury str
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            take {
                label "EVENT_GOAROUND_ANSW"
                stat spd
                
                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_BEARTRAP_REW5"
                            get_item BearTraps
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_BEARTRAP_REW6"
                            get_item BearTrapMask
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_BEARTRAP_REW7"
                            damage 7
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_BEARTRAP_REW8" 
                            damage 7
                            random_pool [
                                {
                                    injury dex
                                }
                                {
                                    injury spd
                                }
                                {
                                    injury str
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `Baphomet`
**Source:** `misc_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_BAPHOMET_NAME`: "Baphomet"
- `EVENT_BAPHOMET_QUES`: "[i]Come closer, small feline... <br/>  <br/> Would you like to make a [a:shake]deal?![/a][/i]"
- `EVENT_BAHPHOMET_HEALTH_ANSW`: "All cats lose 10hp"
- `EVENT_BAPHOMET_REW1`: "[i]"Well done. Have this small trinket..."[/i] <br/>  <br/> The strange beast looks down at {catname} and laughs."
- `EVENT_BAPHOMET_REW2`: "[i]"Most impressive... <br/> You have my... blessing!"[/i] <br/> {catname} does not feel very blessed."
- `EVENT_BAHPHOMET_SACRIFICE_ANSW`: "Sacrifice yourself"
- `EVENT_BAPHOMET_REW4`: "[i]"Yes... well done!"[/i] <br/> {catname}'s eyes roll back in {his} head and is no more. <br/> [i]"You will be reborn in a new form..."[/i]"
- `EVENT_BAPHOMET_REW5`: "[i]"Yes... wait, why are you still alive?"[/i]"
- `EVENT_BAHPHOMET_LEAVE_ANSW`: "Leave"
- `EVENT_BAPHOMET_REW7`: "{catname} turns away from the strange creature and leaves... probably for the best!"
- `EVENT_BAPHOMET_REW8`: "[i]"How dare you turn your back on me! <br/> You will [b]regret[/b] this!"[/i]"
- `EVENT_BAPHOMET_REW9`: "[i]"It would have been better if you had made a deal! <br/> Now you will be plagued with tragedy!"[/i] <br/>  <br/> A shudder goes down {catname}'s spine as {he} slinks away."

```
Baphomet {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_BAPHOMET_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame baphomet
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_BAPHOMET_QUES"

        options {
            damage {
                label "EVENT_BAHPHOMET_HEALTH_ANSW"

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_BAPHOMET_REW1"
                            party_damage 10
                            get_item_from_pool {
                                pool chapter_rare
                                restrict trinket
                            }
                            
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_BAPHOMET_REW2"
                            party_damage 10
                            get_parasite MarkOfTheBeast
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            sacrifice {
                label "EVENT_BAHPHOMET_SACRIFICE_ANSW"

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_BAPHOMET_REW4"
                            kill cat
                            play_animation resultHole
                            party_heal 100%
                            party_permanent_stats_exclude_self {
                                str 1
                                dex 1
                                con 1
                                int 1
                                spd 1
                                cha 1
                                lck 1
                            }
                            gain_familiar CharmedHyde
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_BAPHOMET_REW5"
                            party_heal 100%
                            party_permanent_stats_exclude_self {
                                str 1
                                dex 1
                                con 1
                                int 1
                                spd 1
                                cha 1
                                lck 1
                            }
                            damage 99%
                            gain_disorder Charred
                            //cat is spared but charred at 1hp
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            leave {
                label "EVENT_BAHPHOMET_LEAVE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave
                
                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_BAPHOMET_REW7"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
                bad {
                    play_animation resultVeryBad
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_BAPHOMET_REW8"
                            next_event_from_set {
                                event Tragedy
                                count 1
                                same_cat true
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_BAPHOMET_REW9"
                            next_event_from_set {
                                event Tragedy
                                count 4
                                same_cat true
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `ABeggar`
**Source:** `misc_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_ABEGGAR_NAME`: "A Beggar"
- `EVENT_ABEGGAR_QUES`: "A beggar with sad eyes holds up a small cardboard sign to {catname}. <br/>  <br/> [i]"Could you spare a few pennies please?"[/i]"
- `EVENT_BEGGAR_5_ANSW`: "Donate"
- `EVENT_ABEGGAR_REW1`: "The beggar accepts {catname}'s donation and pulls out something small and hands it to {him} in thanks."
- `EVENT_ABEGGAR_REW2`: "It's your lucky day! The beggar gives {catname} a present in return!"
- `EVENT_BEGGAR_NOTENOUGHMONEY`: "{catname} reaches into {his} pocket to hand over the money, and realizes {he} does not have enough!  <br/>  <br/> The beggar scowls at you for getting their hopes up."
- `EVENT_LEAVE_ANSW`: "Leave"
- `EVENT_ABEGGAR_LEAVE`: "As {catname} walks away the beggar looks on, forlorn..."

```
ABeggar {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_ABEGGAR_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame a_beggar
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_ABEGGAR_QUES"

        options {
            5coins {
                label "EVENT_BEGGAR_5_ANSW"
                stat coins
                animation_fail choice_no_coins
                animation choice_coins_one
                stat_min 5
                stat_max 5

                good {
                    random_pool [
                        {
                            weight 95
                            prompt "EVENT_ABEGGAR_REW1"
                            set_frame 3
                            random_pool [
                                {
                                    get_item_from_pool {
                                        pool chapter_common
                                    }
                                }
                                {
                                    get_item_from_pool {
                                        pool chapter_common
                                        restrict consumables
                                    }
                                }
                                {
                                    get_item_from_pool {
                                        pool chapter_common
                                        restrict trinket
                                    }
                                }

                            ]
                        }
                        {
                            weight 5
                            prompt "EVENT_ABEGGAR_REW2"
                            set_frame 2
                            get_item_from_pool chapter_rare
                        }
                    ]
                }

                bad {
                    prompt "EVENT_BEGGAR_NOTENOUGHMONEY"
                }
            }
            
            10coins {
                label "EVENT_BEGGAR_5_ANSW"
                stat coins
                animation_fail choice_no_coins
                animation choice_coins_ten
                stat_min 10
                stat_max 10

                good {
                    random_pool [
                        {
                            weight 90
                            prompt "EVENT_ABEGGAR_REW1"
                            set_frame 3
                            random_pool [
                                {
                                    get_item_from_pool {
                                        pool chapter_common
                                    }
                                }
                                {
                                    get_item_from_pool {
                                        pool chapter_common
                                        restrict consumables
                                    }
                                }
                                {
                                    get_item_from_pool {
                                        pool chapter_common
                                        restrict trinket
                                    }
                                }

                            ]
                        }
                        {
                            weight 10
                            prompt "EVENT_ABEGGAR_REW2"
                            set_frame 2
                            get_item_from_pool chapter_rare
                        }
                    ]
                }

                bad {
                    prompt "EVENT_BEGGAR_NOTENOUGHMONEY"
                }
            }

            15coins {
                label "EVENT_BEGGAR_5_ANSW"
                stat coins
                animation_fail choice_no_coins
                animation choice_coins_twentyfive
                stat_min 15
                stat_max 15

                good {
                    random_pool [
                        {
                            weight 85
                            prompt "EVENT_ABEGGAR_REW1"
                            set_frame 3
                            random_pool [
                                {
                                    get_item_from_pool {
                                        pool chapter_common
                                    }
                                }
                                {
                                    get_item_from_pool {
                                        pool chapter_common
                                        restrict consumables
                                    }
                                }
                                {
                                    get_item_from_pool {
                                        pool chapter_common
                                        restrict trinket
                                    }
                                }

                            ]
                        }
                        {
                            weight 15
                            prompt "EVENT_ABEGGAR_REW2"
                            set_frame 2
                            get_item_from_pool chapter_rare
                        }
                    ]
                }

                bad {
                    prompt "EVENT_BEGGAR_NOTENOUGHMONEY"
                }
            }

            leave {
                label "EVENT_LEAVE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave
                
                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_ABEGGAR_LEAVE"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `CatBed`
**Source:** `misc_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_CATBED_NAME`: "Cat Bed"
- `EVENT_CATBED_QUES`: "{catname} finds a lush cat bed. Its plush fabric looks like the perfect place to snuggle up for a long nap..."
- `EVENT_REST_ANSW`: "Rest"
- `EVENT_CATBED_REW1`: "{catname} falls fast asleep and dreams about being back home where it is safe and warm."
- `EVENT_CATBED_REW2`: "The luxurious curves of the bed embrace {catname} like a soft hug. <br/>  <br/> When {he} wakes, {catname} feels rejuvenated and ready for anything!"
- `EVENT_CATBED_REW3`: "{catname} tries to rest, but quickly discovers the bed is infested with bed bugs!"
- `EVENT_CATBED_REW4`: "{catname} should have known better. Nothing is soft here... <br/>  <br/> Fleas and maggots crawl all over {catname}, biting {him}!"
- `EVENT_LEAVE_ANSW`: "Leave"
- `EVENT_CATBED_REW5`: "{catname} doubts it would be safe to sleep here. It's not a good time to get complacent."

```
CatBed {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_CATBED_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame cat_bed
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_CATBED_QUES"

        options {
            rest {
                label "EVENT_REST_ANSW"
                stat lck

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 4
                            prompt "EVENT_CATBED_REW1"
                            full_heal 1
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                AllStatsUp 1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 5
                            prompt "EVENT_CATBED_REW2"
                            full_heal 1
                            permanent_stats {
                                str 1
                                dex 1
                                con 1
                                int 1
                                spd 1
                                cha 1
                                lck 1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 2
                            prompt "EVENT_CATBED_REW3"
                            damage 2
                            spawn_unit_next_fight {
                                object Flea
                                count 2
                                spawn_side cats
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 3
                            prompt "EVENT_CATBED_REW4" 
                            gain_disorder Infestation
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            leave {
                label "EVENT_LEAVE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave
                
                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_CATBED_REW5"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `TapeRecorder`
**Source:** `misc_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_TAPERECORDER_NAME`: "Tape Recorder"
- `EVENT_TAPERECORDER_QUES`: "{catname} finds a tape recorder, its tape reels whirring quietly."
- `EVENT_LISTEN_ANSW`: "Listen"
- `EVENT_TAPERECORDER_REW1`: "Rewinding the tape, {catname} listens to the whole message contained on it. <br/>  <br/> {He} meditates on the strange words of the recording, learning new techniques!"
- `EVENT_TAPERECORDER_REW2`: "As the tape reels spin, a contraption at the back of the recorder flips open and a large item tumbles out!"
- `EVENT_TAPERECORDER_REW3`: "The tape recorder spins and a strange howling emits from the speakers... <br/>  <br/> {catname} begins to hear strange sounds from beneath the ground around {him}..."
- `EVENT_TAPERECORDER_REW4`: "The tape recorder emits a terrifying howling sound! <br/>  <br/> {catname}'s hair stands up on end. Something truly horrifying is happening and it is too late to stop!"
- `EVENT_BASH_ANSW`: "Bash"
- `EVENT_TAPERECORDER_REW5`: "{catname} hits the recorder with {his} paws, banging on the various buttons. <br/>  <br/> With a click, the tape reel pops off and the recorder goes silent. Crisis averted!"
- `EVENT_TAPERECORDER_REW6`: "{catname} leaps onto the recorder, tearing out the tape and shredding it into useless plastic! <br/>  <br/> The tape recorder has been [b]permanently[/b] destroyed."
- `EVENT_TAPERECORDER_REW7`: "The tape recorder spins and a strange howling emits from the speakers... <br/>  <br/> {catname} begins to hear strange sounds from beneath the ground around {him}..."
- `EVENT_TAPERECORDER_REW8`: "The tape recorder emits a terrifying howling sound! <br/>  <br/> {catname}'s hair stands up on end. Something truly horrifying is happening and it is too late to stop!"
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"
- `EVENT_TAPERECORDER_REW9`: "{catname} ignores the recorder."

```
TapeRecorder {
    requirements {
        not_has_token WorldEventLegacyToken_TapeRecorderDestroyed
    }

    intro {
        title "EVENT_TAPERECORDER_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame tape_recorder
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_TAPERECORDER_QUES"

        options {
            listen {
                label "EVENT_LISTEN_ANSW"
                stat int

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 2
                            prompt "EVENT_TAPERECORDER_REW1"
                            permanent_stats {
                                dex 1
                                str 1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 3
                            prompt "EVENT_TAPERECORDER_REW2"
                            get_item Chainsaw
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 6
                            prompt "EVENT_TAPERECORDER_REW3"
                            add_weather RestlessDead
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 7
                            prompt "EVENT_TAPERECORDER_REW4" 
                            add_weather RestlessDead
                            add_weather HauntedNight
                            party_status_next_fight {
                                Fear 1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            bash {
                label "EVENT_BASH_ANSW"
                stat str

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 4
                            prompt "EVENT_TAPERECORDER_REW5"
                            //nothing happens, which is good
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 5
                            prompt "EVENT_TAPERECORDER_REW6"
                            //event is permanently removed from pool
                            set_legacy_token WorldEventLegacyToken_TapeRecorderDestroyed
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 6
                            prompt "EVENT_TAPERECORDER_REW7"
                            add_weather RestlessDead
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Fear 1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 7
                            prompt "EVENT_TAPERECORDER_REW8" 
                            add_weather RestlessDead
                            add_weather HauntedNight
                            party_status_next_fight {
                                Fear 1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            ignore {
                label "EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave
                
                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_TAPERECORDER_REW9"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `HoleInTheEarth`
**Source:** `misc_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_HOLEINTHEEARTH_NAME`: "Hole in the earth"
- `EVENT_HOLEINTHEEARTH_QUES`: "A deep hole in the Earth lies before {catname}. Orange red light dances up from something burning deep below..."
- `EVENT_HOLEINTHEEARTH_ENTER_ANSW`: "Enter the hole"
- `EVENT_HOLEINTHEEARTH_REW1`: "{catname} carefully crawls down the hole... <br/>  <br/> {He} emerges several minutes later with a glowing item clutched in {his} paw!"
- `EVENT_HOLEINTHEEARTH_REW2`: "{catname} descends into the hole... <br/>  <br/> A hideous laugh breaks the nervous silence and moments later {catname} emerges with a devilish smirk on {his} face!"
- `EVENT_HOLEINTHEEARTH_REW3`: "{catname} leaps into the hole... <br/>  <br/> The smell of burning hair envelops the party as {catname} reemerges!"
- `EVENT_HOLEINTHEEARTH_REW4`: "{catname} tries to carefully lower {himself} into the hole but tumbles in, head first! <br/>  <br/> {catname} cries out in pain as {he} struggles to escape from the burning flames below!"
- `EVENT_HOLEINTHEEARTH_THROW_ANSW`: "Throw in a random item"
- `EVENT_HOLEINTHEEARTH_REW5`: "{catname} tosses something from {his} backpack into the hole..."
- `EVENT_HOLEINTHEEARTH_REW6`: "{catname} offers up a sacrificial item to the hole... <br/>  <br/> From the depths of hell below a powerful item is returned!"
- `EVENT_HOLEINTHEEARTH_REW7`: "{catname} tosses an item into the hole. {He} hears a faint hissing sound as it burns up deep below."
- `EVENT_HOLEINTHEEARTH_REW8`: "{catname} pulls an item from {his} bag to toss in the hole but knocks off an equipped item too, and they both tumble down into the chasm!"
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"
- `EVENT_HOLEINTHEEARTH_REW9`: "{catname} does peek into the ominous looking hole, but opts to walk carefully around it instead."

```
HoleInTheEarth {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_HOLEINTHEEARTH_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame hole_in_the_earth
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_HOLEINTHEEARTH_QUES"

        options {
            enter {
                label "EVENT_HOLEINTHEEARTH_ENTER_ANSW"
                stat lck

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 5
                            prompt "EVENT_HOLEINTHEEARTH_REW1"
                            get_item_from_pool [Ember, MatchStick, BurningCoal, FireFlower]
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 6
                            prompt "EVENT_HOLEINTHEEARTH_REW2"
                            mutation {
                                eyes 301
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 7
                            prompt "EVENT_HOLEINTHEEARTH_REW3"
                            injury burned
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 8
                            prompt "EVENT_HOLEINTHEEARTH_REW4" 
                            injury burned
                            gain_disorder Charred
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            throw {
                label "EVENT_HOLEINTHEEARTH_THROW_ANSW"
                stat lck

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 2
                            prompt "EVENT_HOLEINTHEEARTH_REW5"
                            lose_item inventory
                            get_item_from_pool {
                                pool chapter_common
                                restrict [weapon armor]
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 3
                            prompt "EVENT_HOLEINTHEEARTH_REW6"
                            lose_item inventory
                            get_item_from_pool demon_themed_items
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 4
                            prompt "EVENT_HOLEINTHEEARTH_REW7"
                            lose_item inventory
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 4
                            prompt "EVENT_HOLEINTHEEARTH_REW8" 
                            lose_item inventory
                            lose_item equipped
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            ignore {
                label "EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave
                
                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_HOLEINTHEEARTH_REW9"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `WrithingPileOfMaggots`
**Source:** `misc_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_WRITHINGPILEOFMAGGOTS_NAME`: "Writhing pile of maggots"
- `EVENT_WRITHINGPILEOFMAGGOTS_QUES`: "A large writhing pile of maggots blocks the way forward! <br/>  <br/> What should {catname} do?"
- `EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW`: "Examine"
- `EVENT_WRITHINGPILEOFMAGGOTS_REW1`: "{catname} sees something useful poking out from beneath the maggot swarm and pulls it out..."
- `EVENT_WRITHINGPILEOFMAGGOTS_REW2`: "Carefully digging into the writhing heap, {catname} pulls something out!"
- `EVENT_WRITHINGPILEOFMAGGOTS_REW3`: "The maggots in the pile leap forward and bite the cats!"
- `EVENT_WRITHINGPILEOFMAGGOTS_REW4`: "{catname} gets too close and one of the worms burrows into {him}!"
- `EVENT_BASH_ANSW`: "Bash"
- `EVENT_WRITHINGPILEOFMAGGOTS_REW5`: "{catname} smashes a bunch of the small maggots, but nothing seems to happen."
- `EVENT_WRITHINGPILEOFMAGGOTS_REW6`: "{catname} strikes at the maggots, scaring them aside to reveal what they were hiding beneath!"
- `EVENT_KISS_ANSW`: "Kiss"
- `EVENT_WRITHINGPILEOFMAGGOTS_REW7`: "{catname} leans in and gives the cute little maggots a kiss... <br/>  <br/> A few of them become {his} friends!"
- `EVENT_WRITHINGPILEOFMAGGOTS_REW8`: "{catname} licks the cute little maggots and they follow {him} to {his} next adventure, hoping for more affection!"

```
WrithingPileOfMaggots {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_WRITHINGPILEOFMAGGOTS_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame writhing_pile_of_maggots
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_WRITHINGPILEOFMAGGOTS_QUES"

        options {
            examine {
                label "EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW"
                stat int

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_WRITHINGPILEOFMAGGOTS_REW1"
                            get_item_from_pool consumables
                            get_item_from_pool consumables
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_WRITHINGPILEOFMAGGOTS_REW2"
                            get_item_from_pool grub_armor
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_WRITHINGPILEOFMAGGOTS_REW3"
                            party_damage [3 6]
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_WRITHINGPILEOFMAGGOTS_REW4" 
                            get_parasite_from_pool [Tapeworm, Pinworm, Ringworm, Heartworm, EyeWorm, Parousworm, Hookworm, Roundworm]
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            bash {
                label "EVENT_BASH_ANSW"
                stat str

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_WRITHINGPILEOFMAGGOTS_REW5"
                            //nothing happens
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_WRITHINGPILEOFMAGGOTS_REW6"
                            get_item_from_pool grub_armor
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_WRITHINGPILEOFMAGGOTS_REW3"
                            party_damage [3 6]
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_WRITHINGPILEOFMAGGOTS_REW4" 
                            get_parasite_from_pool [Tapeworm, Pinworm, Ringworm, Heartworm, EyeWorm, Parousworm, Hookworm, Roundworm]
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            kiss {
                label "EVENT_KISS_ANSW"
                stat cha

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_WRITHINGPILEOFMAGGOTS_REW7"
                            gain_familiar CharmedMaggot
                            gain_familiar CharmedMaggot
							gain_familiar CharmedMaggot
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_WRITHINGPILEOFMAGGOTS_REW8"
                            gain_familiar CharmedMaggot
                            gain_familiar CharmedMaggot
                            gain_familiar CharmedMaggot
                            gain_familiar CharmedMaggot
                            gain_familiar CharmedMaggot
							gain_familiar CharmedMaggot
                            gain_familiar CharmedMaggot
                            gain_familiar CharmedMaggot
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_WRITHINGPILEOFMAGGOTS_REW3"
                            party_damage [3 6]
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_WRITHINGPILEOFMAGGOTS_REW4" 
                            get_parasite_from_pool [Tapeworm, Pinworm, Ringworm, Heartworm, EyeWorm, Parousworm, Hookworm, Roundworm]
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```
