### `DustStorm`
**Source:** `misc_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_DUSTSTORM_NAME`: "Dust Storm"
- `EVENT_DUSTSTORM_QUES`: "A dust storm ahead is blowing debris and sand everywhere. <br/>  <br/> Inside the dust storm {catname} sees the silhouette of a figure..."
- `EVENT_TALKTO_ANSW`: "Talk to"
- `EVENT_DUSTSTORM_REW1`: "{catname} calls out to the figure inside the storm. <br/>  <br/> It smiles, then turns and leaves."
- `EVENT_DUSTSTORM_REW2`: "The figure steps forward with a wide grin on its face... <br/>  <br/> The dust devil joins the party!"
- `EVENT_DUSTSTORM_REW3`: "{catname} cries out to the figure in the storm, but {his} voice is lost in the torrent of wind. <br/>  <br/> The sand storm grows until it envelops the whole area!"
- `EVENT_DUSTSTORM_REW4`: "The figure inside the storm approaches and attacks!"
- `EVENT_RUN_ANSW`: "Run!"
- `EVENT_DUSTSTORM_REW5`: "{catname} escapes the cyclone of wind and dust!"
- `EVENT_DUSTSTORM_REW6`: "Sand stings {catname}'s face as the wind gusts in a fervor around {him}. <br/>  <br/> {catname} runs like the wind and escapes!"
- `EVENT_DUSTSTORM_REW7`: "{catname} tries to flee but the sand storm engulfs the area in never ending torrents of wind!"
- `EVENT_DUSTSTORM_REW8`: "{catname} turns to run but it is too late... <br/>  <br/> The figure inside the storm leaps forward and attacks!"

```
DustStorm {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_DUSTSTORM_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame dust_storm
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_DUSTSTORM_QUES"

        options {
            talk_to {
                label "EVENT_TALKTO_ANSW"
                stat cha

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 3
                            prompt "EVENT_DUSTSTORM_REW1"
                            //nothing
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 5
                            prompt "EVENT_DUSTSTORM_REW2"
                            gain_familiar CharmedDustDevil
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 6
                            prompt "EVENT_DUSTSTORM_REW3"
                            add_weather Sandstorm
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 4
                            prompt "EVENT_DUSTSTORM_REW4" 
                            battle "desert/boss/dustdevil/DustDevil.lvl"
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            run {
                label "EVENT_RUN_ANSW"
                stat spd

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 2
                            prompt "EVENT_DUSTSTORM_REW5"
                            //nothing
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 2
                            prompt "EVENT_DUSTSTORM_REW6"
                            permanent_stats {
                                spd 1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 6
                            prompt "EVENT_DUSTSTORM_REW7"
                            add_weather Sandstorm
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 4
                            prompt "EVENT_DUSTSTORM_REW8" 
                            battle "desert/boss/dustdevil/DustDevil.lvl"
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `VibratingMeteor`
**Source:** `misc_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_VIBRATINGMETEOR_NAME`: "Vibrating Meteor"
- `EVENT_VIBRATINGMETEOR_QUES`: "{catname} finds a strange vibrating meteor. <br/>  <br/> {He} hears a deep humming sound as it pulses with energy..."
- `EVENT_TAKE_ANSW`: "Take"
- `EVENT_VIBRATINGMETEOR_REW1`: "{catname} reaches out and grabs the meteor, pocketing it!"
- `EVENT_VIBRATINGMETEOR_REW2`: "{catname} reaches out and grips the meteor with {his} paws... <br/>  <br/> {catname}'s body trembles and convulses as {his} body mutates!"
- `EVENT_VIBRATINGMETEOR_REW3`: "Terrible pain wracks {catname}'s body as {he} touches the meteor with {his} paws. <br/>  <br/> {catname} recoils in fright but it's too late... the meteor has already mutated {him}!"
- `EVENT_VIBRATINGMETEOR_REW4`: "{catname} releases a howl of agony as {he} grabs the meteor! <br/>  <br/> {catname}'s body twists into horrible contortions as {his} body is ravaged by countless mutations!"
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"
- `EVENT_VIBRATINGMETEOR_REW5`: "{catname} fears the strange power of the vibrating meteor and leaves well enough alone..."

```
VibratingMeteor {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_VIBRATINGMETEOR_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame vibrating_meteor
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_VIBRATINGMETEOR_QUES"

        options {
            take {
                label "EVENT_TAKE_ANSW"
                stat con
                animation choice_dex_alt

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_VIBRATINGMETEOR_REW1"
                            set_frame 2
                            get_item_from_pool [VibratingMeteorite, LargeMeteor, SmallMeteor]
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_VIBRATINGMETEOR_REW2"
                            set_frame 3
                            random_mutation 2
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 4
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_VIBRATINGMETEOR_REW3"
                            set_frame 4
                            random_mutation 1
                            gain_disorder_from_pool all_disorders
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_VIBRATINGMETEOR_REW4"
                            set_frame 5
                            random_mutation {
                                count 3
                                asymmetric true
                            }
                            random_mutation {
                                count 3
                                asymmetric true
                                tag birth_defect
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            ignore {
                label "EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave
                
                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_VIBRATINGMETEOR_REW5"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `Death`
**Source:** `misc_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_DEATH_NAME`: "Death"
- `EVENT_DEATH_QUES2`: "Death appears again before {catname}. <br/>  <br/> [i]"Ha! I have caught you again! Your days of cheating me from what is rightfully mine has come to an end... Give me your soul!"[/i]"
- `EVENT_DEATH_QUES`: "The ghastly figure of Death himself appears before {catname}! <br/>  <br/> [i]"Do you think you can so brazenly ignore me? I've seen you cheat death far too many times to be fair, and now I have come to reclaim what is rightfully mine... your soul!"[/i]"
- `EVENT_DEATH_SWEETTALK_ANSW`: "Sweet talk"
- `EVENT_DEATH_REW1`: "[i]"Your silly words do not impress me. But I will spare you, just this once... and only because I know you will suffer even more if I do!"[/i]"
- `EVENT_DEATH_REW2`: "[i]"I have enjoyed watching you supplicate yourself before me in terror. Were that all my henchmen could be as smooth lipped as you! Take this token and wear it proudly. Ha!"[/i] <br/>  <br/> Death looks very amused with himself."
- `EVENT_DEATH_REW3`: "[i]"You can't talk your way out of this one! Your soul is mine!"[/i] <br/>  <br/> Death swings his scythe to attack {catname}!"
- `EVENT_DEATH_CHALLENGE_ANSW`: "Challenge to a game"
- `EVENT_DEATH_REW4`: "[i]"Arrggh you tricked me! Fine! You get to live this time."[/i] <br/>  <br/> {catname} grins smugly at {his} accomplishment as Death storms off angrily."
- `EVENT_DEATH_REW5`: "{catname} baits Death into betting more and more on the game until he bets his scythe. <br/>  <br/> [i]"This is unacceptable! You must be cheating somehow! Fine... I will just reclaim my scythe from your corpse later when you inevitably meet your demise!"[/i]"
- `EVENT_DEATH_REW6`: "[i]"Ha! You lose! Time to die!"[/i]"
- `EVENT_RUN_ANSW`: "Run!"
- `EVENT_DEATH_REW7`: "While Death is still rambling on in an intimidating monologue, {catname} slips away. <br/>  <br/> [i]"Hey! Where'd that little brat run off to? You think you can escape me? I'll be back!"[/i]"
- `EVENT_DEATH_REW8_B`: "{catname} takes off before Death can react. <br/>  <br/> [i]"Damn it! Why are these cats always running off? Which one was I supposed to kill this time? Whatever... I don't have time for these small fry brats."[/i]"
- `EVENT_DEATH_REW8`: "{catname} takes off before Death can react. <br/>  <br/> [i]"Damn it! Where did that cat just run off to? Whatever... I don't have time for chasing cats around all day."[/i]"
- `EVENT_DEATH_REW9`: "{catname} tries to dash off but Death swoops into his way. <br/>  <br/> [i]"No no no... You can't just scamper off and get away with this! Your demise is long overdue!"[/i]"
- `EVENT_DEATH_REW_RUNAGAIN`: "{catname} takes off again before Death can react. <br/>  <br/> [i]"Damn it! How'd I let that cat slip by me again? It's so rude, {he} won't even let me finish what I have to say!"[/i]"

```
Death {
    requirements {
        cat_has_injury_count_min 2
    }

    intro {
        title "EVENT_DEATH_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        choose_cat_with_most_injuries true
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame death
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {        
        setup {
            conditional_reward {
                requirements {
                    has_token AdventureToken_HasRunFromDeath
                }

                reward {
                    prompt "EVENT_DEATH_QUES2"
                }

                else {
                    prompt "EVENT_DEATH_QUES"
                }
            }
        }

        options {
            sweet_talk {
                label "EVENT_DEATH_SWEETTALK_ANSW"
                stat cha
                
                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_DEATH_REW1"
                            //nothing
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_DEATH_REW2"
                            set_frame 3
                            get_item MysteriousBone
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    prompt "EVENT_DEATH_REW3"
                    battle "events/Death.lvl" 
                    set_frame 4

                    //TODO: save current cat ID in an adventure token, Death should read that token and set his aggro target, so he hyper targets this cat
                }
            }

            challenge_to_game {
                label "EVENT_DEATH_CHALLENGE_ANSW"
                stat int

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_DEATH_REW4"
                            //nothing                            
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_DEATH_REW5"
                            get_item DeathsScythe
                            set_frame 2
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    prompt "EVENT_DEATH_REW6"
                    battle "events/Death.lvl"
                    set_frame 4
                }
            }
            
            run {
                label "EVENT_RUN_ANSW"
                stat spd
                animation choice_leave

                requirements {
                    not_has_token AdventureToken_HasRunFromDeath
                }

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_DEATH_REW7"
                            set_legacy_token WorldEventLegacyToken_HasRunFromDeath
                            play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                            
                            set_adventure_token AdventureToken_HasRunFromDeath
                            next_event_from_set {
                                event Death
                                same_cat true
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            conditional_reward {
                                requirements {
                                    has_token WorldEventLegacyToken_HasRunFromDeath
                                }

                                reward {
                                    prompt "EVENT_DEATH_REW8_B"
                                    //death has had a cat run away from him before
                                }

                                else {
                                    prompt "EVENT_DEATH_REW8"
                                    set_legacy_token WorldEventLegacyToken_HasRunFromDeath
                                    //first time a cat has run away from death
                                }
                            }
                            play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 5
                    prompt "EVENT_DEATH_REW9"
                    battle "events/Death.lvl" 
                }
            }

            run_again { //Death only chases you once.
                label "EVENT_RUN_ANSW"
                stat spd
                animation choice_leave

                requirements {
                    has_token AdventureToken_HasRunFromDeath
                }

                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_DEATH_REW_RUNAGAIN"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                    reward {
                        common {
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                SpeedUp 2
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            permanent_stats {
                                spd 1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 5
                    prompt "EVENT_DEATH_REW9"
                    battle "events/Death.lvl" 
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

## File: `monster.gon`

### `RatMob`
**Source:** `monster.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_MOBOFRATS_NAME`: "Mob of Rats!"
- `EVENT_MOBOFRATS_QUES`: "A mob of rats scurry all around, charging at {catname}!"
- `EVENT_FIGHT_ANSW`: "Fight"
- `EVENT_MOBOFRATS_REW1`: "{catname} hisses and strikes a terrifying pose, ready to strike! <br/>  <br/> The rats scurry away in fright, terrified by the prospect of being attacked by such a fearsome creature as {catname}!"
- `EVENT_MOBOFRATS_REW2`: "{catname} strikes at the rats, laying into them with {his} claws! <br/>  <br/> Several of the rats lie dead before {him}, and the rest scurry away in fear!"
- `EVENT_MOBOFRATS_REW3`: "{catname} holds {his} own against the rats and manages to escape with numerous bite wounds..."
- `EVENT_MOBOFRATS_REW4`: "The rats bite {catname} all over, and {he} retreats, beaten, to the safety of the other cats for help!"
- `EVENT_CHARM_ANSW`: "Charm"
- `EVENT_MOBOFRATS_REW5`: "{catname} impresses the rats with fierce poses, and one of them decides to tag along as a friend!"
- `EVENT_MOBOFRATS_REW6`: "{catname} pretends to be a big furry rat, and they play along! {catname} becomes one with the rats!"
- `EVENT_MOBOFRATS_REW7`: "{catname} tries to convince the rats to leave {him} alone, but they attack instead!"
- `EVENT_MOBOFRATS_REW8`: "{catname} tries in vain to scare away the rats, but the rats tear into {him} with their teeth!"
- `EVENT_SNEAKBY_ANSW`: "Sneak by"
- `EVENT_MOBOFRATS_REW9`: "{catname} darts away stealthily before the rats can react!"
- `EVENT_MOBOFRATS_REW10`: "{catname} tries to sneak away, but the rats pursue {him}, biting and tearing at {his} fur!"
- `EVENT_MOBOFRATS_REW11`: "{catname}'s attempts to evade the rats only leave {him} vulnerable to dozens of their little gnawing teeth!"

```
RatMob {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_MOBOFRATS_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame ratmob
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_MOBOFRATS_QUES"

        options {
            fight {
                label EVENT_FIGHT_ANSW
                stat str

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MOBOFRATS_REW1"

                            get_item_from_pool food

                            global_effect_next_fight {
                                CharacterTypeGainsStatusAtBattleStart {
                                    tag rat
                                    Fear 1
                                }
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
						    prompt "EVENT_MOBOFRATS_REW2"
                            get_item_from_pool rat_trinkets
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 5
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MOBOFRATS_REW3"
                            self_damage 5
                            party_damage 1
                            party_status_next_fight {
                                NoHealthRegen 1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
						    prompt "EVENT_MOBOFRATS_REW4"
                            self_damage 10
                            gain_disorder_from_pool diseases
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            charm {
                label EVENT_CHARM_ANSW
                stat cha

                good {
                    set_frame 4
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MOBOFRATS_REW5"
                            gain_familiar CharmedRat
                        }
                        rare {
						    prompt "EVENT_MOBOFRATS_REW6"
                            random_mutation_from_set {
                                tail 1500
                                ears 1500
                                mouth 1500
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 5
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MOBOFRATS_REW7"
                            self_damage 5
                            party_damage 1
                            party_status_next_fight {
                                NoHealthRegen 1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
						    prompt "EVENT_MOBOFRATS_REW8"
                            self_damage 10
                            gain_disorder_from_pool diseases
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            sneak {
                label EVENT_SNEAKBY_ANSW
                stat dex

                good {
                    set_frame 3
                    prompt "EVENT_MOBOFRATS_REW9"
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 5
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MOBOFRATS_REW10"
                            self_damage 5
                            party_damage 1
                            party_status_next_fight {
                                NoHealthRegen 1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
						    prompt "EVENT_MOBOFRATS_REW11"
                            self_damage 10
                            gain_disorder_from_pool diseases
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `StrayCat`
**Source:** `monster.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_STRAYCAT_NAME`: "Stray Cat!"
- `EVENT_STRAYCAT_QUES`: "{catname} encounters a lonely kitten! <br/>  <br/> Its large, wet eyes look up at {catname}, pleading for help..."
- `EVENT_STRAYCAT_ALT_JURASSIC_QUES`: "{catname} finds a stray cat hiding beneath some large ferns. <br/>  <br/> Its fragile, terrified face seems out of place in this monstrous world."
- `EVENT_STRAYCAT_ALT_ICEAGE_QUES`: "{catname} finds a stray cat, its small body shivering in the cold. <br/>  <br/> It looks up at {catname} with sad, quivering eyes."
- `EVENT_FIGHT_ANSW`: "Fight"
- `EVENT_STRAYCAT_REW1`: "With a quick whack of {his} paw, {catname} knocks the kitten onto its back! <br/>  <br/> {catname} takes the kitten's only possession as the spoils of war."
- `EVENT_STRAYCAT_REW2`: "{catname} makes quick work of the sad looking kitten, killing it and taking its hide as a trophy!"
- `EVENT_STRAYCAT_REW3`: "{catname} tries to take the stray, but it puts up a fierce fight and {catname} limps away in defeat..."
- `EVENT_STRAYCAT_REW4`: "{catname} just can't manage to land a blow on the little scoundrel! <br/>  <br/> The stray's claws rip into {catname} over and over, until {catname} flees with {his} tail between {his} legs."
- `EVENT_CHARM_ANSW`: "Charm"
- `EVENT_STRAYCAT_REW5`: "{catname} showers the kitten with kisses, cleaning its fur. <br/>  <br/> The stray mews in appreciation and follows closely behind when {catname} moves on!"
- `EVENT_STRAYCAT_REW6`: "{catname} makes a new friend! <br/>  <br/> They give each other a bath, and the kitten is glued to {catname} when they move on."
- `EVENT_STRAYCAT_REW7`: "{catname} moves up inquisitively, trying to suss out if the stray is friendly... <br/>  <br/> It strikes at {catname} and scratches {his} nose!"
- `EVENT_STRAYCAT_REW8`: "{catname} rolls onto {his} back, striking a non-threatening pose... <br/>  <br/> The stray pounces and bites at {catname} mercilessly!"
- `EVENT_SNEAKBY_ANSW`: "Sneak by"
- `EVENT_STRAYCAT_REW9`: "{catname} takes a wide berth around the little cat... Strays can be dangerous!"
- `EVENT_STRAYCAT_REW10`: "{catname} tries to skirt by the stray, but finds {himself} suddenly surrounded! <br/>  <br/> It's an ambush!"
- `EVENT_STRAYCAT_REW11`: "It was a trap! The small cat is a fierce warrior! <br/>  <br/> It darts between the cats, deftly biting and scratching furiously at them!"
- `EVENT_STRAYCAT_ALT_REW1`: "The party huddles together with the stray cat and rests for a while."
- `EVENT_STRAYCAT_ALT_REW2`: "After just a few licks, the small stray takes an immediate liking to {catname} and becomes devoted to {him}!"
- `EVENT_BASH_ANSW`: "Bash"
- `EVENT_STRAYCAT_ALT_REW3`: "{catname} strikes the stray cat and steals its meager possessions. <br/>  <br/> It lies in a crumpled heap, crying in misery at the endless cruelty of this harsh world."
- `EVENT_STRAYCAT_ALT_REW4`: "{catname} dispatches the stray cat easily and removes its hide."
- `EVENT_STRAYCAT_ALT_REW5`: "{catname} strikes down the weak stray in a few swift blows... <br/>  <br/> Strange and disturbing memories flood {catname}'s mind. Was this cat {his} ancestor?!"
- `EVENT_STRAYCAT_ALT_REW6`: "The stray puts up little fight and crumples to the ground dead. <br/>  <br/> Looking down at the corpse, {catname} has a brief moment of recognition, then {his} eyes glaze over. <br/>  <br/> {catname} has killed their own great grandfather! {He} feels {his} existence fading..."
- `EVENT_STRAYCAT_ALT_REW7`: "{catname} leaves the stray alone and sneaks past without it noticing."
- `EVENT_STRAYCAT_ALT_REW8`: "{catname} tries to sneak only to find {himself} surrounded by enemies... <br/>  <br/> It was an ambush!"
- `EVENT_STRAYCAT_ALT_REW9`: "{catname} tries to sneak past the stray, but it lashes out and strikes ferociously at the cats!"

```
StrayCat {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_STRAYCAT_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame straycat
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {

        setup {
            conditional_reward {
                requirements {
                    is_not_chapter [iceage jurassic]
                }
                reward {
                    prompt "EVENT_STRAYCAT_QUES"
                }
            }
            
            conditional_reward {
                requirements {
                    is_chapter [jurassic]
                }
                reward {
                    prompt "EVENT_STRAYCAT_ALT_JURASSIC_QUES"
                }
            }

            conditional_reward {
                requirements {
                    is_chapter [iceage]
                }
                reward {
                    prompt "EVENT_STRAYCAT_ALT_ICEAGE_QUES"
                }
            }
        }

        options {
            fight {
                label EVENT_FIGHT_ANSW
                stat str
                
                requirements {
                    is_not_chapter [iceage jurassic]
                }

                good {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_STRAYCAT_REW1"
                            get_item_from_pool [FoodMedium FoodBig Catnip CatnipBig]
                        }
                        rare {
						    prompt "EVENT_STRAYCAT_REW2"
                            get_item_from_pool deadcat_equipment
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 5
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_STRAYCAT_REW3"
                            self_damage 50%
                        }
                        rare {
						    prompt "EVENT_STRAYCAT_REW4"
                            gain_disorder_from_pool physical_disorders
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            charm {
                label EVENT_CHARM_ANSW
                stat cha
                
                requirements {
                    is_not_chapter [iceage jurassic]
                }

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_STRAYCAT_REW5"
                            gain_familiar CharmedKitten
                        }
                        rare {
						    prompt "EVENT_STRAYCAT_REW6"
                            gain_cat_familiar 1
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 5
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_STRAYCAT_REW7"
                            gain_disorder_from_pool diseases
                        }
                        rare {
						    prompt "EVENT_STRAYCAT_REW8"
                            injury random
                            self_damage 10
                            gain_disorder_from_pool physical_disorders
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            sneak {
                label EVENT_SNEAKBY_ANSW
                stat dex
                
                requirements {
                    is_not_chapter [iceage jurassic]
                }

                good {
                    set_frame 4
                    prompt "EVENT_STRAYCAT_REW9"
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 5
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_STRAYCAT_REW10"
                            
                            ambush_next_basic_fights 1
                            spawn_unit_next_fight {
                                object TomTom
                                spawn_side enemies
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
						    prompt "EVENT_STRAYCAT_REW11"
                            party_damage 50%
                            gain_disorder_from_pool all_disorders
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        
            charm_past_alt {
                label "EVENT_CHARM_ANSW"
                stat cha

                requirements {
                    is_chapter [iceage jurassic]
                }

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_STRAYCAT_ALT_REW1"
                            party_heal 100%
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_STRAYCAT_ALT_REW2"
                            learn_passive MiniMe
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 5
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_STRAYCAT_REW7"
                            gain_disorder_from_pool diseases
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_STRAYCAT_REW8"
                            injury random
                            damage 10
                            gain_disorder_from_pool physical_disorders
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            bash_past_alt {
                label "EVENT_BASH_ANSW"
                stat str
                
                requirements {
                    is_chapter [iceage jurassic]
                }

                good {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_STRAYCAT_ALT_REW3"
                            get_item_from_pool consumables
                            gain_coins [4 15]
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_STRAYCAT_ALT_REW4"
                            get_item_from_pool deadcat_equipment
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_STRAYCAT_ALT_REW5"
                            gain_disorder PTSD
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_STRAYCAT_ALT_REW6" 
                            gain_disorder Soulless
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            sneak_past_alt {
                label "EVENT_SNEAKBY_ANSW"
                stat dex
                
                requirements {
                    is_chapter [iceage jurassic]
                }

                good {
                    set_frame 4
                    prompt "EVENT_STRAYCAT_ALT_REW7"
                    //nothing
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 5
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_STRAYCAT_ALT_REW8"
                            ambush_next_basic_fights 1
                            spawn_unit_next_fight {
                                object TomTom
                                spawn_side "cats"
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_STRAYCAT_ALT_REW9"
                            gain_disorder_from_pool all_disorders
                            party_damage 50%
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `BoxMonster`
**Source:** `monster.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_BOXMONSTER_NAME`: "Box Monster!"
- `EVENT_BOXMONSTER_QUES`: "{catname} finds a strange box... as {he} begins to approach, a monster within it speaks! <br/>  <br/> [i]Just a small sip! A little slurp! You have so much life force... give me some and I'll let you pass![/i]"
- `EVENT_BRIBE_ANSW`: "Bribe"
- `EVENT_BOXMONSTER_REW1`: "{catname} touches the box and suddenly feels very exhausted!"
- `EVENT_BOXMONSTER_REW2`: "{catname} pays the box's toll and touches the box... and feels an overwhelming rush of energy coursing through {his} body! Wasn't this supposed to be bad?"
- `EVENT_BOXMONSTER_REW3`: "{catname}'s paw barely touches the box when excruciating pain rips through {him}!"
- `EVENT_BOXMONSTER_REW4`: "{catname} writhes in pain as {his} body distorts and mutates!"
- `EVENT_SNEAKBY_ANSW`: "Sneak by"
- `EVENT_BOXMONSTER_REW5`: "{catname} quickly darts past the box to safety before it can react!"
- `EVENT_BOXMONSTER_REW6`: "{catname} tries to sneak by, but it turns suddenly and {his} mind is gripped by a strange force..."
- `EVENT_BOXMONSTER_REW7`: "{catname} attempts to sneak by, the but monster inside the box screams at {him}, afflicting {catname} with a terrible disease!"

```
BoxMonster {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_BOXMONSTER_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame boxmonster
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_BOXMONSTER_QUES"

        options {
            bribe {
                label EVENT_BRIBE_ANSW
                stat con

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_BOXMONSTER_REW1"
                            self_damage [5 10]
                        }
                        rare {
						    prompt "EVENT_BOXMONSTER_REW2"
                            full_heal 1
                            gain_disorder Touched
                            self_damage 1
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 5
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_BOXMONSTER_REW3"
                            self_damage 100%
                            gain_disorder_from_pool all_disorders
                        }
                        rare {
						    prompt "EVENT_BOXMONSTER_REW4"
                            random_mutation 2
                            gain_disorder_from_pool all_disorders
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            sneak {
                label EVENT_SNEAKBY_ANSW
                stat dex

                good {
                    set_frame 3
                    prompt "EVENT_BOXMONSTER_REW5"
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 5
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_BOXMONSTER_REW6"
                            gain_disorder_from_pool mental_disorders
                        }
                        rare {
						    prompt "EVENT_BOXMONSTER_REW7"
                            gain_disorder Necrosis
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `BallOfFlesh`
**Source:** `monster.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_BALLOFFLESH_NAME`: "Ball of Flesh!"
- `EVENT_BALLOFFLESH_QUES`: "A strange lump of flesh, glistening and red, lies before {catname} on the ground..."
- `EVENT_EAT_ANSW`: "Eat"
- `EVENT_BALLOFFLESH_REW1`: "{catname} timidly tastes the juicy flesh... <br/>  <br/> It is delicious! The other cats gather around and together they devour it!"
- `EVENT_BALLOFFLESH_REW2`: "{catname} chews on the soft flesh, blood dripping from {his} mouth! Beneath the soft exterior is hard marrow, and {catname} extracts it from the mess of tissue..."
- `EVENT_BALLOFFLESH_REW3`: "{catname} tears into the soft tissue, but it tastes gross!"
- `EVENT_BALLOFFLESH_REW4`: "Tempted by a soft and yummy meal, {catname} digs into the fleshy lump... <br/>  <br/> Several moments in, {he} pauses, realizing in horror how absolutely vile it tastes!"
- `EVENT_SNEAKBY_ANSW`: "Sneak by"
- `EVENT_BALLOFFLESH_REW5`: "Probably best not to risk it, {catname} thinks. There's plenty of other meals on the horizon!"
- `EVENT_BALLOFFLESH_REW6`: "{catname} turns to leave, but something pulls {him} closer to take a bite. It just... looked so delicious!"
- `EVENT_BALLOFFLESH_REW7`: "{catname} doesn't want to eat it, but something primal deep inside {him} forces {catname} into a frenzy, devouring the strange flesh!"

```
BallOfFlesh {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_BALLOFFLESH_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame ballofflesh
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_BALLOFFLESH_QUES"

        options {
            eat {
                label EVENT_EAT_ANSW
                stat con

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_BALLOFFLESH_REW1"
                            party_heal 100%
                            gain_food [6 15]
                        }
                        rare {
						    prompt "EVENT_BALLOFFLESH_REW2"
                            get_item BoneMarrow
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 4
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_BALLOFFLESH_REW3"
                            gain_disorder_from_pool diseases
                        }
                        rare {
						    prompt "EVENT_BALLOFFLESH_REW4"
                            gain_disorder_from_pool diseases
                            gain_disorder_from_pool diseases
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            sneak {
                label EVENT_SNEAKBY_ANSW
                stat dex

                good {
                    set_frame 3
                    prompt "EVENT_BALLOFFLESH_REW5"
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 4
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_BALLOFFLESH_REW6"
                            self_damage 5
                            spin again
                        }
                        rare {
						    prompt "EVENT_BALLOFFLESH_REW7"
                            gain_disorder Leprosy
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `SpookieApparation`
**Source:** `monster.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_SPOOKYAPPARATION_NAME`: "Spooky Apparition"
- `EVENT_SPOOKYAPPARATION_QUES`: "{catname} finds a spooky apparition! Spectral tears wash silently down its face as it watches {his} every move..."
- `EVENT_RUN_ANSW`: "Run!"
- `EVENT_SPOOKYAPPARATION_REW1`: "{catname} doesn't stick around to find out what it wants!"
- `EVENT_SPOOKYAPPARATION_REW2`: "{catname} tries to turn and run, but {his} legs won't move... <br/>  <br/> The apparition stares into {catname}'s soul!"
- `EVENT_SPOOKYAPPARATION_REW3`: "{catname} tries to leave, but cannot help but stare at the apparition for what seems like an eternity... <br/>  <br/> {catname}'s skin wrinkles, {his} fur turns white, and {his} eyes become milky with age."
- `EVENT_TALKTO_ANSW`: "Talk to"
- `EVENT_SPOOKYAPPARATION_REW4`: "The apparition presents {catname} with a small box, which {catname} eagerly opens..."
- `EVENT_SPOOKYAPPARATION_REW5`: "The apparition leads {catname} into a small basement and points to an ornate chest in the corner of the room. <br/>  <br/> {catname} cautiously opens it..."
- `EVENT_SPOOKYAPPARATION_REW6`: "{catname} tries to turn and run, but {his} legs won't move... <br/>  <br/> The apparition stares into {catname}'s soul!"
- `EVENT_SPOOKYAPPARATION_REW7`: "The apparition regales {catname} with a long, meandering and tragic story about its previous life... <br/>  <br/> {catname} listens in captivated silence, spellbound to hear the story through to the conclusion."

```
SpookieApparation {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_SPOOKYAPPARATION_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame spookieapparation
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_SPOOKYAPPARATION_QUES"

        options {
            sneak {
                label EVENT_RUN_ANSW
                stat spd

                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_SPOOKYAPPARATION_REW1"
                }

                bad {
                    set_frame 3

                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_SPOOKYAPPARATION_REW2"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Fear 3
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_SPOOKYAPPARATION_REW3"
                            make_old self
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            talk {
                label EVENT_TALKTO_ANSW
                stat cha

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_SPOOKYAPPARATION_REW4"
                            get_item_from_pool chapter_common
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_SPOOKYAPPARATION_REW5"
                            get_item_from_pool isaac_items
                        }
                    }
                }

                bad {
                    set_frame 3

                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_SPOOKYAPPARATION_REW6"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Fear 3
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_SPOOKYAPPARATION_REW7"
                            make_old self
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `WatchingHead`
**Source:** `monster.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_WATCHINGHEAD_NAME`: "Watching Head"
- `EVENT_WATCHINGHEAD_QUES`: "A massive deformed head lies before {catname}. <br/>  <br/> Mouth agape, its single, unmoving eye stares at {catname}..."
- `EVENT_FIGHT_ANSW`: "Fight"
- `EVENT_WATCHINGHEAD_REW1`: "{catname} leaps at the strange head, striking it before it has time to react! <br/>  <br/> {catname} rips out its single eye as a trophy."
- `EVENT_WATCHINGHEAD_REW2`: "{catname} strikes the monstrous head! It lets out a shudder, then deflates slowly like a balloon... <br/>  <br/> {catname} digs into the remains and pulls something out..."
- `EVENT_WATCHINGHEAD_REW3`: "{catname} attacks the giant head, but it awakens and bites at {his} face! <br/>  <br/> {catname} turns in shame at {his} now disfigured face."
- `EVENT_WATCHINGHEAD_REW4`: "{catname} sneaks up to attack, but it rises up and makes a terrifying sucking sound! <br/>  <br/> The cats howl in pain as their faces are ripped towards it! <br/>  <br/> Each cat lost part of their face!"
- `EVENT_SNEAKBY_ANSW`: "Sneak by"
- `EVENT_WATCHINGHEAD_REW5`: "Not diverting {his} gaze, {catname} quietly skirts around the giant head. <br/>  <br/> It continues to stare off blankly into the distance."
- `EVENT_WATCHINGHEAD_REW6`: "{catname} sneaks past the strange head, but the giant head's eye remains fixated on {catname} as {he} moves..."

```
WatchingHead {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_WATCHINGHEAD_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame watching_head
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_WATCHINGHEAD_QUES"

        options {
            fight {
                label "EVENT_FIGHT_ANSW"
                stat str

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_WATCHINGHEAD_REW1"
                            get_item_from_pool eyes_nonrare
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_WATCHINGHEAD_REW2"
                            get_item_from_pool fleshhead_items
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 5
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_WATCHINGHEAD_REW3"
                            random_mutation_from_set {
                                count 1
                                ears -2
                                eyebrows -2
                                eyes -2
                                mouth -2
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_WATCHINGHEAD_REW4"
                            party_random_mutation_from_set {
                                count 1
                                ears -2
                                eyebrows -2
                                eyes -2
                                mouth -2
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            sneak {
                label "EVENT_SNEAKBY_ANSW"
                stat dex

                good {
                    set_frame 4
                    prompt "EVENT_WATCHINGHEAD_REW5"
                    //nothing
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 4
                            prompt "EVENT_WATCHINGHEAD_REW5"
                            //nothing
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 3
                            prompt "EVENT_WATCHINGHEAD_REW6"
                            next_event_from_set WatchingHead2
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

## File: `moon_events.gon`

### `CrashedObject`
**Source:** `moon_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_CRASHEDOBJECT_NAME`: "Crashed Object"
- `EVENT_CRASHEDOBJECT_QUES`: "{catname} finds a large crashed mechanical object! <br/>  <br/> Maybe it is some kind of large robot or ship?"
- `EVENT_LOOT_ANSW`: "Loot"
- `EVENT_CRASHEDOBJECT_REW1`: "{catname} digs around in the wreckage until {he} finds something useful!"
- `EVENT_CRASHEDOBJECT_REW2`: "{catname} explores the crashed object and finds a sweet sci-fi weapon!"
- `EVENT_CRASHEDOBJECT_REW3`: "{catname} digs through the wreckage but can't find anything worth salvaging."
- `EVENT_CRASHEDOBJECT_REW4`: "While examining the wreckage, {catname} accidentally sits on something. It hurts! <br/>  <br/> {catname} has been probed!"
- `EVENT_REPAIR_ANSW`: "Repair"
- `EVENT_CRASHEDOBJECT_REW5`: "Something whirs and clicks and a light turns on! <br/>  <br/> It doesn't seem to do much, but {catname} feels very smart for having figured it out!"
- `EVENT_CRASHEDOBJECT_REW6`: "The ship turns on, and stands up... <br/>  <br/> It was a big mech! {catname} is stoked, this looks very handy!"
- `EVENT_CRASHEDOBJECT_REW7`: "{catname} tries to repair the ship but can't make heads or tails of it."
- `EVENT_CRASHEDOBJECT_REW8`: "{catname} tinkers with the ship, trying to fix it, when a sharp piece of metal cuts {him} badly!"
- `EVENT_INSPECT_ANSW`: "Inspect"
- `EVENT_CRASHEDOBJECT_REW9`: "Tucked in a protected compartment, {catname} finds a robot and turns it on!"
- `EVENT_CRASHEDOBJECT_REW10`: "After further inspection, the wreckage contains several robots, still in working condition! <br/>  <br/> {catname} powers them on!"
- `EVENT_CRASHEDOBJECT_REW11`: "{catname} tries {his} best to figure out the large pile of wreckage but it's no use."
- `EVENT_CRASHEDOBJECT_REW12`: "{catname} wastes so much time trying to figure out the wrecked ship that the party gets ambushed!"

```
CrashedObject {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_CRASHEDOBJECT_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame crashed_object
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_CRASHEDOBJECT_QUES"

        options {
            loot {
                label "EVENT_LOOT_ANSW"
                stat dex
                animation choice_dex_alt

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 2
                            prompt "EVENT_CRASHEDOBJECT_REW1"
                            get_item_from_pool tech_items
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 3
                            prompt "EVENT_CRASHEDOBJECT_REW2"
                            get_item AlienBlaster
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_CRASHEDOBJECT_REW3"
                            //nothing
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 7
                            prompt "EVENT_CRASHEDOBJECT_REW4" 
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                ProbeCharmed 1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            repair {
                label "EVENT_REPAIR_ANSW"
                stat lck

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 4
                            prompt "EVENT_CRASHEDOBJECT_REW5"
                            permanent_stats {
                                int 1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 6
                            prompt "EVENT_CRASHEDOBJECT_REW6"
                            gain_familiar MechSuit
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_CRASHEDOBJECT_REW7"
                            //nothing
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 7
                            prompt "EVENT_CRASHEDOBJECT_REW8" 
                            damage 10
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Bleed 2
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            inspect {
                label "EVENT_INSPECT_ANSW"
                stat int

                good {
                    set_frame 5
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_CRASHEDOBJECT_REW9"
                            random_pool [
                                {
                                    gain_familiar CharmedLoveBot
                                }{
                                    gain_familiar CharmedSecurityBot
                                }{
                                    gain_familiar CharmedCopBot
                                }{
                                    gain_familiar CharmedSoldierBot
                                }{
                                    gain_familiar CharmedHangerBot
                                }{
                                    gain_familiar CharmedDoctorBot
                                }{
                                    gain_familiar CharmedTallBot
                                }{
                                    gain_familiar CharmedFutureBot
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_CRASHEDOBJECT_REW10"
                            random_pool [
                                {
                                    gain_familiar CharmedLoveBot
                                }{
                                    gain_familiar CharmedSecurityBot
                                }{
                                    gain_familiar CharmedCopBot
                                }{
                                    gain_familiar CharmedSoldierBot
                                }{
                                    gain_familiar CharmedHangerBot
                                }{
                                    gain_familiar CharmedDoctorBot
                                }{
                                    gain_familiar CharmedTallBot
                                }{
                                    gain_familiar CharmedFutureBot
                                }
                            ]
                            random_pool [
                                {
                                    gain_familiar CharmedLoveBot
                                }{
                                    gain_familiar CharmedSecurityBot
                                }{
                                    gain_familiar CharmedCopBot
                                }{
                                    gain_familiar CharmedSoldierBot
                                }{
                                    gain_familiar CharmedHangerBot
                                }{
                                    gain_familiar CharmedDoctorBot
                                }{
                                    gain_familiar CharmedTallBot
                                }{
                                    gain_familiar CharmedFutureBot
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_CRASHEDOBJECT_REW11"
                            //nothing
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_CRASHEDOBJECT_REW12" 
                            ambush_next_basic_fights 1
                        }
                    }
                }
            }   
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `MysteriousObelisk`
**Source:** `moon_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSOBELISK_NAME`: "Mysterious Obelisk"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSOBELISK_QUES`: "{catname} finds a mysterious obelisk jutting out from the moon's surface. <br/>  <br/> It has strange text on it that {catname} can't decipher."
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSOBELISK_TOUCH_ANSW`: "Touch obelisk"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSOBELISK_REW1`: "The obelisk reacts to {catname}'s touch, glowing with energy! <br/>  <br/> It infuses {catname} with energy,"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSOBELISK_REW1A`: "maxing out {his} starting mana for the next battle!"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSOBELISK_REW1B`: "providing {him} with health regen for the next battle!"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSOBELISK_REW1C`: "empowering {his} next spell for the next battle!"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSOBELISK_REW2`: "{catname} reaches out and touches the obelisk and it bursts into flames!"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSOBELISK_REW2A`: "{catname} feels heat surging through {his} body, and {his} paws begin to glow with heat!"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSOBELISK_REW2B`: "A chunk of the obelisk melts off and falls to {catname}'s feet."
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSOBELISK_REW3`: "{catname} touches the obelisk and a powerful wave of energy pulses courses through {his} body..."
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSOBELISK_REW4`: "{catname} reaches out and touches the obelisk and it begins to glow and shake...  <br/>  <br/> {He} tries to pull {his} paw away but {catname}'s body is overwhelmed by the powerful energy emanating from the obelisk. <br/>  <br/> All of {catname}'s abilities have been rerolled!"
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSOBELISK_REW5`: "Fearing what terrible and unnatural things might happen if {he} were to touch the alien obelisk, {catname} leaves it alone."

```
MysteriousObelisk {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSOBELISK_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame mysterious_obelisk
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSOBELISK_QUES"

        options {
            touch {
                label "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSOBELISK_TOUCH_ANSW"
                stat cha

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 2
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSOBELISK_REW1"
                            random_pool [
                                {
                                    self_status_next_fight {
                                        MaxStartingMana 1
                                    }
                                    prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSOBELISK_REW1A"
                                }
                                {
                                    self_status_next_fight {
                                        HealthRegenUp 3
                                    }
                                    prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSOBELISK_REW1B"
                                }
                                {
                                    self_status_next_fight {
                                        DoubleCast 1
                                    }
                                    prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSOBELISK_REW1C"
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 3
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSOBELISK_REW2"
                            random_pool [
                                {
                                    prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSOBELISK_REW2A"
                                    gain_disorder FlamingFists
                                    play_animation [resultVeryGood 0]
                                }
                                {
                                    prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSOBELISK_REW2B"
                                    get_item_from_pool [ObeliskMask ObeliskHat ObeliskArmor]
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 4
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSOBELISK_REW3"
                            gain_disorder_from_pool all_disorders
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 5
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSOBELISK_REW4" 
                            scramble_abilities all
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            ignore {
                label "EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave
                
                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSOBELISK_REW5"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `SmallBlackHole`
**Source:** `moon_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_SMALLBLACKHOLE_NAME`: "Small Black Hole"
- `EVENT_SMALLBLACKHOLE_QUES`: "A small black hole beckons {catname} toward it, pulling at every hair on {his} body..."
- `EVENT_SMALLBLACKHOLE_REACHINSIDE_ANSW`: "Reach inside"
- `EVENT_SMALLBLACKHOLE_REW1`: "{catname}'s hand disappears into the darkness of the hole as {he} reaches inside."
- `EVENT_SMALLBLACKHOLE_REW1A`: "With great effort, {catname} pulls {his} arm from the black hole clutching a rare item in {his} paw!"
- `EVENT_SMALLBLACKHOLE_REW1B`: "With great effort, {catname} pulls {his} arm from the black hole only to find it mutated into a strange new shape!"
- `EVENT_SMALLBLACKHOLE_REW2`: "{catname} swipes at the black hole... <br/>  <br/> {His} body convulses as it is overcome with numerous strange mutations!"
- `EVENT_SMALLBLACKHOLE_REW3`: "{catname} reaches into the black hole with {his} arm and feels a terrible crushing sensation as the arm disintegrates into nothing! <br/>  <br/> {He} recoils in horror from the black hole but it is too late. {catname}'s arm is gone!"
- `EVENT_SMALLBLACKHOLE_REW4`: "{catname} reaches for the black hole and is completely sucked in! <br/>  <br/> A blink of the eye later, {catname} is thrown out the other side, {his} body distorted and riddled with severe mutations."

```
SmallBlackHole {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_SMALLBLACKHOLE_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame small_black_hole
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_SMALLBLACKHOLE_QUES"

        options {
            reach_inside {
                label "EVENT_SMALLBLACKHOLE_REACHINSIDE_ANSW"
                stat spd

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_SMALLBLACKHOLE_REW1"
                            random_pool [
                                {
                                    set_frame 2
                                    prompt "EVENT_SMALLBLACKHOLE_REW1A"
                                    get_item_from_pool chapter_rare
                                }
                                {
                                    set_frame 3
                                    prompt "EVENT_SMALLBLACKHOLE_REW1B"
                                    random_pool [ //mutate 1 arm
                                        {
                                            mutation {
                                                arm1 -1
                                            }
                                        }
                                        {
                                            mutation {
                                                arm2 -1
                                            }
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 3
                            prompt "EVENT_SMALLBLACKHOLE_REW2"
                            random_mutation 3
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 4
                            prompt "EVENT_SMALLBLACKHOLE_REW3"
                            permanent_stats {
                                str -2
                            }
                            random_mutation {
                                count 2
                                asymmetric true
                            }
                            random_pool [ //lose arm
                                {
                                    mutation {
                                        arm1 -2
                                    }
                                }
                                {
                                    mutation {
                                        arm2 -2
                                    }
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 5
                            prompt "EVENT_SMALLBLACKHOLE_REW4"
                            random_mutation 2
                            random_mutation {
                                count 2
                                tag birth_defect
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

## File: `npc_events.gon`

### `Butch1`
**Source:** `npc_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_BUTCH_NAME`: "Butch"
- `EVENT_BUTCH_QUES`: "[i]"Ok, kiddo. What's best? Damage or protection?"[/i]"
- `EVENT_DAMAGE_ANSW`: "Damage"
- `EVENT_BUTCH_REW1`: "[i]"Yeah, I feel ya. A shoot first, ask questions later kinda cat, huh? <br/>  <br/> Here, take this…"[/i]"
- `EVENT_BUTCH_REW2`: "[i]"Hell yeah! Hit 'em where it hurts! <br/>  <br/> Here. Don't say I never did nothin' for ya..."[/i]"
- `EVENT_PROTECTION_ANSW`: "Protection"
- `EVENT_BUTCH_REW3`: "[i]"A cat who likes to take a punch, huh? Sicko… <br/>  <br/> This is a judgement-free zone, though... So here."[/i]"
- `EVENT_BUTCH_REW4`: "[i]"So you like gettin' hit, huh? Well, whatever floats your boat, kiddo… Here."[/i]"

```
Butch1 {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_BUTCH_NAME"
        cat_choice random //choose, random, none (random and none are equivalent)
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame butch
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_BUTCH_QUES"

        options {
            damage {
                label "EVENT_DAMAGE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_misc

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                        prompt "EVENT_BUTCH_REW1"
                            get_item_from_pool {
                                pool chapter_common
                                restrict weapon
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                        prompt "EVENT_BUTCH_REW2"
                            get_item_from_pool {
                                pool chapter_rare
                                restrict weapon
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            protection {
                label "EVENT_PROTECTION_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_misc

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                        prompt "EVENT_BUTCH_REW3"
                            get_item_from_pool {
                                pool chapter_common
                                restrict armor
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                        prompt "EVENT_BUTCH_REW4"
                            get_item_from_pool {
                                pool chapter_rare
                                restrict armor
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `Butch2`
**Source:** `npc_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_BUTCH_NAME`: "Butch"
- `EVENT_BUTCH2_QUES`: "[i]"What's best? The element of surprise or intimidation?"[/i]"
- `EVENT_SURPRISE_ANSW`: "Surprise"
- `EVENT_BUTCH2_REW1`: "[i]"The old sucker punch! Yeah, I like ya, kid… <br/>  <br/> Here, I know a shortcut."[/i] <br/>  <br/> {catname} gets an extra turn at start of the next battle."
- `EVENT_BUTCH2_REW2`: "[i]"Fly like a butthole fly, stink like a pee, I always say! <br/>  <br/> Quick, while no one's lookin'. Take this!"[/i]"
- `EVENT_INTIMIDATION_ANSW`: "Intimidation"
- `EVENT_BUTCH2_REW3`: "[i]"You're quite the beefy kiddo, aren't ya? Yeah… I think you'll do just fine."[/i]"
- `EVENT_BUTCH2_REW4`: "[i]"Yeah, I bet you've scared your fair share of kids in your day… <br/>  <br/> Lemme fix your face a bit for ya."[/i]"

```
Butch2 {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_BUTCH_NAME"
        cat_choice random //choose, random, none (random and none are equivalent)
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame butch
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_BUTCH2_QUES"

        options {
            surprise {
                label "EVENT_SURPRISE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_misc

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_BUTCH2_REW1"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                AlphaTurns 1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_BUTCH2_REW2"
                            permanent_stats {
                                spd 2
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            intimidation {
                label "EVENT_INTIMIDATION_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_misc

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_BUTCH2_REW3"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                AllStatsUp 1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_BUTCH2_REW4"
                            permanent_stats {
                                cha 2
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

### `Butch3`
**Source:** `npc_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_BUTCH_NAME`: "Butch"
- `EVENT_BUTCH3_QUES`: "I got one for ya. What's best? Scabs or cuts?"
- `EVENT_SCABS_ANSW`: "Scabs"
- `EVENT_BUTCH3_REW1`: "Ya know what they say. What hurts ya makes you tougher, right? So take... This!"
- `EVENT_BUTCH3_REW2`: "Heck kid, you'll need tough skin out there, but that's a bit excessive tho. You do you, kiddo."
- `EVENT_CUTS_ANSW`: "Cuts"
- `EVENT_BUTCH3_REW3`: "This kiddo's lookin' to start somethin'! Save it for the alley! Here. It's not much, but you can take my backup slice."
- `EVENT_BUTCH3_REW4`: "Dang, that's a mean stabby you got. But we'z friends tho, right? Here, take this. Should help."

```
Butch3 {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_BUTCH_NAME"
        cat_choice random //choose, random, none (random and none are equivalent)
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame butch
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_BUTCH3_QUES"

        options {
            damage {
                label "EVENT_SCABS_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_misc

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_BUTCH3_REW1"
                            get_item Callus
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_BUTCH3_REW2"
                            random_pool [
                                {
                                    gain_disorder ScalyScabs
                                }
                                {
                                    learn_passive Scabs
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            protection {
                label "EVENT_CUTS_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_misc

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_BUTCH3_REW3"
                            get_item_from_pool [GlassShard, RustyRazor, RazorBlade, BagOfGlass]
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_BUTCH3_REW4"
                            get_item_from_pool { //TODO: get_item KnifeSharpener
                                pool chapter_rare
                                restrict weapon
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

### `Beanies1`
**Source:** `npc_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_DRBEANIES_NAME`: "Dr. Beanies"
- `EVENT_DRBEANIES_QUES`: "[i]"Time to heal your cats! <br/>  <br/> Wait... What button do I press again?"[/i]"
- `EVENT_RED_ANSW`: "Red"
- `EVENT_DRBEANIES_REW1`: "[i]"Yes! I did something!"[/i]"
- `EVENT_DRBEANIES_REW2`: "[i]"Oh, cool! It works! <br/>  <br/> Man, I'm smart!"[/i]"
- `EVENT_DRBEANIES_REW3`: "[i]"Oh… Uh… You must have moved or something."[/i]"
- `EVENT_DRBEANIES_REW4`: "[i]"Umm. Uh… There might be some mild side effects…"[/i]"
- `EVENT_BLUE_ANSW`: "Blue"

```
Beanies1 {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_DRBEANIES_NAME"
        cat_choice random //choose, random, none (random and none are equivalent)
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame beanies
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_DRBEANIES_QUES"

        options {
            red {
                label "EVENT_RED_ANSW"
                stat none
                fixed_chance 50%
                animation choice_misc

                good {
                    set_frame 2

                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_DRBEANIES_REW1"
                            party_heal 5
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_DRBEANIES_REW2"
                            party_heal 100%
                            permanent_stats {
                                con 1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }

                bad {
                    set_frame 3

                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_DRBEANIES_REW3"
                            party_damage 3
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_DRBEANIES_REW4"
                            party_damage 10
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            blue {
                label "EVENT_BLUE_ANSW"
                stat none
                fixed_chance 50%
                animation choice_misc

                copy_results red
            }
        }
    }
}
```

### `Beanies2`
**Source:** `npc_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_DRBEANIES_NAME`: "Dr. Beanies"
- `EVENT_DRBEANIES2_QUES`: "[i]"My tech can make you better in every way! <br/>  <br/> Wait... How do I work this?"[/i]"
- `EVENT_PULLLEVER_ANSW`: "Pull lever"
- `EVENT_DRBEANIES2_REW1`: "[i]"It worked!"[/i]"
- `EVENT_DRBEANIES2_REW2`: "[i]"Full power! The doctor is in!"[/i]"
- `EVENT_DRBEANIES2_REW3`: "[i]"No! Wait! Why did you tell me to do that?"[/i]"
- `EVENT_DRBEANIES2_REW4`: "[i]"Oops…"[/i]"
- `EVENT_PUSHBUTTON_ANSW`: "Push button"

```
Beanies2 {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_DRBEANIES_NAME"
        cat_choice random //choose, random, none (random and none are equivalent)
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame beanies
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

        prompt "EVENT_DRBEANIES2_QUES"

        options {
            lever {
                label "EVENT_PULLLEVER_ANSW"
                stat none
                fixed_chance 50%
                animation choice_misc

                good {
                    set_frame 2

                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_DRBEANIES2_REW1"
                            permanent_stats {
                                random 2
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_DRBEANIES2_REW2"
                            permanent_stats {
                                str 1
                                dex 1
                                con 1
                                int 1
                                spd 1
                                cha 1
                                lck 1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }

                bad {
                    set_frame 3

                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_DRBEANIES2_REW3"
                            permanent_stats {
                                random -1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_DRBEANIES2_REW4"
                            random_mutation 1
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            button {
                label "EVENT_PUSHBUTTON_ANSW"
                stat none
                fixed_chance 50%
                animation choice_misc

                copy_results lever
            }
        }
    }
}
```

                        prompt "EVENT_FRANK_REW3"

                        }
                        rare {
                        prompt "EVENT_FRANK_REW4"
                            get_item_from_pool poop_items
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
