### `Tink1`
**Source:** `npc_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_TINK_NAME`: "Tink"
- `EVENT_TINK_QUES`: "[i]"Ok, ugly. Answer me this… Which is better? <br/>  <br/> Tappy toes or pirouette?"[/i]"
- `EVENT_TAPPYTOES_ANSW`: "Tappy toes"
- `EVENT_TINK_REW1`: "[i]"Oh, honey, you couldn't be more right! <br/>  <br/> Can you do the running man?"[/i] <br/>  <br/> {catname} feels a burst of speed!"
- `EVENT_TINK_REW2`: "[i]"My god, yes! I'll tap these toes all over your face, honey! <br/>  <br/> Watch and learn."[/i]"
- `EVENT_PIROUETTE_ANSW`: "Pirouette"
- `EVENT_TINK_REW3`: "[i]"Spin, baby, spin! You got this, honey!"[/i] <br/>  <br/> {catname} spins and spins until {he}'s dizzy. {He} feels a lot more nimble!"
- `EVENT_TINK_REW4`: "[i]"Listen, gurl. If you wanna spin like a queen… <br/>  <br/> You gotta become a queen! Lemme show you how it's done!"[/i]"

```
Tink1 {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_TINK_NAME"
        cat_choice random //choose, random, none (random and none are equivalent)
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame tink
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_TINK_QUES"

        options {
            tappytoes {
                label "EVENT_TAPPYTOES_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_misc

                good {
                    set_frame 2

                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_TINK_REW1"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                SpeedUp 2
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_TINK_REW2"
                            permanent_stats {
                                spd 2
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            pirouette {
                label "EVENT_PIROUETTE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_misc

                good {
                    set_frame 2

                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_TINK_REW3"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                DexterityUp 2
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_TINK_REW4"
                            permanent_stats {
                                dex 2
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

### `Tink2`
**Source:** `npc_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_TINK_NAME`: "Tink"
- `EVENT_TINK2_QUES`: "[i]"Which is better?"[/i]"
- `EVENT_MAKEUP_ANSW`: "Makeup"
- `EVENT_TINK2_REW1`: "[i]"Well, yeah. No crap! Makeup IS better than an old book… <br/>  <br/> Here's some lip gloss."[/i]"
- `EVENT_TINK2_REW2`: "[i]"And you know what's even better than makeup? Lip injections! <br/>  <br/> Here, hold still…"[/i]"
- `EVENT_SOMEOLDBOOK_ANSW`: "Some Old Book"
- `EVENT_TINK2_REW3`: "[i]"Well, then go read you uggo library lady!"[/i]"
- `EVENT_TINK2_REW4`: "[i]"Well, I sure hope it's a book about how to fix that jacked up mug of yours, sister…"[/i]"

```
Tink2 {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_TINK_NAME"
        cat_choice random //choose, random, none (random and none are equivalent)
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame tink
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_TINK2_QUES"

        options {
            makeup {
                label "EVENT_MAKEUP_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_misc

                good {
                    set_frame 2

                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_TINK2_REW1"
                            permanent_stats {
                                cha 1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_TINK2_REW2"
                            permanent_stats {
                                cha 2
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            book {
                label "EVENT_SOMEOLDBOOK_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_misc

                good {
                    set_frame 3

                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_TINK2_REW3"
                            permanent_stats {
                                int 1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_TINK2_REW4"
                            permanent_stats {
                                int 2
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

### `Tracy1`
**Source:** `npc_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_TRACY_NAME`: "Tracy"
- `EVENT_TRACY_QUES`: "[i]"Yeah, I got some stuff. How much are you willing to donate? <br/>  <br/> It's for a good cause…"[/i]"
- `EVENT_BUY_ANSW`: "Buy"
- `EVENT_TRACY_REW1`: "[i]"Uh, here. Take this... You deserve it!"[/i]"
- `EVENT_TRACY_REW2`: "{catname} gets a random stat down… Temporarily."
- `EVENT_TRACY_REW3`: "[i]"Thank you for your donation."[/i]"
- `EVENT_TRACY_REW3B`: "[i]"Here, have some food."[/i]"
- `EVENT_TRACY_REW4`: "{catname} gets a random stat up… Temporarily."
- `EVENT_TRACY_REW5`: "[i]"Here. Have a pet squirrel."[/i]"
- `EVENT_TRACY_REW6`: "[i]"Here. Have a pet snake."[/i]"
- `EVENT_TRACY_REW7`: "[i]"Here. Have a pet frog."[/i]"
- `EVENT_TRACY_REW8`: "[i]"Here. Have a pet turtle."[/i]"
- `EVENT_TRACY_REW9`: "[i]"Thank you for the donation… Here."[/i]"
- `EVENT_TRACY_REW10`: "[i]"You don't have enough money… Maybe try not being so greedy next time. <br/>  <br/> You know there are HUNDREDS of dying animals who need this cash a lot more than you, right? <br/>  <br/> Shame!"[/i]"
- `EVENT_TRACY_REW11`: "[i]"Thank you for your donation… Here."[/i]"
- `EVENT_TRACY_REW12`: "[i]"I guess you can take this…"[/i]"
- `EVENT_TRACY_REW13`: "[i]"Uh, here…"[/i]"
- `EVENT_TRACY_REW14`: "[i]"You don't have enough money… Maybe try not being so greedy next time. <br/>  <br/> You know there are HUNDREDS of dying animals who need this cash a lot more than you, right? <br/>  <br/> Shame!"[/i]"
- `EVENT_TRACY_REW15`: "[i]"Uh… Here. Have these!"[/i]"
- `EVENT_TRACY_REW16`: "[i]"Uh… Here. Have these."[/i]"
- `EVENT_TRACY_REW17`: "[i]"Uh, here…"[/i]"
- `EVENT_TRACY_REW18`: "[i]"I guess you can have these…"[/i]"
- `EVENT_TRACY_REW19`: "[i]"Thank you for the donation… Here."[/i]"
- `EVENT_TRACY_REW20`: "[i]"You don't have enough money… Maybe try not being so greedy next time. <br/>  <br/> You know there are HUNDREDS of dying animals who need this cash a lot more than you, right? <br/>  <br/> Shame!"[/i]"
- `EVENT_LEAVE_ANSW`: "Leave"
- `EVENT_TRACY_REW21`: "[i]"Thanks for wasting my time…"[/i]"

```
Tracy1 {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_TRACY_NAME"
        cat_choice random //choose, random, none (random and none are equivalent)
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame tracy
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_TRACY_QUES"

        options {
            buy1 {
                label "EVENT_BUY_ANSW"
                stat coins
                animation_fail choice_no_coins
                animation choice_coins_one
                stat_min 1
                stat_max 1

                good {
                    set_frame 2

                    random_pool_consider_luck [ //sort worst to best for luck
                        { //cursed item
                            prompt "EVENT_TRACY_REW1"
                            weight 1
                            get_parasite_from_pool cursed_items 
                            play_animation resultBad
                        }
                        { //temp random stat down
                            prompt "EVENT_TRACY_REW2"
                            weight 1
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                RandomStatUp -1
                            }
                            play_animation resultBad
                        }
                        { //nothing
                            prompt "EVENT_TRACY_REW3"
                            weight 1
                            play_animation resultConfused
                        }
                        { //food
                            prompt "EVENT_TRACY_REW3B"
                            weight 1
                            gain_food [1 2]
                        }
                        { //temp random stat up
                            prompt "EVENT_TRACY_REW4"
                            weight 1
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                RandomStatUp 1
                            }
                        }
                        { //temp druid familiar
                            prompt "EVENT_TRACY_REW5"
                            weight .5
                            gain_familiar Squirrel
                        }
                        { //temp druid familiar
                            prompt "EVENT_TRACY_REW6"
                            weight .5
                            gain_familiar Snake
                        }
                        { //temp druid familiar
                            prompt "EVENT_TRACY_REW7"
                            weight .5
                            gain_familiar Toad
                        }
                        { //temp druid familiar
                            prompt "EVENT_TRACY_REW8"
                            weight .5
                            gain_familiar Turtle
                        }
                        { //random consumable
                            prompt "EVENT_TRACY_REW9"
                            weight 1
                            get_item_from_pool consumables 
                        }
                        
                    ]
                }

                bad {
                    set_frame 2
                    //play_animation NotEnoughMoney
                    prompt "EVENT_TRACY_REW10"
                }
            }

            buy2 {
                label "EVENT_BUY_ANSW"
                stat coins
                animation_fail choice_no_coins
                animation choice_coins_ten

                stat_min 10
                stat_max 10

                good {
                    set_frame 2

                    random_pool_consider_luck [ //sort worst to best for luck
                        { //random consumable
                            prompt "EVENT_TRACY_REW11"
                            weight 1
                            get_item_from_pool consumables 
                        }
                        { 
                            prompt "EVENT_TRACY_REW12"
                            weight 1
                            get_item_from_pool chapter 
                        }
                        { 
                            prompt "EVENT_TRACY_REW13"
                            weight 1
                            permanent_stats {
                                random 1
                            }
                        }
                        
                    ]
                }

                bad {
                    set_frame 2
                    //play_animation NotEnoughMoney
                    prompt "EVENT_TRACY_REW14"
                }
            }

            buy3 {
                label "EVENT_BUY_ANSW"
                stat coins
                animation_fail choice_no_coins
                animation choice_coins_twentyfive
                stat_min 25
                stat_max 25

                good {
                    set_frame 2

                    random_pool_consider_luck [ //sort worst to best for luck
                        { 
                            prompt "EVENT_TRACY_REW15"
                            weight 1
                            get_item RoidRage
                            get_item SpeedBall
                            get_item BrainCandy
                            get_item DiscoBiscuit
                            get_item Clover
                            get_item Upper
                            get_item Percs
                        }
                        { 
                            prompt "EVENT_TRACY_REW16"
                            weight 1
                            get_item_from_pool chapter 
                            get_item_from_pool chapter 
                        }
                        { 
                            prompt "EVENT_TRACY_REW17"
                            weight 1
                            get_item_from_pool chapter_rare 
                        }
                        { 
                            prompt "EVENT_TRACY_REW18"
                            weight 1
                            get_full_item_set_from_pool common
                        }
                        { 
                            prompt "EVENT_TRACY_REW19"
                            weight 1
                            level_up self
                        }
                    ]
                }

                bad {
                    set_frame 2
                    //play_animation NotEnoughMoney
                    prompt "EVENT_TRACY_REW20"
                }
            }

            leave {
                label "EVENT_LEAVE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    prompt "EVENT_TRACY_REW21"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

### `OrganGrinder1`
**Source:** `npc_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_ORGANGRINDER_NAME`: "Organ Grinder"
- `EVENT_ORGANGRINDER_QUES`: "[i]"I got itchies and wheezies here for you!"[/i]"
- `EVENT_ITCHIES_ANSW`: "Itchies"
- `EVENT_ORGANGRINDER_REW1`: "[i]"Itchies it is!"[/i]"
- `EVENT_WHEEZIES_ANSW`: "Wheezies"
- `EVENT_ORGANGRINDER_REW2`: "[i]"Wheezies it is!"[/i]"
- `EVENT_NOTHANKS_ANSW`: "No thanks"
- `EVENT_ORGANGRINDER_REW3`: "[i]"YOU WILL REGRET THAT!!!!"[/i]"

```
OrganGrinder1 {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_ORGANGRINDER_NAME"
        cat_choice random //choose, random, none (random and none are equivalent)
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame organgrinder
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_ORGANGRINDER_QUES"

        options {
            itchies {
                label "EVENT_ITCHIES_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_misc

                bad {
                    set_frame 2

                    prompt "EVENT_ORGANGRINDER_REW1"
                    get_parasite_from_pool parasites
					gain_immortal_familiar CharmedFlea
                }
            }

            wheezies {
                label "EVENT_WHEEZIES_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_misc

                bad {
                    set_frame 2

                    prompt "EVENT_ORGANGRINDER_REW2"
                    gain_disorder_from_pool diseases
					permanent_stats {
						lck 2
					}
                }
            }

            nothanks {
                label "EVENT_NOTHANKS_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave

                good {
                    set_frame 3
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]

                    prompt "EVENT_ORGANGRINDER_REW3"

                    next_event_from_set {
                        event Tragedy
                        count 1
                        same_cat true
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

### `Jack`
**Source:** `npc_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_JACK_NAME`: "Jack"
- `EVENT_JACK_QUES`: "[i]"Spare some change to help my nona?"[/i]"
- `EVENT_DONATE_ANSW`: "Donate"
- `EVENT_JACK_REW1`: "[i]"Sorry my Nona doesn't like you yet."[/i]"
- `EVENT_JACK_REW2`: "[i]"Hey, Nona says you are pretty cool. Here take this!"[/i]"
- `EVENT_JACK_REW3`: "[i]"Wow, Nona really likes you a lot! Here take this!"[/i]"
- `EVENT_JACK_REW4`: "[i]"What the heck! Nona says you are rich! Take this!"[/i]"
- `EVENT_JACK_NOTENOUGHMONEY`: "[i]"You don't even have enough for that! <br/>  <br/> Nona says it's mean to get my hopes up."[/i]"
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"
- `EVENT_JACK_LEAVE`: "[i]"See you next time I guess. <br/>  <br/> I hope Nona will be okay."[/i]"

```
Jack {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_JACK_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame jack
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_JACK_QUES"

        options {
            donate_5 {
                label "EVENT_DONATE_ANSW"
                stat coins
                animation_fail choice_no_coins
                animation choice_coins_one
                stat_min 5
                stat_max 5
                requirements {
                    counter_maximum [WorldEventLegacyCounter_Jack 99]
                }

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    increment_legacy_counter WorldEventLegacyCounter_Jack
                    increment_legacy_counter WorldEventLegacyCounter_Jack
                    increment_legacy_counter WorldEventLegacyCounter_Jack
                    increment_legacy_counter WorldEventLegacyCounter_Jack
                    increment_legacy_counter WorldEventLegacyCounter_Jack
                    conditional_reward {
                        requirements {
                            counter_minimum [WorldEventLegacyCounter_Jack 1]
                            counter_maximum [WorldEventLegacyCounter_Jack 24]
                        }

                        reward {
                            prompt "EVENT_JACK_REW1"
                            play_animation resultBad
                        }
                    }
                    
                    conditional_reward {
                        requirements {
                            counter_minimum [WorldEventLegacyCounter_Jack 25]
                            counter_maximum [WorldEventLegacyCounter_Jack 49]
                        }

                        reward {
                            prompt "EVENT_JACK_REW2"
                            get_item_from_pool chapter_rare
                        }
                    }

                    conditional_reward {
                        requirements {
                            counter_minimum [WorldEventLegacyCounter_Jack 50]
                            counter_maximum [WorldEventLegacyCounter_Jack 99]
                        }

                        reward {
                            prompt "EVENT_JACK_REW3"
                            random_pool [
                                {
                                    get_item_from_pool uncommon
                                    get_item_from_pool uncommon
                                }{
                                    get_item_from_pool uncommon
                                    get_item_from_pool rare
                                }{
                                    get_item_from_pool rare
                                    get_item_from_pool rare
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                    }

                    conditional_reward {
                        requirements {
                            counter_minimum [WorldEventLegacyCounter_Jack 100]
                        }

                        reward {
                            prompt "EVENT_JACK_REW4"
                            random_pool [
                                {
                                    get_item_from_pool rare
                                    get_item_from_pool rare
                                }{
                                    get_item_from_pool very_rare
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    prompt "EVENT_JACK_NOTENOUGHMONEY"
                }
            }

            donate_10 {
                label "EVENT_DONATE_ANSW"
                stat coins
                animation_fail choice_no_coins
                animation choice_coins_ten
                stat_min 10
                stat_max 10
                requirements {
                    counter_maximum [WorldEventLegacyCounter_Jack 99]
                }

                good {
                    set_frame 3
                    increment_legacy_counter WorldEventLegacyCounter_Jack
                    increment_legacy_counter WorldEventLegacyCounter_Jack
                    increment_legacy_counter WorldEventLegacyCounter_Jack
                    increment_legacy_counter WorldEventLegacyCounter_Jack
                    increment_legacy_counter WorldEventLegacyCounter_Jack
                    
                    increment_legacy_counter WorldEventLegacyCounter_Jack

                    increment_legacy_counter WorldEventLegacyCounter_Jack
                    increment_legacy_counter WorldEventLegacyCounter_Jack
                    increment_legacy_counter WorldEventLegacyCounter_Jack
                    conditional_reward {
                        requirements {
                            counter_minimum [WorldEventLegacyCounter_Jack 1]
                            counter_maximum [WorldEventLegacyCounter_Jack 24]
                        }

                        reward {
                            prompt "EVENT_JACK_REW1"
                            play_animation resultBad
                        }
                    }
                    
                    conditional_reward {
                        requirements {
                            counter_minimum [WorldEventLegacyCounter_Jack 25]
                            counter_maximum [WorldEventLegacyCounter_Jack 49]
                        }

                        reward {
                            prompt "EVENT_JACK_REW2"
                            get_item_from_pool chapter_rare
                        }
                    }

                    conditional_reward {
                        requirements {
                            counter_minimum [WorldEventLegacyCounter_Jack 50]
                            counter_maximum [WorldEventLegacyCounter_Jack 99]
                        }

                        reward {
                            prompt "EVENT_JACK_REW3"
                            random_pool [
                                {
                                    get_item_from_pool uncommon

                                }{

                            random_pool [
                                {
                                    get_item_from_pool rare
                                    get_item_from_pool rare
                                }{
                                    get_item_from_pool very_rare
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {

### `StevenFetus`
**Source:** `npc_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_STEVENFETUS_NAME`: "Steven Fetus"
- `EVENT_STEVENFETUS_QUES`: "A small fetus floats before {catname} with an inquisitive look on its face. <br/>  <br/> Its inky black figure feels familiar somehow, but {catname} can't remember why."
- `EVENT_STEVENFETUS_QUES2`: "A small fetus floats before {catname} with an inquisitive look on its face. <br/>  <br/> [i]"Wait, wasn't I just here?"[/i] {catname} looks around, bewildered."
- `EVENT_STEVENFETUS_QUES3`: "A small fetus floats before {catname} with an inquisitive look on its face. <br/>  <br/> [i]"What the hell is going on!?"[/i] {catname} screams. <br/>  <br/> {He} looks at the other cats for help but they seem unconcerned."
- `EVENT_STEVENFETUS_QUES4`: "{catname} feels a relentless pull in the back of {his} mind like an itch that must be scratched. <br/>  <br/> {He} must... not... flee..."
- `EVENT_INVESTIGATE_ANSW`: "Investigate"
- `EVENT_STEVENFETUS_REW1`: "{catname} approaches the fetus inquisitively... <br/>  <br/> It pulls off a part of itself and attaches it onto {catname}'s skin!"
- `EVENT_STEVENFETUS_REW2`: "{catname} attempts to communicate with the strange hovering fetus. <br/>  <br/> It smirks and pulls out an even smaller fetus and throws it at {catname}!"
- `EVENT_STEVENFETUS_REW3`: "The fetus starts screaming at {catname}, going on incoherently about something that makes no sense to {him}."
- `EVENT_STEVENFETUS_REW4`: "The strange fetus starts rambling on angrily about something incoherent to {catname}. <br/>  <br/> This whole experience feels oddly familiar like a bad dream {he} keeps having over and over..."
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"
- `EVENT_STEVENFETUS_REW5`: "Something about the strange fetus feels offputting to {catname} so {he} leaves it alone."
- `EVENT_STEVENFETUS_REW6`: "{catname} panics and runs away!"

```
StevenFetus {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_STEVENFETUS_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame steven_fetus
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_STEVENFETUS_QUES"
        setup {
            conditional_reward {
                requirements {
                    has_token AdventureToken_StevenTryAgain
                    not_has_token AdventureToken_StevenTryAgain2
                }
                reward {
                    prompt "EVENT_STEVENFETUS_QUES2"
                }
            }
            conditional_reward {
                requirements {
                    has_token AdventureToken_StevenTryAgain2
                    not_has_token AdventureToken_StevenTryAgain3

                }
                reward {
                    prompt "EVENT_STEVENFETUS_QUES3"
                }
            }
            conditional_reward {
                requirements {
                    has_token AdventureToken_StevenTryAgain3
                }
                reward {
                    prompt "EVENT_STEVENFETUS_QUES4"
                }
            }
        }

        options {
            investigate {
                label "EVENT_INVESTIGATE_ANSW"
                stat int

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_STEVENFETUS_REW1"
                            random_mutation {
                                count 1
                                asymmetric false
                                tag extra
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_STEVENFETUS_REW2"
                            learn_passive MiniMe
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 4
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_STEVENFETUS_REW3"
                            gain_disorder_from_pool Steven_disorders 
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_STEVENFETUS_REW4"
                            gain_disorder_from_pool Steven_disorders 
                            random_mutation {
                                count 2
                                tag extra
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            ignore {
                label "EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave

                requirements {
                    not_has_token AdventureToken_StevenTryAgain3
                }

                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_STEVENFETUS_REW5"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
                bad {
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                    
                    conditional_reward {
                        requirements {
                            has_token AdventureToken_StevenTryAgain
                            has_token AdventureToken_StevenTryAgain2
                        }
                        reward {
                            prompt "EVENT_STEVENFETUS_REW6"
                            set_adventure_token AdventureToken_StevenTryAgain3
                            next_event_bonus -1
                            gain_disorder_from_pool Steven_disorders 
                        }
                    }

                    conditional_reward {
                        requirements {
                            has_token AdventureToken_StevenTryAgain
                            not_has_token AdventureToken_StevenTryAgain2
                        }
                        reward {
                            prompt "EVENT_STEVENFETUS_REW5"
                            set_adventure_token AdventureToken_StevenTryAgain2
                            next_event_bonus -2
                        }
                    }

                    conditional_reward {
                        requirements {
                            not_has_token AdventureToken_StevenTryAgain
                            not_has_token AdventureToken_StevenTryAgain2
                        }
                        reward {
                            prompt "EVENT_STEVENFETUS_REW5"
                            set_adventure_token AdventureToken_StevenTryAgain
                            next_event_bonus -1
                        }
                    }

                    event_now_same_cat StevenFetus
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `DarkDen`
**Source:** `npc_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_DARKDEN_NAME`: "Dark Den"
- `EVENT_DARKDEN_QUES`: "{catname} finds a dark cave in the ground. <br/>  <br/> {He} can smell the musky odor of a large animal, perhaps resting within the den."
- `EVENT_INVESTIGATE_ANSW`: "Investigate"
- `EVENT_DARKDEN_REW1`: "{catname} enters the den and finds a sleepy bear and befriends it!"
- `EVENT_DARKDEN_REW2`: "{catname} finds a strange glowing bear within the den. It saunters out and greets {him} with a very warm and furry hug. <br/>  <br/> {catname} feels {his} body shift as it takes on a bear-like appearance!"
- `EVENT_DARKDEN_REW3`: "A large angry bear comes charging out as {catname} approaches the den!"
- `EVENT_DARKDEN_REW4`: "{catname} enters the dimly lit den and pokes around... <br/>  <br/> The party hears a terrifying roar and {catname} sprints out of the cave, terrified, with a massive glowing bear in hot pursuit!"
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"
- `EVENT_DARKDEN_REW5`: "{catname} stays clear of the ominous den. <br/>  <br/> Best to not awaken whatever is sleeping inside!"

```
DarkDen {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_DARKDEN_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame dark_den
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_DARKDEN_QUES"

        options {
            investigate {
                label "EVENT_INVESTIGATE_ANSW"
                stat int

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 2
                            prompt "EVENT_DARKDEN_REW1"
                            gain_familiar CharmedBear
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 3
                            prompt "EVENT_DARKDEN_REW2"
							mutation {
                                legs 322
							}
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 4
                            prompt "EVENT_DARKDEN_REW3"
                            spawn_unit_next_fight {
                                object MaddenedBear
                                count 1
                                spawn_side anywhere
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 5
                            prompt "EVENT_DARKDEN_REW4" 
                            battle "events/GlowingBear"
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            ignore {
                label "EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave
                
                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_DARKDEN_REW5"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `WhiteRabbit`
**Source:** `npc_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_WHITERABBIT_NAME`: "White Rabbit"
- `EVENT_WHITERABBIT_QUES`: "{catname} finds a curious looking white rabbit. <br/>  <br/> It stares at {him} with bright red eyes..."
- `EVENT_CHARM_ANSW`: "Charm"
- `EVENT_WHITERABBIT_REW1`: "{catname} licks the rabbit on the ear and rubs its belly. <br/>  <br/> The rabbit, perhaps confused at the odd gesture, barfs up a pile of bones. <br/>  <br/> {catname} didn't think rabbits were carnivores but apparently this one is?"
- `EVENT_WHITERABBIT_REW2`: "The rabbit looks angrily at {catname} as {he} approaches, but warms up to {him} after a lot of kisses. <br/>  <br/> The rabbit seems a bit temperamental, but it tags along as a friend regardless!"
- `EVENT_WHITERABBIT_REW3`: "{catname} tries to tame the wild rabbit but it viciously bites {him}!"
- `EVENT_WHITERABBIT_REW4`: "{catname} tries to befriend the rabbit, but it becomes enraged! <br/>  <br/> The white rabbit begins foaming at the mouth and charges the party at blinding speed!"
- `EVENT_FOLLOW_ANSW`: "Follow"
- `EVENT_WHITERABBIT_REW5`: "The rabbit leads {catname} to a secret stash of coins!"
- `EVENT_WHITERABBIT_REW6`: "{catname} follows the white rabbit down into a hole where it leads {him} to a secret treasure stash!"
- `EVENT_WHITERABBIT_REW7`: "{catname} follows the rabbit down into a burrow where it suddenly tears into {him} with its teeth!"
- `EVENT_WHITERABBIT_REW8`: "Following the white rabbit down into its den, {catname} suddenly finds {himself} surrounded by corpses of numerous cats... <br/>  <br/> Realizing {his} mistake, {catname} turns to leave but it is too late!"
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"
- `EVENT_WHITERABBIT_REW9`: "There's a suspicious look in the rabbit's eyes and {catname} isn't having any of it."

```
WhiteRabbit {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_WHITERABBIT_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame white_rabbit
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_WHITERABBIT_QUES"

        options {
            charm {
                label "EVENT_CHARM_ANSW"
                stat cha

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 2
                            prompt "EVENT_WHITERABBIT_REW1"
                            get_item_from_pool bone_equipment
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 3
                            prompt "EVENT_WHITERABBIT_REW2"
                            gain_familiar CharmedWhiteRabbit
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 6
                            prompt "EVENT_WHITERABBIT_REW3"
                            injury random
                            damage [5 8]
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 7
                            prompt "EVENT_WHITERABBIT_REW4" 
                            battle "events/WhiteRabbit.lvl"
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            follow {
                label "EVENT_FOLLOW_ANSW"
                stat spd

                good {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 4
                            prompt "EVENT_WHITERABBIT_REW5"
                            gain_coins [5 10]
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 5
                            prompt "EVENT_WHITERABBIT_REW6"
                            gain_coins [10 20]
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 6
                            prompt "EVENT_WHITERABBIT_REW7"
                            injury random
                            damage [5 8]
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 7
                            prompt "EVENT_WHITERABBIT_REW8" 
                            battle "events/WhiteRabbit.lvl"
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            ignore {
                label "EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave
                
                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_WHITERABBIT_REW9"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `MysteriousMachine`
**Source:** `npc_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSMACHINE_NAME`: "Mysterious Machine"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSMACHINE_QUES`: "{catname} finds a mysterious machine with paper sticking out of it."
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSMACHINE_TURNITON_ANSW`: "Turn it on"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSMACHINE_REW1`: "{catname} tries to get the machine working by hitting it but nothing happens. <br/>  <br/> {catname} tries again but with significantly more fervor and obliterates it."
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSMACHINE_REW2`: "{catname} finds a switch at the back and turns it on. <br/>  <br/> It makes a series of loud beeps and mechanical sounds..."
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSMACHINE_REW3`: "{catname} tries pushing the buttons and sticks {his} claws into various holes... <br/>  <br/> {catname} howls in fright as electricity arcs from the machine and stuns {him}!"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSMACHINE_REW4`: "{catname} pushes various buttons and gives the machine a good whack. <br/>  <br/> It purrs to life with loud angry sounding beeps!"
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSMACHINE_REW5`: "{catname} opts to leave the weird machine alone. <br/>  <br/> {He}'s not sure what the machine does, but paper doesn't sound very useful."

```
MysteriousMachine {
    requirements {
        //Several of the unique rewards from the crit events only make sense with 2+ cats.
        minimum_party_size 2
        not_on_quest 1 //the copy cat / clone item results are quite bad to get if you're on an item quest
    }

    intro {
        title "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSMACHINE_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame mysterious_machine
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSMACHINE_QUES"

        options {
            turnon {
                label "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSMACHINE_TURNITON_ANSW"
                stat int
                

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSMACHINE_REW1"
                            set_frame 2
                            get_item Technology
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSMACHINE_REW2"
                            set_frame 4
                            event_now MysteriousMachine_Good
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSMACHINE_REW3"
                            set_frame 3
                            damage 1
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Stun 1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSMACHINE_REW4" 
                            set_frame 4
                            event_now MysteriousMachine_Bad
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            ignore {
                label "EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave
                
                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSMACHINE_REW5"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `BodyOfGlorg`
**Source:** `npc_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_BODYOFGLORG_NAME`: "Body of Glorg"
- `EVENT_BODYOFGLORG_QUES`: "{catname} sees before {him} a writhing mass of parasites in the form of a headless body..."
- `EVENT_BODYOFGLORG_PARASITE_ANSW`: "Give parasite"
- `EVENT_BODYOFGLORG_REW1`: "The writhing mass tears a parasite off {catname} and absorbs it into itself... <br/>  <br/> Glorg is pleased!"
- `EVENT_BODYOFGLORG_REW2`: "The writhing mass tears a parasite off {catname} and absorbs it into itself... <br/>  <br/> Nothing else seems to happen."
- `EVENT_FIGHT_ANSW`: "Fight"
- `EVENT_BODYOFGLORG_REW3`: "{catname} strikes the mass of parasites and saves two maggots that were trapped inside!"
- `EVENT_BODYOFGLORG_REW4`: "{catname} attacks the writhing mass, scattering parasites onto the floor around {him}..."
- `EVENT_BODYOFGLORG_REW5`: "{catname} strikes the strange body. <br/>  <br/> When {he} does so, a parasite from within the mass latches onto {him}!"
- `EVENT_BODYOFGLORG_REW6`: "{catname} dives at the writhing mass, attacking with {his} paws and teeth... <br/>  <br/> {He} sinks into the amorphous body, becoming covered in parasites!"
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"
- `EVENT_BODYOFGLORG_REW7`: "{catname} steers clear of the strange amorphous creature."

```
BodyOfGlorg {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_BODYOFGLORG_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame body_of_glorg
        choose_cat_with_parasite true
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }
       
    main {
        prompt "EVENT_BODYOFGLORG_QUES"

        options {
            give_parasite {
                label "EVENT_BODYOFGLORG_PARASITE_ANSW"
                requirements {
                    cat_has_parasite true
                }

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    prompt "EVENT_BODYOFGLORG_REW1"
                    lose_item parasite
                    event_now_same_cat BodyOfGlorg_Gift
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    prompt "EVENT_BODYOFGLORG_REW2"
                    lose_item parasite
                }
            }

            fight {
                label "EVENT_FIGHT_ANSW"
                stat str

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_BODYOFGLORG_REW3"
                            gain_familiar CharmedMaggot
                            gain_familiar CharmedMaggot
                            gain_familiar CharmedMaggot
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_BODYOFGLORG_REW4"
                            learn_passive Host
                            get_parasite_from_pool parasites
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_BODYOFGLORG_REW5"
                            get_parasite_from_pool parasites
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_BODYOFGLORG_REW6" 
                            get_parasite_from_pool parasites
                            get_parasite_from_pool parasites
                            get_parasite_from_pool parasites
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            ignore {
                label "EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave
                
                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_BODYOFGLORG_REW7"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

## File: `quest_events.gon`

### `Quest_ThrobbingArtery`
**Source:** `quest_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `QEVENT_THROBBINGARTERY_NAME`: "Throbbing Artery"
- `QEVENT_THROBBINGARTERY_QUES1`: "A large mound of thick earthy flesh and throbbing arteries protrudes from the ground."
- `QEVENT_THROBBINGARTERY_QUES2`: "A large lattice of throbbing arteries protrudes from the ground. Where there was once thick flesh binding the veins together, now only shriveled husks remain."
- `QEVENT_THROBBINGARTERY_BITE_ANSW`: "Bite Artery"
- `QEVENT_THROBBINGARTERY_REW1`: "{catname} bites into the artery and a dark red liquid gushes out. The cats excitedly lap up the warm blood and they feel the stresses of their long journey wash away..."
- `QEVENT_THROBBINGARTERY_REW2`: "{catname} bites into the throbbing artery and is bathed in a warm liquid. {His} body twists as a strange sensation washes over {catname}, healing {his} injuries but leaving {him} forever mutilated..."
- `QEVENT_THROBBINGARTERY_REW3`: "{catname} tears into the tough flesh of the artery, and an inky black fluid sprays out onto {him}! {He} tries to jump back but the thick fluid splashes onto {catname}, deforming {him}!"
- `QEVENT_THROBBINGARTERY_ATTACH_ANSW`: "Attach Leech"
- `QEVENT_THROBBINGARTERY_REW5`: "{Catname} places {his} head near the throbbing artery. The putrid leech detaches from {his} head and latches onto the artery. The arteries and veins shrivel up, revealing a hole in the ground!"
- `QEVENT_THROBBINGARTERY_REW6`: "{Catname} places {his} head near the throbbing artery. The putrid leech detaches from {his} head and latches onto the artery. The arteries and veins shrivel up, revealing the fleshy earth beneath. It seems impenetrable."
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"
- `QEVENT_THROBBINGARTERY_REW_IGNORE`: "{Catname} ignores the strange veiny mound."

```
Quest_ThrobbingArtery { //boneyard
    intro {
        title QEVENT_THROBBINGARTERY_NAME
        cat_choice random
        choose_cat_with_item PutridLeech
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame throbbing_artery
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt QEVENT_THROBBINGARTERY_QUES1
        setup { //alt prompt if the flesh has been removed
            conditional_reward {
                requirements {
                    has_token MeatWorldQuest_Gristle
                }

                reward {
                    prompt QEVENT_THROBBINGARTERY_QUES2
                    set_subject throbbing_artery_noflesh
                }
            }
        }

        options {
            bite {
                label QEVENT_THROBBINGARTERY_BITE_ANSW
                stat con
                animation choice_con

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt QEVENT_THROBBINGARTERY_REW1
                            set_frame 2
                            party_heal_disorder 2
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt QEVENT_THROBBINGARTERY_REW2
                            set_frame 3
                            party_heal 100%
                            party_random_mutation 1
                            party_heal_injury 99
                            party_heal_disorder 2
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt QEVENT_THROBBINGARTERY_REW3
                            set_frame 4
                            random_mutation {
                                tag birth_defect
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt QEVENT_THROBBINGARTERY_REW3
                            set_frame 5                            
                            random_mutation {
                                count 2
                                tag birth_defect
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            attach_leech {
                label QEVENT_THROBBINGARTERY_ATTACH_ANSW
                stat quest
                animation choice_misc

                requirements {
                    cat_has_item_equipped PutridLeech
                }

                good {
                    set_legacy_token MeatWorldQuest_Leech
                    set_legacy_token mapflag_ThrobbingArteryDone
                    complete_item_quest PutridLeech
                    lose_specific_item PutridLeech 
                    set_frame 6

                    conditional_reward {
                        requirements {
                            has_token MeatWorldQuest_Gristle
                        }

                        reward { //the other half of the quest (gristle) was previously completed, this completes the meat world quest and unlocks meat world
                            prompt QEVENT_THROBBINGARTERY_REW5
                            trigger_adventure_unlock meat_world_unlock
                        } else {
                            prompt QEVENT_THROBBINGARTERY_REW6
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            ignore {
                label EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW
                stat none
                animation choice_leave

                good {
                    prompt QEVENT_THROBBINGARTERY_REW_IGNORE
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `Quest_ThrobbingArtery2`
**Source:** `quest_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `QEVENT_THROBBINGARTERY_NAME2`: "Throbbing Artery 2"
- `QEVENT_THROBBINGARTERY2_QUES`: "A large mound of earthy flesh covered in veins protrudes from the ground. A leech is sucking on the arteries, which are shriveled and weakly pulsating."
- `QEVENT_THROBBINGARTERY_BITE_ANSW`: "Bite Artery"
- `QEVENT_THROBBINGARTERY_REW1`: "{catname} bites into the artery and a dark red liquid gushes out. The cats excitedly lap up the warm blood and they feel the stresses of their long journey wash away..."
- `QEVENT_THROBBINGARTERY_REW2`: "{catname} bites into the throbbing artery and is bathed in a warm liquid. {His} body twists as a strange sensation washes over {catname}, healing {his} injuries but leaving {him} forever mutilated..."
- `QEVENT_THROBBINGARTERY_REW3`: "{catname} tears into the tough flesh of the artery, and an inky black fluid sprays out onto {him}! {He} tries to jump back but the thick fluid splashes onto {catname}, deforming {him}!"
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"

```
Quest_ThrobbingArtery2 { //boneyard
    intro {
        title QEVENT_THROBBINGARTERY_NAME2
        cat_choice random
        choose_cat_with_item PutridLeech

                        common {
                            prompt QEVENT_THROBBINGARTERY_REW1
                            set_frame 2
                            party_heal_disorder 2
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt QEVENT_THROBBINGARTERY_REW2
                            set_frame 3
                            party_heal 100%
                            party_random_mutation 1
                            party_heal_injury 99
                            party_heal_disorder 2

                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt QEVENT_THROBBINGARTERY_REW3
                            set_frame 4
                            random_mutation {
                                tag birth_defect
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt QEVENT_THROBBINGARTERY_REW3
                            set_frame 5                            
                            random_mutation {
                                count 2
                                tag birth_defect
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            ignore {
                label EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW
                stat none
                animation choice_leave

                good {
                    prompt QEVENT_THROBBINGARTERY2_REW_IGNORE
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

### `Quest_WallOfFlesh`
**Source:** `quest_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `QEVENT_WALLOFFLESH_NAME`: "Wall Of Flesh"
- `QEVENT_WALLOFFLESH_QUES1`: "A giant wall of flesh and pulsating veins blocks the way before {catname}. <br/>  <br/> {He} notices there is a strange cube shaped indent in the wall."
- `QEVENT_WALLOFFLESH_QUES2`: "A giant wall of flesh blocks the way before {catname}. Where once there might have been large throbbing veins, they now appear to be shriveled up. <br/>  <br/> {He} notices there is a strange cube shaped indent in the wall."
- `QEVENT_WALLOFFLESH_BITE_ANSW`: "Bite Flesh"
- `QEVENT_WALLOFFLESH_REW1`: "{catname} tears off a hunk of soft flesh...  <br/>  <br/> It tastes great!"
- `QEVENT_WALLOFFLESH_REW2`: "{catname} tears into the soft flesh of the wall, devouring it. It tastes delicious but {catname} feels a strange twisting sensation as {his} body deforms..."
- `QEVENT_WALLOFFLESH_REW3`: "{catname} tries to bite into the fleshy wall, but it tastes gross!"
- `QEVENT_WALLOFFLESH_REW4`: "{catname} tries to wrestle a hunk of flesh off the wall with {his} teeth, but instead one of {his} items gets pried off by the thick veins!"
- `QEVENT_WALLOFFLESH_PLACE_ANSW`: "Place Gristle"
- `QEVENT_WALLOFFLESH_REW5`: "{Catname} places the throbbing gristle into the cube shaped hole. The flesh shrivels and retracts, and the shriveled veins crumble away, revealing a path through the wall!"
- `QEVENT_WALLOFFLESH_REW6`: "{Catname} places the throbbing gristle into the cube shaped hole. The flesh shrivels and retracts, but the veins remain, seemingly impenetrable."
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"
- `QEVENT_WALLOFFLESH_REW_IGNORE`: "{Catname} ignores the wall of flesh."

```
Quest_WallOfFlesh { //caves
    intro {
        title QEVENT_WALLOFFLESH_NAME
        cat_choice random
        choose_cat_with_item ThrobbingGristle
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame wall_of_flesh
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt QEVENT_WALLOFFLESH_QUES1

        setup { //alt prompt if the veins have been drained
            conditional_reward {
                requirements {
                    has_token MeatWorldQuest_Leech
                }

                reward {
                    prompt QEVENT_WALLOFFLESH_QUES2
                    set_subject wall_of_flesh_noartery
                }
            }
        }
        
        //TODO: Add alt info result text if you bring GuillotinasHead but the wall is still blocking your way?

        options {
            bite {
                label QEVENT_WALLOFFLESH_BITE_ANSW
                stat str
                animation choice_con

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt QEVENT_WALLOFFLESH_REW1
                            set_frame 2
                            gain_food 20
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt QEVENT_WALLOFFLESH_REW2
                            set_frame 3
                            gain_food 30
                            random_mutation {
                                count 1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt QEVENT_WALLOFFLESH_REW3
                            set_frame 4
                            //nothing happens
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt QEVENT_WALLOFFLESH_REW4
                            set_frame 5
                            lose_item equipped
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            place_gristle {
                label QEVENT_WALLOFFLESH_PLACE_ANSW
                stat quest
                animation choice_misc

                requirements {
                    cat_has_item_equipped ThrobbingGristle
                }

                good {
                    set_legacy_token MeatWorldQuest_Gristle
                    set_legacy_token mapflag_WallOfFleshDone
                    complete_item_quest ThrobbingGristle
                    lose_specific_item ThrobbingGristle
                    set_frame 6

                    conditional_reward {
                        requirements {
                            has_token MeatWorldQuest_Leech
                        }

                        reward { //the other half of the quest (leech) was previously completed, this completes the meat world quest and unlocks meat world
                            prompt QEVENT_WALLOFFLESH_REW5
                            trigger_adventure_unlock meat_world_unlock
                        } else {
                            prompt QEVENT_WALLOFFLESH_REW6
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            ignore {
                label EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW
                stat none
                animation choice_leave

                good {
                    prompt QEVENT_WALLOFFLESH_REW_IGNORE
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `Quest_WallOfFlesh2`
**Source:** `quest_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `QEVENT_WALLOFFLESH_NAME`: "Wall Of Flesh"
- `QEVENT_WALLOFFLESH2_QUES`: "There is a wall of veins with a lump of throbbing gristle embedded in it. The flesh that was once there has rotted away."
- `QEVENT_WALLOFFLESH_BITE2_ANSW`: "Bite Veins"
- `QEVENT_WALLOFFLESH_REW7`: "{catname} bites into the soft veins and a warm liquid gushes out. It tastes great!"
- `QEVENT_WALLOFFLESH_REW8`: "{catname} tears into the wall of veins with {his} teeth and laps up the warm liquid that pours from the wound. <br/>  <br/> {catname} feels a strange twisting sensation as {his} body deforms..."
- `QEVENT_WALLOFFLESH_REW9`: "{catname} tries to bite into the wall of veins, but they are too tough for {his} little teeth to chew through!"
- `QEVENT_WALLOFFLESH_REW10`: "{catname} gets twisted in the veins while trying to bite into them and barely manages to wriggle free! <br/>  <br/> A toxic black liquid from the veins pours over {him}!"
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"
- `QEVENT_WALLOFFLESH2_REW_IGNORE`: "{Catname} ignores the wall of veins."

```
Quest_WallOfFlesh2 { //caves
    intro {
        title QEVENT_WALLOFFLESH_NAME
        cat_choice random
        choose_cat_with_item ThrobbingGristle
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame wall_of_flesh2
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt QEVENT_WALLOFFLESH2_QUES

        options {
            bite {
                label QEVENT_WALLOFFLESH_BITE2_ANSW
                stat str
                animation choice_con
                
                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt QEVENT_WALLOFFLESH_REW7
                            set_frame 2
                            gain_food 20
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt QEVENT_WALLOFFLESH_REW8
                            set_frame 3
                            gain_food 30
                            random_mutation {
                                count 1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt QEVENT_WALLOFFLESH_REW9
                            set_frame 4
                            //nothing happens
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt QEVENT_WALLOFFLESH_REW10
                            set_frame 5
                            lose_item equipped
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            ignore {
                label EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW
                stat none
                animation choice_leave

                good {
                    prompt QEVENT_WALLOFFLESH2_REW_IGNORE
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

### `Quest_MeatWorldAltar`
**Source:** `quest_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `QEVENT_MEATALTAR_NAME`: "Meat Altar"
- `QEVENT_MEATALTAR_QUES1`: "Before {catname} is a large altar made of veins and flesh. It demands sacrifice!"
- `QEVENT_MEATALTAR_SACRIFICE_ANSW`: "Sacrifice {Catname}"
- `QEVENT_MEATALTAR_REW1`: "{Catname} lies upon the sacrificial slab, and the room starts to rumble... <br/> Suddenly, the altar inverts, sucking {Catname} deep down into a pit of throbbing veins and sinew.  <br/> The walls around the remaining cats undulate and unfurl, beckoning them deeper into the [a:shake]THROBBING DOMAIN[/a]!"
- `QEVENT_MEATALTAR_REW2B`: "{Catname} lies sacrificed on top of the altar. The altar is pleased.  <br/>  <br/> The remaining cats feel strengthened, and one of them begrudgingly pulls on {catname}'s corpse, salvaging it for useful parts."
- `QEVENT_MEATALTAR_REW2`: "{Catname} lies sacrificed on top of the altar. The altar is pleased, but not satisfied. It desires something specific...  <br/>  <br/> The remaining cats feel strengthened, and one of them begrudgingly pulls on {catname}'s corpse, salvaging it for useful parts."
- `QEVENT_MEATALTAR_REW3B`: "{Catname} lies sacrificed on top of the altar. The altar is pleased. <br/>  <br/> The remaining cats feel great though!"
- `QEVENT_MEATALTAR_REW3`: "{Catname} lies sacrificed on top of the altar. The altar is pleased, but not satisfied. It desires something specific...  <br/>  <br/> The remaining cats feel great though!"
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"
- `QEVENT_MEATALTAR_REW_IGNORE`: "{Catname} ignores the altar."

```
Quest_MeatWorldAltar {
    intro {
        title QEVENT_MEATALTAR_NAME
        cat_choice random
        choose_cat_with_item GuillotinasHead // will pick the cat with GuillotinasHead equipped (or random otherwise) (this can be an array, in which case any cat that has a qualifying item equipped will be pulled randomly)
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame meatworld_altar
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt QEVENT_MEATALTAR_QUES1

        options {
            sacrifice_quest {
                requirements {
                    cat_has_item_equipped GuillotinasHead
                }

                label QEVENT_MEATALTAR_SACRIFICE_ANSW
                stat quest
                animation choice_misc

                good {
                    prompt QEVENT_MEATALTAR_REW1
                    kill cat
                    play_animation resultHole
                    set_frame 6
                    complete_item_quest GuillotinasHead
                    trigger_adventure_unlock meat_world_open
                    cutscene_on_exit king_intro
                }
            }

            sacrifice_normal {
                requirements {
                    not_cat_has_item_equipped GuillotinasHead
                }

                label QEVENT_MEATALTAR_SACRIFICE_ANSW
                stat lck
                animation choice_misc
                
                good {
                    kill cat
                    play_animation resultHole

                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 2

                            conditional_reward {
                                requirements {
                                    has_token mapflag_MeatWorldUnlocked
                                }

                                reward {
                                    prompt QEVENT_MEATALTAR_REW2B
                                } else {
                                    prompt QEVENT_MEATALTAR_REW2
                                }
                            }

                            get_item_from_pool blood_altar_items
							get_item_from_pool blood_altar_items
                            party_heal 100%
                            party_permanent_stats_exclude_self {
                                str 1
                                dex 1
                                con 1
                                int 1
                                spd 1
                                cha 1
                                lck 1
                            }
                            clear_result_animation 1
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 3

                            conditional_reward {
                                requirements {
                                    has_token mapflag_MeatWorldUnlocked
                                }

                                reward {
                                    prompt QEVENT_MEATALTAR_REW3B
                                } else {
                                    prompt QEVENT_MEATALTAR_REW3
                                }
                            }

                            get_item_from_pool blood_altar_items
                            get_item_from_pool blood_altar_items
							get_item_from_pool blood_altar_items
                            party_heal 100%
                            party_permanent_stats_exclude_self {
                                str 2
                                dex 2
                                con 2
                                int 2
                                spd 2
                                cha 2
                                lck 2
                            }

                            clear_result_animation 1
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            ignore {
                label EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW
                stat none
                animation choice_leave

                good {
                    prompt QEVENT_MEATALTAR_REW_IGNORE
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `Quest_DeadKing`
**Source:** `quest_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `QEVENT_DEADKING_NAME`: "Dead King"
- `QEVENT_DEADKING_QUES`: "The corpse of the Throbbing King lies before {catname}, his blood and organs spilling out upon the ground."
- `QEVENT_DEADKING_LOOTCORPSE_ANSW`: "Loot Corpse"
- `QEVENT_DEADKING_REW1`: "{catname} tears open the chest of the Throbbing King and withdraws a legendary item!"
- `QEVENT_DEADKING_REW2`: "{catname} reaches down and touches the corpse of the Throbbing King... <br/>  <br/> The chest of the body explodes, showering {catname} in bloody debris. <br/>  <br/> {catname}'s blood boils and {his} body turns inside out as {he} collapses into a gruesome mound of flesh and dies."
- `QEVENT_DEADKING_TAKEHEART_ANSW`: "Take Heart"
- `QEVENT_DEADKING_REW3`: "{catname} rips out the King's throbbing heart and stores it safely inside the Cryogenic Time Chamber!"
- `QEVENT_DEADKING_DRAINBLOOD_ANSW`: "Drain Blood"
- `QEVENT_DEADKING_REW4`: "{catname} drains the King's blood into {his} jar."
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"
- `QEVENT_DEADKING_REW5`: "{catname} ignores the corpse."

```
Quest_DeadKing { //THE RESULTS FOR THIS NEED TO USE A SPECIAL CUTSCENE
    intro {
        title QEVENT_DEADKING_NAME
        cat_choice random
        choose_cat_with_item [CryogenicTimeChamber_Empty JarOfRadiation]
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame dead_king
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt QEVENT_DEADKING_QUES

        options {
            loot {
                label QEVENT_DEADKING_LOOTCORPSE_ANSW
                stat lck
                animation choice_misc

                good {
                    // set_frame 2
                    prompt QEVENT_DEADKING_REW1 //once cutscene is in this prompt is skipped
                    get_item_from_pool bloody_items
                    cutscene {
                        cutscene "king_ending_good"
                        skip_result_screen true
                    }
                }

                bad {
                    // set_frame 2
                    prompt QEVENT_DEADKING_REW2 //once cutscene is in this prompt is skipped
                    kill cat
                    cutscene {
                        cutscene "king_ending_bad"
                        skip_result_screen true
                    }
                    play_animation resultHole
                }
            }

            loot_heart {
                label QEVENT_DEADKING_TAKEHEART_ANSW
                stat quest
                animation choice_misc

                requirements {
                    cat_has_item_equipped CryogenicTimeChamber_Empty
                }

                good {
                    prompt QEVENT_DEADKING_REW3
                    complete_item_quest CryogenicTimeChamber_Empty
                    unlock_item_quest CryogenicTimeChamber_Full
                    transform_item [CryogenicTimeChamber_Empty CryogenicTimeChamber_Full]
                    trigger_adventure_unlock time_machine_quest_finalstep
                    //set_frame 3
                    cutscene {
                        cutscene "king_ending_good"
                        skip_result_screen true
                    }
                }
            }

            take_blood {
                label QEVENT_DEADKING_DRAINBLOOD_ANSW
                stat quest
                animation choice_misc

                requirements {
                    cat_has_item_equipped JarOfRadiation
                }

                good {
                    prompt QEVENT_DEADKING_REW4
                    complete_item_quest JarOfRadiation
                    unlock_item_quest JarOfRadiatedBlood
                    transform_item [JarOfRadiation JarOfRadiatedBlood]
                    //set_frame 4
                    cutscene {
                        cutscene "king_ending_good"
                        skip_result_screen true
                    }
                }
            }

            ignore {
                label EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW
                stat none
                animation choice_leave

                good {
                    prompt QEVENT_DEADKING_REW5
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `Quest_MoonObelisk`
**Source:** `quest_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `QEVENT_OBELISK_MOON_NAME`: "Moon Obelisk"
- `QEVENT_OBELISK_QUES1`: "A small cubical obelisk protrudes from the ground."
- `QEVENT_OBELISK_MOON_TOUCH_ANSW`: "Touch the Obelisk"
- `QEVENT_OBELISK_REW1`: "{catname} touches the obelisk. {He} feels {his} body mutate!"
- `QEVENT_OBELISK_REW2`: "As {catname} touches the obelisk, {his} whole body convulses as a strange power from the obelisk mutates {him}!"
- `QEVENT_OBELISK_REW3`: "{catname} places {his} paw on the obelisk but nothing happens."
- `QEVENT_OBELISK_REW4`: "{catname} pushes {his} paw onto the obelisk. {He} lets out a cry as searing pain courses up {his} arm!"
- `QEVENT_OBELISK_MOON_ACTIVATE_ANSW`: "Activate"
- `QEVENT_OBELISK_MOON_REW_PYRO1`: "Pyrophina attempts to activate the obelisk, but it needs to be raised first."
- `QEVENT_OBELISK_REW_ZARA_WRONG`: "Zaratana comes from the moon and cannot do anything with this obelisk. She requests you take her to the other one."
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"
- `QEVENT_OBELISK_IGNORE`: "{Catname} ignores the obelisk."

```
Quest_MoonObelisk {
    intro {
        title QEVENT_OBELISK_MOON_NAME
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        choose_cat_with_item [PyrophinasCollar ZaratanasCollar]
        subject_frame obelisk
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt QEVENT_OBELISK_QUES1

        options {
            touch {
                label QEVENT_OBELISK_MOON_TOUCH_ANSW
                stat lck
                animation choice_misc

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt QEVENT_OBELISK_REW1
                            set_frame 2
                            random_mutation 1
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt QEVENT_OBELISK_REW2
                            set_frame 3
                            party_random_mutation 1
                        }
                    }
                }

                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt QEVENT_OBELISK_REW3
                            set_frame 1
                            //nothing happens
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt QEVENT_OBELISK_REW4
                            set_frame 4
                            injury str
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            activate_p {
                label QEVENT_OBELISK_MOON_ACTIVATE_ANSW
                stat none
                animation choice_misc

                requirements {
                    cat_has_item_equipped PyrophinasCollar
                }

                good {
                    prompt QEVENT_OBELISK_MOON_REW_PYRO1
                }
            }

            activate_z {
                label QEVENT_OBELISK_MOON_ACTIVATE_ANSW
                stat none
                animation choice_misc

                requirements {
                    cat_has_item_equipped ZaratanasCollar
                }

                good {
                    prompt QEVENT_OBELISK_REW_ZARA_WRONG
                }
            }

            ignore {
                label EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW
                stat none
                animation choice_leave

                good {
                    prompt QEVENT_OBELISK_IGNORE
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `Quest_MoonObeliskRaised`
**Source:** `quest_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `QEVENT_OBELISK_MOON_NAME2`: "Moon Obelisk (Raised)"
- `QEVENT_OBELISK_QUES2`: "A large obelisk extends from the ground. In the reflection of the obelisk, you can see a smaller one, still buried in the ground."
- `QEVENT_OBELISK_MOON_TOUCH_ANSW`: "Touch the Obelisk"
- `QEVENT_OBELISK_REW1`: "{catname} touches the obelisk. {He} feels {his} body mutate!"
- `QEVENT_OBELISK_REW2`: "As {catname} touches the obelisk, {his} whole body convulses as a strange power from the obelisk mutates {him}!"

- `QEVENT_OBELISK_REW4`: "{catname} pushes {his} paw onto the obelisk. {He} lets out a cry as searing pain courses up {his} arm!"
- `QEVENT_OBELISK_MOON_ACTIVATE_ANSW`: "Activate"
- `QEVENT_OBELISK_MOON_REW_PYRO2`: "Pyrophina attempts to activate the obelisk, but its counterpart needs to be raised first."
- `QEVENT_OBELISK_REW_ZARA_WRONG`: "Zaratana comes from the moon and cannot do anything with this obelisk. She requests you take her to the other one."

            activate_p {

                    prompt QEVENT_OBELISK_MOON_REW_PYRO2
                }
            }

            activate_z {
                label QEVENT_OBELISK_MOON_ACTIVATE_ANSW
                stat none
                animation choice_misc

                requirements {
                    cat_has_item_equipped ZaratanasCollar
                }

                good {
                    prompt QEVENT_OBELISK_REW_ZARA_WRONG
                }
            }

            ignore {
                label EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW
                stat none
                animation choice_leave

                good {
                    prompt QEVENT_OBELISK_IGNORE
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
