### `Quest_MoonObeliskGlowing`
**Source:** `quest_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `QEVENT_OBELISK_MOON_NAME3`: "Moon Obelisk (Glowing)"
- `QEVENT_OBELISK_QUES3`: "A large obelisk extends from the ground. It emanates a powerful glowing energy, and on its polished surface {catname} can see another identical obelisk glowing!"
- `QEVENT_OBELISK_MOON_TOUCH_ANSW`: "Touch the Obelisk"
- `QEVENT_OBELISK_REW1`: "{catname} touches the obelisk. {He} feels {his} body mutate!"
- `QEVENT_OBELISK_REW2`: "As {catname} touches the obelisk, {his} whole body convulses as a strange power from the obelisk mutates {him}!"
- `QEVENT_OBELISK_REW3`: "{catname} places {his} paw on the obelisk but nothing happens."
- `QEVENT_OBELISK_REW4`: "{catname} pushes {his} paw onto the obelisk. {He} lets out a cry as searing pain courses up {his} arm!"
- `QEVENT_OBELISK_MOON_ACTIVATE_ANSW`: "Activate"
- `QEVENT_OBELISK_MOON_REW_PYRO3`: "Pyrophina activates the obelisk.  It rises up out of the ground and shatters into small perfectly smooth fragments! <br/>  <br/> The fragments merge together into a broken mirror. {catname} looks on, seeing a strange new place opening up through the surface into a portal!"
- `QEVENT_OBELISK_REW_ZARA_WRONG`: "Zaratana comes from the moon and cannot do anything with this obelisk. She requests you take her to the other one."
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"
- `QEVENT_OBELISK_IGNORE`: "{Catname} ignores the obelisk."

```
Quest_MoonObeliskGlowing {
    intro {
        title QEVENT_OBELISK_MOON_NAME3
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        choose_cat_with_item [PyrophinasCollar ZaratanasCollar]
        subject_frame obelisk_glowing
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt QEVENT_OBELISK_QUES3

        options {
            touch {
                label QEVENT_OBELISK_MOON_TOUCH_ANSW
                stat none
                animation choice_misc
                
                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt QEVENT_OBELISK_REW1
                            set_frame 2
                            random_mutation 1
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt QEVENT_OBELISK_REW2
                            set_frame 3
                            party_random_mutation 1
                        }
                    }
                }

                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt QEVENT_OBELISK_REW3
                            set_frame 1
                            //nothing happens
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt QEVENT_OBELISK_REW4
                            set_frame 4
                            injury str
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            activate_p {
                label QEVENT_OBELISK_MOON_ACTIVATE_ANSW
                stat quest
                animation choice_misc

                requirements {
                    cat_has_item_equipped PyrophinasCollar
                }

                good {
                    cutscene {
                        cutscene "pyro_ending"
                        skip_result_screen true
                    }

                    prompt QEVENT_OBELISK_MOON_REW_PYRO3
                    trigger_adventure_unlock map_unlock_dimensionx
                    complete_item_quest PyrophinasCollar
                    lose_specific_item PyrophinasCollar
                    clear_surviving_kaiju pyrophina
                    set_legacy_token TheRift_UsedPyrophina
                    event_now_same_cat Quest_DimensionXPortal
                    //set_frame 6
                }
            }

            activate_z {
                label QEVENT_OBELISK_MOON_ACTIVATE_ANSW
                stat none
                animation choice_misc

                requirements {
                    cat_has_item_equipped ZaratanasCollar
                }

                good {
                    prompt QEVENT_OBELISK_REW_ZARA_WRONG
                }
            }

            ignore {
                label EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW
                stat none
                animation choice_leave

                good {
                    prompt QEVENT_OBELISK_IGNORE
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `Quest_CoreObelisk`
**Source:** `quest_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `QEVENT_OBELISK_CORE_NAME`: "Core Obelisk"
- `QEVENT_OBELISK_QUES1`: "A small cubical obelisk protrudes from the ground."
- `QEVENT_OBELISK_CORE_TOUCH_ANSW`: "Touch the Obelisk"
- `QEVENT_OBELISK_REW1`: "{catname} touches the obelisk. {He} feels {his} body mutate!"
- `QEVENT_OBELISK_REW2`: "As {catname} touches the obelisk, {his} whole body convulses as a strange power from the obelisk mutates {him}!"
- `QEVENT_OBELISK_REW3`: "{catname} places {his} paw on the obelisk but nothing happens."
- `QEVENT_OBELISK_REW4`: "{catname} pushes {his} paw onto the obelisk. {He} lets out a cry as searing pain courses up {his} arm!"
- `QEVENT_OBELISK_CORE_ACTIVATE_ANSW`: "Activate"
- `QEVENT_OBELISK_REW_PYRO_WRONG`: "Pyrophina comes from the core and cannot do anything with this obelisk. She requests you take her to the other one."
- `QEVENT_OBELISK_CORE_REW_ZARA1`: "Zaratana attempts to activate the obelisk, but it needs to be raised first."
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"
- `QEVENT_OBELISK_IGNORE`: "{Catname} ignores the obelisk."

```
Quest_CoreObelisk {
    intro {
        title QEVENT_OBELISK_CORE_NAME
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        choose_cat_with_item [PyrophinasCollar ZaratanasCollar]
        subject_frame obelisk
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt QEVENT_OBELISK_QUES1

        options {
            touch {
                label QEVENT_OBELISK_CORE_TOUCH_ANSW
                stat none
                animation choice_misc
                
                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt QEVENT_OBELISK_REW1
                            set_frame 2
                            random_mutation 1
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt QEVENT_OBELISK_REW2
                            set_frame 3
                            party_random_mutation 1
                        }
                    }
                }

                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt QEVENT_OBELISK_REW3
                            set_frame 1
                            //nothing happens
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt QEVENT_OBELISK_REW4
                            set_frame 4
                            injury str
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            activate_p {
                label QEVENT_OBELISK_CORE_ACTIVATE_ANSW
                stat none
                animation choice_misc

                requirements {
                    cat_has_item_equipped PyrophinasCollar
                }

                good {
                    prompt QEVENT_OBELISK_REW_PYRO_WRONG
                }
            }

            activate_z {
                label QEVENT_OBELISK_CORE_ACTIVATE_ANSW
                stat none
                animation choice_misc

                requirements {
                    cat_has_item_equipped ZaratanasCollar
                }

                good {
                    prompt QEVENT_OBELISK_CORE_REW_ZARA1
                }
            }

            ignore {
                label EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW
                stat none
                animation choice_leave

                good {
                    prompt QEVENT_OBELISK_IGNORE
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

### `Quest_CoreObeliskGlowing`
**Source:** `quest_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `QEVENT_OBELISK_CORE_NAME3`: "Core Obelisk (Glowing)"
- `QEVENT_OBELISK_QUES2`: "A large obelisk extends from the ground. In the reflection of the obelisk, you can see a smaller one, still buried in the ground."
- `QEVENT_OBELISK_CORE_TOUCH_ANSW`: "Touch the Obelisk"
- `QEVENT_OBELISK_REW1`: "{catname} touches the obelisk. {He} feels {his} body mutate!"
- `QEVENT_OBELISK_REW2`: "As {catname} touches the obelisk, {his} whole body convulses as a strange power from the obelisk mutates {him}!"
- `QEVENT_OBELISK_REW3`: "{catname} places {his} paw on the obelisk but nothing happens."
- `QEVENT_OBELISK_REW4`: "{catname} pushes {his} paw onto the obelisk. {He} lets out a cry as searing pain courses up {his} arm!"
- `QEVENT_OBELISK_CORE_ACTIVATE_ANSW`: "Activate"
- `QEVENT_OBELISK_REW_PYRO_WRONG`: "Pyrophina comes from the core and cannot do anything with this obelisk. She requests you take her to the other one."
- `QEVENT_OBELISK_CORE_REW_ZARA3`: "Zaratana activates the obelisk. It rises up out of the ground and shatters into perfectly smooth fragments! <br/>  <br/> The fragments merge together into a broken mirror-like surface. {catname} looks on, seeing a strange new place opening up through the surface into a portal!"
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"

```
Quest_CoreObeliskGlowing {
    intro {
        title QEVENT_OBELISK_CORE_NAME3
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        choose_cat_with_item [PyrophinasCollar ZaratanasCollar]
        subject_frame obelisk_glowing
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt QEVENT_OBELISK_QUES2

        options {
            touch {
                label QEVENT_OBELISK_CORE_TOUCH_ANSW
                stat none
                animation choice_misc

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt QEVENT_OBELISK_REW1
                            set_frame 2
                            random_mutation 1
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt QEVENT_OBELISK_REW2
                            set_frame 3
                            party_random_mutation 1
                        }
                    }
                }

                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt QEVENT_OBELISK_REW3
                            set_frame 1
                            //nothing happens
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt QEVENT_OBELISK_REW4
                            set_frame 4
                            injury str
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            activate_p {
                label QEVENT_OBELISK_CORE_ACTIVATE_ANSW
                stat none
                animation choice_misc

                requirements {
                    cat_has_item_equipped PyrophinasCollar
                }

                good {
                    prompt QEVENT_OBELISK_REW_PYRO_WRONG
                }
            }

            activate_z {
                label QEVENT_OBELISK_CORE_ACTIVATE_ANSW
                stat quest
                animation choice_misc

                requirements {
                    cat_has_item_equipped ZaratanasCollar
                }

                good {
                    cutscene {
                        cutscene "zara_ending"
                        skip_result_screen true
                    }

                    prompt QEVENT_OBELISK_CORE_REW_ZARA3
                    trigger_adventure_unlock map_unlock_dimensionx
                    complete_item_quest ZaratanasCollar
                    lose_specific_item ZaratanasCollar
                    clear_surviving_kaiju zaratana
                    set_legacy_token TheRift_UsedZaratana
                    event_now_same_cat Quest_DimensionXPortal
                    //set_frame 6

                stat none

                good {
                    prompt QEVENT_OBELISK_IGNORE
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

### `Quest_DimensionXPortal`
**Source:** `quest_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `QEVENT_DIMENSIONXPORTAL_NAME`: "The Rift"
- `QEVENT_DIMENSIONXPORTAL_QUES`: "A tear in the fabric of spacetime lies beyond. {catname} sees strange and wild things moving about on the other side of the rift!"
- `QEVENT_DIMENSIONXPORTAL_ENTER_ANSW`: "Enter Rift"
- `QEVENT_DIMENSIONXPORTAL_ENTER_REW`: "The cats leap through the rift in space, traveling to a strange and distant land!"
- `QEVENT_DIMENSIONXPORTAL_LICK_ANSW`: "Lick"
- `QEVENT_DIMENSIONXPORTAL_REW1`: "Curious as to what an interdimensional portal would taste like, {catname} gives it a good lick. <br/>  <br/> {catname}'s hair stands on end as energy from the rift surges through {his} body, mutating it!"
- `QEVENT_DIMENSIONXPORTAL_REW2`: "Images from the mind of an unfathomable creature flash through {catname}'s mind as {his} tongue exists simultaneously across two dimensions. <br/>  <br/> When {catname} returns to {his} senses, {he} finds {his} body has become twisted and deformed."
- `QEVENT_DIMENSIONXPORTAL_REW3`: "{catname} is not the smartest cat that ever lived. Far from it in fact. <br/>  <br/> It does not even cross {catname}'s mind that it could be dangerous to lick a strange interdimensional rift!"
- `QEVENT_DIMENSIONXPORTAL_REW4`: "Unspeakable horrors from between space and time flash in {catname}'s eyes as {his} tongue makes contact with the rift."
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"
- `QEVENT_DIMENSIONXPORTAL_IGNORE_ANSW`: "{Catname} ignores the rift. {He}'s had a long enough day as it is already."

```
Quest_DimensionXPortal {
    intro {
        title QEVENT_DIMENSIONXPORTAL_NAME
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame dimensionx_portal
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt QEVENT_DIMENSIONXPORTAL_QUES

        options {
            enter {
                label QEVENT_DIMENSIONXPORTAL_ENTER_ANSW
                stat none
                animation choice_misc
                hint_chapter_exit dimensionx

                good {
                    prompt QEVENT_DIMENSIONXPORTAL_ENTER_REW
                    play_animation resultHole
                    begin_chapter dimensionx.gon

                    cutscene {
                        cutscene "rift_portal"
                        skip_result_screen true
                    }
                    //set_frame 6
                }
            }

            /*reach {
                label QEVENT_DIMENSIONXPORTAL_LICK_ANSW
                stat lck
                animation choice_misc

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt QEVENT_DIMENSIONXPORTAL_REW1
                            set_frame 2
                            random_mutation 1
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt QEVENT_DIMENSIONXPORTAL_REW2
                            set_frame 3
                            party_random_mutation 1
                        }
                    }
                }

                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt QEVENT_DIMENSIONXPORTAL_REW3
                            set_frame 4
                            gain_disorder_from_pool all_disorders
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt QEVENT_DIMENSIONXPORTAL_REW4
                            set_frame 5
                            party_gain_disorder_from_pool all_disorders
                        }
                    }
                }
            }*/

            ignore {
                label EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW
                stat none
                animation choice_leave
                hint_chapter_exit home

                good {
                    prompt QEVENT_DIMENSIONXPORTAL_IGNORE_ANSW
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `Quest_DimensionXRift`
**Name:** of  
**Source:** `quest_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `QEVENT_THEHEAD_NAME`: "The Head"
- `QEVENT_THEHEAD_QUES`: "The grotesque head of The Chaos God floats before {catname}."
- `EVENT_LOOT_ANSW`: "Loot"
- `QEVENT_THEHEAD_REW1`: "{catname} rips the tongue of the head out and reaches down its throat, pulling out a legendary item!"
- `QEVENT_THEHEAD_REW2`: "{catname} touches the floating head and is cursed by the Chaos God! <br/>  <br/> {His} body contorts into terrifying shapes and {catname} screams in terror before collapsing into an inanimate, silent heap of flesh and fur."
- `QEVENT_THEHEAD_AMPLIFIER_ANSW`: "Insert Amplifier"
- `QEVENT_THEHEAD_REW3`: "{catname} installs the signal amplifier into the head's skull. <br/>  <br/> The time signal is complete! The future and the past now meet up!"
- `QEVENT_THEHEAD_REW4`: "{catname} installs the signal amplifier into the head's skull. <br/>  <br/> The signal is not yet complete."
- `QEVENT_THEHEAD_FILLJAR_ANSW`: "Collect Flesh"
- `QEVENT_THEHEAD_REW5`: "{catname} rips some flesh off of the Chaos God and places it into {his} jar."
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"
- `QEVENT_THEHEAD_REW6`: "{catname} leaves the head alone."

```
Quest_DimensionXRift {
    intro {
        title QEVENT_THEHEAD_NAME //ignore that the name of this doesnt match the art/theme it was implemented before the art
        cat_choice random
        choose_cat_with_item [SignalAmplifier JarOfRadiatedBlood]
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame dimensionx_head
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt QEVENT_THEHEAD_QUES
        
        setup { //alt frame if the flesh have been removed
            conditional_reward {
                requirements {
                    has_token AntennaQuest_Rift
                }

                reward {
                    set_subject dimensionx_head2
                }
            }
        }

        options {
            loot {
                label EVENT_LOOT_ANSW
                stat lck
                animation choice_misc

                good {
                    prompt QEVENT_THEHEAD_REW1
                    get_item_from_pool glitched_items
                    cutscene {
                        cutscene "chaos_ending_good"
                        skip_result_screen true
                    }
                    //set_frame 2
                }
                bad {
                    prompt QEVENT_THEHEAD_REW2
                    kill cat
                    select_item_from_pool_for_cutscene_only glitched_items
                    cutscene {
                        cutscene "chaos_ending_bad"
                        skip_result_screen true
                    }
                }
            }

            attach_amplifier {
                label QEVENT_THEHEAD_AMPLIFIER_ANSW
                stat quest
                animation choice_misc

                requirements {
                    cat_has_item_equipped SignalAmplifier
                }

                good {
                    set_legacy_token AntennaQuest_Rift
                    set_legacy_token mapflag_ChaosAntennaAttached
                    complete_item_quest SignalAmplifier
                    lose_specific_item SignalAmplifier
                    set_frame 3

                    conditional_reward {
                        requirements {
                            has_token AntennaQuest_Volcano
                            has_token AntennaQuest_Orb
                            has_token AntennaQuest_Rift
                        }

                        reward { //the whole quest is completed
                            prompt QEVENT_THEHEAD_REW3
                            trigger_adventure_unlock end_of_time_unlock

                            cutscene_on_exit infinite_intro

                        } else {
                            prompt QEVENT_THEHEAD_REW4
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            fill_jar {
                label QEVENT_THEHEAD_FILLJAR_ANSW
                stat quest
                animation choice_misc

                requirements {
                    cat_has_item_equipped JarOfRadiatedBlood
                }

                good {
                    prompt QEVENT_THEHEAD_REW5
                    complete_item_quest JarOfRadiatedBlood
                    unlock_item_quest JarOfChaos
                    transform_item [JarOfRadiatedBlood JarOfChaos]

                    cutscene {
                        cutscene "chaos_ending_good"
                        skip_result_screen true
                    }
                    //set_frame 2
                }
            }

            ignore {
                label EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW
                stat none
                animation choice_leave

                good {
                    prompt QEVENT_THEHEAD_REW6
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `Quest_BrokenTimeMachine`
**Source:** `quest_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `QEVENT_BROKENTIMEMACHINE_NAME`: "Time Machine"
- `QEVENT_BROKENTIMEMACHINE_QUES`: "A strange machine stands before {catname}.  <br/>  <br/> {catname} recalls Dr. Beanies mentioning something about this."
- `EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW`: "Examine"
- `QEVENT_BROKENTIMEMACHINE_REW1`: "{catname} extracts an empty Cryogenic Time Chamber from the time machine.  <br/>  <br/> {catname} believes Dr. Beanies should know what to do with it."
- `QEVENT_BROKENTIMEMACHINE_REW2`: "{catname} examines the machine. It does not appear to be working.  <br/>  <br/> {catname} thinks Dr. Beanies may know how to fix it."
- `EVENT_REPAIR_ANSW`: "Repair"
- `QEVENT_BROKENTIMEMACHINE_REW3`: "{catname} tries to repair the machine but it looks like {he}'ll need a device of some kind. <br/>  <br/> {catname} should come back with the right item to fix the machine."
- `QEVENT_BROKENTIMEMACHINE_REW4`: "{Catname} inserts the Cryogenic Time Chamber back into the sub-quantum vortex chronogate. <br/>  <br/> The time machine turns on!"
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"
- `QEVENT_BROKENTIMEMACHINE_REW5`: "{catname} ignores the strange machine."

```
Quest_BrokenTimeMachine {
    intro {
        title QEVENT_BROKENTIMEMACHINE_NAME
        cat_choice random
        choose_cat_with_item CryogenicTimeChamber_Full
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame timemachine_broken
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt QEVENT_BROKENTIMEMACHINE_QUES

        options {
            fiddle {
                label EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW
                stat quest

                requirements {
                    not_has_token TimeMachineQuest_Began
                }

                good {
                    /*prompt QEVENT_BROKENTIMEMACHINE_REW1
                    unlock_item_quest CryogenicTimeChamber_Empty
                    get_item CryogenicTimeChamber_Empty
                    set_legacy_token TimeMachineQuest_Began*/

                    play_animation resultConfused
                    prompt QEVENT_BROKENTIMEMACHINE_REW2
                    trigger_adventure_unlock time_machine_quest_trigger
                    set_legacy_token TimeMachineQuest_Began
                }
            }

            repair {
                label EVENT_REPAIR_ANSW
                stat none

                requirements {
                    has_token TimeMachineQuest_Began
                    not_cat_has_item_equipped CryogenicTimeChamber_Full
                }

                good {
                    prompt QEVENT_BROKENTIMEMACHINE_REW3
                    play_animation resultConfused
                }
            }

            repair_quest {
                label EVENT_REPAIR_ANSW
                stat quest

                requirements {
                    has_token TimeMachineQuest_Began
                    cat_has_item_equipped CryogenicTimeChamber_Full
                }

                good {
                    prompt QEVENT_BROKENTIMEMACHINE_REW4
                    trigger_adventure_unlock map_unlock_iceage
                    complete_item_quest CryogenicTimeChamber_Full
                    lose_specific_item CryogenicTimeChamber_Full
                    event_now_same_cat Quest_TimeMachine
                }
            }

            ignore {
                label EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW
                stat none
                animation choice_leave

                requirements {
                    has_token TimeMachineQuest_Began
                }

                good {
                    prompt QEVENT_BROKENTIMEMACHINE_REW5
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `Quest_TimeMachine`
**Source:** `quest_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `QEVENT_TIMEMACHINE_NAME`: "Time Machine"
- `QEVENT_TIMEMACHINE_QUES`: "{catname} approaches the time machine. It hums with energy! <br/>  <br/> What should the party do?"
- `QEVENT_TIMEMACHINE_PAST_ANSW`: "Go to The Past"
- `QEVENT_TIMEMACHINE_REW1`: "{catname} and the cats enter the time machine and pull the "BACKWARD" lever... <br/>  <br/> The machine whirs to life and they are transported into the past!"
- `QEVENT_TIMEMACHINE_FUTURE_ANSW`: "Go to The Future"
- `QEVENT_TIMEMACHINE_REW2`: "{catname} and the cats enter the time machine and pull the "FORWARD" lever... <br/>  <br/> The machine activates and they are transported into the future!"
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"
- `QEVENT_TIMEMACHINE_REW3`: "{catname} ignores the time machine."

```
Quest_TimeMachine {
    intro {
        title QEVENT_TIMEMACHINE_NAME
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame timemachine_fixed
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt QEVENT_TIMEMACHINE_QUES

        options {
            past {
                label QEVENT_TIMEMACHINE_PAST_ANSW
                stat none
                animation choice_misc
                hint_chapter_exit iceage

                requirements {
                    has_token mapflag_IceAgeUnlocked
                }

                good {
                    prompt QEVENT_TIMEMACHINE_REW1

                    cutscene {
                        cutscene "time_machine-lab-iceage"
                        skip_result_screen true
                    }
                    random_mutation 1

                    play_animation resultHole
                    begin_chapter iceage.gon
                    trigger_butterfly_effect 1
                }
            }

            future {
                label QEVENT_TIMEMACHINE_FUTURE_ANSW
                stat none
                animation choice_misc
                hint_chapter_exit future

                requirements {
                    has_token mapflag_FutureUnlocked
                }

                good {
                    prompt QEVENT_TIMEMACHINE_REW2

                    cutscene {
                        cutscene "time_machine-lab-future"
                        skip_result_screen true
                    }
                    random_mutation 1

                    play_animation resultHole
                    begin_chapter future.gon
                }
            }

            ignore {
                label EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW
                stat none
                animation choice_leave
                hint_chapter_exit home

                good {
                    prompt QEVENT_TIMEMACHINE_REW3
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

### `Quest_TimeMachineIceAge`
**Source:** `quest_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `QEVENT_TIMEMACHINE_NAME`: "Time Machine"
- `QEVENT_TIMEMACHINE_ICEAGE_QUES`: "The cats approach the time machine, weary from their long and cold journey."
- `QEVENT_TIMEMACHINE_ICEAGE_PAST_ANSW`: "Go Further Into the Past"
- `QEVENT_TIMEMACHINE_ICEAGE_REW1`: "The party bravely travels even further into the past!"
- `QEVENT_TIMEMACHINE_HOME_ANSW`: "Return Home"
- `QEVENT_TIMEMACHINE_ICEAGE_REW2`: "As the party huddles in the time machine they dream of the warm comforts of home."

```
Quest_TimeMachineIceAge {
    intro {
        title QEVENT_TIMEMACHINE_NAME
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame timemachine_fixed
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt QEVENT_TIMEMACHINE_ICEAGE_QUES

        options {
            past {
                label QEVENT_TIMEMACHINE_ICEAGE_PAST_ANSW
                stat none
                animation choice_misc
                hint_chapter_exit jurassic

                requirements {
                    has_token mapflag_JurassicUnlocked
                }

                good {
                    prompt QEVENT_TIMEMACHINE_ICEAGE_REW1

                    cutscene {
                        cutscene "time_machine-iceage-jurassic"
                        skip_result_screen true
                    }
                    random_mutation 1

                    play_animation resultHole
                    begin_chapter jurassic.gon
                }
            }

            home {
                label QEVENT_TIMEMACHINE_HOME_ANSW
                stat none
                animation choice_misc
                hint_chapter_exit home

                good {
                    prompt QEVENT_TIMEMACHINE_ICEAGE_REW2
                    
                    play_animation resultHole
                    begin_chapter home
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

### `Quest_Volcano`
**Source:** `quest_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `QEVENT_VOLCANO_NAME`: "Volcano"
- `QEVENT_VOLCANO_QUES`: "{catname} climbs to the top of the active volcano. <br/>  <br/> {He} looks down into the depths of the chasm where magma bubbles below..."
- `QEVENT_VOLCANO_QUES2`: "{catname} climbs to the top of the active volcano. <br/>  <br/> At the summit {he} finds a receiver antenna."
- `QEVENT_VOLCANO_SACRIFICE_ANSW`: "Sacrifice {Catname}"
- `QEVENT_VOLCANO_REW1`: "{catname} leaps into the volcano and perishes in the hot depths below. <br/>  <br/> The ancient gods smile down favorably on the cats, pleased with {catname}'s brave sacrifice."
- `QEVENT_VOLCANO_REW2`: "{catname} dives into the volcano! <br/>  <br/> Moments later {he} is catapulted back up from the depths below, having received a blessing from the ancient gods!"
- `QEVENT_VOLCANO_REW3`: "{catname} leaps into the volcano! <br/>  <br/> The party hears distant screams as {catname} perishes in the depths far below."
- `QEVENT_VOLCANO_REW4`: "{catname} and all the items {he} was carrying are lost!"
- `QEVENT_VOLCANO_ANTENNA_ANSW`: "Place Antenna"
- `QEVENT_VOLCANO_REW5`: "{Catname} places the antenna atop the volcano. <br/>  <br/> The time signal is complete! The future and the past now meet up!"
- `QEVENT_VOLCANO_REW6`: "{Catname} carefully sets up the antenna atop the volcano. <br/>  <br/> The signal is not yet complete."
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"
- `QEVENT_VOLCANO_REW7`: "{Catname} ignores the volcano and climbs back down."

```
Quest_Volcano {
    intro {
        title QEVENT_VOLCANO_NAME
        cat_choice random
        choose_cat_with_item ReceiverAntenna
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame volcano
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt QEVENT_VOLCANO_QUES
        setup { //alt prompt if the flesh have been removed
            conditional_reward {
                requirements {
                    has_token AntennaQuest_Volcano
                }

                reward {
                    prompt QEVENT_VOLCANO_QUES2
                    set_subject volcano2
                }
            }
        }

        options {
            sacrifice {
                label "QEVENT_VOLCANO_SACRIFICE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_misc
                
                requirements {
                    counter_range [WorldEventLegacyCounter_VolcanoSacrifices 0 1]
                }

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            kill cat
                            play_animation resultHole
                            prompt QEVENT_VOLCANO_REW1
                            set_frame 2
                            increment_legacy_counter WorldEventLegacyCounter_VolcanoSacrifices
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt QEVENT_VOLCANO_REW2
                            set_frame 3
                            gain_disorder_from_pool [BlackFetin OrangeFetin PurpleFetin]
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt QEVENT_VOLCANO_REW3
                            play_animation resultHole
                            set_frame 4
                            kill cat
                            //gain nothing
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt QEVENT_VOLCANO_REW4
                            play_animation resultHole
                            set_frame 5

                            lose_all_equipped_items cat
                            lose_item_from_inventory cat
                            lose_item_from_inventory cat
                            lose_item_from_inventory cat
                            kill cat                         
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            sacrifice_partial_favor {
                label "QEVENT_VOLCANO_SACRIFICE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_misc
                
                requirements {
                    counter_range [WorldEventLegacyCounter_VolcanoSacrifices 2 4]
                }

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            kill cat
                            play_animation resultHole
                            prompt QEVENT_VOLCANO_REW1
                            set_frame 2
                            increment_legacy_counter WorldEventLegacyCounter_VolcanoSacrifices
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt QEVENT_VOLCANO_REW2
                            set_frame 3
                            gain_disorder_from_pool [BlackFetin OrangeFetin PurpleFetin]
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    prompt QEVENT_VOLCANO_REW3
                    play_animation resultHole
                    set_frame 4
                    kill cat
                    //gain nothing
                }
                //Favor from previous sacrifices removed bad crit
            }
            
            sacrifice_full_favor {
                label "QEVENT_VOLCANO_SACRIFICE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_misc
                
                requirements {
                    counter_minimum [WorldEventLegacyCounter_VolcanoSacrifices 5]
                }

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            kill cat
                            play_animation resultHole
                            prompt QEVENT_VOLCANO_REW3
                            set_frame 4
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt QEVENT_VOLCANO_REW2
                            set_frame 3
                            gain_disorder_from_pool [BlackFetin OrangeFetin PurpleFetin]
                        }
                    }
                }
                //Favor from previous sacrifices eliminates bad outcomes
            }

            attach_antenna {
                label QEVENT_VOLCANO_ANTENNA_ANSW
                stat quest
                animation choice_misc

                requirements {
                    cat_has_item_equipped ReceiverAntenna
                }

                good {
                    set_legacy_token AntennaQuest_Volcano
                    set_legacy_token mapflag_VolcanoAntennaAttached
                    complete_item_quest ReceiverAntenna
                    lose_specific_item ReceiverAntenna

                    conditional_reward {
                        requirements {
                            has_token AntennaQuest_Volcano
                            has_token AntennaQuest_Orb
                            has_token AntennaQuest_Rift
                        }

                        reward { //the whole quest is completed
                            prompt QEVENT_VOLCANO_REW5
                            trigger_adventure_unlock end_of_time_unlock

                            cutscene_on_exit infinite_intro
                        } else {
                            prompt QEVENT_VOLCANO_REW6
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            ignore {
                label EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW
                stat none
                animation choice_leave

                good {
                    prompt QEVENT_VOLCANO_REW7
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `Quest_Orb`
**Source:** `quest_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `QEVENT_GLOWINGORB_NAME`: "Glowing Orb"
- `QEVENT_GLOWINGORB_QUES`: "{catname} gazes up in awe at the brilliant light of the orb. <br/>  <br/> It radiates warm heat like the surface of a tiny sun and is slowly consuming everything around it."
- `QEVENT_GLOWINGORB_QUES2`: "{catname} gazes in awe at the large glowing orb at the end of time. <br/>  <br/> Next to the orb a transmitter has been set up."
- `QEVENT_GLOWINGORB_LICK_ANSW`: "Lick Orb"
- `QEVENT_GLOWINGORB_REW1`: "{catname} approaches the orb and licks it... <br/>  <br/> Hot energy from the orb pulses through {his} body, mutating it."
- `QEVENT_GLOWINGORB_REW2`: "As {catname} licks the orb, {his} mind is overwhelmed with knowledge about all things. <br/>  <br/> {catname}'s body shifts as {he} grows a human head and enters an evolved state of being!"
- `QEVENT_GLOWINGORB_REW3`: "{catname} approaches the orb and licks it... <br/>  <br/> Hot radiation blasts {catname}, ravaging every cell in {his} body."
- `QEVENT_GLOWINGORB_REW4`: "In a blinding flash of intense heat, the orb explodes, eradicating everything around it, instantly vaporizing {catname}!"
- `QEVENT_GLOWINGORB_ANTENNA_ANSW`: "Place Antenna"
- `QEVENT_GLOWINGORB_REW5`: "{Catname} sets up the antenna on the orb. <br/>  <br/> The time signal is complete! The future and the past now meet up!"
- `QEVENT_GLOWINGORB_REW6`: "{Catname} attaches the antenna to the orb. <br/>  <br/> The signal is not yet complete."
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"
- `QEVENT_GLOWINGORB_REW7`: "{Catname} basks in the warm light of the orb for a few moments before leaving."

```
Quest_Orb {
    intro {
        title QEVENT_GLOWINGORB_NAME
        cat_choice random
        choose_cat_with_item TransmitterAntenna
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame endorb
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt QEVENT_GLOWINGORB_QUES
        setup { //alt prompt if the flesh have been removed
            conditional_reward {
                requirements {
                    has_token AntennaQuest_Orb
                }

                reward {
                    prompt QEVENT_GLOWINGORB_QUES2
                    set_subject endorb2
                }
            }
        }

        options {
            lick {
                label QEVENT_GLOWINGORB_LICK_ANSW
                stat none
                animation choice_misc

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt QEVENT_GLOWINGORB_REW1
                            set_frame 2
                            random_pool [
                                {
                                    random_mutation {
                                        count 2
                                    }
                                }
                                {
                                    random_mutation {
                                        count 3
                                    }
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt QEVENT_GLOWINGORB_REW2
                            set_frame 3
                            random_mutation_from_set {
                                body 758
                                head 759
                                tail 760
                            }                            
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt QEVENT_GLOWINGORB_REW3
                            set_frame 4
                            gain_disorder Cancer
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt QEVENT_GLOWINGORB_REW4
                            set_frame 5
                            play_animation resultHole
                            kill cat
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            attach_antenna {
                label QEVENT_GLOWINGORB_ANTENNA_ANSW
                stat quest
                animation choice_misc

                requirements {
                    cat_has_item_equipped TransmitterAntenna
                }

                good {
                    set_legacy_token AntennaQuest_Orb
                    set_legacy_token mapflag_OrbAntennaAttached
                    complete_item_quest TransmitterAntenna
                    lose_specific_item TransmitterAntenna

                    conditional_reward {
                        requirements {
                            has_token AntennaQuest_Volcano
                            has_token AntennaQuest_Orb
                            has_token AntennaQuest_Rift
                        }

                        reward { //the whole quest is completed
                            prompt QEVENT_GLOWINGORB_REW5
                            trigger_adventure_unlock end_of_time_unlock

                            cutscene_on_exit infinite_intro
                        } else {
                            prompt QEVENT_GLOWINGORB_REW6
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            ignore {
                label EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW
                stat none
                animation choice_leave

                good {
                    prompt QEVENT_GLOWINGORB_REW7
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `Quest_DeadGod`
**Source:** `quest_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `QEVENT_DEADGOD_NAME`: "Dead God"
- `QEVENT_DEADGOD_QUES`: "Guts spilled out onto the ground, the corpse of The Fetal Creator lies in a pool of its own pale blood. <br/>  <br/> {catname} stands apprehensively nearby, the stress of the battle still pumping adrenaline through {his} body..."
- `EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW`: "Examine"
- `QEVENT_DEADGOD_REW1`: "{catname} reaches down and rips apart the creator's body. <br/>  <br/> Inside {he} finds a legendary item!"
- `QEVENT_DEADGOD_REW2`: "{catname} reaches down to examine the Creator's body... <br/>  <br/> {His} body shudders briefly, then {catname} collapses onto the ground, dead."
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"
- `QEVENT_DEADGOD_REW3`: "Wary from the insanity of what {he} just experienced, {catname} opts to not tempt fate and leaves the divine corpse alone."

```
Quest_DeadGod {
    intro {
        title QEVENT_DEADGOD_NAME
        cat_choice random
        choose_cat_with_item TransmitterAntenna
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame dead_god
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt QEVENT_DEADGOD_QUES

        options {
            examine {
                label EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW
                stat lck
                animation choice_misc

                good {
                    prompt QEVENT_DEADGOD_REW1 //once cutscene is in this prompt is skipped
                    get_item_from_pool godly_items
                    cutscene {
                        cutscene "infinite_ending_good"
                        skip_result_screen true
                    }
                    //set_frame 2 //do not set frame once cutscenes are added.
                }

                bad {
                    prompt QEVENT_DEADGOD_REW2 //once cutscene is in this prompt is skipped
                    kill cat
                    cutscene {
                        cutscene "infinite_ending_bad"
                        skip_result_screen true
                    }
                    //set_frame 2 //do not set frame once cutscenes are added.
                    play_animation resultHole
                }
            }

            ignore {
                label EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW
                stat none
                animation choice_leave

                good {
                    prompt QEVENT_DEADGOD_REW3
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                    set_frame 2
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

## File: `sequence_event_continuations.gon`

### `Genie_Good`
**Source:** `sequence_event_continuations.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_GENIEOFTHELAMP_NAME`: "The Genie of the Lamp"
- `EVENT_GENIEOFTHELAMP_QUES`: "[i]"Hello my furry friend! <br/>  <br/> I, the Genie of the Lamp, grant you a wish! <br/>  <br/> What shall it be then?"[/i]"
- `EVENT_GENIE_CHOICE_WEALTH`: "Wealth!"
- `EVENT_GENIEOFTHELAMP_REW1`: "[i]"Ahh yes. Wealth! Someone as shabby as yourself could certainly use it!"[/i] <br/>  <br/> A huge pile of coins appears before {catname}!"
- `EVENT_GENIEOFTHELAMP_REW2`: "[i]"Treasure! My favourite! You could certainly use a change of clothes!"[/i] <br/>  <br/> The genie waves its arm and a pile of items appears before {catname}!"
- `EVENT_GENIE_CHOICE_LOOKS`: "Looks!"
- `EVENT_GENIEOFTHELAMP_REW3`: "[i]"Why yes... a makeover! I was going to suggest that but I didn't want to be rude!"[/i] <br/>  <br/> The Genie snorts in laughter and {catname} feels something change..."
- `EVENT_GENIEOFTHELAMP_REW4`: "[i]"Mmmmm... I know just the look for you!"[/i] <br/>  <br/> The Genie waves its incorporeal arms and then bursts out laughing! <br/>  <br/> {catname} doesn't know what's so funny."
- `EVENT_GENIE_CHOICE_POWER`: "Power!"
- `EVENT_GENIEOFTHELAMP_REW5`: "[i]"How bland! You know there are gyms for that, right?"[/i] <br/>  <br/> {catname} feels a lot stronger. {He} considers smashing the lamp."
- `EVENT_GENIEOFTHELAMP_REW6`: "[i]"Power! MORE POWER! <br/>  <br/> Okay fine. You types are never creative!"[/i] <br/>  <br/> The Genie waves its arms at {catname}."

```
Genie_Good {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_GENIEOFTHELAMP_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame genie
        subject_frame_inner 2
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_GENIEOFTHELAMP_QUES"

        options {
            wealth {
                label EVENT_GENIE_CHOICE_WEALTH
                stat none

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_GENIEOFTHELAMP_REW1"
                            gain_coins [30 60]
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_GENIEOFTHELAMP_REW2"
                            get_item_from_pool {
                                pool chapter_rare
                            }
                            get_item_from_pool {
                                pool chapter_rare
                            }
                            get_item_from_pool {
                                pool chapter_rare
                            }
                            get_item_from_pool {
                                pool chapter_rare
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            looks {
                label EVENT_GENIE_CHOICE_LOOKS
                stat none

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_GENIEOFTHELAMP_REW3"
                            permanent_stats {
                                cha 4
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_GENIEOFTHELAMP_REW4"
                            gain_disorder Gigachad
							permanent_stats {
                                cha 3
                            }
							mutation {
                                head 305
							}
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            power {
                label EVENT_GENIE_CHOICE_POWER
                stat none

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_GENIEOFTHELAMP_REW5"
                            permanent_stats {
                                str 4
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_GENIEOFTHELAMP_REW6"
							permanent_stats {
                                str 4
                            }
                            level_up self
							level_up self
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `Genie_Bad`
**Source:** `sequence_event_continuations.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_GENIEOFTHELAMP_NAME`: "The Genie of the Lamp"
- `EVENT_GENIEOFTHELAMP2_QUES`: "[i]"How rude of you to bother me, the Genie of the Lamp, from my rest! I curse thee! <br/>  <br/> But I'm feeling... [b]generous[/b] today... so I will let you choose your own demise!"[/i] <br/>  <br/> The Genie cackles in glee at {catname}'s distress."
- `EVENT_GENIE_CHOICE_CURSEMIND`: "Curse Mind"
- `EVENT_GENIEOFTHELAMP2_REW1`: "[i]"I love that one!"[/i] <br/>  <br/> The Genie leans down and whispers a lot of really mean things to {catname} that no one else can hear. <br/>  <br/> {catname} looks around confused and sad..."
- `EVENT_GENIEOFTHELAMP2_REW2`: "[i]"Smart choice!"[/i] <br/>  <br/> The Genie cackles at its own joke and smacks {catname} on the top of the head!"
- `EVENT_GENIE_CHOICE_CURSEBODY`: "Curse Body"
- `EVENT_GENIEOFTHELAMP2_REW3`: "[i]"Seems only fair considering you were just practically punching me!"[/i] <br/>  <br/> The Genie strikes {catname}, cursing {him} with an affliction..."
- `EVENT_GENIEOFTHELAMP2_REW4`: "[i]"Ooooh, fun! What would be most fitting ailment for you then?"[/i] <br/>  <br/> The Genie pauses and thinks for a moment, weighing numerous ways to torture {catname} in its mind, then shrugs and punches {him} really hard!"
- `EVENT_GENIE_CHOICE_CURSESOUL`: "Curse Soul"
- `EVENT_GENIEOFTHELAMP2_REW5`: "[i]"I would have let you ask a friend for help deciding, but I doubt you have any! Ha Ha Ha! <br/>  <br/> Here, let me help you with that!"[/i] <br/>  <br/> The Genie points its finger and something flies out and latches onto {catname}!"
- `EVENT_GENIEOFTHELAMP2_REW6`: "[i]"Your soul you say! I know just what will tickle your fancy! Literally!"[/i] <br/>  <br/> The Genie spits and something wet and wriggling lands on {catname}!"

```
Genie_Bad {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_GENIEOFTHELAMP_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame genie
        subject_frame_inner 4
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_GENIEOFTHELAMP2_QUES"

        //TODO: Consider making it unable to curse you if you are too dumb (int<=0) because
        //  you need to clearly articulate your preference for him to act.

        options {
            mind {
                label EVENT_GENIE_CHOICE_CURSEMIND
                stat none

                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_GENIEOFTHELAMP2_REW1"
                            gain_disorder_from_pool mental_disorders
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_GENIEOFTHELAMP2_REW2"
                            gain_disorder_from_pool mental_disorders
                            permanent_stats {
                                int -3
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            body {
                label EVENT_GENIE_CHOICE_CURSEBODY
                stat none

                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_GENIEOFTHELAMP2_REW3"
                            gain_disorder_from_pool physical_disorders
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_GENIEOFTHELAMP2_REW4"
                            gain_disorder_from_pool physical_disorders
                            permanent_stats {
                                con -3
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            soul {
                label EVENT_GENIE_CHOICE_CURSESOUL
                stat none

                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_GENIEOFTHELAMP2_REW5"
                            get_parasite_from_pool parasites 
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_GENIEOFTHELAMP2_REW6"
                            get_parasite_from_pool parasites 
                            permanent_stats {
                                lck -3
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `WatchingHead2`
**Source:** `sequence_event_continuations.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_WATCHINGHEAD2_NAME`: "Watching Head part 2"
- `EVENT_WATCHINGHEAD2_QUES`: "The giant deformed head is back...? <br/>  <br/> {catname} pauses, confused. This isn't the way {he} came... yet here it is again? <br/>  <br/> The head's single eye stares straight at {him}."
- `EVENT_FIGHT_ANSW`: "Fight"
- `EVENT_WATCHINGHEAD2_REW1`: "{catname} strikes the monstrous head! It lets out a shudder, then deflates slowly like a balloon... <br/>  <br/> {catname} digs into the remains and pulls something out..."
- `EVENT_WATCHINGHEAD2_REW2`: "{catname} sneaks up to attack, but it rises up and makes a terrifying sucking sound! <br/>  <br/> The cats howl in pain as their faces are ripped towards it! <br/>  <br/> Each cat lost part of their face!"

```
WatchingHead2 {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_WATCHINGHEAD2_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame watching_head
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_WATCHINGHEAD2_QUES"

        options {
            fight {
                label "EVENT_FIGHT_ANSW"
                stat str

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    prompt "EVENT_WATCHINGHEAD2_REW1"
                    get_item HumanBrain
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 5
                    prompt "EVENT_WATCHINGHEAD2_REW2" 
                    party_random_mutation_from_set {
                        count 1
                        ears -2
                        eyebrows -2
                        eyes -2
                        mouth -2
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `MonkeyPawWish`
**Source:** `sequence_event_continuations.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_MONKEYPAWWISH_NAME`: "Monkey Paw Wish"
- `EVENT_MONKEYPAWWISH_QUES`: "The monkey paw grants {catname} a wish!"
- `EVENT_MONKEYPAW_WISH1`: "Strength beyond your wildest dreams"
- `EVENT_MONKEYPAW_WISH1_REW`: "{catname} feels {his} body swell as {he} grows larger and larger... So big {he} can barely move!"
- `EVENT_MONKEYPAW_WISH2`: "Enhanced genes to become the perfect cat"
- `EVENT_MONKEYPAW_WISH2_REW`: "{catname} feels {his} skin and organs begin to boil as {his} dna is scrambles into horrific concoctions!"
- `EVENT_MONKEYPAW_WISH3`: "An immensely powerful item"
- `EVENT_MONKEYPAW_WISH3_REW`: "{catname} is granted their wish and an item magically materializes in front of {him}! {catname} discards the rest of his armor to focus on wearing his new one!"
- `EVENT_MONKEYPAW_WISH4`: "Learn unfathomably powerful abilities"
- `EVENT_MONKEYPAW_WISH4_REW`: "{catname} feels a splitting pain in {his} head as {he} suddenly fathoms the vast possibilities of all things. {He} begins to drool as {his} brain cells are overridden with new knowledge."

```
MonkeyPawWish {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_MONKEYPAWWISH_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame monkey_paw_4fingers
        subject_frame_inner 2 //This event is called when a finger moves down, requiring 2nd frame.
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        setup {
            conditional_reward {
                requirements {
                    has_token WorldEventLegacyToken_MonkeyPaw1
                    not_has_token WorldEventLegacyToken_MonkeyPaw2
                }
                reward {
                    set_subject monkey_paw_4fingers
                    set_frame 2
                }
            }
            conditional_reward {
                requirements {
                    has_token WorldEventLegacyToken_MonkeyPaw2
                    not_has_token WorldEventLegacyToken_MonkeyPaw3
                }
                reward {
                    set_subject monkey_paw_3fingers
                    set_frame 2
                }
            }
            conditional_reward {
                requirements {
                    has_token WorldEventLegacyToken_MonkeyPaw3
                }
                reward {
                    set_subject monkey_paw_2fingers
                    set_frame 2
                }
            }
            conditional_reward {
                requirements {
                    has_token WorldEventLegacyToken_MonkeyPaw4
                }
                reward {
                    set_subject monkey_paw_1finger
                    set_frame 2
                }
            }
        }
        prompt "EVENT_MONKEYPAWWISH_QUES"

        options {
            wish_strength {
                requirements {
                    not_has_token WorldEventLegacyToken_MonkeyPawStrength
                }

                label "EVENT_MONKEYPAW_WISH1"
                stat none

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    prompt "EVENT_MONKEYPAW_WISH1_REW"
                    set_legacy_token WorldEventLegacyToken_MonkeyPawStrength
                    gain_disorder Gargantuan
                }
            }
            
            wish_genes {
                requirements {
                    not_has_token WorldEventLegacyToken_MonkeyPawGenes
                }

                label "EVENT_MONKEYPAW_WISH2"
                stat none

                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_MONKEYPAW_WISH2_REW"
                    set_legacy_token WorldEventLegacyToken_MonkeyPawGenes
                    gain_disorder TamperedGenes
                }
            }
            
            wish_items {
                requirements {
                    not_has_token WorldEventLegacyToken_MonkeyPawItems
                }

                label "EVENT_MONKEYPAW_WISH3"
                stat none

                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_MONKEYPAW_WISH3_REW"
                    set_legacy_token WorldEventLegacyToken_MonkeyPawItems
                    random_pool [
                        {
                            gain_disorder SensoryOverloadTrinket
                            get_and_equip_item_from_pool {
                                pool chapter_rare
                                restrict trinket
                            }
                        }
                        {
                            gain_disorder SensoryOverloadFace
                            get_and_equip_item_from_pool {
                                pool chapter_rare
                                restrict face
                            }
                        }
                        {
                            gain_disorder SensoryOverloadHead
                            get_and_equip_item_from_pool {
                                pool chapter_rare
                                restrict head
                            }
                        }
                        {
                            gain_disorder SensoryOverloadNeck
                            get_and_equip_item_from_pool {
                                pool chapter_rare
                                restrict neck
                            }
                        }
                        {
                            gain_disorder SensoryOverloadWeapon
                            get_and_equip_item_from_pool {
                                pool chapter_rare
                                restrict weapon
                            }
                        }
                    ]
                }
            }

            wish_levelups {
                requirements {
                    not_has_token WorldEventLegacyToken_MonkeyPawKnowledge
                }

                label "EVENT_MONKEYPAW_WISH4"
                stat none

                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_MONKEYPAW_WISH4_REW"
                    set_legacy_token WorldEventLegacyToken_MonkeyPawKnowledge
                    gain_disorder BrainDead
                    level_up self
                    level_up self
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `MysteriousTomb1`
**Source:** `sequence_event_continuations.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB_NAME`: "Mysterious Tomb"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB1_QUES`: "{catname} looks inside the door and sees steps leading downward into darkness. <br/>  <br/> Unlike the outside, the stone here is in great condition, untouched by the passage of time. <br/>  <br/> Decorative looking slots are etched into the walls beside each step."
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB1_ANSW`: "Make your way down the stairs..."
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB1_END`: "Explore the level below"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB1_REW1`: "Poisoned darts fly out from the slots as {catname} runs down the stairs! <br/>  <br/> {He} manages to dodge most of the darts but get stung by a few."
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB1_REW2`: "{catname} deftly leaps down from step to step, dodging flying darts that shoot from the slots!"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB1_REW3`: "As {catname} walks down the stairs, poisoned darts shoot out and stab {him}! <br/>  <br/> {catname} tries to press on but gets riddled with more darts and runs screaming from the tomb!"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB1_REW4`: "Poisoned darts leap from the slots on the walls and sting {catname}. {He} retreats, howling in pain! <br/>  <br/> The darts must have been laced with something even worse than poison..."
- `EVENT_LEAVE_ANSW`: "Leave"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB1_REW5`: "It looks way too spooky down there! <br/>  <br/> {catname} turns back and continues on in the hot sun..."

```
MysteriousTomb1 {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame mysterious_tomb_stairs
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB1_QUES"

        options {
            smash {
                label "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB1_ANSW"
                stat dex

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    override_end_option_prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB1_END"
                    event_now_same_cat MysteriousTomb2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB1_REW1"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Poison 2
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB1_REW2"
                        }
                    }
                }

                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB1_REW3"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Poison 4
                            }
                            
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB1_REW4"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Poison 4
                            }
                            gain_disorder_from_pool diseases
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            leave {
                label "EVENT_LEAVE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave
                
                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB1_REW5"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `MysteriousTomb2`
**Source:** `sequence_event_continuations.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB_NAME`: "Mysterious Tomb"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB2_QUES`: "{catname} finds a large ominous doorway leading into the crypt. <br/>  <br/> The skeletal remains of would-be grave robbers lay about within..."
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB2_ANSW`: "Enter tomb"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB2_REW1`: "Try as {he} might, {catname} cannot muster up the courage to go on. <br/>  <br/> {catname} stands there for frozen what feels like an eon, {his} heart throbbing in {his} chest."
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB2_END_RETRY`: "Try again?"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB2_REW2`: "{catname} shakes the fear and doubt from {his} mind and steps bravely into the tomb chamber!"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB2_END_NEXT`: "Look around"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB2_REW3`: "{catname}'s tail quivers in fear and {his} hair stands up on end... <br/>  <br/> {He} dashes back up the stairs to safety!"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB2_END_RETREAT`: "Retreat!"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB2_REW4`: "{catname} steps brazenly into the tomb, and doors in the entrance slam shut behind {him}! <br/>  <br/> The cats outside wait patiently for a while... but {catname} does not return."
- `EVENT_LEAVE_ANSW`: "Leave"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB2_REW5`: "Not wanting to add another set of bones, {catname} quickly retreats back out of the tomb!"

```
MysteriousTomb2 {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame mysterious_tomb_enter
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB2_QUES"

        options {
            smash {
                label "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB2_ANSW"
                stat con

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB2_REW1"
                            override_end_option_prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB2_END_RETRY"
                            event_now_same_cat MysteriousTomb2 //try same event again
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB2_REW2"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                AllStatsUp 1
                            }
                            override_end_option_prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB2_END_NEXT"
                            event_now_same_cat MysteriousTomb3
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 3
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB2_REW3"
                            override_end_option_prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB2_END_RETREAT"
                            event_now_same_cat MysteriousTomb1 //go back a room
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 4
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB2_REW4"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Fear 1
                            }
                            //gain_disorder_from_pool all_disorders //this is showing up in results which spoils that the cat is coming back.
                            play_animation resultHole
                            leave_party_temporarily {
                                fights_skipped 1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            leave {
                label "EVENT_LEAVE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave
                
                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB2_REW5"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `MysteriousTomb3`
**Source:** `sequence_event_continuations.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB_NAME`: "Mysterious Tomb"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB3_QUES`: "Within the crypt chamber {catname} finds a stone sarcophagus."
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB3_ANSW`: "Open the sarcophagus"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB3_REW1`: "The treasure hoard of a long dead king lies within! <br/>  <br/> {catname} retrieves the bounty and returns to the surface."
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB3_REW2`: "After pushing the lid clear, {catname} finds an artifact clasped in the hands of the long dead mummy within."
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB3_REW3`: "When the lid falls away {catname} looks down at the mummy lying within... <br/>  <br/> It's eyes snap open and it begins to rise up out of the sarcophagus!"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB3_END_MUMMY`: "Something else?"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB3_REW4`: "{catname} pulls at the lid of the sarcophagus, and triggers a trap! <br/>  <br/> Purple gas rapidly fills the room and {catname} chokes on the foul fumes as {he} flees the tomb!"
- `EVENT_LEAVE_ANSW`: "Leave"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB3_REW5`: "{catname} has seen enough! <br/>  <br/> Best to let the dead rest."

```
MysteriousTomb3 {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame mysterious_tomb_sarcophagus
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB3_QUES"

        options {
            smash {
                label "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB3_ANSW"
                stat lck

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB3_REW1"
                            gain_coins [50 100]
                            get_item_from_pool chapter_rare
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB3_REW2"
                            get_item EyeOfRa
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 3
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB3_REW3"
                            override_end_option_prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB3_END_MUMMY"
                            event_now_same_cat MysteriousTomb4 //go to next floor
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 4
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB3_REW4"
                            gain_disorder_from_pool all_disorders
                            gain_disorder_from_pool all_disorders
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            leave {
                label "EVENT_LEAVE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave
                
                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB3_REW5"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `MysteriousTomb4`
**Source:** `sequence_event_continuations.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB_NAME`: "Mysterious Tomb"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB4_QUES`: "With a blood-curdling scream, the mummy attacks {catname}! <br/>  <br/> [i]In the brief instant before {his} reflexes set in, {catname} ponders the strange series of events in {his} life that brought {him} here...[/i]"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB4_ANSW`: "Think quickly!"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB4_REW1`: "{catname} distracts the mummy by throwing bones from the tomb at it and manages to escape!"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB4_REW2`: "{catname} deftly dodges the incoming attack and counters, striking the fragile skeleton in the jaw! <br/>  <br/> The mummy's head splits in half and it collapses back into the open sarcophagus!"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB4_REW3`: "Too startled to react, the mummy grips {catname}'s head with its bony hands... <br/>  <br/> [b][i]Now you know how it feels to be mummified![/i][/b] <br/>  <br/> {catname} howls as the mummy rips out {his} brain and returns it to {him} in a jar!"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB4_REW4`: "[b][i]How dare you disturb my sleep![/i][/b] <br/>  <br/> The mummy bites into {catname}'s skull, spewing {his} brain matter across the room. <br/>  <br/> {catname}'s lifeless body is tossed aside to the floor and the mummy returns to its eternal slumber..."

```
MysteriousTomb4 {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame mysterious_tomb_mummy
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB4_QUES"

        options {
            smash {
                label "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB4_ANSW"
                stat int

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB4_REW1"
                            //successfuly escape
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB4_REW2"
                            get_item PharaohStaff
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB4_REW3"
                            get_parasite BrainInAJar
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSTOMB4_REW4"
                            play_animation resultHole
                            kill cat
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `ElephantsFootCloser`
**Source:** `sequence_event_continuations.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_ELEPHANTSFOOTCLOSER_NAME`: "Elephant's Foot Closer"
- `EVENT_ELEPHANTSFOOTCLOSER_QUES`: "Heat from the elephant's foot now permeates every cell of {catname}'s body... <br/>  <br/> {catname} imagines this might be what it feels like to be nestled in {his} mother's womb."
- `EVENT_ELEPHANTSFOOTCLOSER_ANSW`: "Move Even Closer!"
- `EVENT_ELEPHANTSFOOTCLOSER_REW1`: "The tingling on {catname}'s skin erupts as {his} body mutates into a strange new form..."
- `EVENT_ELEPHANTSFOOTCLOSER_REW2`: "A euphoric sensation washes over {catname}. Now totally immersed in the sensation, {his} overstimulated mind craves more... more!"
- `EVENT_ELEPHANTSFOOTCLOSER_REW3`: "The tingling heat turns to pain and {catname} whimpers as {he} begins to burn alive!"
- `EVENT_ELEPHANTSFOOTCLOSER_REW4`: "Every cell in {catname}'s body screams in agony and {he} stumbles away from the room in a daze..."
- `EVENT_LEAVE_ANSW`: "Leave"
- `EVENT_ELEPHANTSFOOTCLOSER_REW5`: "Coming to {his} senses, {catname} flees from the room! <br/>  <br/> Small dots sparkle in {catname}'s vision, like a sea of small stars being born then dying in the same instant."

```
ElephantsFootCloser {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_ELEPHANTSFOOTCLOSER_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame eliphants_foot_closer
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_ELEPHANTSFOOTCLOSER_QUES"

        options {
            move_closer {
                label "EVENT_ELEPHANTSFOOTCLOSER_ANSW"
                stat str

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_ELEPHANTSFOOTCLOSER_REW1"
                            random_mutation 1
                            permanent_stats {
                                con 1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_ELEPHANTSFOOTCLOSER_REW2"
                            random_mutation 1
                            permanent_stats {
                                random 1
                            }
                            event_now_same_cat ElephantsFootEvenCloser
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_ELEPHANTSFOOTCLOSER_REW3"
                            injury radiated
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_ELEPHANTSFOOTCLOSER_REW4"
                            gain_disorder Cancer
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Poison 5
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            leave {
                label "EVENT_LEAVE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave
                
                good {
