```
                    prompt "EVENT_ELEPHANTSFOOTCLOSER_REW5"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `ElephantsFootEvenCloser`
**Source:** `sequence_event_continuations.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_ELEPHANTSFOOTEVENCLOSER_NAME`: "Elephant's Foot Even Closer"
- `EVENT_ELEPHANTSFOOTEVENCLOSER_QUES`: "Where is {he}? Is this hell? Is this heaven? <br/>  <br/> {His} brain is boiling yet {catname} wonders if {he} can hold out... just a little longer!"
- `EVENT_ELEPHANTSFOOTEVENCLOSER_ANSW`: "Withstand"
- `EVENT_ELEPHANTSFOOTEVENCLOSER_REW1`: "{catname} stands transfixed for several moments longer facing the glowing shrine, sweat drenching {his} fur. <br/>  <br/> {He} turns away at last, {his} body ravished and twisted by the radiation."
- `EVENT_ELEPHANTSFOOTEVENCLOSER_REW2`: "Time seems to drag on, and {catname} is lost in the overwhelming sensations of heat, death, and power!"
- `EVENT_ELEPHANTSFOOTEVENCLOSER_REW3`: "{catname} can no longer feel the heat. {He} IS heat.  <br/>  <br/> {catname} finally manages to turn away from the glowing heap, a small cloud of steam following in {his} wake."
- `EVENT_ELEPHANTSFOOTEVENCLOSER_REW4`: "Sweat and blood are steaming out of {catname}'s fur like water off a hot iron. {catname} slumps to the floor unconscious, {his} body ravaged by the radiation.  <br/>  <br/> The other cats hastily drag {him} away to safety."
- `EVENT_LEAVE_ANSW`: "Leave"
- `EVENT_ELEPHANTSFOOTEVENCLOSER_REW5`: "{catname} turns away from the strange mound, meandering into the cold, damp rooms beyond, {his} mind still longing for that deep, deep warmth..."

```
ElephantsFootEvenCloser {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_ELEPHANTSFOOTEVENCLOSER_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame eliphants_foot_closer
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_ELEPHANTSFOOTEVENCLOSER_QUES"

        options {
            withstand {
                label "EVENT_ELEPHANTSFOOTEVENCLOSER_ANSW"
                stat con

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_ELEPHANTSFOOTEVENCLOSER_REW1"
                            random_mutation 2
                            permanent_stats {
                                con 1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_ELEPHANTSFOOTEVENCLOSER_REW2"
                            random_mutation 4
                            permanent_stats {
                                random 5
                            }
                            event_now_same_cat ElephantsFootEvenCloser
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_ELEPHANTSFOOTEVENCLOSER_REW3"
                            injury radiated
                            injury radiated
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_ELEPHANTSFOOTEVENCLOSER_REW4" 
                            injury radiated
                            gain_disorder Cancer
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Poison 10
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            leave {
                label "EVENT_LEAVE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave
                
                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_ELEPHANTSFOOTEVENCLOSER_REW5"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `MysteriousStrangerForced`
**Source:** `sequence_event_continuations.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTRANGER_NAME`: "Mysterious Stranger"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTRANGER_QUES`: "[i]Would you like to play a game? Just place your paw right here and we shall begin...[/i] <br/>  <br/> {catname} peers beneath the stranger's patchwork cloak but can't see what is hiding within. Cats are pretty fast though... {He} might win!"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTRANGER_QUES2`: "[i]Want to play again? You could get lucky this time, if you're fast enough![/i]"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTRANGER_ANSW`: "Play his game"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTRANGER_REW1`: "{catname} barely pulls {his} paw back at the last second! <br/>  <br/> [i]Impressive... Have your winnings.[/i]"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTRANGER_END_AGAIN`: "Play again?"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTRANGER_REW2`: "Before the stranger could barely move the large knife, {catname} darts {his} paw away to safety! <br/>  <br/> [i]Most impressive... I think you win today. I give up![/i]"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTRANGER_REW3`: "{catname} concentrates on the stranger's movements but {he} is caught by surprise and the knife slices down, removing {his} finger! <br/>  <br/> [i]Not fast enough little feline![/i]"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTRANGER_REW4`: "The knife slams down, cutting off {catname}'s finger! <br/>  <br/> [i]Are you even trying?!? Pay attention this time![/i] <br/>  <br/> The stranger reaches out and grabs {catname}'s paw, forcing {him} to play again!"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTRANGER_END_AGAIN2`: "Play again"

```
MysteriousStrangerForced {
    //This is the same event but with no leave option.
    intro {
        title "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTRANGER_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame mysterious_stranger
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTRANGER_QUES"
        
        setup {
            conditional_reward {
                requirements {
                    has_token HasPlayedMysteriousStranger
                }
                reward {
                    prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTRANGER_QUES2"
                }
            }
        }

        options {
            play {
                label "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTRANGER_ANSW"
                stat spd

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 3
                            set_adventure_token HasPlayedMysteriousStranger
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTRANGER_REW1"
                            gain_coins [5 15]
                            override_end_option_prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTRANGER_END_AGAIN"
                            event_now_same_cat MysteriousStranger
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 4
                            set_adventure_token HasPlayedMysteriousStranger
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTRANGER_REW2"
                            gain_coins [20 100]
                            permanent_stats {
                                spd 1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        set_adventure_token HasPlayedMysteriousStranger
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTRANGER_REW3"
                            set_adventure_token HasPlayedMysteriousStranger
                            set_adventure_token MysteriousStranger_HasLostFinger
                            random_pool [
                                {
                                    permanent_stats {
                                        str -1
                                    }
                                }
                                {
                                    permanent_stats {
                                        dex -1
                                    }
                                }
                            ]
                            override_end_option_prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTRANGER_END_AGAIN"
                            event_now_same_cat MysteriousStranger
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTRANGER_REW4"
                            set_adventure_token HasPlayedMysteriousStranger
                            set_adventure_token MysteriousStranger_HasLostFinger
                            random_pool [
                                {
                                    permanent_stats {
                                        str -1
                                    }
                                }
                                {
                                    permanent_stats {
                                        dex -1
                                    }
                                }
                            ]
                            override_end_option_prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSSTRANGER_END_AGAIN2"
                            event_now_same_cat MysteriousStrangerForced
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `JaggedPathwayStalactite`
**Source:** `sequence_event_continuations.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_JAGGEDPATHWAY_NAME`: "Jagged Pathway"
- `EVENT_JAGGEDPATHWAY_STALACTITE_QUES`: "{catname} howls in pain at the giant stalactite buried in {his} skull! <br/>  <br/> The other cats bet they could help {him} by pulling it out... Should they?"
- `EVENT_JAGGEDPATHWAY_STALACTITE_ANSW1`: "Pull it out"
- `EVENT_JAGGEDPATHWAY_STALACTITE_REW1`: "The cats help {catname} carefully pull the stalactite out of {his} head... <br/>  <br/> They manage to pry it out, but {catname} passes out from the pain!"
- `EVENT_JAGGEDPATHWAY_STALACTITE_REW2`: "The other cats carefully help {catname} extract the protruding rock from {his} head..."
- `EVENT_JAGGEDPATHWAY_STALACTITE_REW3`: "{catname} howls in pain as the cats yank at the stalactite stuck in {his} head! <br/>  <br/> With a lurch, it pulls free and {catname} begins bleeding profusely from the gash in his skull!"
- `EVENT_JAGGEDPATHWAY_STALACTITE_REW4`: "The cats pull at the stalactite in {catname}'s skull, and it breaks off in pieces... <br/>  <br/> They extract the remaining chunks and look down at the bloody chasm on top of {catname}'s head. They're pretty sure there are supposed to be more brains in there... oh well!"
- `EVENT_JAGGEDPATHWAY_STALACTITE_ANSW2`: "Leave it in"
- `EVENT_JAGGEDPATHWAY_STALACTITE_REW5`: "{catname} is too afraid and won't let the cats get anywhere near the giant rock protruding from {his} skull!"

```
JaggedPathwayStalactite {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_JAGGEDPATHWAY_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame jagged_pathway
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_JAGGEDPATHWAY_STALACTITE_QUES"

        options {
            pull_it_out {
                label "EVENT_JAGGEDPATHWAY_STALACTITE_ANSW1"
                stat none

                good {
                    set_frame 6
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_JAGGEDPATHWAY_STALACTITE_REW1"
                            lose_specific_item SlagTight
                            get_item SlagMight
                            damage [5 8]
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Sleep 1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_JAGGEDPATHWAY_STALACTITE_REW2"
                            lose_specific_item SlagTight
                            get_item SlagMight
                            damage [3 4]
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 6
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_JAGGEDPATHWAY_STALACTITE_REW3"
                            lose_specific_item SlagTight
                            get_item SlagMight
                            permanent_stats {
                                int -2
                            }
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Bleed 3
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_JAGGEDPATHWAY_STALACTITE_REW4" 
                            lose_specific_item SlagTight
                            gain_disorder BrainDamage
                            permanent_stats {
                                int -2
                            }
                            //item is destroyed when pulling it out
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            leave_it_in {
                label "EVENT_JAGGEDPATHWAY_STALACTITE_ANSW2"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave
                
                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_JAGGEDPATHWAY_STALACTITE_REW5"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
                bad {
                    prompt "EVENT_JAGGEDPATHWAY_STALACTITE_REW5"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                    self_status_next_fight {
                        Fear 1
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `MysteriousCave1`
**Source:** `sequence_event_continuations.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE1_NAME`: "Mysterious Cave1 (Rappel)"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE1_QUES`: "{catname} finds a rope tied above a deep shaft that leads into an abyss. <br/>  <br/> Should {he} rappel down into the chasm?"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE1_RAPPEL_ANSW`: "Rappel"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE1_REW1`: "{catname} makes {his} way down the rope to the base of the chasm. <br/>  <br/> The darkness is broken by the soft glow of light splashing on the walls of the cavern ahead..."
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE1_REW2`: "{catname} feels as if {he} was destined to travel this path! <br/>  <br/> {He} rappels down the chasm effortlessly as if {he} has done it a thousand times before..."
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE1_REW3`: "Reverberating through the caves below, {catname} hears the stern voice of {his} father! <br/>  <br/> {He} scrambles back up the rope and flees the cave in fear!"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE1_REW4`: "Strange sounds and voices fill the cave and {catname}'s mind fills with chaos! <br/>  <br/> {He} scrambles to safety outside the cave, visibly shaken with fear."
- `EVENT_LEAVE_ANSW`: "Leave"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE1_REW5`: "{catname} peers down the chasm past the rope which leads into the darkness below... <br/>  <br/> Best not to risk it! {catname} returns to the surface."

```
MysteriousCave1 { //repell
    intro {
        title "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE1_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame mysterious_cave_hole
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE1_QUES"

        options {
            repell {
                label "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE1_RAPPEL_ANSW"
                stat dex

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE1_REW1"
                            conditional_reward {
                                requirements {
                                    has_token AdventureToken_MysteriousCave_FamiliarVoice
                                }
                                reward {
                                    next_event_bonus 1
                                }
                            }
                            event_now_same_cat MysteriousCave2
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE1_REW2"
                            conditional_reward {
                                requirements {
                                    has_token AdventureToken_MysteriousCave_FamiliarVoice
                                }
                                reward {
                                    next_event_bonus 2
                                }
                                else {
                                    next_event_bonus 1
                                }
                            }
                            event_now_same_cat MysteriousCave2
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE1_REW3"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Fear 2
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE1_REW4" 
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Fear 2
                            }
                            gain_disorder_from_pool mental_disorders
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            leave {
                label "EVENT_LEAVE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave
                
                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE1_REW5"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `MysteriousCave2`
**Source:** `sequence_event_continuations.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE2_NAME`: "Mysterious Cave2 (Glowing One)"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE2_QUES`: "A strange glowing figure sits before {catname}! <br/>  <br/> Power emanates from its body and strange words from the being echo in {catname}'s mind."
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE1_TALKTO_ANSW`: "Talk to the Glowing One"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE2_REW1`: "A long time passes as the glowing one explains, using spoken and unspoken words, the meaning of life to {catname}. <br/>  <br/> {catname}'s mind is at peace and {his} heart is warmed by the knowledge imparted to {him}."
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE2_REW2`: "The glowing one weaves together the story of {catname}'s life and purpose. <br/>  <br/> {catname} now fully understands who {he} really is!"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE2_REW3`: "The glowing one speaks to {catname}, but the words have no meaning and just fill {him} with confusion. <br/>  <br/> {catname} turns away, ready to return to the surface."
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE2_REW4`: "The glowing one tells {catname} dark and terrible secrets about the world. <br/>  <br/> {catname}'s blood runs cold and {his} ears invert back into {his} skull. <br/>  <br/> {He} was not supposed to hear those terrible words!"

```
MysteriousCave2 { //glowing one
    intro {
        title "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE2_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame mysterious_cave_glowing_one
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE2_QUES"

        options {
            repell {
                label "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE1_TALKTO_ANSW"
                stat cha

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE2_REW1"
                            upgrade_ability random
                            event_now_same_cat MysteriousCave3
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE2_REW2"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                AllStatsUp 1
                            }
                            upgrade_ability random
                            upgrade_passive random
                            event_now_same_cat MysteriousCave3
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE2_REW3"
                            event_now_same_cat MysteriousCave3
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE2_REW4" 
                            gain_disorder Albinism
                            mutation {
                                ears -2
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `MysteriousCave3`
**Source:** `sequence_event_continuations.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE2_NAME`: "Mysterious Cave2 (Glowing One)"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE3_QUES`: "{catname} turns to the base of the rope and looks up... <br/>  <br/> It sure is a long way back up to the entrance of the cave!"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE3_CLIMB_ANSW`: "Climb out"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE3_REW1`: "{catname} climbs back up the way {he} came in and exits the cave."
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE3_REW2`: "As {he} climbs back up, {catname} ponders the words that the Glowing One spoke to {him}. <br/>  <br/> A vigor and excitement for life fills {catname} as {he} thinks of the battle ahead!"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE3_REW3`: "{catname} tries to climb up but falls back to the bottom and breaks {his} leg! <br/>  <br/> {He} turns awkwardly back to the Glowing One who is now before {him} again..."
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE3_REW4`: "{catname} tries to use the rope to pull {himself} up, but slips and tumbles back down!"

```
MysteriousCave3 { //climb out
    intro {
        title "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE2_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame mysterious_cave_climb
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE3_QUES"

        options {
            repell {
                label "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE3_CLIMB_ANSW"
                stat str

                good {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE3_REW1"
                            //nothing, escape event
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE3_REW2"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                AllStatsUp 1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE3_REW3"
                            injury spd
                            event_now_same_cat MysteriousCave2
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSCAVE3_REW4" 
                            injury spd
                            event_now_same_cat MysteriousCave3
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `MysteriousMachine_Good`
**Source:** `sequence_event_continuations.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSMACHINE_GOOD_NAME`: "Mysterious Machine is working good"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSMACHINE_GOOD_QUES`: "The machine is humming with life and waiting for {catname} to issue a command."
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSMACHINE_COPY_ANSW`: "Copy"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSMACHINE_GOOD_REW1`: "The machine roars to life and prints out a copy of {catname}! <br/>  <br/> {catname} hears something behind {him} and turns to see a cat standing next to {him} that looks just like {catname}!?"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSMACHINE_SCALE_ANSW`: "Scale"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSMACHINE_GOOD_REW2`: "The machine beeps and groans, becoming larger and larger! <br/>  <br/> Or are the cats all getting smaller!?"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSMACHINE_PRINT_ANSW`: "Print"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSMACHINE_GOOD_REW3`: "The strange machine starts spitting out sheet after sheet of paper, each with a bunch of different items! <br/>  <br/> All the items look just like the ones {catname} and the cats already have!"

```
MysteriousMachine_Good {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSMACHINE_GOOD_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame mysterious_machine
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSMACHINE_GOOD_QUES"

        setup {
            set_frame 4
        }

        options {
            copy {
                label "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSMACHINE_COPY_ANSW"

                good {
                    set_frame 5
                    prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSMACHINE_GOOD_REW1"
                    gain_clone_familiar {
                        object PlayerCat_MachineClone
                    }
                }
            }

            scale {
                label "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSMACHINE_SCALE_ANSW"

                good {
                    set_frame 6
                    prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSMACHINE_GOOD_REW2"
                    party_gain_disorder_from_pool [Dwarfism]
                }
            }

            print {
                label "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSMACHINE_PRINT_ANSW"

                good {
                    set_frame 7
                    prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSMACHINE_GOOD_REW3"
                    copy_party_items 1
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `MysteriousMachine_Bad`
**Source:** `sequence_event_continuations.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSMACHINE_BAD_NAME`: "Mysterious Machine is working bad"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSMACHINE_BAD_QUES`: "The machine is beeping loudly and shaking all over! <br/>  <br/> {catname} should press a button, quick!"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSMACHINE_COPY_ANSW`: "Copy"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSMACHINE_BAD_REW1`: "{catname} presses the copy button and the machine springs to life! <br/>  <br/> The party of {catname}s gather around to watch while the device works. Not very exiting? <br/>  <br/> {catname} looks around at the other {catname}s and then they move on to the next area."
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSMACHINE_SCALE_ANSW`: "Scale"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSMACHINE_BAD_REW2`: "The machine angrily beeps at {catname}, growing smaller and smaller as it spits out a new sheet of paper. <br/>  <br/> Or are the cats all getting bigger?"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSMACHINE_PRINT_ANSW`: "Print"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSMACHINE_BAD_REW3`: "The machine spits out a sheet with multiple copies of the same item on it. <br/>  <br/> Alarmed, the cats check their pockets... all of their stuff got replaced with duplicates of {catname}'s items!"

```
MysteriousMachine_Bad {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSMACHINE_BAD_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame mysterious_machine
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSMACHINE_BAD_QUES"

        setup {
            set_frame 4
        }

        options {
            copy {
                label "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSMACHINE_COPY_ANSW"

                good {
                    set_frame 8
                    prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSMACHINE_BAD_REW1"
                    play_animation resultBad
                    clone_self_to_party 1
                }
            }

            scale {
                label "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSMACHINE_SCALE_ANSW"

                good {
                    set_frame 9
                    prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSMACHINE_BAD_REW2"
                    party_gain_disorder_from_pool [Gigantism]
                }
            }

            print {
                label "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSMACHINE_PRINT_ANSW"

                good {
                    set_frame 10
                    prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSMACHINE_BAD_REW3"
                    play_animation resultBad
                    copy_items_to_party 1
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `BodyOfGlorg_Gift`
**Source:** `sequence_event_continuations.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_GIFTOFGLORG_NAME`: "Gift of Glorg"
- `EVENT_GIFTOFGLORG_QUES`: "Large parasites extends from Glorg's hand towards {catname}... <br/>  <br/> Where should Glorg gift {catname}?"
- `EVENT_GIFTOFGLORG_HEAD_ANSW`: "Head"
- `EVENT_GIFTOFGLORG_REW1`: "A large parasite from Glorg's body latches onto {catname}'s skull... <br/>  <br/> {catname} feels the rush of euphoria as {his} passive abilities become empowered!"
- `EVENT_GIFTOFGLORG_NECK_ANSW`: "Neck"
- `EVENT_GIFTOFGLORG_REW2`: "A parasite extends from Glorg's hand and wraps itself around {catname}'s neck. <br/>  <br/> {catname} feels a rush of excitement as energy from the parasite surges through {his} body!"
- `EVENT_GIFTOFGLORG_FACE_ANSW`: "Face"
- `EVENT_GIFTOFGLORG_REW3`: "Glorg's parasite reaches forward and latches onto {catname}'s face! <br/>  <br/> {catname} feels an odd sucking sensation on {his} face as the creature empower's {his} abilities!"

```
BodyOfGlorg_Gift {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_GIFTOFGLORG_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame body_of_glorg
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_GIFTOFGLORG_QUES"

        setup{
            set_frame 4
        }

        options {
            head {
                label "EVENT_GIFTOFGLORG_HEAD_ANSW"

                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_GIFTOFGLORG_REW1"
                    set_frame 5
                    get_parasite Beepis
                    gain_disorder BlessingOfGlorg
                }
            }

            neck {
                label "EVENT_GIFTOFGLORG_NECK_ANSW"
                
                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_GIFTOFGLORG_REW2"
                    set_frame 5
                    get_parasite Cunch
                    gain_disorder BlessingOfGlorg
                }
            }
            
            face {
                label "EVENT_GIFTOFGLORG_FACE_ANSW"
                
                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_GIFTOFGLORG_REW3"
                    set_frame 5
                    get_parasite Feebis
                    gain_disorder BlessingOfGlorg
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

## File: `sewer_events.gon`

### `CloggedPipes`
**Source:** `sewer_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_CLOGGEDPIPES_NAME`: "Clogged Pipes"
- `EVENT_CLOGGEDPIPES_QUES`: "{catname} finds a large pipe that is clogged with debris and waste."
- `EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW`: "Examine"
- `EVENT_CLOGGEDPIPES_REW1`: "Seeing a way to unclog the pipe, {catname} pulls out a branch that was impeding flow... <br/>  <br/> A huge wave of water explodes from the pipe, drenching everything!"
- `EVENT_CLOGGEDPIPES_REW2`: "{catname} sees something stuck in the sludge at the end of the pipe and digs it out..."
- `EVENT_CLOGGEDPIPES_REW3`: "{catname} digs through the thick waste with {his} paws, completely ruining {his} clean fur."
- `EVENT_CLOGGEDPIPES_REW4`: "Squishing {his} nose, {catname} leaps into the pipe and pulls out as much sludge as {he} can, trying to unclog the pipe to no avail!"
- `EVENT_BASH_ANSW`: "Bash"
- `EVENT_CLOGGEDPIPES_REW5`: "With surprising fury, {catname} busts the clog open with {his} paws! <br/>  <br/> A massive torrent of water blasts from the pipe, throwing {catname} back!"
- `EVENT_CLOGGEDPIPES_REW6`: "{catname} digs through the slush and finds an item!"
- `EVENT_CLOGGEDPIPES_REW7`: "{catname} throws {himself} into the pipe pulling as much gunk and waste out as {he} can, emerging moments later covered in sludge!"
- `EVENT_CLOGGEDPIPES_REW8`: "{catname} smashes {his} way through the thick sludge trying to clear the clogged pipe, but only ends up covered in disgusting refuse."

```
CloggedPipes {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_CLOGGEDPIPES_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame clogged_pipes
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_CLOGGEDPIPES_QUES"

        options {
            examine {
                label "EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW"
                stat int

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 2
                            prompt "EVENT_CLOGGEDPIPES_REW1"
                            self_status_next_fight{
                                AbilityOnBattleStart Flush
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 3
                            prompt "EVENT_CLOGGEDPIPES_REW2"
                            get_item_from_pool chapter_rare
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 4
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 4
                            prompt "EVENT_CLOGGEDPIPES_REW3"
                            get_parasite_from_pool sludge_armor
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 4
                            prompt "EVENT_CLOGGEDPIPES_REW4" 
                            gain_disorder_from_pool diseases
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            bash {
                label "EVENT_BASH_ANSW"
                stat str

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 2
                            prompt "EVENT_CLOGGEDPIPES_REW5"
                            self_status_next_fight{
                                AbilityOnBattleStart_Immediate Flush
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 3
                            prompt "EVENT_CLOGGEDPIPES_REW6"
                            get_item_from_pool chapter_rare
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 5
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 4
                            prompt "EVENT_CLOGGEDPIPES_REW7"
                            get_parasite_from_pool sludge_armor
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 4
                            prompt "EVENT_CLOGGEDPIPES_REW8" 
                            gain_disorder_from_pool diseases
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `ShinyThingInAPool`
**Source:** `sewer_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_SHINYTHINGINAPOOL_NAME`: "Shiny thing in a pool"
- `EVENT_SHINYTHINGINAPOOL_QUES`: "Beneath the surface of a murky pool of water {catname} spies something shiny!"
- `EVENT_DIVE_ANSW`: "Dive into pool"
- `EVENT_SHINYTHINGINAPOOL_REW1`: "{catname} wades into the water and finds some coins at the bottom!"
- `EVENT_SHINYTHINGINAPOOL_REW2`: "With a splash, {catname} dives into the pool... <br/>  <br/> Moments later {catname} breaches the surface of the water with an item clutched in {his} paws!"
- `EVENT_SHINYTHINGINAPOOL_REW3`: "{catname} leaps recklessly into the pool and only gets a mouthful of toxic water in return!"
- `EVENT_SHINYTHINGINAPOOL_REW4`: "{catname} dives into the water trying to reach the bottom of the pool but almost drowns in the foul muck! <br/>  <br/> The other cats manage to pull {catname} out."
- `EVENT_USE_ITEM_ANSW`: "Use an item from backpack"
- `EVENT_SHINYTHINGINAPOOL_REW5`: "{catname} pulls an item out from {his} backpack and fishes out the item from the bottom of the pool!"
- `EVENT_SHINYTHINGINAPOOL_REW6`: "{catname} reaches into the murky water and pulls up the item at the bottom!"
- `EVENT_SHINYTHINGINAPOOL_REW7`: "{catname} reaches into the pool with an item from {his} backpack but fumbles and drops it!"
- `EVENT_SHINYTHINGINAPOOL_REW8`: "{catname} trips into the pool and almost drowns in the foul water!"

```
ShinyThingInAPool {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_SHINYTHINGINAPOOL_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame shiny_thing_in_pool
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_SHINYTHINGINAPOOL_QUES"

        options {
            dive {
                label "EVENT_DIVE_ANSW"
                stat dex

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 3
                            prompt "EVENT_SHINYTHINGINAPOOL_REW1"
                            gain_coins[10 20]
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 2
                            prompt "EVENT_SHINYTHINGINAPOOL_REW2"
                            get_item_from_pool rare
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 4
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_SHINYTHINGINAPOOL_REW3"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Poison 3
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_SHINYTHINGINAPOOL_REW4" 
                            permanent_stats {
                                con -1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            use_item {
                label "EVENT_USE_ITEM_ANSW"
                stat lck

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_SHINYTHINGINAPOOL_REW5"
                            get_item_from_pool {
                                pool current_chapter_rare
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_SHINYTHINGINAPOOL_REW6"
                            get_item_from_pool {
								pool current_chapter_rare
                                pool current_chapter_rare //TODO: Gain unique item? maybe a skeleton key that you can use to unlock other locked events?
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 1
                            prompt "EVENT_SHINYTHINGINAPOOL_REW7"
                            lose_item inventory
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 4
                            prompt "EVENT_SHINYTHINGINAPOOL_REW8" 
                            damage [2 5]
                            lose_item inventory
                            lose_item equipped
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `UseTheToilet`
**Source:** `sewer_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_USETHETOILET_NAME`: "Use the toilet"
- `EVENT_USETHETOILET_QUES`: "{catname} finds a well used toilet. Who knows what might lurk within it?"
- `EVENT_USETOILET_ANSW`: "Use toilet"
- `EVENT_USETHETOILET_REW1`: "{catname} carefully uses the toilet... <br/>  <br/> {His} contribution is appreciated! The toilet man is happy."
- `EVENT_USETHETOILET_REW2`: "The toilet man is very pleased with {catname}'s performance!"
- `EVENT_USETHETOILET_REW3`: "{catname} tries to go but is nervous and only releases a tiny turd... it is not worthy!"
- `EVENT_USETHETOILET_REW4`: "The toilet man is angry! <br/>  <br/> {catname} howls in pain as it grabs at {him} from inside the bowl!"
- `EVENT_USETHETOILET_REW5`: "{catname} sits on the toilet and moments later the party hears a satisfying 'sploosh' sound. <br/>  <br/> {He} feels a lot better!"
- `EVENT_USETHETOILET_REW6`: "{catname} releases an incredibly massive turd into the toilet with a massive 'sploosh'! <br/>  <br/> Does {catname} have what it takes to go again?"
- `EVENT_USETHETOILET_AGAIN`: "Take another dump?"
- `EVENT_USETHETOILET_REW7`: "{catname} tries as hard as {he} can but just ends up hurting {himself}."
- `EVENT_USETHETOILET_REW8`: "{catname} pushes way too hard and something ruptures inside {him}!"
- `EVENT_FLUSHYOURSELF_ANSW`: "Flush yourself"
- `EVENT_USETHETOILET_REW9`: "{catname} flushes {himself} down the toilet!?!"

```
UseTheToilet {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_USETHETOILET_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame use_the_toilet
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_USETHETOILET_QUES"

        options {
            use_toilet_con {
                label "EVENT_USETOILET_ANSW"
                stat con

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_USETHETOILET_REW1"
                            gain_coins [5 15]
                            increment_legacy_counter WorldEventLegacyCounter_ToiletFlushes
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_USETHETOILET_REW2"
                            gain_coins [15 66]
                            increment_legacy_counter WorldEventLegacyCounter_ToiletFlushes
                            increment_legacy_counter WorldEventLegacyCounter_ToiletFlushes
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_USETHETOILET_REW3"
                            set_frame 4
                            //nothing
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 5
                            prompt "EVENT_USETHETOILET_REW4" 
                            injury spd
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            use_toilet_str {
                label "EVENT_USETOILET_ANSW"
                stat str

                good {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_USETHETOILET_REW5"
                            increment_legacy_counter WorldEventLegacyCounter_ToiletFlushes
                            full_heal 1
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_USETHETOILET_REW6"
                            permanent_stats {
                                con 1
                            }
                            increment_legacy_counter WorldEventLegacyCounter_ToiletFlushes
                            increment_legacy_counter WorldEventLegacyCounter_ToiletFlushes
                            override_end_option_prompt EVENT_USETHETOILET_AGAIN
                            event_now_same_cat UseTheToilet
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 4
                            prompt "EVENT_USETHETOILET_REW7"
                            damage 3
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 5
                            prompt "EVENT_USETHETOILET_REW8"
                            gain_disorder IntestinalProlapse
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            flush_yourself {
                label "EVENT_FLUSHYOURSELF_ANSW"

                requirements {
                    counter_minimum [WorldEventLegacyCounter_ToiletFlushes 6]
                }
                
                good {
                    set_frame 1
                    prompt "EVENT_USETHETOILET_REW9"
                    shop_now Event_SmallShop
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `BrokenCanister`
**Source:** `sewer_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_BROKENCANISTER_NAME`: "Broken Canister"
- `EVENT_BROKENCANISTER_QUES`: "{catname} finds a broken cylinder. Strange green goo is pooled beneath the broken container."
- `EVENT_INSPECT_ANSW`: "Inspect"
- `EVENT_BROKENCANISTER_REW1`: "{catname} rubs the strange liquid on {his} face, mutating it!"
- `EVENT_BROKENCANISTER_REW2`: "Unable to resist the strange temptation, {catname} rubs the sweet smelling liquid in {his} eyes!"
- `EVENT_BROKENCANISTER_REW3`: "{catname} moves in close to sniff the strange liquid... <br/>  <br/> A bubble from beneath the liquid's surface pops, spraying {catname} in the face and blinding {him}!"
- `EVENT_BROKENCANISTER_REW4`: "The liquid looks soothing, and {catname} rubs some on {his} face... <br/>  <br/> {catname} howls in pain as the acidic liquid burns {his} skin!"
- `EVENT_LICK_ANSW`: "Lick"
- `EVENT_BROKENCANISTER_REW5`: "{catname} laps up some of the thick liquid. It tastes strange, but good. <br/>  <br/> {catname} feels {his} body mutate!"
- `EVENT_BROKENCANISTER_REW6`: "{catname} tastes the liquid... it is delicious! <br/>  <br/> {He} gobbles it up as {his} body mutates!"
- `EVENT_BROKENCANISTER_REW7`: "{catname} licks the green goo. It tastes absolutely vile! <br/>  <br/> {He} tries to spit it out, but the sticky substance sticks to everything, poisoning {catname}!"
- `EVENT_BROKENCANISTER_REW8`: "The strange goo tastes gross going down but {catname} keeps going. {He} begins to feel strange..."

```
BrokenCanister {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_BROKENCANISTER_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame broken_canister
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_BROKENCANISTER_QUES"

        options {
            inspect {
                label "EVENT_INSPECT_ANSW"
                stat int

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 2
                            prompt "EVENT_BROKENCANISTER_REW1"
                            random_mutation_from_set {
                                eyes -1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 3
                            prompt "EVENT_BROKENCANISTER_REW2"
                            mutation {
                                eye1 -1
                                eye2 -1
                            }                            
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 3
                            prompt "EVENT_BROKENCANISTER_REW3"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Blind 6
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 3
                            prompt "EVENT_BROKENCANISTER_REW4" 
                            gain_disorder PuncturedEye
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            lick {
                label "EVENT_LICK_ANSW"
                stat con

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 2
                            prompt "EVENT_BROKENCANISTER_REW5"
                            random_mutation 1
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 2
                            prompt "EVENT_BROKENCANISTER_REW6"
                            random_mutation 2
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 5
                            prompt "EVENT_BROKENCANISTER_REW7"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Poison 6
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 5
                            prompt "EVENT_BROKENCANISTER_REW8" 
                            gain_disorder_from_pool all_disorders

                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `GiantSleepingShark`
**Source:** `sewer_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_GIANTSLEEPINGSHARK_NAME`: "Giant Sleeping Shark"
- `EVENT_GIANTSLEEPINGSHARK_QUES`: "A giant sleeping shark blocks the way forward in front of {catname}!"
- `EVENT_SNEAKBY_ANSW`: "Sneak by"
- `EVENT_GIANTSLEEPINGSHARK_REW1`: "{catname} quietly sneaks by, careful not to disturb the snoozing shark..."
- `EVENT_GIANTSLEEPINGSHARK_REW2`: "As {catname} sneaks by, {he} is able to steal the shark's treasure!"
- `EVENT_GIANTSLEEPINGSHARK_REW3`: "The shark wakes up and bites at {catname}! <br/>  <br/> Blood flies everywhere as the giant teeth sink deep into {catname}."
- `EVENT_GIANTSLEEPINGSHARK_REW4`: "The shark is enraged by {catname}, and bites {him} with its giant rows of sharp teeth!"
- `EVENT_RUNAWAY_ANSW`: "Run away"
- `EVENT_GIANTSLEEPINGSHARK_REW5`: "{catname} successfully runs away from the giant shark!"
- `EVENT_GIANTSLEEPINGSHARK_REW6`: "{catname} runs past the shark and finds {himself} overlooking the next battle, giving the party the opportunity to ambush!"
- `EVENT_GIANTSLEEPINGSHARK_REW7`: "The shark wakes and chases {catname}! <br/>  <br/> {He} barely manages to escape but is exhausted from all the running."
- `EVENT_GIANTSLEEPINGSHARK_REW8`: "The shark wakes up and chases the party all the way into the next battle!"
- `EVENT_KISS_ANSW`: "Kiss"
- `EVENT_GIANTSLEEPINGSHARK_REW9`: "The shark gives {catname} a large, teethy grin then falls back to sleep."
- `EVENT_GIANTSLEEPINGSHARK_REW10`: "The shark is impressed by the small cat before him and smiles fondly. <br/>  <br/> It follows {catname} into the next room!"
- `EVENT_GIANTSLEEPINGSHARK_REW11`: "The shark kisses {catname} back, then winks... <br/>  <br/> The large rows of teeth staring {catname} down open and {catname} runs in terror!"
- `EVENT_GIANTSLEEPINGSHARK_REW12`: "As {catname} kisses the huge shark, it's jaw opens and it bites {catname} on the face, tearing off {his} face!"

```
GiantSleepingShark {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_GIANTSLEEPINGSHARK_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame giant_sleeping_shark
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_GIANTSLEEPINGSHARK_QUES"

        options {
            sneak_by {
                label "EVENT_SNEAKBY_ANSW"
                stat dex

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_GIANTSLEEPINGSHARK_REW1"
                            //nothing
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 2
                            prompt "EVENT_GIANTSLEEPINGSHARK_REW2"
                            get_item SharkTooth
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 4
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_GIANTSLEEPINGSHARK_REW3"
                            damage 6
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Bleed 3
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_GIANTSLEEPINGSHARK_REW4" 
                            injury bleeding
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Bleed 4
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            run_away {
                label "EVENT_RUNAWAY_ANSW"
                stat spd

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_GIANTSLEEPINGSHARK_REW5"
                            //nothing
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_GIANTSLEEPINGSHARK_REW6"
                            ally_ambush_next_fights 1
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 3
                            prompt "EVENT_GIANTSLEEPINGSHARK_REW7"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                SpeedUp -4
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 4
                            prompt "EVENT_GIANTSLEEPINGSHARK_REW8" 
                            
                            spawn_unit_next_fight {
                                object DaddyShark
                                count 1
                                spawn_side enemies
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            kiss {
                label "EVENT_KISS_ANSW"
                stat cha

                good {
                    set_frame 5 
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_GIANTSLEEPINGSHARK_REW9"
                            //nothing
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_GIANTSLEEPINGSHARK_REW10"
                            gain_familiar CharmedDaddyShark
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 5
                            prompt "EVENT_GIANTSLEEPINGSHARK_REW11"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Fear 3
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 4
                            prompt "EVENT_GIANTSLEEPINGSHARK_REW12" 
                            injury cha
                            injury cha
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```
