## File: `special_events.gon`

### `Tragedy`
**Source:** `special_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_TRAGEDY_NAME`: "Tragedy!"
- `EVENT_TRAGEDY_REW1`: "{catname} feels like an outcast in the group. {He} strays a bit further from the pack."
- `EVENT_TRAGEDY_REW2`: "{catname} remembers a time when things were easier and wishes {he} was back home."
- `EVENT_TRAGEDY_REW3`: "{catname} recalls fond memories of being cared for by {his} mother."
- `EVENT_TRAGEDY_REW4`: "{catname} experiences existential dread. What's the point of it all if it just ends in death?"
- `EVENT_TRAGEDY_REW5`: "{catname} checks {his} pockets... It appears {he} has lost something."
- `EVENT_TRAGEDY_REW6`: "{catname} feels pangs of hunger. {He} licks {his} wounds but they won't heal!"
- `EVENT_TRAGEDY_REW7`: "{catname} feels emotionally drained... This adventure has been quite the ordeal. <br/>  <br/> {catname} won't start with mana next battle."
- `EVENT_TRAGEDY_REW8`: "{catname} accidentally snags {himself} on a rusted nail. {He} can't stop the bleeding!"
- `EVENT_TRAGEDY_REW9`: "{catname} hears the voice of {his} father calling to him! <br/>  <br/> {catname} turns to see a terrifying face {he} can't describe… It is horrifying!"
- `EVENT_TRAGEDY_REW10`: "Whatever {catname} last ate must have been spoiled... <br/>  <br/> {He} got food poisoning!"
- `EVENT_TRAGEDY_REW11`: "{catname}'s wounds have become infected."
- `EVENT_TRAGEDY_REW12`: "{catname} trips on a rock, face planting into the ground! <br/>  <br/> {catname}'s forehead swells up and {he} feels sluggish from the head trauma."
- `EVENT_TRAGEDY_REW13`: "{catname} seems to have misplaced something important but {he} can't remember where or what it was..."
- `EVENT_TRAGEDY_REW14`: "{catname} accidentally steps on a trap!"
- `EVENT_TRAGEDY_REW15`: "Rats jump out from a nearby crevice and bite {catname}! <br/>  <br/> {Catname} is suffering a string of bad luck... What did {he} do to deserve this?"
- `EVENT_TRAGEDY_REW16`: "Out of nowhere, {catname} spontaneously combusts! <br/>  <br/> {catname} howls in surprise as {his} fur lights on fire!"
- `EVENT_TRAGEDY_REW17`: "{catname} finds a little friend! {He} proudly shows it off to the party. <br/>  <br/> Isn't it cute!?"
- `EVENT_TRAGEDY_REW18`: "{catname} feels something lumpy under the ground at {his} feet and digs it up... <br/>  <br/> It latches onto {him}!"
- `EVENT_TRAGEDY_REW19`: "Memories of battles flash in {catname}'s mind, driving {him} into an insatiable rage!"
- `EVENT_TRAGEDY_REW20`: "Someone pushes {catname}! {He} tumbles roughly onto a pile of sharp rocks."

```
Tragedy {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_TRAGEDY_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame tragedy
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        goto end

        outcome {
            play_animation [resultTragedy .5]
            random_pool [
                //common
                { 
                    set_frame 1 
                    prompt "EVENT_TRAGEDY_REW1" 
                }
                { 
                    set_frame 2
                    prompt "EVENT_TRAGEDY_REW2" 
                }
                { 
                    set_frame 3
                    prompt "EVENT_TRAGEDY_REW3" 
                }
                { 
                    set_frame 4
                    prompt "EVENT_TRAGEDY_REW4" 
                }

                //uncommon
                /*{ 
                    set_frame 5
                    prompt "EVENT_TRAGEDY_REW5" 
                    lose_item inventory 
                }*/
                {
                    set_frame 6
                    prompt "EVENT_TRAGEDY_REW6" 
                    self_status_next_fight {
                        NoHealthRegen 1
                    }
                }   
                {
                    set_frame 7
                    prompt "EVENT_TRAGEDY_REW7" 
                    self_status_next_fight {
                        NoStartingMana 1
                    }
                }   
                {   
                    set_frame 8
                    prompt "EVENT_TRAGEDY_REW8" 
                    self_status_next_fight {
                        Bleed 1
                    }
                }   
                {   
                    set_frame 9
                    prompt "EVENT_TRAGEDY_REW9" 
                    self_status_next_fight {
                        Fear 1
                    }
                }   
                {   
                    set_frame 10
                    prompt "EVENT_TRAGEDY_REW10" 
                    self_status_next_fight {
                        Poison 1
                    }
                }  
                    
                    
                //rare
                {   
                    set_frame 11
                    prompt "EVENT_TRAGEDY_REW11" 
                    permanent_stats {
                        cha -1
                    }
                }   
                {   
                    set_frame 12
                    prompt "EVENT_TRAGEDY_REW12" 
                    permanent_stats {
                        int -1
                    }
                }   
                /*{   
                    set_frame 13
                    prompt "EVENT_TRAGEDY_REW13" 
                    lose_item equipped
                }*/
                {   
                    set_frame 14
                    prompt "EVENT_TRAGEDY_REW14" 
                    self_damage [8 15]
                }   
                {   
                    set_frame 15
                    prompt "EVENT_TRAGEDY_REW15" 
                    self_damage [4 8]
                    next_event_from_set Tragedy
                }   
                    
                //v rare
                {   
                    set_frame 16
                    prompt "EVENT_TRAGEDY_REW16" 
                    self_status_next_fight {
                        Burn 5
                    }
                }   
                {   
                    set_frame 17
                    prompt "EVENT_TRAGEDY_REW17" 
                    get_parasite_from_pool parasites
                }   
                {   
                    set_frame 18
                    prompt "EVENT_TRAGEDY_REW18" 
                    get_parasite_from_pool cursed_items
                }   
                {
                    set_frame 19
                    prompt "EVENT_TRAGEDY_REW19" 
                    gain_disorder_from_pool Crazy_disorders
                }
                {   
                    set_frame 20
                    prompt "EVENT_TRAGEDY_REW20" 
                    injury random
                }
            ]
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `Blessing`
**Source:** `special_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_BLESSING_REW1`: "{catname} finds a tasty snack!"
- `EVENT_BLESSING_REW2`: "{catname} finds some shiny coins!"
- `EVENT_BLESSING_REW3`: "{catname} finds some delicious catnip growing and devours it. {He} travels to strange places where all {his} dreams come true... <br/>  <br/> {catname} will start the next battle with extra mana."
- `EVENT_BLESSING_REW4`: "{catname} finds some evidence and is more prepared for the next event!"
- `EVENT_BLESSING_REW5`: "{catname} seems to have an admirer. A fly has joined the party!"
- `EVENT_BLESSING_REW6`: "Aha! {catname} discovers some tracks! <br/>  <br/> {He} follows them through a secret path allowing the party to ambush!"
- `EVENT_BLESSING_REW7`: "{catname} finds a strange sealed box and opens it up..."
- `EVENT_BLESSING_REW8`: "{catname} discovers a strange piece of art. <br/>  <br/> {He} admires the design and comments smugly about it to the other cats."
- `EVENT_BLESSING_REW9`: "{catname} has been working out lately and it is finally starting to pay off!"
- `EVENT_BLESSING_REW10`: "{catname} is all dolled up and ready for a night on the town!"
- `EVENT_BLESSING_REW11`: "{catname} finds a secret hatch and pulls it open to look inside..."
- `EVENT_BLESSING_REW12`: "{catname} makes a new friend! <br/>  <br/> A stray cat joins the party."
- `EVENT_BLESSING_REW13`: "{catname} discovers a partially buried treasure chest and digs it up!"
- `EVENT_BLESSING_REW14`: "{catname} finds a large pile of food! The cats chow down on the lavish feast!"
- `EVENT_BLESSING_REW15`: "{catname} finds a rare piece of candy and levels up!"
- `EVENT_BLESSING_REW16`: "{catname} spies a four leaf clover!"
- `EVENT_BLESSING_REW17`: "{catname} finds an old shoe and wears it for a while. When {he} finally takes it off, {catname} can run much faster than before!"
- `EVENT_BLESSING_REW18`: "{catname} finds a plump and delicious looking mushroom and eats it!"
- `EVENT_BLESSING_REW19`: "{catname} digs through a trash heap and finds something valuable!"
- `EVENT_BLESSING_REW20`: "{catname} finds a syringe full of a strange liquid. {He} doesn't hesitate!"
- `EVENT_BLESSING_REW21`: "{catname} finds a tin full of super rare candies! <br/>  <br/> The whole party gets one!"

```
Blessing {
    intro {
        title "Blessing!"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame blessing
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        goto end

        outcome {
            play_animation [resultBlessing .5]
            random_pool [
                //common
                { 
                    set_frame 1 
                    prompt "EVENT_BLESSING_REW1" 
                    heal 5
                }
                { 
                    set_frame 2
                    prompt "EVENT_BLESSING_REW2"
                    gain_coins [5 15]
                }
                { 
                    set_frame 3
                    prompt "EVENT_BLESSING_REW3"
                    self_status_next_fight {
                        AddStartingMana 5
                    }
                } 
                { 
                    set_frame 4
                    prompt "EVENT_BLESSING_REW4" 
                    next_event_bonus 2
                }
                { 
                    set_frame 5
                    prompt "EVENT_BLESSING_REW5" 
                    gain_familiar CharmedFly
                } 
                
                //uncommon
                {
                    set_frame 6
                    prompt "EVENT_BLESSING_REW6" 
                    ally_ambush_next_fights 1
                }   
                {
                    set_frame 7
                    prompt "EVENT_BLESSING_REW7" 
                    get_item_from_pool consumables
                }   
                {   
                    set_frame 8
                    prompt "EVENT_BLESSING_REW8" 
                    permanent_stats {
                        int 1
                    }
                }   
                {   
                    set_frame 9
                    prompt "EVENT_BLESSING_REW9" 
                    permanent_stats {
                        str 1
                    }
                }   
                {   
                    set_frame 10
                    prompt "EVENT_BLESSING_REW10" 
                    permanent_stats {
                        cha 1
                    }
                }
                {   
                    set_frame 11
                    prompt "EVENT_BLESSING_REW11" 
                    get_item_from_pool treasure_easy
                }  
                    
                    
                //rare
                {   
                    set_frame 12
                    prompt "EVENT_BLESSING_REW12" 
                    gain_cat_familiar 1
                }   
                {   
                    set_frame 13
                    prompt "EVENT_BLESSING_REW13" 
                    get_item_from_pool chapter
                }   
                {   
                    set_frame 14
                    prompt "EVENT_BLESSING_REW14" 
                    party_heal 10
                    gain_food [5 10]
                    permanent_stats {
                        con 1
                    }
                }   
                {   
                    set_frame 15
                    prompt "EVENT_BLESSING_REW15" 
                    level_up self
                }  
                {   
                    set_frame 16
                    prompt "EVENT_BLESSING_REW16" 
                    permanent_stats {
                        lck 1
                    }
                }  
                {   
                    set_frame 17
                    prompt "EVENT_BLESSING_REW17" 
                    permanent_stats {
                        spd 1
                    }
                }  
                    
                //v rare
                {   
                    set_frame 18
                    prompt "EVENT_BLESSING_REW18" 
                    permanent_stats {
                        str 1
                        dex 1
                        con 1
                        int 1
                        cha 1
                        spd 1
                        lck 1
                    }
                }   
                {
                    set_frame 19
                    prompt "EVENT_BLESSING_REW19" 
                    get_item_from_pool rare
                }
                {   
                    set_frame 20
                    prompt "EVENT_BLESSING_REW20" 
                    random_mutation 1
                }
                {   
                    set_frame 21
                    prompt "EVENT_BLESSING_REW21"
                    level_up all
                }
            ]
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `Happening`
**Source:** `special_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_HAPPENING_NAME`: "Something's Happening!"
- `EVENT_HAPPENING_FOG_REW`: "A dense fog starts rolling in. The cats can barely see in front of them!"
- `EVENT_HAPPENING_RAIN_REW`: "The sky darkens with clouds and raindrops drizzle down, forming small puddles on the ground and wetting the cats' soft fur."
- `EVENT_HAPPENING_HEAVYRAIN_REW`: "Dark clouds churn above as a heavy rain begins to pelt down, drenching the cats in a constant deluge."
- `EVENT_HAPPENING_WINDY_REW`: "A strong wind howls around the cats. Dirt and debris kicked up from the tempest pelt against them, nearly knocking the cats off their feet!"
- `EVENT_HAPPENING_SANDSTORM_REW`: "A thick sandstorm kicks up. Small grains of sand, travelling at furious speeds through the air, sting the cats through their fur!"
- `EVENT_HAPPENING_OVERGROWTH_REW`: "Tall grass and brambles are thick here! <br/>  <br/> The cats push their way through the long grass, trying desperately not to get caught in the thorny branches."
- `EVENT_HAPPENING_EARTHQUAKE_REW`: "Tremors shake the ground beneath the cats' feet! <br/>  <br/> Rocks and debris tumble down around them, dislodged from the violent shaking!"
- `EVENT_HAPPENING_WILDFIRE_REW`: "Embers fill the air as a raging wildfire engulfs the horizon. <br/>  <br/> The cats cough, spitting out chunks of dry ash, as smoke fills their lungs."
- `EVENT_HAPPENING_HEATWAVE_REW`: "A brutal heatwave settles in the air... <br/>  <br/> The cats sluggishly plod on, their warm fur exacerbating their misery."
- `EVENT_HAPPENING_SNOW_REW`: "The temperature suddenly drops and thick snow begins falling around the cats. <br/>  <br/> At first the cats swat at the pretty little snowflakes, but as the snow piles up the party decides they liked it much better when it was warm out."
- `EVENT_HAPPENING_ACIDRAIN_REW`: "A light rain begins to fall around the cats. At first they are not worried... <br/>  <br/> But it is raining acid! The cats howl as it burns them!"
- `EVENT_HAPPENING_THUNDERSTORM_REW`: "The distant rumbling of thunder quickly turns into a full lightning storm, as rain pours down and fierce winds blow the cats off their now soggy feet!"
- `EVENT_HAPPENING_FLASHFLOOD_REW`: "A torrent of water dumps from the sky and begins pooling in large pools around the cats! <br/>  <br/> The flash flood claims more and more of the terrain as the cats run to high ground!"
- `EVENT_HAPPENING_TRASHDAY_REW`: "It must be trash day. Bags of discarded refuse line the path forward!"
- `EVENT_HAPPENING_FROGS_REW`: "It's raining frogs!?! <br/>  <br/> The slimy little fellows bounce down like water balloons, and the air is filled with the sound of their ribbits!"
- `EVENT_HAPPENING_PIPEBLOCKAGE_REW`: "A nearby sewer pipe erupts, triggering a chain reaction of other pipes nearby! Sewage sprays into the air, piling into large mounds of sludge. <br/>  <br/> Stench from the freed blockage permeates the air like thick molasses accosting the cats' sensitive noses..."
- `EVENT_HAPPENING_PAYDAY_REW`: "It's payday! Various coins lay scattered about, carelessly dropped in a rush to spend them!"
- `EVENT_HAPPENING_HUNTINGSEASON_REW`: "The cats notice an abundance of bear traps laid out. <br/>  <br/> It must be hunting season, they had better watch their step!"
- `EVENT_HAPPENING_RESTLESSDEAD_REW`: "Patches of earth begin to shake around the cats, as rotting paws reach up from beneath the ground! The dead are restless!"
- `EVENT_HAPPENING_FIREFLIES_REW`: "Swarms of fireflies surround the cats, their bioluminescent lights dancing in a beautiful symphony of floating stars!"
- `EVENT_HAPPENING_BUTTERFLIES_REW`: "The cats can't believe their eyes! <br/>  <br/> Swarms of beautiful butterflies fill the air, landing on every surface in a blanket of color!"
- `EVENT_HAPPENING_FLIES_REW`: "Swarms of flies fill the air! <br/>  <br/> The cats swat at them and shake their tails but there are too many of them to stop!"
- `EVENT_HAPPENING_ROBOTS_REW`: "Noisy terrible machines are rolling around, snapping their strange metal arms at everything in sight! <br/>  <br/> A robot uprising has begun!"
- `EVENT_HAPPENING_HAUNTEDNIGHT_REW`: "Oh, what a horrible night to have a curse... <br/>  <br/> Ethereal cries of ghostly figures fill the air!"
- `EVENT_HAPPENING_FIRESTORM_REW`: "Walls of fire rapidly spring up, blocking the way! <br/>  <br/> The cats hurry to navigate the burning landscape, fleeing the fury of a firestorm!"
- `EVENT_HAPPENING_METEORNADO_REW`: "A giant meteornado engulfs the area! Large boulders and stones are swept up, pelting everything still foolishly standing in the path of the maelstrom!"
- `EVENT_HAPPENING_BIRDMIGRATION_REW`: "Flocks of birds travel above in the sky... <br/>  <br/> Some land on nearby perches, resting for a moment before continuing on their migration."
- `EVENT_HAPPENING_COCKROACHES_REW`: "Swarms of cockroaches ripple like waves across the surface of the ground! <br/>  <br/> The cats yelp in terror as the hard little creatures bite their paws and try to climb their legs!"
- `EVENT_HAPPENING_JUDGEMENTDAY_REW`: "Blinding beams of holy light from the heavens begin striking the ground nearby, obliterating everything caught in their deadly rays. <br/>  <br/> It is judgment day!"
- `EVENT_HAPPENING_PANDEMONIUM_REW`: "A strange fervor grips the minds of the cats, and they tear about in a frantic pandemonium, striking at anything, or anyone, that gets in their way!"
- `EVENT_HAPPENING_THEHOLLOWING_REW`: "Strange muffled cries fill the night... the howls and screams of the dead, awakened from their slumber... <br/>  <br/> The Hollowing has begun!"
- `EVENT_HAPPENING_OILSPILL_REW`: "Large steel drums lay strewn about, their inky contents spilled out onto the ground!"
- `EVENT_HAPPENING_BLIZZARD_REW`: "A violent frigid wind sweeps through, chilling the cats to their core! <br/>  <br/> The cats brace themselves against the frozen torrent, even as snow plasters against their faces and thunder rumbles in the air!"
- `EVENT_HAPPENING_HURRICANE_REW`: "A terrible hurricane rips through the area, tossing everything up in the air and into a violent turmoil of wind and water!"
- `EVENT_HAPPENING_SPIKES_REW`: "Strange thorns start growing out of everything... <br/>  <br/> The cats look down in astonishment as thin barbs stick out from beneath their own fur! <br/>  <br/> It will be a while until their next bath!"
- `EVENT_HAPPENING_BLESSEDDAY_REW`: "A radiant light fills the surroundings with holy energy, and the cats feel invigorated by its warm embrace."
- `EVENT_HAPPENING_STEALTHMISSION_REW`: "There is a strange stillness here... <br/>  <br/> The silence accentuates every step and the cats move as stealthily as they can!"
- `EVENT_HAPPENING_INFESTATION_REW`: "Swarms of small insects darken the sky, latching onto and infesting everything in sight!"
- `EVENT_HAPPENING_ERUPTION_REW`: "Hot lava flows from a huge mound not far away! Molten debris flies through the air and dark clouds billow forth from the Earth's maw!"
- `EVENT_HAPPENING_DRUGAWARENESS_REW`: "The cats seemed to have stumbled into a drug awareness day party!"
- `EVENT_HAPPENING_TRAININGDAY_REW`: "Weird looking dummy cats can be seen about, just waiting to be pounced on! <br/>  <br/> It's training day? The cats wonder if striking the dummies will be like using the scratching post back home?"
- `EVENT_HAPPENING_TORNADOES_REW`: "Violent tornadoes form from distant air currents high above! <br/>  <br/> The windy tendrils reach down like fingers of a long hand and strike the earth, lifting debris up and tossing it indiscriminately into the air!"
- `EVENT_HAPPENING_CRAZYWEATHER_REW`: "The weather is going crazy! First rain, then snow, then lightning! <br/>  <br/> The cats don't know what is going on, but if they were back safe at home it might be fun to watch from a window."
- `EVENT_HAPPENING_HUNTINGBOUNTIES_REW`: "Gunshots ring out in the distance followed by an unnerving quiet... <br/>  <br/> Someone is hunting bounties... the cats had better be careful!"
- `EVENT_HAPPENING_MINEFIELD_REW`: "Large craters in the ground are scattered about, and the smell of sulfur is in the air. <br/>  <br/> The cats have stepped into a minefield!"
- `EVENT_HAPPENING_ALIENINVASION_REW`: "Aliens are invading!?! <br/>  <br/> The cats look around in bewilderment as flying saucers whiz by and little strange people hop out, firing lasers!"
- `EVENT_HAPPENING_BIRDEMIC_REW`: "The sky appears to darken as numerous birds circle above. <br/>  <br/> The cats look around them in surprise as birds begin to land everywhere!"
- `EVENT_HAPPENING_METEORSHOWER_REW`: "The cats look up in wonder as majestic balls of fire streak through the sky. <br/>  <br/> Their awe shifts to terror as the loud booms of meteors striking the ground reverberate through the air!"
- `EVENT_CRATERWEATHER_REW2`: "A blinding light from the sky illuminates the landscape in terrifying clarity. <br/>  <br/> The cats cower and cover their eyes from the scorching rays!"
- `EVENT_CRATERWEATHER_REW3`: "The cats look on in bewilderment as rocks around them begin hovering in the air and flying in every direction!"
- `EVENT_CRATERWEATHER_REW4`: "The air shimmers in vibrant hues and the cats retch as ripples in the air cause their bodies to warp and mutate!"
- `EVENT_CRATERWEATHER_REW5`: "Strange eggs begin to pop up all over the ground... <br/>  <br/> The cats look at them inquisitively, not sure what to do."
- `EVENT_CRATERWEATHER_REW6`: "Brambles begin rapidly growing all around the cats... <br/>  <br/> Something about the strange bulbs growing amidst the thorns is very off-putting!"

```
Happening {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_HAPPENING_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame happening
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        goto end

        outcome {
            play_animation [resultWeather .5]
            weather_roll [ //common = weight 1, uncommon = weight .5, rare = weight .25
                //enemies (1)
                { 
                    weight 1
                    set_frame 2
                    prompt "EVENT_HAPPENING_FOG_REW"
                    
                    add_weather Fog
                }
                { 
                    weight 1
                    set_frame 4
                    prompt "EVENT_HAPPENING_RAIN_REW"
                    
                    add_weather Rain
                }
                { 
                    weight .5
                    set_frame 5
                    prompt "EVENT_HAPPENING_HEAVYRAIN_REW"
                    
                    add_weather HeavyRain
                }
                { 
                    weight 1
                    set_frame 6
                    prompt "EVENT_HAPPENING_WINDY_REW"
                    
                    add_weather Windy
                }
                { 
                    weight 1
                    set_frame 7
                    prompt "EVENT_HAPPENING_SANDSTORM_REW"
                    
                    add_weather Sandstorm
                }
                { 
                    weight .5
                    set_frame 8
                    prompt "EVENT_HAPPENING_OVERGROWTH_REW"

                    add_weather Overgrowth
                }
                { 
                    weight .5
                    set_frame 9
                    prompt "EVENT_HAPPENING_EARTHQUAKE_REW"

                    add_weather Earthquake
                }
                { 
                    weight .5
                    set_frame 10
                    prompt "EVENT_HAPPENING_WILDFIRE_REW"
                    
                    add_weather Wildfire
                }

                { 
                    weight .5
                    set_frame 11
                    prompt "EVENT_HAPPENING_HEATWAVE_REW"
                    
                    add_weather HeatWave
                }

                { 
                    weight 1
                    set_frame 12
                    prompt "EVENT_HAPPENING_SNOW_REW"
                    
                    add_weather Snow
                }

                { 
                    weight .25
                    set_frame 15
                    prompt "EVENT_HAPPENING_ACIDRAIN_REW"

                    add_weather AcidRain
                }

                { 
                    weight .5
                    set_frame 18
                    prompt "EVENT_HAPPENING_THUNDERSTORM_REW"
                    
                    add_weather Thunderstorm
                }

                { 
                    weight .25
                    set_frame 20
                    prompt "EVENT_HAPPENING_FLASHFLOOD_REW"
                    
                    add_weather FlashFlood
                }

                //sparse stuff

                { 
                    weight .5
                    set_frame 25
                    prompt "EVENT_HAPPENING_TRASHDAY_REW"
                    
                    add_weather TrashDay
                }

                { 
                    weight .5
                    set_frame 30
                    prompt "EVENT_HAPPENING_FROGS_REW"
                    
                    add_weather RainingFrogs
                }

                { 
                    weight .5
                    set_frame 37
                    prompt "EVENT_HAPPENING_PIPEBLOCKAGE_REW"
                    
                    add_weather PipeBlockage
                }

                { 
                    weight .5
                    set_frame 38
                    prompt "EVENT_HAPPENING_PAYDAY_REW"
                    
                    add_weather PayDay
                }

                { 
                    weight .5
                    set_frame 40
                    prompt "EVENT_HAPPENING_HUNTINGSEASON_REW"
                    
                    add_weather HuntingSeason
                }

                { 
                    weight .5
                    requires_flag RestlessDeadUnlocked

                    set_frame 41
                    prompt "EVENT_HAPPENING_RESTLESSDEAD_REW"
                    
                    add_weather RestlessDead
                }

                //bug swarms

                { 
                    weight .25
                    set_frame 42
                    prompt "EVENT_HAPPENING_FIREFLIES_REW"
                    
                    add_weather FireflySwarm
                }

                { 
                    weight .25
                    set_frame 43
                    prompt "EVENT_HAPPENING_BUTTERFLIES_REW"
                    
                    add_weather ButterflySwarm
                }

                { 
                    weight .25
                    set_frame 44
                    prompt "EVENT_HAPPENING_FLIES_REW"
                    
                    add_weather FlySwarm
                }


                //new stuff
                { 
                    weight .25
                    requires_flag RobotUprisingUnlocked

                    set_frame 48
                    prompt EVENT_HAPPENING_ROBOTS_REW
                    
                    add_weather RobotUprising
                }
                { 
                    weight .25
                    requires_flag HauntedNightUnlocked

                    set_frame 3
                    prompt EVENT_HAPPENING_HAUNTEDNIGHT_REW
                    
                    add_weather HauntedNight
                }

                { 
                    weight .5
                    set_frame 46
                    prompt EVENT_HAPPENING_FIRESTORM_REW
                    
                    add_weather Firestorm
                }

                { 
                    weight .25
                    set_frame 47
                    prompt EVENT_HAPPENING_METEORNADO_REW
                    
                    add_weather Meteornado
                }

                { 
                    weight .25
                    set_frame 50
                    prompt EVENT_HAPPENING_BIRDMIGRATION_REW
                    
                    add_weather BirdMigration
                }

                { 
                    weight .25
                    set_frame 51
                    prompt EVENT_HAPPENING_COCKROACHES_REW
                    
                    add_weather CockroachSwarm
                }

                { 
                    weight .25
                    set_frame 52
                    prompt EVENT_HAPPENING_JUDGEMENTDAY_REW
                    
                    add_weather JudgementDay
                }

                /*{ 
                    weight .25
                    set_frame 53
                    prompt EVENT_HAPPENING_PANDEMONIUM_REW
                    
                    add_weather Pandemonium
                }*/

                { 
                    weight .25
                    set_frame 54
                    prompt EVENT_HAPPENING_THEHOLLOWING_REW
                    
                    add_weather TheHollowing
                }

                { 
                    weight .25
                    set_frame 55
                    prompt EVENT_HAPPENING_OILSPILL_REW
                    
                    add_weather OilSpill
                }

                { 
                    weight .5
                    set_frame 56
                    prompt EVENT_HAPPENING_BLIZZARD_REW
                    
                    add_weather Blizzard
                }

                { 
                    weight .25
                    set_frame 57
                    prompt EVENT_HAPPENING_HURRICANE_REW
                    
                    add_weather Hurricane
                }

                { 
                    weight .25
                    set_frame 58
                    prompt EVENT_HAPPENING_SPIKES_REW
                    
                    add_weather StrangeSpikes
                }

                { 
                    weight .25
                    set_frame 59
                    prompt EVENT_HAPPENING_BLESSEDDAY_REW
                    
                    add_weather BlessedDay
                }

                { 
                    weight .25
                    set_frame 60
                    prompt EVENT_HAPPENING_STEALTHMISSION_REW
                    
                    add_weather StealthMission
                }

                { 
                    weight .5
                    set_frame 61
                    prompt EVENT_HAPPENING_INFESTATION_REW
                    
                    add_weather Infestation
                }

                { 
                    weight .25
                    set_frame 62
                    prompt EVENT_HAPPENING_ERUPTION_REW
                    
                    add_weather Eruption
                }

                { 
                    weight .5
                    set_frame 63
                    prompt EVENT_HAPPENING_DRUGAWARENESS_REW
                    
                    add_weather Drugs
                }

                { 
                    weight .5
                    set_frame 64
                    prompt EVENT_HAPPENING_TRAININGDAY_REW
                    
                    add_weather TrainingDay
                }

                { 
                    weight .25
                    set_frame 65
                    prompt EVENT_HAPPENING_TORNADOES_REW
                    
                    add_weather Tornado
                }

                { 
                    weight .5
                    set_frame 66
                    prompt EVENT_HAPPENING_CRAZYWEATHER_REW
                    
                    add_weather CrazyWeather
                }

                { 
                    weight .25
                    set_frame 67
                    prompt EVENT_HAPPENING_HUNTINGBOUNTIES_REW
                    
                    add_weather BountyHunting
                }

                { 
                    weight .25
                    set_frame 68
                    prompt EVENT_HAPPENING_MINEFIELD_REW
                    
                    add_weather Minesweeper
                }

                { 
                    weight .25
                    requires_flag AlienInvasionUnlocked

                    set_frame 69
                    prompt EVENT_HAPPENING_ALIENINVASION_REW
                    
                    add_weather AlienInvasion
                }

                { 
                    weight .25
                    set_frame 75
                    prompt "EVENT_HAPPENING_BIRDEMIC_REW"
                    requires_counter [BonusBirdsKilled 25]
                    
                    add_weather Birdemic
                }

                //crater stuff
                { 
                    weight .25
                    set_frame 16
                    prompt "EVENT_HAPPENING_METEORSHOWER_REW"
                    requires_flag MeteorShowerUnlocked
                    
                    add_weather MeteorShower
                }
                { 
                    weight .25
                    set_frame 70
                    prompt "EVENT_CRATERWEATHER_REW2"
                    requires_flag SolarFlareUnlocked
                    
                    add_weather SolarFlare
                }
                { 
                    weight .25
                    set_frame 71
                    prompt "EVENT_CRATERWEATHER_REW3"
                    requires_flag GeomagneticStormUnlocked
                    
                    add_weather GeomagneticStorm
                }
                { 
                    weight .25
                    set_frame 74
                    prompt "EVENT_CRATERWEATHER_REW4"
                    requires_flag TheShimmerUnlocked
                    
                    add_weather TheShimmer
                }
                { 
                    weight .25
                    set_frame 72
                    prompt "EVENT_CRATERWEATHER_REW5"
                    requires_flag StrangeEggsUnlocked
                    
                    add_weather StrangeEggs
                }
                { 
                    weight .25
                    set_frame 73
                    prompt "EVENT_CRATERWEATHER_REW6"
                    requires_flag AlienOvergrowthUnlocked
                    
                    add_weather AlienOvergrowth
                }
            ]
        }
    }
}
```

### `ExtraLife`
**Source:** `special_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_ACAT_NAME`: "A cat!"
- `EVENT_ACAT_REW1`: "A new cat starts following the party!"

```
ExtraLife {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_ACAT_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame blessing
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        goto end

        outcome {
            play_animation [resultGood .5]
            random_pool [
                //common
                { 
                    set_frame 12
                    prompt "EVENT_ACAT_REW1" 
                    gain_cat_familiar 1
                    get_item Neverstone
                }
            ]
        }
    }
}
```

---

## File: `specific_events.gon`

### `CraterWeatherEvent`
**Source:** `specific_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_CRATERWEATHER_NAME`: "Stacy's Experiment"
- `EVENT_CRATERWEATHER_QUES`: "Amidst the vines and rocks a strange floating rock creature blocks the path forward. <br/>  <br/> The party must choose a weather option to proceed!"
- `EVENT_CRATERWEATHER_ANSW1`: "Meteor Shower"
- `EVENT_HAPPENING_METEORSHOWER_REW`: "The cats look up in wonder as majestic balls of fire streak through the sky. <br/>  <br/> Their awe shifts to terror as the loud booms of meteors striking the ground reverberate through the air!"
- `EVENT_CRATERWEATHER_ANSW2`: "Solar Flare"
- `EVENT_CRATERWEATHER_REW2`: "A blinding light from the sky illuminates the landscape in terrifying clarity. <br/>  <br/> The cats cower and cover their eyes from the scorching rays!"
- `EVENT_CRATERWEATHER_ANSW3`: "Geomagnetic Storm"
- `EVENT_CRATERWEATHER_REW3`: "The cats look on in bewilderment as rocks around them begin hovering in the air and flying in every direction!"
- `EVENT_CRATERWEATHER_ANSW4`: "The Shimmer"
- `EVENT_CRATERWEATHER_REW4`: "The air shimmers in vibrant hues and the cats retch as ripples in the air cause their bodies to warp and mutate!"
- `EVENT_CRATERWEATHER_ANSW5`: "Strange Eggs"
- `EVENT_CRATERWEATHER_REW5`: "Strange eggs begin to pop up all over the ground... <br/>  <br/> The cats look at them inquisitively, not sure what to do."
- `EVENT_CRATERWEATHER_ANSW6`: "Alien Overgrowth"
- `EVENT_CRATERWEATHER_REW6`: "Brambles begin rapidly growing all around the cats... <br/>  <br/> Something about the strange bulbs growing amidst the thorns is very off-putting!"

```
CraterWeatherEvent {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_CRATERWEATHER_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame crater_weather
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_CRATERWEATHER_QUES"
        shuffle_options true
        max_options 3

        options {
            w1 {
                label "EVENT_CRATERWEATHER_ANSW1"
                stat none
                animation choice_misc

                good {
                    set_frame 7
                    prompt "EVENT_HAPPENING_METEORSHOWER_REW"
                    add_weather MeteorShower
                    set_legacy_token MeteorShowerUnlocked
                }
            }
            w2 {
                label "EVENT_CRATERWEATHER_ANSW2"
                stat none
                animation choice_misc

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    prompt "EVENT_CRATERWEATHER_REW2"
                    add_weather SolarFlare
                    set_legacy_token SolarFlareUnlocked
                }
            }
            w3 {
                label "EVENT_CRATERWEATHER_ANSW3"
                stat none
                animation choice_misc

                good {
                    set_frame 3
                    prompt "EVENT_CRATERWEATHER_REW3"
                    add_weather GeomagneticStorm
                    set_legacy_token GeomagneticStormUnlocked
                }
            }
            w4 {
                label "EVENT_CRATERWEATHER_ANSW4"
                stat none
                animation choice_misc

                good {
                    set_frame 6
                    prompt "EVENT_CRATERWEATHER_REW4"
                    add_weather TheShimmer
                    set_legacy_token TheShimmerUnlocked
                }
            }
            w5 {
                label "EVENT_CRATERWEATHER_ANSW5"
                stat none
                animation choice_misc

                good {
                    set_frame 4
                    prompt "EVENT_CRATERWEATHER_REW5"
                    add_weather StrangeEggs
                    set_legacy_token StrangeEggsUnlocked
                }
            }
            w6 {
                label "EVENT_CRATERWEATHER_ANSW6"
                stat none
                animation choice_misc

                good {
                    set_frame 5
                    prompt "EVENT_CRATERWEATHER_REW6"
                    add_weather AlienOvergrowth
                    set_legacy_token AlienOvergrowthUnlocked
                }
            }

        }
    }
}
```

---

### `Butch_Tutorial`
**Source:** `specific_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_BUTCH_NAME`: "Butch"
- `EVENT_BUTCHTUTORIAL_QUES`: "Butch blocks your path! <br/>  <br/> Should you use brawn [img:str] <br/> or brains [img:int] to get past him? <br/>  <br/> Check your stats <br/> to see the odds of success!"
- `EVENT_BUTCHTUTORIAL_ATTACK_ANSW`: "Attack Butch"
- `EVENT_BUTCHTUTORIAL_REW1`: "{catname}'s punch misses completely, smashing hard into the ground! <br/>  <br/> [i]"You broke your paw just trying to hit me! Your [img:str] is so low, why would you pick that option?"[/i]"
- `EVENT_BUTCHTUTORIAL_OUTSMART_ANSW`: "Outsmart Butch"
- `EVENT_BUTCHTUTORIAL_REW2`: "{catname} points cleverly behind Butch, distracting him. <br/>  <br/> [i]"Well hello mr. fancy pants! You're lucky your [img:int] is so high or you'd be chewin' rocks!"[/i]"

```
Butch_Tutorial {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_BUTCH_NAME"
        cat_choice random //choose, random, none (random and none are equivalent)
        choose_cat_with_highest_stat int
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame butch
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_BUTCHTUTORIAL_QUES"

        options {
            attack {
                label "EVENT_BUTCHTUTORIAL_ATTACK_ANSW"
                stat str

                bad {
                    set_frame 2

                    prompt "EVENT_BUTCHTUTORIAL_REW1"
                    injury str
                }
            }

            outsmart {
                label "EVENT_BUTCHTUTORIAL_OUTSMART_ANSW"
                stat int

                good {
                    set_frame 2

                    prompt "EVENT_BUTCHTUTORIAL_REW2"
                    get_item Catnip
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

## File: `theend_events.gon`

### `BallOfCancer`
**Source:** `theend_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_BALLOFCANCER_NAME`: "Ball of Cancer"
- `EVENT_BALLOFCANCER_QUES`: "A grotesque, writhing, cancerous mass of flesh lies in a heap before {catname}. <br/>  <br/> Perhaps once this thing was a creature but it has now lost any recognizable form."
- `EVENT_EAT_ANSW`: "Eat"
- `EVENT_BALLOFCANCER_REW1`: "{catname} tries to eat from the large mass of flesh. It doesn't taste great but satisfies {him} a tad."
- `EVENT_BALLOFCANCER_REW2`: "{catname} bites into the cancerous mass, unsure what to expect. <br/>  <br/> It tastes... odd. As {he} continues to eat from it, {catname} feels {his} body rapidly begin to mutate!"
- `EVENT_BALLOFCANCER_REW3`: "{catname} takes a large bite from the strange creature. It tastes pretty gross."
- `EVENT_BALLOFCANCER_REW4`: "{catname} eats part of the disgusting creature. It tastes vile and wriggles on the way down!"
- `EVENT_KISS_ANSW`: "Kiss"
- `EVENT_BALLOFCANCER_REW5`: "{catname} leans in and kisses the strange creature... <br/>  <br/> Hard to tell, but it seems to have liked the affection."
- `EVENT_BALLOFCANCER_REW6`: "{catname} plants a large kiss on the strange creature. <br/>  <br/> It smiles in a gross but reassuring way and begins to follow {catname} around!"
- `EVENT_BALLOFCANCER_REW7`: "As {catname} brings {his} face close to the mass it attacks {him}, ripping off {catname}'s mouth!"
- `EVENT_BALLOFCANCER_REW8`: "{catname} howls in distress as the horrific creature latches on to {his} face! <br/>  <br/> The cats look on in horror as {catname} turns to them, {his} body shaking in fear... <br/>  <br/> {catname}'s mouth and eyes are gone!"
- `EVENT_DESTROY_ANSW`: "Destroy"
- `EVENT_BALLOFCANCER_REW9`: "{catname} crushes the frail mass, sending moist hunks of meat flying in all directions..."
- `EVENT_BALLOFCANCER_REW10`: "As {catname} tears the mass of cancer apart, {he} feels a fantastic surge of energy rush through {him}!"
- `EVENT_BALLOFCANCER_REW11`: "{catname} strikes the mass with {his} paw, but it gets stuck. <br/>  <br/> {catname} screams in pain as {his} arm is pulled further and further into the writhing mass until it is pulled completely off!"
- `EVENT_BALLOFCANCER_REW12`: "{catname} strikes at the ball of cancer. It seems to have little effect except to make it mad! <br/>  <br/> The strange mass shifts and attacks {catname} back!"

```
BallOfCancer {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_BALLOFCANCER_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame ball_of_cancer
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_BALLOFCANCER_QUES"

        options {
            eat {
                label "EVENT_EAT_ANSW"
                stat con

                good {
                    set_frame 4
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_BALLOFCANCER_REW1"
                            heal 1
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_BALLOFCANCER_REW2"
                            random_mutation 3
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 5
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_BALLOFCANCER_REW3"
                            damage 1
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_BALLOFCANCER_REW4" 
                            gain_disorder Cancer
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            kiss {
                label "EVENT_KISS_ANSW"
                stat cha

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_BALLOFCANCER_REW5"
                            random_mutation 1
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_BALLOFCANCER_REW6"
                            random_mutation 2
                            random_pool [
                                {
                                    gain_familiar CharmedCancerCat
                                }
                                {
                                    gain_familiar CharmedFloast
                                }

                            ]
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_BALLOFCANCER_REW7"
                            mutation {
                                mouth -2
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_BALLOFCANCER_REW8" 
                            mutation {
                                mouth -2
                                eyes -2
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            destroy {
                label "EVENT_DESTROY_ANSW"
                stat str

                good {
                    set_frame 6
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_BALLOFCANCER_REW9"
                            get_item_from_pool meat_items
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_BALLOFCANCER_REW10"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                AllStatsUp 1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 7
                            prompt "EVENT_BALLOFCANCER_REW11"
                            random_mutation_from_set {
                                arm1 -2
                                arm2 -2
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 3
                            prompt "EVENT_BALLOFCANCER_REW12" 
                            gain_disorder Cancer
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `MysteriousBuilding`
**Source:** `theend_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSBUILDING_NAME`: "Mysterious Building"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSBUILDING_QUES`: "A mysterious building looms ahead. {catname} approaches cautiously... <br/>  <br/> An open doorway leads within, but {catname}'s eyes cannot pierce into the shadowed interior."
- `EVENT_ENTER_ANSW`: "Enter"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSBUILDING_REW1`: "{catname} sneaks up to the doorway, fearing the worst... <br/>  <br/> Inside {he} finds a shop!"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSBUILDING_REW2`: "{catname} boldly runs into the ominous structure... <br/>  <br/> Inside is a rare discounted shop!"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSBUILDING_REW3`: "{catname} thinks {he} can see something within the interior as {he} approaches the doorway. <br/>  <br/> Legs trembling, but not wanting to lose {his} nerve, {catname} ventures within..."
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSBUILDING_REW4`: "{catname} can't shake the feeling this was a terrible idea... <br/>  <br/> A chill goes down {catname}'s spine and {his} hair stands up on end."
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"
- `EVENT_MYSTERIOUSBUILDING_REW5`: "This place is eerie enough as it is, no need to venture into ominous buildings!"

```
MysteriousBuilding {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSBUILDING_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame mysterious_building
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSBUILDING_QUES"

        options {
            enter {
                label "EVENT_ENTER_ANSW"
                stat none

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSBUILDING_REW1"
                            shop_now Event_SmallShop
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSBUILDING_REW2"
                            shop_now Event_RareShop
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSBUILDING_REW3"
                            next_event_bonus -1
                            event_now_same_cat random
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSBUILDING_REW4" 
                            event_now_same_cat Tragedy
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            ignore {
                label "EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave
                
                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_MYSTERIOUSBUILDING_REW5"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `CrackInTheEarth`
**Source:** `theend_events.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_CRACKINTHEEARTH_NAME`: "Crack in the Earth"
- `EVENT_CRACKINTHEEARTH_QUES`: "{catname} discovers a large crack in the earth. Who knows how far down it leads?"
- `EVENT_INSPECT_ANSW`: "Inspect"
- `EVENT_CRACKINTHEEARTH_REW1`: "{catname} looks beneath the lip of the crack and spies something poking out just within reach!"
- `EVENT_CRACKINTHEEARTH_REW2`: "There is a strange membrane blocking the way down, but {catname} sees something lodged in the barrier and reaches in to pull it out! <br/>  <br/> {catname} pulls it out, but the strange surface mutates {him}!"
- `EVENT_CRACKINTHEEARTH_REW3`: "As {catname} approaches the crevice a terrifying monster rises up and attacks {him}! <br/>  <br/> {catname} is barely able to escape its grasp!"
- `EVENT_CRACKINTHEEARTH_REW4`: "Fear grips {catname} as a terrifying monster looms out of the crack and attacks {him}! <br/>  <br/> {catname} runs for {his} life!"
- `EVENT_ENTER_ANSW`: "Enter"
- `EVENT_CRACKINTHEEARTH_REW5`: "{catname} follows the fracture down deep into the earth..."
- `EVENT_CRACKINTHEEARTH_REW6`: "{catname} finds a hidden pathway leading downwards at top of the crack and follows it below..."
- `EVENT_CRACKINTHEEARTH_REW7`: "{catname} can't shake a sense of foreboding as {he} scrambles {his} way down the narrow crack..."
- `EVENT_CRACKINTHEEARTH_REW8`: "{catname} struggles, but manages to navigate a way down the steep crevice. <br/>  <br/> What misfortunes could lie below?"
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"
- `EVENT_CRACKINTHEEARTH_REW9`: "{catname} takes a wide berth around the large crevice and makes {his} way safely past."

```
CrackInTheEarth {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_CRACKINTHEEARTH_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame crack_in_the_earth
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_CRACKINTHEEARTH_QUES"

        options {
            inspect {
                label "EVENT_INSPECT_ANSW"
                stat int

                good {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_CRACKINTHEEARTH_REW1"
                            get_item_from_pool chapter_common
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_CRACKINTHEEARTH_REW2"
                            get_item_from_pool chapter_rare
                            random_mutation 1
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_CRACKINTHEEARTH_REW3"
                            lose_item equipped
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_CRACKINTHEEARTH_REW4" 
                            injury cursed
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Fear 4
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            enter {
                label "EVENT_ENTER_ANSW"
                stat lck

                good {
                    set_frame 4
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_CRACKINTHEEARTH_REW5"
                            next_event_bonus 1
                            random_pool [
                                {
                                    event_now_same_cat DemonicIdol
                                }
                                {
                                    event_now_same_cat JaggedPathway
                                }
                                {
                                    event_now_same_cat MysteriousStranger
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_CRACKINTHEEARTH_REW6"
                            next_event_bonus 2
                            random_pool [
                                {
                                    event_now_same_cat DemonicIdol
                                }
                                {
                                    event_now_same_cat JaggedPathway
                                }
                                {
                                    event_now_same_cat MysteriousStranger
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 4
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_CRACKINTHEEARTH_REW7"
                            next_event_bonus -1
                            random_pool [
                                {
                                    event_now_same_cat DemonicIdol
                                }
                                {
                                    event_now_same_cat JaggedPathway
                                }
                                {
                                    event_now_same_cat MysteriousStranger
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_CRACKINTHEEARTH_REW8" 
                            next_event_bonus -2
                            random_pool [
                                {
                                    event_now_same_cat DemonicIdol
                                }
                                {
                                    event_now_same_cat JaggedPathway
                                }
                                {
                                    event_now_same_cat MysteriousStranger
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            ignore {
                label "EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave
                
                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_CRACKINTHEEARTH_REW9"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```
