## File: `treasure_box.gon`

### `Crate`
**Source:** `treasure_box.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_CRATE_NAME`: "Crate"
- `EVENT_CRATE_QUES`: "{catname} finds a large wooden crate. It appears to be in good condition... <br/>  <br/> {catname} wonders what treasures could be inside?"
- `EVENT_SMASH_ANSW`: "Smash"
- `EVENT_CRATE_REW1`: "{catname} manages to crack open the crate and its contents spill out!"
- `EVENT_CRATE_REW2`: "A lavish can of wet cat food is inside! {catname} pries it open and enjoys the feast!"
- `EVENT_CRATE_REW3`: "Breaking the lid off the crate, {catname} uncovers the valuable object it was protecting!"
- `EVENT_CRATE_REW4`: "Try as {he} might, {catname} fails to open the crate... <br/>  <br/> {catname} sulks away in shame. Cats love boxes!"
- `EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW`: "Examine"
- `EVENT_OPEN_ANSW`: "Open"

```
Crate {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_CRATE_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame crate
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_CRATE_QUES"

        options {
            smash {
                label "EVENT_SMASH_ANSW"
                stat str

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_CRATE_REW1"
                            random_pool [
                                { 
                                    gain_coins [1, 20] 
                                }{ 
                                    get_item_from_pool consumables 
                                }{ 
                                    prompt "EVENT_CRATE_REW2"
                                    full_heal 1 
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_CRATE_REW3"
                            random_pool [
                                { 
                                    get_item FurnitureBox
                                }{ 
                                    get_item_from_pool weapons
                                }{ 
                                    get_item_from_pool chapter
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    prompt "EVENT_CRATE_REW4"
                    //nothing, can't open crate
                }
            }

            examine {
                label "EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW"
                stat int

                copy_results smash
            }

            open {
                label "EVENT_OPEN_ANSW"
                stat lck

                copy_results smash
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `Dumpster`
**Source:** `treasure_box.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_LOCKEDDUMPSTER_NAME`: "Locked Dumpster"
- `EVENT_LOCKEDDUMPSTER_QUES`: "{catname} finds a dumpster. Oddly, there is a lock keeping it shut... <br/>  <br/> Why would you lock a dumpster?"
- `EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW`: "Examine"
- `EVENT_LOCKEDDUMPSTER_REW1`: "{catname} finds a way to force the lock open and flings open the lid! <br/>  <br/> Leaping into the dumpster, {catname} rifles through the trash inside until {he} finds something valuable!"
- `EVENT_LOCKEDDUMPSTER_REW2`: "{catname} fiddles with the lock until {he} can break it open. <br/>  <br/> The cats look down in horror as they find the dumpster is full of cat skeletons! There are scratch marks all over the inside of the bin... What a terrifying way to go! <br/>  <br/> Not wanting to be the next victim, the party flees in terror!"
- `EVENT_LOCKEDDUMPSTER_REW3`: "The dumpster opens slightly and a skeletal hand reaches out, grabbing {catname}! <br/>  <br/> Horrific visions of the creature's terrible death torment {his} mind!"
- `EVENT_PICK_ANSW`: "Pick"
- `EVENT_SMASH_ANSW`: "Smash"

```
Dumpster {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_LOCKEDDUMPSTER_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame dumpster
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_LOCKEDDUMPSTER_QUES"

        options {
            examine {
                label "EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW"
                stat int

                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_LOCKEDDUMPSTER_REW1"
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            random_pool [
                                { 
                                    gain_coins [10 20]
                                    gain_food [1 10]
                                }
                                { 
                                    get_item_from_pool chapter
                                }
                                { 
                                    get_item_from_pool consumables
                                    gain_food [10 20]
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                        rare {
                            random_pool [
                                {
                                    gain_coins [25 50]
                                }
                                { 
                                    get_item_from_pool any_chapter
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_LOCKEDDUMPSTER_REW2"
                            party_status_next_fight {
                                Fear 1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_LOCKEDDUMPSTER_REW3"
                            gain_disorder_from_pool mental_disorders
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            pick {
                label "EVENT_PICK_ANSW"
                stat dex
                animation choice_dex_alt

                copy_results examine
            }

            smash {
                label "EVENT_SMASH_ANSW"
                stat str

                copy_results examine
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `Safe`
**Source:** `treasure_box.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_SAFE_NAME`: "Safe"
- `EVENT_SAFE_QUES`: "{catname} finds a locked safe. <br/>  <br/> Although worn with age, the locking mechanism appears secure."
- `EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW`: "Examine"
- `EVENT_SAFE_REW1`: "With a *[i]click[/i]* the safe swings open and {catname} purrs in triumph at {his} accomplishment!"
- `EVENT_SAFE_REW2`: "{catname} attempts to open the safe, but it was a trap! <br/>  <br/> The safe explodes, pelting the cats in a hail of flaming debris!"
- `EVENT_SAFE_REW3`: "{catname} cleverly opens the safe and peers inside... <br/>  <br/> It contains only the skull of a small human child... {catname} can't see why {he}'d want that, and yet inexplicably {his} paw reaches slowly in and touches it!"
- `EVENT_PICK_ANSW`: "Pick"
- `EVENT_OPEN_ANSW`: "Open"

```
Safe {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_SAFE_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame safe
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_SAFE_QUES"

        options {
            examine {
                label "EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW"
                stat int

                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_SAFE_REW1"
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            random_pool [
                                { 
                                    gain_coins [20 30]
                                }
                                { 
                                    get_item_from_pool chapter
                                    random_chance {
                                        chance 50%
                                        get_item_from_pool chapter
                                    }
                                }
                                { 
                                    get_item FurnitureBox
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                        rare {
                            get_item_from_pool unique
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 3
                            prompt "EVENT_SAFE_REW2"
                            party_damage 5
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 2 //TODO: Need art for this result.
                            prompt "EVENT_SAFE_REW3"
                            get_parasite ChildSkull
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            pick {
                label "EVENT_PICK_ANSW"
                stat dex
                animation choice_dex_alt

                copy_results examine
            }

            open {
                label "EVENT_OPEN_ANSW"
                stat lck

                copy_results examine
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `Bottle`
**Source:** `treasure_box.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_BOTTLEOFUNKNOWNLIQUID_NAME`: "Bottle of Unknown Liquid"
- `EVENT_BOTTLEOFUNKNOWNLIQUID_QUES`: "{catname} finds a strange bottle of liquid. {He} tries to read the label, but the branding is vague as to what is actually inside... <br/>  <br/> {catname} wonders what the liquid could be?"
- `EVENT_DRINK_ANSW`: "Drink"
- `EVENT_BOTTLEOFUNKNOWNLIQUID_REW1`: "{catname} sips the liquid and a warm fuzzy feeling tumbles down {his} throat!"
- `EVENT_BOTTLEOFUNKNOWNLIQUID_REW2`: "{catname} gulps down a large mouthful from the bottle, splashing some of it on {his} fur... <br/>  <br/> It tastes vile! {catname} coughs and spits as {his} throat burns from the horrible liquid!"
- `EVENT_TAKE_ANSW`: "Take"
- `EVENT_BOTTLEOFUNKNOWNLIQUID_REW3`: "{catname} dumps the liquid out onto the ground. This would make a great weapon!"
- `EVENT_BOTTLEOFUNKNOWNLIQUID_REW4`: "{catname} goes to take the bottle but is interrupted by angry shouting and loud thunderous footsteps approaching! <br/>  <br/> [i]"THAT'S MY TRASH!"[/i] <br/>  <br/> {catname} panics and runs away!"
- `EVENT_BOTTLEOFUNKNOWNLIQUID_REW5`: "{catname} bats at the bottle with {his} paw, trying to pick it up, but knocks it over instead! <br/>  <br/> The bottle tumbles over and glass shards fly everywhere!"
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"
- `EVENT_BOTTLEOFUNKNOWNLIQUID_REW6`: "{catname} ignores the bottle alone. <br/>  <br/> Best to not drink from sketchy looking bottles!"

```
Bottle {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_BOTTLEOFUNKNOWNLIQUID_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame bottleofliquid
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_BOTTLEOFUNKNOWNLIQUID_QUES"

        options {
            drink {
                label EVENT_DRINK_ANSW
                stat con

                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_BOTTLEOFUNKNOWNLIQUID_REW1"
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            permanent_stats {
                                random 1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            permanent_stats {
                                random 2
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    prompt "EVENT_BOTTLEOFUNKNOWNLIQUID_REW2"
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            permanent_stats {
                                random -1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            permanent_stats {
                                random -2
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            take {
                label "EVENT_TAKE_ANSW"
                stat lck

                good {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_BOTTLEOFUNKNOWNLIQUID_REW3"
                            get_item Bottles
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_BOTTLEOFUNKNOWNLIQUID_REW3"
                            get_item Bottles
                            get_item Bottles
							get_item Bottles
                            get_item Bottles
                            get_item Bottles
							get_item Bottles
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_BOTTLEOFUNKNOWNLIQUID_REW4"
                            event_now_same_cat Tragedy
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_BOTTLEOFUNKNOWNLIQUID_REW5"
                            damage 2
                            get_item GlassShard
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            ignore {
                label "EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave
                
                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_BOTTLEOFUNKNOWNLIQUID_REW6"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `Pinata`
**Source:** `treasure_box.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_SOMEKINDOFPINATA_NAME`: "Some Kind of Piñata"
- `EVENT_SOMEKINDOFPINATA_QUES`: "{catname} finds some kind of piñata. <br/>  <br/> There's something odd about hitting a stuffed cat... but {he} might as well have a go?"
- `EVENT_SOMEKINDOFPINATA_QUES2`: "The piñata swings around and around, its mere existence taunting {catname} for failing to destroy it!"
- `EVENT_SMASH_ANSW`: "Smash"
- `EVENT_SOMEKINDOFPINATA_REW1`: "{catname} smashes the piñata into pieces and coins bounce all over the ground!"
- `EVENT_SOMEKINDOFPINATA_REW2A`: "{catname} whacks the cat piñata and some coins spill out of its butt!"
- `EVENT_SOMEKINDOFPINATA_REW2B`: "{catname} whacks the cat piñata and some coins spill out of its mouth!"
- `EVENT_SOMEKINDOFPINATA_REW2C`: "{catname} whacks a limb off the cat piñata and coins spill out!"
- `EVENT_SOMEKINDOFPINATA_AGAIN`: "Hit it again!"
- `EVENT_SOMEKINDOFPINATA_REW3`: "{catname} swings at the piñata but misses!"
- `EVENT_SOMEKINDOFPINATA_REW4`: "{catname} swings really hard at the piñata, but totally whiffs and punches {himself} in the face! <br/>  <br/> Embarrassed, {catname} runs off, not sure which is more bruised, {his} ego or {his} face..."
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"
- `EVENT_SOMEKINDOFPINATA_REW5`: "{catname} turns away, ashamed at {his} inability to land a good hit on the piñata."
- `EVENT_SOMEKINDOFPINATA_REW6`: "{catname} leaves the piñata alone. <br/>  <br/> This is no time for silly games afterall."

```
Pinata {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_SOMEKINDOFPINATA_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame pinata
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_SOMEKINDOFPINATA_QUES"
        setup {
            conditional_reward {
                requirements {
                    has_token HasHitPinata
                }

                reward {
                    prompt "EVENT_SOMEKINDOFPINATA_QUES2"
                }
            }
        }

        options {
            smash {
                label "EVENT_SMASH_ANSW"
                stat str

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 2
                            prompt "EVENT_SOMEKINDOFPINATA_REW1"
                            gain_coins [1 15]
                        }
                        rare {
                            random_pool [
                                {
                                    prompt "EVENT_SOMEKINDOFPINATA_REW2A"
                                }
                                {
                                    prompt "EVENT_SOMEKINDOFPINATA_REW2B"
                                }
                                {
                                    prompt "EVENT_SOMEKINDOFPINATA_REW2C"
                                }
                            ]
                            gain_coins [5 20]
                            set_adventure_token HasHitPinata
                            override_end_option_prompt "EVENT_SOMEKINDOFPINATA_AGAIN"
                            event_now_same_cat Pinata
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_SOMEKINDOFPINATA_REW3"
                            set_adventure_token HasHitPinata
                            override_end_option_prompt "EVENT_SOMEKINDOFPINATA_AGAIN"
                            event_now_same_cat Pinata
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_SOMEKINDOFPINATA_REW4"
                            damage [1 3]
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            leave {
                label "EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave

                good {
                    conditional_reward {
                        requirements {
                            has_token HasHitPinata
                        }
                        reward {
                            prompt "EVENT_SOMEKINDOFPINATA_REW5"
                        }
                        else{
                            prompt "EVENT_SOMEKINDOFPINATA_REW6"
                        }
                    }
                    
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `GenieLamp`
**Source:** `treasure_box.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_ANODDLAMP_NAME`: "An Odd Lamp"
- `EVENT_ANODDLAMP_QUES`: "{catname} finds an odd looking antique lamp. <br/>  <br/> For some reason, {catname} feels a sudden urge to rub it with {his} paw."
- `EVENT_RUB_ANSW`: "Rub"
- `EVENT_ANODDLAMP_REW1`: "{catname} rubs the lamp and nothing happens. <br/>  <br/> {He} feels like a fool and sneaks away as if nothing happened before the other cats notice."
- `EVENT_ANODDLAMP_REW2`: "{catname} reaches out with {his} paw and rubs the lamp… <br/>  <br/> A blue cloud of smoke puffs out from the end. It's a genie!"
- `EVENT_ANODDLAMP_REW3`: "The party watches on as {catname} reaches out and awkwardly kneads the lamp with {his} paws... <br/>  <br/> The other cats chortle in laughter at {catname} for making a fool of {himself}!"
- `EVENT_ANODDLAMP_REW4`: "{catname} aggressively rubs the lamp with {his} paws... <br/>  <br/> A Genie billows out of the lamp! It looks angry!"
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"
- `EVENT_ANODDLAMP_REW5`: "What good is a weird antique lamp, {catname} thinks? It doesn't even have a light bulb!"

```
GenieLamp {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_ANODDLAMP_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame genie
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_ANODDLAMP_QUES"

        options {
            rub {
                label "EVENT_RUB_ANSW"
                stat lck

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_ANODDLAMP_REW1"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                LuckUp 1
                            }
                            //nothing happens
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_ANODDLAMP_REW2"
                            set_frame 2
                            event_now_same_cat Genie_Good //this event is in "sequence_event_continuations.gon"
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_ANODDLAMP_REW3"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                CharismaUp -1
                            }
                            //nothing happens
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_ANODDLAMP_REW4"
                            set_frame 4
                            event_now_same_cat Genie_Bad //this event is in "sequence_event_continuations.gon"
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            leave {
                label "EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave

                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_ANODDLAMP_REW5"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `ToxicWaste`
**Source:** `treasure_box.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_AVATOFTOXICWASTE_NAME`: "A Vat of Toxic Waste"
- `EVENT_AVATOFTOXICWASTE_QUES`: "{catname} finds a large vat of a strange, green liquid, its contents oozing and bubbling over the side..."
- `EVENT_GOAROUND_ANSW`: "Go around"
- `EVENT_AVATOFTOXICWASTE_REW1`: "{catname} takes a wide path around the vat, staying clear!"
- `EVENT_AVATOFTOXICWASTE_REW2`: "{catname} walks around the bubbling vat, but as {he} does, a glob of it splashes over onto {him}! <br/>  <br/> {catname}'s flesh churns under the hot liquid, mutating!"
- `EVENT_AVATOFTOXICWASTE_REW3`: "Acid from the vat splashes over the rim and burns {catname}!"
- `EVENT_AVATOFTOXICWASTE_REW4`: "{catname} slips on the ground while trying to pass and accidentally splashes into a pool of the green liquid on the ground! <br/>  <br/> It burns! {catname} cries out in pain!"
- `EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW`: "Examine"
- `EVENT_AVATOFTOXICWASTE_REW5`: "{catname} smells the liquid, breathing deeply, trying to identify it... <br/>  <br/> The toxins fill {his} lungs, mutating {catname}'s body!"
- `EVENT_AVATOFTOXICWASTE_REW6`: "{catname} carefully approaches the vat and sniffs the fumes... it smells very strange!"
- `EVENT_AVATOFTOXICWASTE_REW7`: "{catname} approaches the vat and before {he} can react, it explodes!  <br/>  <br/> Green ooze sprays all over {catname}, poisoning {him}!"
- `EVENT_AVATOFTOXICWASTE_REW8`: "The foul-smelling liquid sprays out from the vat, covering {catname}'s fur! <br/>  <br/> {catname} tries to escape the fumes, but they are stuck to {him}, driving {catname} crazy!"
- `EVENT_DRINK_ANSW`: "Drink"
- `EVENT_AVATOFTOXICWASTE_REW9`: "The green liquid tastes really odd, like nothing {catname} has eaten before!"
- `EVENT_AVATOFTOXICWASTE_REW10`: "{catname} aggressively drinks from the bubbling vat, not caring as it splashes over {his} fur and runs down {his} body... <br/>  <br/> {catname}'s skin bubbles and mutates under the green liquid!"
- `EVENT_AVATOFTOXICWASTE_REW11`: "The liquid tastes disgusting, and {catname}'s body spasms in pain!"
- `EVENT_AVATOFTOXICWASTE_REW12`: "{catname} gulps down a large swallow of the toxic liquid before recoiling in disgust!"

```
ToxicWaste {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_AVATOFTOXICWASTE_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame toxicwastevat
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_AVATOFTOXICWASTE_QUES"

        options {
            sneak {
                label "EVENT_GOAROUND_ANSW"
                stat dex

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_AVATOFTOXICWASTE_REW1"
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_AVATOFTOXICWASTE_REW2"
                            random_mutation_from_set { //gives one
                                tail -1
                                tail -1
                                body -1
                                body -1
                                leg1 -1
                                leg2 -1
                                arm1 -1
                                arm2 -1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_AVATOFTOXICWASTE_REW3"

                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Burn 4
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_AVATOFTOXICWASTE_REW4"

                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Burn 6
                            }
                            gain_disorder Charred
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            examine {
                label "EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW"
                stat int

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_AVATOFTOXICWASTE_REW5"
                            random_mutation_from_set { //gives one
                                eyes -1
                                mouth -1
                                head -1
                                eyebrows -1
                                ears -1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_AVATOFTOXICWASTE_REW6"
                            random_mutation_from_set { //gives 3
                                count 3

                                eyes -1
                                mouth -1
                                head -1
                                eyebrows -1
                                ears -1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }

                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_AVATOFTOXICWASTE_REW7"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Poison 2
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_AVATOFTOXICWASTE_REW8"
                            permanent_stats {
                                int -2
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            eat {
                label "EVENT_DRINK_ANSW"
                stat con

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_AVATOFTOXICWASTE_REW9"
                            random_mutation_from_set { //gives one
                                mouth -1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_AVATOFTOXICWASTE_REW10"
                            random_mutation_from_set {
                                mouth -1
                            }
                            random_mutation_from_set {
                                body -1
                            }
                            random_mutation_from_set {
                                texture -1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }

                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_AVATOFTOXICWASTE_REW11"
                            damage 10
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_AVATOFTOXICWASTE_REW12"
                            damage 50%
                            permanent_stats {
                                con -1
                                cha -1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `WomansPurse`
**Source:** `treasure_box.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_WOMANSPURSE_NAME`: "Womans Purse"
- `EVENT_WOMANSPURSE_QUES`: "{catname} finds a purse on the ground. <br/>  <br/> Its charming colors seem out of place in this gloomy place."
- `EVENT_OPEN_ANSW`: "Open"
- `EVENT_WOMANSPURSE_REW1`: "{catname} digs around in the purse, and finds all sorts of cosmetics. <br/>  <br/> {He} glams it up and feels very pretty!"
- `EVENT_WOMANSPURSE_REW2`: "{catname} looks in the purse and finds mostly expired candy, makeup, and other useless items. <br/>  <br/> Reaching further in, {he} feels an object with {his} paw and pulls it out..."
- `EVENT_WOMANSPURSE_REW3`: "{catname} dumps the purse open and the contents spills out onto the ground. Among the random junk, {catname} spots a few pills and eats them!"
- `EVENT_WOMANSPURSE_REW4`: "Tearing open the purse, {catname} is disappointed to find mostly useless items were inside. <br/>  <br/> {He} does find a pill though and promptly swallows it!"
- `EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW`: "Examine"
- `EVENT_WOMANSPURSE_REW5`: "{catname} digs around in the purse with {his} paw and feels some small hard objects at the bottom..."
- `EVENT_WOMANSPURSE_REW6`: "{catname} knocks the purse over and meows excitedly as lots of pills and coins spill out!"
- `EVENT_WOMANSPURSE_REW7`: "{catname} looks inside the purse and spies some old hard candies. {catname} swallows them whole!"
- `EVENT_WOMANSPURSE_REW8`: "Although it mostly contained random junk, {catname} does spy an odd looking candy and pops it in {his} mouth. <br/>  <br/> It tastes really weird! {catname} starts to feel sick."
- `EVENT_LEAVE_ANSW`: "Leave"
- `EVENT_WOMANSPURSE_REW9`: "[i]"What use would I have of a purse? I'm a cat,"[/i] {catname} thinks, as {he} ignores the purse."

```
WomansPurse {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_WOMANSPURSE_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame womans_purse
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_WOMANSPURSE_QUES"

        options {
            open {
                label "EVENT_OPEN_ANSW"
                stat lck

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_WOMANSPURSE_REW1"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                CharismaUp 2
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_WOMANSPURSE_REW2"
                            get_item_from_pool mom_items
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_WOMANSPURSE_REW3"
                            permanent_stats {
                                random 1
                            }
                            permanent_stats {
                                random -1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_WOMANSPURSE_REW4" 
                            permanent_stats {
                                random -1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            examine {
                label "EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW"
                stat int

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_WOMANSPURSE_REW5"
                            random_pool [
                                { 
                                    get_item_from_pool pills
                                    get_item_from_pool pills
                                }
                                {
                                    gain_coins [3 10]
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_WOMANSPURSE_REW6"
                            get_item_from_pool pills
                            get_item_from_pool pills
                            get_item_from_pool pills
                            get_item_from_pool pills
                            gain_coins 10
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_WOMANSPURSE_REW7"
                            
                            permanent_stats {
                                random 1
                            }
                            permanent_stats {
                                random -1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_WOMANSPURSE_REW8"
                            permanent_stats {
                                random -1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            leave {
                label "EVENT_LEAVE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave
                
                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_WOMANSPURSE_REW9"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `OldCan`
**Source:** `treasure_box.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_OLDCAN_NAME`: "Old Can"
- `EVENT_OLDCAN_QUES`: "{catname} finds an old can. <br/>  <br/> {He} can feel something sloshing around inside it."
- `EVENT_DRINK_ANSW`: "Drink"
- `EVENT_OLDCAN_REW1`: "{catname} cracks it open and drinks from the can... <br/>  <br/> A refreshing, delicious beverage! {catname} feels particularly ready for the next battle."
- `EVENT_OLDCAN_REW2`: "As {catname} gulps down the strange liquid, {he} feels a buzz of energy! <br/>  <br/> {His} toes quiver, itching to run forever!"
- `EVENT_OLDCAN_REW3`: "{catname} pops open the can and gulps down the thick liquid within. <br/>  <br/> {His} eyes begin to water and {his} head spins. {catname} sluggishly stumbles on."
- `EVENT_OLDCAN_REW4`: "{catname} pauses briefly after opening the can before tossing it down. <br/>  <br/> {His} senses feel dulled as the warm liquid begins to foam in {his} mouth. {catname} lets out a loud burp."
- `EVENT_TAKE_ANSW`: "Take"
- `EVENT_OLDCAN_REW5`: "{catname} picks up the can. It might be useful later?"
- `EVENT_OLDCAN_REW6`: "{catname} goes to stash the old can, but it bursts open in {his} paws and something foul leaps out!"
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"
- `EVENT_OLDCAN_REW7`: "[i]"Probably not a good idea to drink random unmarked beverages. Still though..."[/i] {catname} thinks as {he} moves on."

```
OldCan {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_OLDCAN_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame old_can
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_OLDCAN_QUES"

        options {
            drink {
                label "EVENT_DRINK_ANSW"
                stat con

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_OLDCAN_REW1"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                AddStartingMana 5
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_OLDCAN_REW2"
                            permanent_stats {
                                spd 2
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_OLDCAN_REW3"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                DexterityUp -1
                            }
                            self_status_next_fight { 
                                MissChance 10
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_OLDCAN_REW4" 
                            permanent_stats {
                                int -1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            take {
                label "EVENT_TAKE_ANSW"
                stat lck
                
                        
                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    prompt "EVENT_OLDCAN_REW5"
                    reward {
                        common {
                            get_item_from_pool can_items_common
                        }
                        rare {
                            get_item_from_pool can_items_rare
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 2
                    prompt "EVENT_OLDCAN_REW6"
                    get_parasite_from_pool parasites
                }
            }
            
            ignore {
                label "EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave
                
                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_OLDCAN_REW7"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `ARock`
**Source:** `treasure_box.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_AROCK_NAME`: "A Rock"
- `EVENT_AROCK_QUES`: "A rock lies in {catname}'s path. {He} normally wouldn't have given it another thought. But recently..."
- `EVENT_SMASH_ANSW`: "Smash"
- `EVENT_AROCK_REW1`: "{catname} pounces on the rock, smashing it asunder! Now there are several smaller rocks!"
- `EVENT_AROCK_REW2`: "{catname} breaks open the rock. The top layer falls away revealing something hidden beneath!"
- `EVENT_AROCK_REW3`: "Mustering {his} strength, {catname} pounces at the rock! Ouch! Why did {he} do that?"
- `EVENT_AROCK_REW4`: "{catname} saunters over to the rock and strikes suddenly, punching it with all {his} might! <br/>  <br/> There is an audible crunching sound!"
- `EVENT_TAKE_ANSW`: "Take"
- `EVENT_AROCK_REW5`: "{catname} picks up the rock and examines it more closely..."
- `EVENT_AROCK_REW6`: "{catname} picks up the rock. {he} begins petting and talking to it. <br/>  <br/> The other cats try to explain to {catname} that it's just a rock, but {he} won't listen... <br/>  <br/> [i]"I'm never giving it up! We're in love!"[/i]"
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"
- `EVENT_AROCK_REW7`: "What was {he} thinking? It's just a rock. <br/>  <br/> {catname} ignores it and moves on."

```
ARock {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_AROCK_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame a_rock
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_AROCK_QUES"

        options {
            smash {
                label "EVENT_SMASH_ANSW"
                stat str

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_AROCK_REW1"
                            //nothing
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_AROCK_REW2"
                            get_item Geode
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_AROCK_REW3"
                            self_damage 1
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_AROCK_REW4" 
                            injury str //broken paw
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            take {
                label "EVENT_TAKE_ANSW"
                stat lck

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    prompt "EVENT_AROCK_REW5"
                    get_item_from_pool rock_items
                }
                bad {
                    prompt "EVENT_AROCK_REW6"
                    get_parasite CursedRock
                }
            }

            
            ignore {
                label "EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave
                
                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_AROCK_REW7"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `HollowSkull`
**Source:** `treasure_box.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_HOLLOWSKULL_NAME`: "Hollow Skull"
- `EVENT_HOLLOWSKULL_QUES`: "A skull lies before {catname}. The unblinking eyes of the skull stare at {him} like endless dark pits. <br/>  <br/> {catname} fights the urge to sit and stare into the skull forever..."
- `EVENT_SMASH_ANSW`: "Smash"
- `EVENT_HOLLOWSKULL_REW1`: "Unperturbed by the creepy skull, {catname} flips it over and pulls out its teeth."
- `EVENT_HOLLOWSKULL_REW2`: "Unperturbed by the creepy skull, {catname} flips it over but doesn't find anything useful."
- `EVENT_HOLLOWSKULL_REW3`: "{catname} picks up the pale skull and holds the trophy over {his} head triumphantly!"
- `EVENT_HOLLOWSKULL_REW4`: "{catname} moves close to the skull, debating what to do next, when suddenly spiders begin pouring out of the skull's eye sockets! <br/>  <br/> The spiders crawl all over {catname}, poisoning {him} with tiny bites!"
- `EVENT_HOLLOWSKULL_REW5`: "{catname} knocks over the skull. A sudden sense of guilt washes over {him}. <br/>  <br/> Why is {his} first instinct to always desecrate the dead? What did it do to deserve this?"
- `EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW`: "Examine"
- `EVENT_OPEN_ANSW`: "Open"

```
HollowSkull { 
    intro {
        title "EVENT_HOLLOWSKULL_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame hollow_skull
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_HOLLOWSKULL_QUES"

        options {
            smash {
                label "EVENT_SMASH_ANSW"
                stat str

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            random_pool [
                                { 
                                    prompt "EVENT_HOLLOWSKULL_REW1"
                                    get_item Molars
                                }
                                {
                                    prompt "EVENT_HOLLOWSKULL_REW2"
                                   //nothing
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_HOLLOWSKULL_REW3"
                            get_item_from_pool [BonesHat, DryBoneHat]
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_HOLLOWSKULL_REW4"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                SpiderInfested 1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_HOLLOWSKULL_REW5" 
                            permanent_stats {
                                lck -2
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
                        
            examine {
                label "EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW"
                stat int

                copy_results smash
            }

            open {
                label "EVENT_OPEN_ANSW"
                stat lck

                copy_results smash
            }
        }
    }
}
```

### `TunaCan`
**Source:** `treasure_box.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_TUNACAN_NAME`: "Tuna Can"
- `EVENT_TUNACAN_QUES`: "{catname} wrinkles {his} nose. <br/>  <br/> What is that familiar smell? Is it... Tuna??"
- `EVENT_OPEN_ANSW`: "Open"
- `EVENT_TUNACAN_REW1`: "{catname} cracks open the can of tuna. Absolutely delectable! What a treat!"
- `EVENT_TUNACAN_REW2`: "{catname} opens the can. Buried in the tuna {he} sees something sticking out!"
- `EVENT_TUNACAN_REW3`: "{catname} attempts to break open the can with {his} teeth. The sharp metal cuts into {his} mouth."
- `EVENT_TUNACAN_REW4`: "After cracking open the can {catname} aggressively digs into the yummy tuna... <br/>  <br/> {catname} lets out a yelp as {he} discovers the tuna is full of glass and spits it out!"
- `EVENT_SMASH_ANSW`: "Smash"
- `EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW`: "Examine"

```
TunaCan { 
    intro {
        title "EVENT_TUNACAN_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame tuna_can
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_TUNACAN_QUES"

        options {
            open {
                label "EVENT_OPEN_ANSW"
                stat lck

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_TUNACAN_REW1"
                            self_heal 10
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_TUNACAN_REW2"
                            get_item_from_pool [Pearl, FishHook, FishNecklace]
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_TUNACAN_REW3"
                            self_damage 2
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_TUNACAN_REW4" 
                            self_damage 6
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Bleed 4
                            }
                            get_item GlassShard
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
                        
            smash {
                label "EVENT_SMASH_ANSW"
                stat str

                copy_results open
            }

            examine {
                label "EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW"
                stat int

                copy_results open
            }
        }
    }
}
```
