### `AFewCoins`
**Source:** `treasure_box.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_AFEWCOINS_NAME`: "A Few Coins"
- `EVENT_AFEWCOINS_QUES`: "{catname} discovers some coins scattered on the ground. <br/>  <br/> [i]"Why would someone leave these here?"[/i]"
- `EVENT_TAKE_ANSW`: "Take"
- `EVENT_AFEWCOINS_REW1`: "{catname} picks up the coins."
- `EVENT_AFEWCOINS_REW2`: "When {he} goes to pick up the coins, {catname} notices a small satchel laying nearby and picks it up."
- `EVENT_AFEWCOINS_REW3`: "{catname} goes to pick up the coins but they are stuck fast to the ground. What a mean prank!"
- `EVENT_AFEWCOINS_REW4`: "{catname} tries but can't pick up the coins! <br/>  <br/> The other cats laugh at {him} as {he} furiously attempts to pry the coins off the floor. Alas, they are glued down!"
- `EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW`: "Examine"
- `EVENT_AFEWCOINS_REW5`: "The coins look valuable! {catname} quickly picks them all up."
- `EVENT_AFEWCOINS_REW6`: "While most of the coins seem worthless, one of them looks fancy!"
- `EVENT_AFEWCOINS_REW7`: "{catname} examines the coins but they seem worthless. <br/>  <br/> As {he} leans close to sniff them, {catname} gets a whiff of something truly foul, a butt penny!"
- `EVENT_AFEWCOINS_REW8`: "{catname} turns the coins over in {his} paws to examine them. <br/>  <br/> {catname} gives one a lick to see if {he} recognizes the type of metal. Yuck!"
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"
- `EVENT_AFEWCOINS_REW9`: "{catname} ignores the coins."

```
AFewCoins {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_AFEWCOINS_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame a_few_coins
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_AFEWCOINS_QUES"

        options {
            take {
                label "EVENT_TAKE_ANSW"
                stat lck

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_AFEWCOINS_REW1"
                            gain_coins [2 3]
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_AFEWCOINS_REW2"
                            get_item_from_pool Coin_items
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 1
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_AFEWCOINS_REW3"
                            //nothing
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_AFEWCOINS_REW4" 
                            gain_disorder Depression
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            examine {
                label "EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW"
                stat int

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_AFEWCOINS_REW5"
                            gain_coins 10
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_AFEWCOINS_REW6"
                            get_item_from_pool Coin_items
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_AFEWCOINS_REW7"
                            //nothing
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_AFEWCOINS_REW8" 
                            gain_disorder_from_pool diseases
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            ignore {
                label "EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave
                
                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_AFEWCOINS_REW9"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `APuzzleBox`
**Source:** `treasure_box.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_APUZZLEBOX_NAME`: "A Puzzle Box"
- `EVENT_APUZZLEBOX_QUES`: "{catname} finds a small metal puzzle box with a myriad of intricate designs etched onto the surface."
- `EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW`: "Examine"
- `EVENT_APUZZLEBOX_REW1`: "{catname} turns the cube over in {his} paws, pushing and pulling and trying to pry it open with {his} claws, but to no avail..."
- `EVENT_APUZZLEBOX_REW2`: "With careful examination and a few deliberate gestures, {catname} solves the puzzle and opens the box! <br/>  <br/> There is a rush of air and something rushes out of the box, excaping into the night!"
- `EVENT_APUZZLEBOX_REW3`: "{catname} plays with the box for a time, but is unable to figure out how to open it."
- `EVENT_APUZZLEBOX_REW4`: "Whirs and clicking sounds emanate from the box as {catname} unlocks it... <br/>  <br/> A terrifying scream fills {catname}'s mind as {his} soul is torn from {his} body!"
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"
- `EVENT_APUZZLEBOX_REW5`: "The box looks very complicated and {catname} can't be bothered after such a long and grueling day."

```
APuzzleBox {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_APUZZLEBOX_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame a_puzzle_box
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_APUZZLEBOX_QUES"

        options {
            examine {
                label "EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW"
                stat int

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_APUZZLEBOX_REW1"
                            play_animation resultBad
                            //nothing
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 2
                            prompt "EVENT_APUZZLEBOX_REW2"
                            battle "events/hellspawn.lvl"
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_APUZZLEBOX_REW3"
                            //nothing
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 2
                            prompt "EVENT_APUZZLEBOX_REW4" 
                            gain_disorder Soulless
							get_item PuzzleBox
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            ignore {
                label "EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave
                
                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_APUZZLEBOX_REW5"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `TimeCapsule`
**Source:** `treasure_box.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_TIMECAPSULE_NAME`: "Time Capsule"
- `EVENT_TIMECAPSULE_QUES`: "{catname} finds an old can. It looks like it was buried long ago.  <br/>  <br/> [i]"I wonder what could be inside?"[/i]"
- `EVENT_SMASH_ANSW`: "Smash"
- `EVENT_TIMECAPSULE_REW1`: "{catname} breaks the lid off and an assortment of items tumble out. <br/>  <br/> Looks like it was a time capsule left by someone long ago."
- `EVENT_TIMECAPSULE_REW2`: "{catname} deftly cracks open the can. {He} pulls out an old tattered note which crumbles to dust in {his} paws. <br/>  <br/> {catname} reaches further into the time capsule..."
- `EVENT_TIMECAPSULE_REW3`: "{catname} smacks the old tin, breaking it, but cuts {himself} in the process!"
- `EVENT_TIMECAPSULE_REW4`: "{catname} hears a crunching sound as {he} breaks the canister. <br/>  <br/> {He} feels a sharp pain as shards of metal burrow into {his} paw."
- `EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW`: "Examine"
- `EVENT_TIMECAPSULE_REW5`: "It appears to be an old time capsule! <br/>  <br/> {catname} carefully opens the container and something tumbles out..."
- `EVENT_TIMECAPSULE_REW6`: "{catname} shakes the old capsule and hears something tumbling about inside. <br/>  <br/> {He} excitedly opens the lid..."
- `EVENT_TIMECAPSULE_REW7`: "{catname} studies the old canister. It seems harmless? <br/>  <br/> {He} goes to open it, but it bursts open before {he} gets the chance! It was booby trapped!"
- `EVENT_TIMECAPSULE_REW8`: "{catname} opens the lid and peeks inside the canister and sees a bunch of wires and... <br/>  <br/> IT'S A BO-M-B! Too late! It explodes!"
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"
- `EVENT_TIMECAPSULE_REW9`: "{catname} bats the can around for a bit then gets bored and moves on."

```
TimeCapsule {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_TIMECAPSULE_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame time_capsule
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_TIMECAPSULE_QUES"

        options {
            smash {
                label "EVENT_SMASH_ANSW"
                stat str

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_TIMECAPSULE_REW1"
                            conditional_reward {
                                requirements {
                                    is_not_chapter [future theend]
                                }

                                reward {
                                    get_item_from_pool any_chapter
                                }
                                else {
                                    get_item_from_pool [
                                        LeafyMask
	                                    LeafyHat
	                                    LeafyNecklace
	                                    DinoHat
	                                    DinoMask
	                                    DinoNecklace
	                                    BigRockHat
	                                    BigRockMask
	                                    BigRockNecklace
	                                    PhoenixHat
	                                    PhoenixMask
	                                    PhoenixNecklace
                                        FrozenHat
	                                    FrozenMask
	                                    FrozenNecklace
	                                    SaberToothedHat
	                                    SaberToothedPelt
	                                    CavemanBeard
	                                    CavemanWig
	                                    CavemanEyebrows
	                                    CavemanNecklace
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_TIMECAPSULE_REW2"
                            conditional_reward {
                                requirements {
                                    is_not_chapter [future theend]
                                }

                                reward {
                                    get_item_from_pool chapter_rare
                                }
                                else {
                                    random_pool [
                                        //ice age item sets
                                        {
                                            get_item FrozenHat
                                            get_item FrozenMask
                                            get_item FrozenNecklace
                                        }
                                        {
                                            get_item SaberToothedHat
                                            get_item SabertoothTigerPelt
                                            get_item SaberToothedPelt
                                        }
                                        {
                                            get_item CavemanWig
                                            get_item CavemanEyebrows
                                            get_item CavemanNecklace
                                        }
                                        //jurassic item sets
                                        {
                                            get_item LeafyMask
                                            get_item LeafyHat
                                            get_item LeafyNecklace
                                        }
                                        {
                                            get_item DinoHat
                                            get_item DinoMask
                                            get_item DinoNecklace
                                        }
                                        {
                                            get_item BigRockHat
                                            get_item BigRockMask
                                            get_item BigRockNecklace
                                        }
                                        {
                                            get_item PhoenixHat
                                            get_item PhoenixMask
                                            get_item PhoenixNecklace
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_TIMECAPSULE_REW3"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Bleed 2
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_TIMECAPSULE_REW4"
                            get_parasite PawShards
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            examine {
                label "EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW"
                stat int

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_TIMECAPSULE_REW5"
                            conditional_reward {
                                requirements {
                                    is_not_chapter [future theend]
                                }

                                reward {
                                    get_item_from_pool any_chapter
                                }
                                else {
                                    get_item_from_pool [
                                        LeafyMask
	                                    LeafyHat
	                                    LeafyNecklace
	                                    DinoHat
	                                    DinoMask
	                                    DinoNecklace
	                                    BigRockHat
	                                    BigRockMask
	                                    BigRockNecklace
	                                    PhoenixHat
	                                    PhoenixMask
	                                    PhoenixNecklace
                                        FrozenHat
	                                    FrozenMask
	                                    FrozenNecklace
	                                    SaberToothedHat
	                                    SaberToothedPelt
	                                    CavemanBeard
	                                    CavemanWig
	                                    CavemanEyebrows
	                                    CavemanNecklace
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_TIMECAPSULE_REW6"
                            conditional_reward {
                                requirements {
                                    is_not_chapter [future theend]
                                }
                                reward {
                                    get_item_from_pool chapter_rare
                                }
                                else {
                                    random_pool [
                                        //ice age item sets
                                        {
                                            get_item FrozenHat
                                            get_item FrozenMask
                                            get_item FrozenNecklace
                                        }
                                        {
                                            get_item SaberToothedHat
                                            get_item SabertoothTigerPelt
                                            get_item SaberToothedPelt
                                        }
                                        {
                                            get_item CavemanWig
                                            get_item CavemanEyebrows
                                            get_item CavemanNecklace
                                        }
                                        //jurassic item sets
                                        {
                                            get_item LeafyMask
                                            get_item LeafyHat
                                            get_item LeafyNecklace
                                        }
                                        {
                                            get_item DinoHat
                                            get_item DinoMask
                                            get_item DinoNecklace
                                        }
                                        {
                                            get_item BigRockHat
                                            get_item BigRockMask
                                            get_item BigRockNecklace
                                        }
                                        {
                                            get_item PhoenixHat
                                            get_item PhoenixMask
                                            get_item PhoenixNecklace
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 3
                            prompt "EVENT_TIMECAPSULE_REW7"
                            damage 5
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 4
                            prompt "EVENT_TIMECAPSULE_REW8"
                            conditional_reward {
                                requirements {
                                    is_not_chapter [future theend]
                                }
                                reward {
                                    party_damage [5 10]
                                }
                                else {
                                    party_damage [10 15]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            ignore {
                label "EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave
                
                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_TIMECAPSULE_REW9"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `Locket`
**Source:** `treasure_box.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_LOCKET_NAME`: "Locket"
- `EVENT_LOCKET_QUES`: "While travelling, {catname} finds a locket. It appears to be in decent condition."
- `EVENT_OPEN_ANSW`: "Open"
- `EVENT_LOCKET_REW1`: "{catname} flips open the locket to find a picture of an unfamiliar face looking back at {him}. <br/>  <br/> The original owner must have cared about them, but it's useless to {catname}."
- `EVENT_LOCKET_REW2`: "{catname} opens the locket and stares at the oddly familiar face within. <br/>  <br/> {catname} knows that {he} has never met them, but perhaps {he} will?"
- `EVENT_LOCKET_REW3`: "{catname} tries to open the locket, but try as {he} might, it remains clamped shut. Oh, well."
- `EVENT_LOCKET_REW4`: "{catname} attempts to open the locket, but just ends up breaking it instead!"
- `EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW`: "Examine"
- `EVENT_LOCKET_REW5`: "After closer examination, {catname} discovers it is made of gold!"
- `EVENT_LOCKET_REW6`: "Looking closely at the locket, {catname} discovers a hidden compartment on the back! {He} pops it open!"
- `EVENT_LOCKET_REW7`: "After close inspection, the locket appears to be useless. {catname} tosses it away."
- `EVENT_LOCKET_REW8`: "As {catname} inspects the locket, a small shard of the metal breaks off into the flesh of {his} paw! <br/>  <br/> {catname} tries to pull it out but it is stuck fast."
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"
- `EVENT_LOCKET_REW9`: "{catname} ignores the locket."

```
Locket {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_LOCKET_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame locket
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_LOCKET_QUES"

        options {
            open {
                label "EVENT_OPEN_ANSW"
                stat lck

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_LOCKET_REW1"
                            //nothing
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_LOCKET_REW2"
                            //gain_disorder Premonitions
                            learn_ability FutureSight
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 4
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_LOCKET_REW3"
                            //nothing
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_LOCKET_REW4" 
                            permanent_stats {
                                lck -2
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            examine {
                label "EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW"
                stat int

                good {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_LOCKET_REW5"
                            gain_coins [4 8]
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_LOCKET_REW6"
                            get_item_from_pool isaac_items
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 4
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_LOCKET_REW7"
                            //nothing
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_LOCKET_REW8"
                            gain_disorder DeepCut
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            ignore {
                label "EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave
                
                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_LOCKET_REW9"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }

        }
    }
}
```

---

### `WeirdEgg`
**Source:** `treasure_box.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_WEIRDEGG_NAME`: "Weird Egg"
- `EVENT_WEIRDEGG_QUES`: "{catname} finds a strange egg. It is larger than any normal egg {he} has seen before. <br/>  <br/> It appears to be quivering slightly, although that might be an illusion."
- `EVENT_SMASH_ANSW`: "Smash"
- `EVENT_WEIRDEGG_REW1`: "{catname} cracks the egg open and a delicious liquid flows out. {He} eagerly laps it up."
- `EVENT_WEIRDEGG_REW2`: "{catname} smashes open the egg with a resounding 'crack!' A pale, invigorating liquid pools on the floor."
- `EVENT_WEIRDEGG_REW3`: "As {catname} cracks the egg open, {he} is horrified as a small creature tumbles out. <br/>  <br/> It makes a small squawk before keeling over. What has {he} done?!"
- `EVENT_WEIRDEGG_REW4`: "Thinking nothing of it, {catname} whacks the egg, breaking the shell. <br/>  <br/> Aghast, {catname} leaps back as a giant angry fetus crawls out!"
- `EVENT_LOOT_ANSW`: "Loot"
- `EVENT_WEIRDEGG_REW5`: "{catname} picks up the weird egg and tucks it away to investigate later."
- `EVENT_WEIRDEGG_REW6`: "{catname} picks up the strange egg. It feels warm to the touch and {he} can hear happy gurgling sounds inside. <br/>  <br/> It is about to hatch!"
- `EVENT_WEIRDEGG_REW7`: "{catname} attempts to pick it up, but it bursts open! <br/>  <br/> The horrifying monster that was within bruises {him} before {catname} is able to push it away!"
- `EVENT_WEIRDEGG_REW8`: "{catname} goes to grab the egg, but it bursts open! <br/>  <br/> Large eyes and rolls of flesh ooze out!"
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"
- `EVENT_WEIRDEGG_REW9`: "{catname} leaves the strange egg alone."

```
WeirdEgg {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_WEIRDEGG_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame weird_egg
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_WEIRDEGG_QUES"

        options {
            smash {
                label "EVENT_SMASH_ANSW"
                stat str

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_WEIRDEGG_REW1"
                            full_heal 1
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_WEIRDEGG_REW2"
                            party_permanent_stats {
                                con 1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 4
                            prompt "EVENT_WEIRDEGG_REW3"
                            gain_disorder Depression
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 5
                            prompt "EVENT_WEIRDEGG_REW4" 
                            spawn_unit_next_fight {
                                object MegaFetus
                                count 1
                                spawn_side enemies
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            loot {
                label "EVENT_LOOT_ANSW"
                stat dex
                animation choice_dex_alt

                good {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_WEIRDEGG_REW5"
                            get_item_from_pool raptor_nest_eggs
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_WEIRDEGG_REW6"
                            gain_familiar FamiliarFetus
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 5
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_WEIRDEGG_REW7"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Bruise 1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_WEIRDEGG_REW8" 
                            spawn_unit_next_fight {
                                object MegaFetus //TODO: 'next combat features specific enemy'
                                count 1
                                spawn_side enemies
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            ignore {
                label "EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave
                
                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_WEIRDEGG_REW9"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `RacyMagazine`
**Source:** `treasure_box.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_RACYMAGAZINE_NAME`: "Racy Magazine"
- `EVENT_RACYMAGAZINE_QUES`: "In a dimly lit corner {catname} finds an old magazine. <br/>  <br/> After brushing off the dust, {he} discovers it's a copy of PlayCat!"
- `EVENT_OPEN_ANSW`: "Open"
- `EVENT_RACYMAGAZINE_REW1`: "{catname} flips it open, and {his} eyes go wide at the fold-out three page spread that pops out! <br/>  <br/> {catname} feels a wave of confidence wash over {him}."
- `EVENT_RACYMAGAZINE_REW2`: "{catname} opens it, and starts mimicking the cats' poses on the colorful pages. <br/>  <br/> {He} rolls over on the ground and lifts a paw inquisitively into the air..."
- `EVENT_RACYMAGAZINE_REW3`: "Nothing could have prepared {catname} for the horrifying images inside. <br/>  <br/> {His} hair stands up on end in terror!"
- `EVENT_RACYMAGAZINE_REW4`: "A single tear runs down {catname}'s cheek as {he} stands transfixed looking at the horrifying images within. <br/>  <br/> {catname} will never be the same again..."
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"
- `EVENT_RACYMAGAZINE_REW5`: "Feeling uncomfortable with the other cats watching, {catname} decides it would probably be best to leave it alone."
- `EVENT_RACYMAGAZINE_REW6`: "{catname} resists the urge to look, and feels a surge of confidence as {he} walks away."
- `EVENT_RACYMAGAZINE_REW7`: "Feeling shy, {catname} puts it back down and walks away."
- `EVENT_RACYMAGAZINE_REW8`: "{catname} tosses the magazine back down and turns to leave. <br/>  <br/> It inadvertently falls open and what {he} sees leaves {his} head spinning."

```
RacyMagazine {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_RACYMAGAZINE_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame racy_magazine
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_RACYMAGAZINE_QUES"

        options {
            open {
                label "EVENT_OPEN_ANSW"
                stat lck

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_RACYMAGAZINE_REW1"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                AddStartingMana 5
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_RACYMAGAZINE_REW2"
                            permanent_stats {
                                cha 1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 4
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_RACYMAGAZINE_REW3"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Fear 3
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_RACYMAGAZINE_REW4"
                            make_old self
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            ignore {
                label "EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW"
                stat con

                good {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_RACYMAGAZINE_REW5"
                            //nothing
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_RACYMAGAZINE_REW6"
                            permanent_stats {
                                con 1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 3
                            prompt "EVENT_RACYMAGAZINE_REW7"
                            //nothing
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 5
                            prompt "EVENT_RACYMAGAZINE_REW8" 
                            permanent_stats {
                                int -1
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `PillBottle`
**Source:** `treasure_box.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_PILLBOTTLE_NAME`: "Pill Bottle"
- `EVENT_PILLBOTTLE_QUES`: "A pill bottle lies before {catname}. {He} wonders what could be inside."
- `EVENT_OPEN_ANSW`: "Open"
- `EVENT_PILLBOTTLE_REW1`: "{catname} pops the lid open and several pills tumble out into {his} paw."
- `EVENT_PILLBOTTLE_REW2`: "{catname} pops the lid off and a cloud of magic dust sprays up at {his} face."
- `EVENT_PILLBOTTLE_REW3`: "{catname} opens the bottle and finds a strange looking pill inside. <br/>  <br/> Without hesitating {he} swallows it. {catname} feels an odd sensation... <br/>  <br/> {catname} got two random bad statuses!"
- `EVENT_PILLBOTTLE_REW4`: "{catname} was never told to not eat random things {he} finds, so after opening the bottle, {catname} quickly scarfs down the hard object inside."
- `EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW`: "Examine"
- `EVENT_PILLBOTTLE_REW5`: "{catname} opens the bottle and examines the contents. <br/>  <br/> It's candy! {He} shares them with the rest of the party."
- `EVENT_PILLBOTTLE_REW6`: "{catname} shakes the bottle, rattling the contents within. <br/>  <br/> Opening it up, {he} finds a lot of pills inside!"
- `EVENT_PILLBOTTLE_REW7`: "{catname} peers through the transparent side of the container. It looks like there's a treat inside! <br/>  <br/> {catname} quickly scarfs it down before anyone can interject. <br/>  <br/> A sudden confusion washes over {catname}!"
- `EVENT_PILLBOTTLE_REW8`: "{catname} pops open the lid and gives the pills within a sniff. <br/>  <br/> [i]"These smell FABULOUS!"[/i] {catname} thinks, before quickly stashing the bottle away so no one else can have them."
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"
- `EVENT_PILLBOTTLE_REW9`: "{catname} thinks better of it and leaves the pill bottle alone."

```
PillBottle {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_PILLBOTTLE_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame pill_bottle
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_PILLBOTTLE_QUES"

        options {
            open {
                label "EVENT_OPEN_ANSW"
                stat lck

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_PILLBOTTLE_REW1"
                            random_pool [
                                { 
                                    get_item_from_pool pills
                                }
                                {
                                    get_item_from_pool pills
                                    get_item_from_pool pills
                                }
                                {
                                    get_item_from_pool pills
                                    get_item_from_pool pills
                                    get_item_from_pool pills
                                }
                                {
                                    get_item_from_pool pills
                                    get_item_from_pool pills
                                    get_item_from_pool pills
                                    get_item_from_pool pills
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_PILLBOTTLE_REW2"
                            //self_status_next_fight {
                            //    AbilityOnBattleStart_Immediate FlowerEventSleep
                            //}

                            permanent_stats {
                                random 2   
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 4
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_PILLBOTTLE_REW3"
                            random_pool [
                                {
                                    self_status_next_fight {
                                        Drowsy 1
                                    }
                                }
                                {
                                    self_status_next_fight {
                                        Sleep 1
                                    }
                                }
                                {
                                    self_status_next_fight {
                                        Bleed 1
                                    }
                                }
                                {
                                    self_status_next_fight {
                                        Burn 1
                                    }
                                }
                                {
                                    self_status_next_fight {
                                        Poison 1
                                    }
                                }
                                {
                                    self_status_next_fight {
                                        MagicWeakness 1
                                    }
                                }
                                {
                                    self_status_next_fight {
                                        Confusion 1
                                    }
                                }
                                {
                                    self_status_next_fight {
                                        Madness 1
                                    }
                                }
                                {
                                    self_status_next_fight {
                                        Fear 1
                                    }
                                }
                                {
                                    self_status_next_fight {
                                        Stun 1
                                    }
                                }
                                {
                                    self_status_next_fight {
                                        Immobile 1
                                    }
                                }
                                {
                                    self_status_next_fight {
                                        Weakness 1
                                    }
                                }
                                {
                                    self_status_next_fight {
                                        Bruise 1
                                    }
                                }
                                {
                                    self_status_next_fight {
                                        Blind 1
                                    }
                                }
                            ]
                            random_pool [
                                {
                                    self_status_next_fight {
                                        Drowsy 1
                                    }
                                }
                                {
                                    self_status_next_fight {
                                        Sleep 1
                                    }
                                }
                                {
                                    self_status_next_fight {
                                        Bleed 1
                                    }
                                }
                                {
                                    self_status_next_fight {
                                        Burn 1
                                    }
                                }
                                {
                                    self_status_next_fight {
                                        Poison 1
                                    }
                                }
                                {
                                    self_status_next_fight {
                                        MagicWeakness 1
                                    }
                                }
                                {
                                    self_status_next_fight {
                                        Confusion 1
                                    }
                                }
                                {
                                    self_status_next_fight {
                                        Madness 1
                                    }
                                }
                                {
                                    self_status_next_fight {
                                        Fear 1
                                    }
                                }
                                {
                                    self_status_next_fight {
                                        Stun 1
                                    }
                                }
                                {
                                    self_status_next_fight {
                                        Immobile 1
                                    }
                                }
                                {
                                    self_status_next_fight {
                                        Weakness 1
                                    }
                                }
                                {
                                    self_status_next_fight {
                                        Bruise 1
                                    }
                                }
                                {
                                    self_status_next_fight {
                                        Blind 1
                                    }
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_PILLBOTTLE_REW4"
                            permanent_stats {
                                random -2
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            examine {
                label "EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW"
                stat int

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 3
                            prompt "EVENT_PILLBOTTLE_REW5"
                            party_heal 100%
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 2
                            prompt "EVENT_PILLBOTTLE_REW6"
                            random_pool [
                                { 
                                    get_item_from_pool pills
                                    get_item_from_pool pills
                                    get_item_from_pool pills
                                    get_item_from_pool pills

                                {

                                    get_item_from_pool pills

                                    get_item_from_pool pills
                                    get_item_from_pool pills
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 4
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_PILLBOTTLE_REW7"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Confusion 4
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_PILLBOTTLE_REW8" 
                            gain_disorder PillPopper
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            ignore {
                label "EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave
                
                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_PILLBOTTLE_REW9"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

### `Coffin`
**Source:** `treasure_box.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_COFFIN_NAME`: "Coffin"
- `EVENT_COFFIN_QUES`: "A large coffin stands ominously in the room ahead, leaning against the wall."
- `EVENT_BASH_ANSW`: "Bash"
- `EVENT_COFFIN_REW1`: "{catname} smashes the coffin open. The bones of its' long dead occupant fall out on top of {him}."
- `EVENT_COFFIN_REW2`: "{catname} rips the lid off the old coffin and pulls out the corpse lying within..."
- `EVENT_COFFIN_REW3`: "After {catname} rips off the coffin lid, an angry zombie stumbles out!"
- `EVENT_COFFIN_REW4`: "{catname} leaps at the old coffin and tears open the lid. <br/>  <br/> A decayed hand reaches out and grips {him} with unnatural strength..."
- `EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW`: "Examine"
- `EVENT_COFFIN_REW5`: "{catname} carefully lifts the lid of the coffin. <br/>  <br/> Amidst the skeletal remains of the coffin's owner {he} spots something useful..."
- `EVENT_COFFIN_REW6`: "Pushing the coffin's lid open, {catname} finds a decaying corpse within. {He} pulls it apart..."
- `EVENT_COFFIN_REW7`: "{catname} pries the coffin open revealing a zombie within! <br/>  <br/> {catname} takes off running to the next room and the zombie stumbles along in pursuit!"
- `EVENT_COFFIN_REW8`: "Eager to find treasure within the coffin, {catname} carelessly throws the lid open, and a monster within bites {him}!"
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"
- `EVENT_COFFIN_REW9`: "{catname} has seen enough corpses for a lifetime and doesn't need to look at another."

```
Coffin {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_COFFIN_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame coffin
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_COFFIN_QUES"

        options {
            bash {
                label "EVENT_BASH_ANSW"
                stat str

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_COFFIN_REW1"
                            get_item_from_pool bone_equipment
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_COFFIN_REW2"
                            get_item_from_pool fleshhead_items
							get_item_from_pool fleshhead_items
							get_item_from_pool bone_equipment
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_COFFIN_REW3"
                            spawn_unit_next_fight {
                                object ButtZombie
                                count 1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_COFFIN_REW4" 
                            gain_disorder Necrosis
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            examine {
                label "EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW"
                stat int

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_COFFIN_REW5"
                            get_item_from_pool bone_equipment
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_COFFIN_REW6"
                            get_item_from_pool fleshhead_items
							get_item_from_pool fleshhead_items
							get_item_from_pool bone_equipment
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_COFFIN_REW7"
                            spawn_unit_next_fight {
                                object ButtZombie
                                count 1
                            }

                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_COFFIN_REW8" 
                            gain_disorder Necrosis
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            ignore {
                label "EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave
                
                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_COFFIN_REW9"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `Clam`
**Source:** `treasure_box.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_CLAM_NAME`: "Clam"
- `EVENT_CLAM_QUES`: "{catname} comes upon a charming little clam. <br/>  <br/> It's so... beautiful! {He} feels a growing urge to lean in closer..."
- `EVENT_KISS_ANSW`: "Kiss"
- `EVENT_CLAM_REW1`: "{catname} leans in and gives the clam a kiss! <br/>  <br/> The clam pops open and kisses {him} back!"
- `EVENT_CLAM_REW2`: "{catname} gives the clam a kiss with {his} tongue. <br/>  <br/> It pops open revealing a shiny stone inside!"
- `EVENT_CLAM_REW3`: "{catname} leans in to give the clam a kiss, and when {his} nose is about to touch the clam snaps at {him}!"
- `EVENT_CLAM_REW4`: "Drawn in by the alluring clam, {catname} closes {his} eyes and moves in close to the clam... <br/>  <br/> It snaps shut on {his} face!"
- `EVENT_BASH_ANSW`: "Bash"
- `EVENT_CLAM_REW5`: "{catname} resists the temptation and smashes the little clam instead."
- `EVENT_CLAM_REW6`: "Ignoring the clam's charm, {catname} prys it open looking for treasure within..."
- `EVENT_CLAM_REW7`: "{catname} attempts to crush the clam, but it snaps at {him} instead!"
- `EVENT_CLAM_REW8`: "{catname} jumps on the small clam, trying to crush it beneath {him}, but the clam slams shut on {his} paw!"
- `EVENT_LEAVE_ANSW`: "Leave"
- `EVENT_CLAM_REW9`: "{catname} barely resists the urge to kiss the clam and runs away instead."

```
Clam {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_CLAM_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame clam
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_CLAM_QUES"

        options {
            lick {
                label "EVENT_KISS_ANSW"
                stat cha

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_CLAM_REW1"
                            permanent_stats {
                                lck 1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_CLAM_REW2" 
                            get_item Pearl
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_CLAM_REW3"
                            self_damage 3
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_CLAM_REW4"
                            get_parasite Clam
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            bash { //did not have bash implementation in sheet so I put these in.
                label "EVENT_BASH_ANSW"
                stat str

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 1
                            prompt "EVENT_CLAM_REW5"
                            permanent_stats {
                                con 1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 2
                            prompt "EVENT_CLAM_REW6"
                            get_item TinyPebble
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 3
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_CLAM_REW7"
                            self_damage 3
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_CLAM_REW8" 
                            injury str
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            ignore {
                label "EVENT_LEAVE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave
                
                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_CLAM_REW9"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `GratingInTheFloor`
**Source:** `treasure_box.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_GRATINGINTHEFLOOR_NAME`: "Grating in the Floor"
- `EVENT_GRATINGINTHEFLOOR_QUES`: "{catname} finds a metal grate. Could it lead to somewhere else?"
- `EVENT_BASH_ANSW`: "Bash"
- `EVENT_GRATINGINTHEFLOOR_REW1`: "{catname} breaks the hatch open, and sneaks inside... {catname} leads the cats through a secret entrance to the next area, giving them the element of surprise!"
- `EVENT_GRATINGINTHEFLOOR_REW2`: "{catname} throws the grate open and crawls inside..."
- `EVENT_GRATINGINTHEFLOOR_REW3`: "{catname} pushes the grate aside, but as {he} does, a swarm of rats crawl out, biting and poisoning all the cats!"
- `EVENT_GRATINGINTHEFLOOR_REW4`: "{catname} breaks the grate open, and to {his} horror, a giant fetus crawls out and attacks!"
- `EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW`: "Examine"
- `EVENT_GRATINGINTHEFLOOR_REW5`: "{catname} looks around the grate and finds a few coins wedged in the corners."
- `EVENT_GRATINGINTHEFLOOR_REW6`: "{catname} notices that the grate looks loose and pushes it open, revealing another room hidden below!"
- `EVENT_GRATINGINTHEFLOOR_REW7`: "{catname} looks around the grate but doesn't suss out anything interesting."
- `EVENT_GRATINGINTHEFLOOR_REW8`: "{catname} approaches the grate and looks down beneath metal bars. {catname} thinks {he} can see something moving down there... <br/>  <br/> The grate bursts open and bunch of rats attack!"
- `EVENT_LEAVE_ANSW`: "Leave"
- `EVENT_GRATINGINTHEFLOOR_REW9`: "{catname} steps carefully around the grate and on to the next area."

```
GratingInTheFloor {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_GRATINGINTHEFLOOR_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame grating_in_the_floor
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_GRATINGINTHEFLOOR_QUES"

        options {
            bash {
                label "EVENT_BASH_ANSW"
                stat str

                good {
                    set_frame 2
                    reward {
                        common {
                            prompt "EVENT_GRATINGINTHEFLOOR_REW1"
                            ally_ambush_next_fights 1
                        }
                        rare {
                            prompt "EVENT_GRATINGINTHEFLOOR_REW2"
                            next_event_bonus 2
                            event_now_same_cat random
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 3
                            prompt "EVENT_GRATINGINTHEFLOOR_REW3"
                            party_status_next_fight {
                                Poison 2
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 4
                            prompt "EVENT_GRATINGINTHEFLOOR_REW4"
                            spawn_unit_next_fight {
                                object FastFetus
                                count 1
                                spawn_side cats
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            examine {
                label "EVENT_EXAMINE_ANSW"
                stat int
                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 1
                            prompt "EVENT_GRATINGINTHEFLOOR_REW5"
                            gain_coins [2 4]
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 2
                            prompt "EVENT_GRATINGINTHEFLOOR_REW6"
                            next_event_bonus 2
                            event_now_same_cat random
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 1
                            prompt "EVENT_GRATINGINTHEFLOOR_REW7"
                            //nothing
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 3
                            prompt "EVENT_GRATINGINTHEFLOOR_REW8" 
                            spawn_unit_next_fight {
                                object FastRat
                                count 2
                                spawn_side cats
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            ignore {
                label "EVENT_LEAVE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave
                
                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_GRATINGINTHEFLOOR_REW9"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `BrokenTV`
**Source:** `treasure_box.gon`  

**Localization Strings:**
- `EVENT_BROKENTV_NAME`: "BrokenTV"
- `EVENT_BROKENTV_QUES`: "{catname} finds an old television set. <br/>  <br/> Although it has seen better days, the ancient device might still be functional. <br/>  <br/> A faint humming sound emanates from within..."
- `EVENT_SMASH_ANSW`: "Smash"
- `EVENT_BROKENTV_REW1`: "{catname} punches the screen, smashing the fragile glass. <br/>  <br/> {He} winces as the glass scratches {him}, but manages to pull out a sharp chunk of the display."
- `EVENT_BROKENTV_REW2`: "{catname} tears apart the old device, sending glass and wires flying everywhere! <br/>  <br/> {He} looks through the debris for anything useful."
- `EVENT_BROKENTV_REW3`: "The glass display shatters when {catname} hits it, sending glass flying! <br/>  <br/> Blood dripping from {his} arm, {catname} limps away."
- `EVENT_BROKENTV_REW4`: "As {catname}'s paw flies through the fragile glass display, electricity arcs through {him}, sending sparks flying and burning {his} fur!"
- `EVENT_TURNONTV_ANSW`: "Turn on TV"
- `EVENT_BROKENTV_REW5`: "{catname} watches transfixed as the old screen comes alive with hilarious animated cartoons! <br/>  <br/> {catname} feels happy happy and full of joy!"
- `EVENT_BROKENTV_REW6`: "Wow! A thrilling action movie plays on the screen, gripping {catname}'s attention. <br/>  <br/> {catname} learns clever strategies for handling future encounters."
- `EVENT_BROKENTV_REW7`: "Ominous music begins playing and a spooky ghost jumps out at {catname} from within the screen!"
- `EVENT_BROKENTV_REW8`: "{catname} flips on the television and leans close to see what's on the flickering display...  <br/>  <br/> A hideous monster bursts through the screen and grabs {catname}, ripping out {his} soul!"
- `EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW`: "Ignore"
- `EVENT_BROKENTV_REW9`: "Annoyed by the constant buzzing of the television, {catname} leaves it alone."

```
BrokenTV {
    intro {
        title "EVENT_BROKENTV_NAME"
        cat_choice random
        subject_clip EventSubject
        subject_frame broken_tv
        event_clip NonWheelEvent
    }

    main {
        prompt "EVENT_BROKENTV_QUES"

        options {
            smash {
                label "EVENT_SMASH_ANSW"
                stat str

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 6
                            prompt "EVENT_BROKENTV_REW1"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Bleed 1
                            }
                            get_item GlassShard
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 7
                            prompt "EVENT_BROKENTV_REW2"
                            random_pool [
                                {
                                    get_item OddRemote
                                }
                                {
                                    get_item Conductor
                                }
								{
									get_item FreyedWires
								}
                            ]
                            
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 6
                            prompt "EVENT_BROKENTV_REW3"
                            self_status_next_fight {
                                Bleed 3
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 8
                            prompt "EVENT_BROKENTV_REW4" 
                            gain_disorder Charred
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            turnon {
                label "EVENT_TURNONTV_ANSW"
                stat lck

                good {
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 2
                            prompt "EVENT_BROKENTV_REW5"
                            permanent_stats {
                                cha 1
                            }
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 3
                            prompt "EVENT_BROKENTV_REW6"
                            level_up self
                        }
                    }
                }
                bad {
                    set_frame 5
                    reward {
                        common {
                            set_frame 4
                            prompt "EVENT_BROKENTV_REW7"
                            spawn_unit_next_fight {
                                object Spookie
                            }
                            
                        }
                        rare {
                            set_frame 5
                            prompt "EVENT_BROKENTV_REW8" 
                            gain_disorder Soulless
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            ignore {
                label "EVENT_IGNORE_ANSW"
                stat none
                animation choice_leave
                
                good {
                    prompt "EVENT_BROKENTV_REW9"
                    play_animation [resultLeave 0]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```
